papers.title: Lifting Embodied World Models for Planning and Control
papers.abstract: World models of embodied agents predict future observations conditioned on an action taken by the agent. For complex embodiments, action spaces are high-dimensional and difficult to specify: for example, precisely controlling a human agent requires specifying the motion of each joint. This makes the world model hard to control and expensive to plan with as search-based methods like CEM scale poorly with action dimensionality. To address this issue, we train a lightweight policy that maps high-level actions to sequences of low-level joint actions. Composing this policy with the frozen world model produces a lifted world model that predicts a sequence of future observations from a single high-level action. We instantiate this framework for a human-like embodiment, defining the high-level action space as a small set of 2D waypoints annotated on the current observation frame, each specifying a near-term goal position for a leaf joint (pelvis, head, hands). Waypoints are low-dimensional, visually interpretable, and easy to specify manually or to search over. We show that the lifted world model substantially outperforms searching directly in low-level joint space ($3.8\times$ lower mean joint error to the goal pose), while remaining more compute-efficient and generalizing to environments unseen by the policy.

analysis.tldr: 通过轻量级策略将高维关节动作提升为低维路点，实现高效的世界模型规划与控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能体的动作空间高维且难以指定，导致世界模型难以控制和规划，基于搜索的方法（如CEM）随动作维度扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何降低高维动作空间带来的规划复杂性和计算开销，使世界模型能够高效用于控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练一个轻量级策略，将高层动作（如2D路点）映射为低层关节动作序列，并与冻结的世界模型组合形成提升世界模型，从单个高层动作预测未来观测序列。
contributions: 提出提升世界模型框架，通过轻量级策略将高维动作空间压缩为低维可解释的高层动作空间。
在类人具身体上验证，高层动作定义为当前观测帧上的2D路点，显著降低规划复杂度并提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 在类人具身体上实验，提升世界模型相比直接在低层关节空间搜索，平均关节误差降低3.8倍，且计算效率更高，能泛化到策略未见过的环境。
limitations: 高层动作空间设计依赖具体任务（如2D路点），可能不适用于所有具身体。
轻量级策略的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过轻量级策略将高维关节动作提升为低维路点，实现高效的世界模型规划与控制。

papers.title: Evergreen: Efficient Claim Verification for Semantic Aggregates
papers.abstract: With recent semantic query processing engines, semantic aggregation has become a primitive operator, enabling the reduction of a relation into a natural language aggregate using an LLM. However, the resulting semantic aggregate may contain claims that are not grounded in the underlying relation. Verifying such claims is challenging: they often involve quantifiers, groupings, and comparisons over relations that far exceed LLM context windows and require a costly combination of semantic and symbolic processing. We present Evergreen, a system that recasts claim verification as a semantic query processing task with tailored optimizations and provenance capture. Evergreen compiles each claim into a declarative semantic verification query and executes it on the same engine that produced the aggregate. To reduce cost and latency, Evergreen avoids unnecessary LLM calls through verification-aware optimizations (early stopping, relevance sorting, and estimation with confidence sequences) and general-purpose optimizations for semantic queries (operator fusion, similarity filtering, and prompt caching). Each verdict is accompanied by citations that identify a minimal set of tuples justifying the result, with semantics based on semiring provenance for first-order logic. On a benchmark of real-world restaurant review datasets reflecting production-inspired workloads, Evergreen achieves excellent verification quality (F1 = 1.00) with a strong LLM while reducing cost by 3.2x and latency by 4.0x compared to unoptimized verification. Even with a significantly weaker LLM, Evergreen outperforms a strong LLM-as-a-judge baseline in F1 at 48x lower cost and 2.3x lower latency. Relative to a retrieval-augmented agent, Evergreen compares favorably in F1 and latency with similar cost when both use a strong LLM; yet, with a much weaker LLM, it achieves the same F1 at 63x lower cost and 4.2x lower latency.

analysis.tldr: Evergreen 将语义聚合中的声明验证转化为语义查询处理任务，通过优化和溯源实现高效验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 语义聚合可能产生不基于底层关系的声明，验证这些声明因涉及量化、分组和比较而超出 LLM 上下文窗口，现有方法成本高且延迟大。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且低成本地验证语义聚合结果中的声明，并确保结果可溯源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将声明编译为声明式语义验证查询，在相同引擎上执行；采用验证感知优化（早停、相关性排序、置信序列估计）和通用语义查询优化（算子融合、相似性过滤、提示缓存）；基于半环溯源提供最小证明元组。
contributions: 提出将声明验证转化为语义查询处理任务的新范式
设计验证感知和通用优化策略，显著降低成本和延迟
引入基于半环溯源的引用机制，提供最小证明元组
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界餐厅评论数据集上，使用强 LLM 时 F1=1.00，成本降低 3.2 倍，延迟降低 4.0 倍；使用弱 LLM 时 F1 优于强 LLM-as-a-judge 基线，成本降低 48 倍，延迟降低 2.3 倍；与检索增强 agent 相比，弱 LLM 下成本降低 63 倍，延迟降低 4.2 倍。
limitations: 可能依赖特定语义查询引擎
优化策略的有效性可能随数据分布变化
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Evergreen 将语义聚合中的声明验证转化为语义查询处理任务，通过优化和溯源实现高效验证。

papers.title: Why Domain Matters: A Preliminary Study of Domain Effects in Underwater Object Detection
papers.abstract: Domain shift, where deviations between training and deployment data distributions degrade model performance, is a key challenge in underwater environments. Existing benchmarks testing performance for underwater domain shift simulate variability through synthetic style transfer. This fails to capture intrinsic scene factors such as visibility, illumination, scene composition, or acquisition factors, limiting analysis of real-world effects. We propose a labeling framework that defines underwater domains using measurable image, scene, and acquisition characteristics. Unlike prior benchmarks, it captures physically meaningful factors, enabling semantically consistent image grouping and supporting domain-specific evaluation of detection performance including failure analysis. We validate this on public datasets, showing systematic variations across domain factors and revealing hidden failure modes.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于可测量图像、场景和采集特征的水下域定义框架，揭示域因素对目标检测性能的系统性影响和隐藏失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下环境中的域偏移严重影响目标检测性能，现有基准通过合成风格迁移模拟域偏移，无法捕捉真实场景中的内在因素（如能见度、光照、场景构成等），限制了实际效果分析。
analysis.problem: 如何定义和量化水下环境中的真实域因素，并评估它们对目标检测性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出域因素会导致检测性能的系统性变化和隐藏失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出一个标签框架，利用可测量的图像、场景和采集特征定义水下域，实现语义一致的图像分组，并支持域特定的检测性能评估和失败分析。
contributions: 提出基于物理可测量因素的水下域定义框架，替代合成风格迁移方法。
在公开数据集上验证了域因素对检测性能的系统性影响，并揭示了隐藏的失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于水下场景，泛化性未知。
标签框架的构建可能依赖人工标注或特定传感器数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于可测量图像、场景和采集特征的水下域定义框架，揭示域因素对目标检测性能的系统性影响和隐藏失败模式。

papers.title: Entropy Centroids as Intrinsic Rewards for Test-Time Scaling
papers.abstract: An effective way to scale up test-time compute of large language models is to sample multiple responses and then select the best one, as in Grok Heavy and Gemini Deep Think. Existing selection methods often rely on external reward models, which requires training a strong reward model and introduces additional computation overhead. As an alternative, previous approaches have explored intrinsic signals, such as confidence and entropy, but these signals are noisy with naive aggregation. In this work, we observe that high-entropy tokens tend to cluster into consecutive groups during inference, providing a more stable notion of model uncertainty than individual tokens. Together, these clusters reveal temporal patterns of model uncertainty throughout the inference process. Motivated by this observation, we propose to use the temporal structure of uncertainty as an intrinsic reward. To this end, we first formalize the basic unit of segment-level uncertainty as the High Entropy Phase (HEP), a variable-length segment that begins at a high-entropy token and ends when consecutive low-entropy tokens appear. We then define the Entropy Centroid, inspired by the concept of the center of mass in physics, as the weighted average position of all HEPs along the trajectory. Intuitively, a lower centroid indicates early exploration followed by confident generation, which we find often corresponds to higher response quality. Based on this insight, we propose the Lowest Centroid method, which selects the response with the lowest entropy centroid among multiple candidates. Experiments on mathematics, code generation, logical reasoning, and agentic tasks, across model scales ranging from 14B to 480B, show that Lowest Centroid consistently outperforms existing baselines and delivers stable gains as model size increases. Code is available at https://github.com/hkust-nlp/entropy-centroid.

analysis.tldr: 提出熵质心作为内在奖励，用于测试时扩展中无需外部奖励模型的选择方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法依赖外部奖励模型，训练成本高且引入额外计算开销；而基于置信度或熵的内在信号因简单聚合而噪声大。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型内在的不确定性信号，在无需外部奖励模型的情况下，从多个采样响应中选出最优答案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到高熵令牌在推理过程中倾向于聚集成连续组，形成更稳定的模型不确定性表示，揭示时间模式。
analysis.method: 定义高熵阶段（HEP）作为段级不确定性单元，并借鉴物理质心概念定义熵质心，选择熵质心最低的响应。
contributions: 发现高熵令牌在推理中聚集成连续组，提出段级不确定性单元HEP。
提出熵质心作为内在奖励，并设计最低质心选择方法，无需外部奖励模型。
analysis.experiments: 在数学、代码生成、逻辑推理和智能体任务上，使用14B到480B规模模型进行实验，最低质心方法持续优于现有基线，且随模型规模增大稳定提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于自回归生成任务，其他任务需验证。
熵质心计算依赖令牌级熵，对熵估计的准确性敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出熵质心作为内在奖励，用于测试时扩展中无需外部奖励模型的选择方法。

papers.title: Co-Learning Port-Hamiltonian Systems and Optimal Energy-Shaping Control
papers.abstract: We develop a physics-informed learning framework for energy-shaping control of port-Hamiltonian (pH) systems from trajectory data. The proposed approach co-learns a pH system model and an optimal energy-balancing passivity-based controller (EB-PBC) through alternating optimization with policy-aware data collection. At each iteration, the system model is refined using trajectory data collected under the current control policy, and the controller is re-optimized on the updated model. Both components are parameterized by neural networks that embed the pH dynamics and EB-PBC structure, ensuring interpretability in terms of energy interactions. The learned controller renders the closed-loop system inherently passive and provably stable, and exploits passive plant dynamics without canceling the natural potential. A dissipation regularization enforces strict energy decay during training, thereby enhancing robustness to sim-to-real gaps. The proposed framework is validated on state-regulation and swing-up tasks for planar and torsional pendulum systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理信息学习框架，从轨迹数据中协同学习端口-哈密顿系统模型与最优能量整形控制器。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统能量整形控制依赖精确的物理模型，但实际系统中模型未知或难以获取，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从轨迹数据中同时学习端口-哈密顿系统模型和最优能量整形控制器，并保证闭环系统的稳定性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过交替优化和策略感知数据收集，协同学习参数化为神经网络的pH系统模型和EB-PBC控制器，嵌入pH动力学和EB-PBC结构，并引入耗散正则化强制能量衰减。
contributions: 提出协同学习框架，同时学习pH系统模型和最优能量整形控制器。
通过嵌入物理结构保证模型和控制器可解释性，并利用耗散正则化增强鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在平面和扭转摆系统的状态调节和摆动任务上验证。
limitations: 可能仅适用于低维系统，高维系统扩展性未知。
依赖策略感知数据收集，初始策略可能影响收敛。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种物理信息学习框架，从轨迹数据中协同学习端口-哈密顿系统模型与最优能量整形控制器。

papers.title: Test-Time Safety Alignment
papers.abstract: Recent work has shown that a model's input word embeddings can serve as effective control variables for steering its behavior toward outputs that satisfy desired properties. However, this has only been demonstrated for pretrained text-completion models on the relatively simple objective of reducing surface-level profanity in short continuations. A natural and practically important question is how well input embeddings can control aligned models, which produce an imbalanced bimodal refuse-or-comply output distribution rather than the smooth distribution characteristic of open-ended generation. We explore this in the context of safety, showing that input word embeddings can be optimized in a sub-lexical manner to minimize the semantic harmfulness of aligned model responses. Our approach uses zeroth-order gradient estimation of a black-box text-moderation API with respect to the input embeddings, and then applies gradient descent on these embeddings to minimize the harmfulness of the generated text. Experiments show that the proposed method can neutralize every safety-flagged response on standard safety benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过优化输入词嵌入实现对齐模型的安全对齐，无需修改模型参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法仅对预训练文本补全模型有效，且仅能减少表面粗俗语言，无法处理对齐模型产生的拒绝-服从双峰输出分布。
analysis.problem: 如何在对齐模型（具有拒绝-服从双峰输出分布）中，通过优化输入词嵌入来最小化生成文本的语义危害性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对齐模型产生不平衡的双峰输出分布（拒绝或服从），而非开放生成的平滑分布，使得传统嵌入控制方法失效。
analysis.method: 使用零阶梯度估计黑盒文本审核API对输入嵌入的梯度，然后对嵌入进行梯度下降以最小化生成文本的危害性。
contributions: 首次将输入嵌入控制扩展到对齐模型的安全对齐任务
提出子词级别的嵌入优化方法，结合零阶梯度估计和黑盒API
analysis.experiments: 在标准安全基准上，该方法能够中和所有被安全标记的响应。
limitations: 依赖黑盒文本审核API的可用性和准确性
可能仅适用于特定类型的危害性检测
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过优化输入词嵌入实现对齐模型的安全对齐，无需修改模型参数。

papers.title: Structural Generalization on SLOG without Hand-Written Rules
papers.abstract: Structural generalization in semantic parsing requires systems to apply learned compositional rules to novel structural combinations. Existing approaches either rely on hand-written algebraic rules (AM-Parser) or fail to generalize structurally (Transformer-based models). We present an alternative requiring no hand-written compositional rules, based on a neural cellular automaton (NCA) with a discrete bottleneck: all compositional rules are learned from data through local iteration. On the SLOG benchmark, the system achieves an overall accuracy of $67.3 \pm 0.2\%$ across 10 seeds (AM-Parser: $70.8 \pm 4.3\%$), with 11 of 17 structural generalization categories at $100\%$ type-exact match, including three where AM-Parser scores $0$--$74\%$. Analysis reveals that all 5,539 failure instances reduce to exactly two mechanisms: novel combinations of wh-extraction context with reduced verb types, and modifiers appearing on the subject side of verbs. When we decompose results by CCG structural features, each sub-pattern either succeeds on all instances or fails on all. Intermediate scores (e.g., $41.4\%$) are mixtures of structurally distinct CCG patterns, not partial generalization. These results suggest that CCG directed types provide higher resolution than SLOG's phenomenon-level categories for characterizing structural generalization, and that the success/failure boundary is determined by the coverage of directed operations in the training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的语义解析方法，无需手工规则即可在SLOG基准上实现结构泛化，并揭示了泛化失败的根本机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义解析方法要么依赖手工编写的代数规则（如AM-Parser），要么在结构泛化上表现不佳（如Transformer模型），亟需一种无需手工规则且能有效泛化的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用手工编写规则的情况下，让语义解析系统在未见过的结构组合上实现结构泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有5,539个失败实例可归结为两种机制：wh-提取语境与简化动词类型的新组合，以及动词主语侧的修饰语。CCG有向类型比SLOG的现象级类别能更精细地刻画结构泛化，成功/失败边界由训练数据中有向操作的覆盖范围决定。
analysis.method: 基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的离散瓶颈架构，所有组合规则通过局部迭代从数据中学习，无需手工规则。
contributions: 提出一种无需手工规则的NCA方法，在SLOG基准上达到67.3%的准确率，接近AM-Parser的70.8%。
系统性地分析了所有失败实例，发现仅由两种机制导致，并揭示了CCG有向类型在结构泛化中的更高分辨率。
analysis.experiments: 在SLOG基准上进行了10个种子的实验，总体准确率67.3±0.2%，并与AM-Parser（70.8±4.3%）对比。17个泛化类别中有11个达到100%类型精确匹配，包括AM-Parser得分为0-74%的三个类别。
limitations: 总体准确率仍略低于AM-Parser，且存在两种已知的失败机制。
方法依赖于CCG有向类型的覆盖范围，可能在其他语义表示上需要调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于神经细胞自动机（NCA）的语义解析方法，无需手工规则即可在SLOG基准上实现结构泛化，并揭示了泛化失败的根本机制。

papers.title: People-Centred Medical Image Analysis
papers.abstract: Recent advances in data-centric medical AI have produced highly accurate diagnostic systems, but the emphasis on data curation and performance metrics has not translated into widespread clinical adoption. We conjecture that this limited uptake stems from insufficient attention dedicated to the optimisation of fair performance across diverse patient populations and to workflow integration: performance biases can create regulatory barriers, and poorly integrated automation can disrupt clinical routines, degrade the quality of human-AI collaboration, and reduce clinicians' willingness to adopt AI tools. Prior work on workflow integration (e.g., Learning to Defer (L2D) and Learning to Complement (L2C)) and AI fairness has typically examined these challenges in isolation, overlooking their natural interdependence and the practical constraints of clinical environments, such as restricted clinician availability. We propose People-Centred Medical Image Analysis (PecMan), a human-AI framework that jointly optimises fairness, diagnostic accuracy, and workflow effectiveness through a dynamic gating mechanism that assigns cases to AI, clinicians, or both under clinician workload constraints. We also introduce the Fairness and Human-Centred AI (FairHAI) benchmark for evaluating trade-offs between accuracy, fairness, and clinician workload. Experiments using this benchmark show that PecMan consistently outperforms existing methods, paving the way for more trustworthy and clinically viable AI systems. Code will be available upon paper acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出PecMan框架，联合优化医学影像分析中的公平性、准确性和工作流效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动的医学AI虽诊断准确，但因忽视跨人群公平性和工作流整合而难以临床落地。
analysis.problem: 如何同时优化医学影像AI的公平性、诊断准确性和临床工作流效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，公平性和工作流整合（如L2D、L2C）通常被孤立研究，忽略了它们的相互依赖性和临床实际约束（如医生可用性有限）。
analysis.method: 提出People-Centred Medical Image Analysis (PecMan)框架，通过动态门控机制在医生工作量约束下将病例分配给AI、医生或两者共同处理，联合优化公平性、准确性和工作流效果。
contributions: 提出PecMan框架，首次联合优化医学影像分析中的公平性、准确性和工作流效率。
引入FairHAI基准，用于评估准确性、公平性和医生工作量之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 使用FairHAI基准进行实验，PecMan持续优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定医学影像模态上验证，泛化性未知。
动态门控机制的计算开销和实时性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PecMan框架，联合优化医学影像分析中的公平性、准确性和工作流效率。

papers.title: A Data-Centric Framework for Intraoperative Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging for Glioma Surgical Guidance
papers.abstract: Accurate intraoperative assessment of glioma infiltration is essential for maximizing tumor resection while preserving functional brain tissue. Fluorescence lifetime imaging (FLIm) offers real-time, label-free biochemical contrast, but its clinical utility is challenged by biological heterogeneity, class imbalance, and variability in histopathological labeling. We present a data-centric AI (DC-AI) framework that integrates confident learning (CL), class refinement, and targeted label evaluation to develop a robust multi-class FLIm classifier for glioblastoma (GBM) resection margins. FLIm data were collected from 192 tissue margins across 31 newly diagnosed IDH-wildtype GBM patients and initially labeled into seven tumor cellularity classes by an expert neuropathologist. CL was applied to quantify FLIm point-level confidence, identify label inconsistencies, and guide iterative class merging into a three-class scheme ("low", "moderate", "high"). The resulting high-fidelity dataset enabled training a model that achieved 96% accuracy in the three-class task. SHAP analysis revealed class-specific FLIm feature importance, highlighting distinct optical signatures across the infiltration spectrum. Targeted FLIm analysis further identified biological (e.g., gray matter composition) and acquisition-related (e.g., blood contamination) contributors to low-confidence predictions. Blinded re-evaluation of margins flagged by CL demonstrated intra-pathologist variability, underscoring the value of selective relabeling rather than exhaustive review. Together, these findings demonstrate that a DC-AI framework can systematically improve data reliability, enhance model robustness, and refine biological interpretation of FLIm signals, supporting the development of clinically actionable optical tools for real-time glioma margin assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据为中心的AI框架，通过置信学习提升荧光寿命成像在胶质瘤手术中的分类准确率至96%。
analysis.research_motivation: 术中准确评估胶质瘤浸润程度对最大化切除肿瘤同时保留功能脑组织至关重要，但荧光寿命成像（FLIm）受生物异质性、类别不平衡和组织病理标记变异性影响，临床实用性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何构建鲁棒的多类FLIm分类器，克服标签噪声和类别不平衡，实现胶质母细胞瘤切除边缘的实时、准确分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但提到通过置信学习发现标签不一致、病理学家自身判读变异，以及低置信预测受灰质成分和血液污染等因素影响。
analysis.method: 数据为中心的AI框架：结合置信学习（CL）量化点级置信度、识别标签不一致，指导迭代类别合并（从7类合并为3类），并针对低置信样本进行目标标签评估和选择性重新标注。
contributions: 提出数据为中心的AI框架，系统提升FLIm数据可靠性并增强模型鲁棒性。
通过置信学习实现类别合并，在3类任务上达到96%准确率。
SHAP分析揭示不同浸润程度的光学特征重要性，并识别影响预测置信度的生物和采集因素。
analysis.experiments: 从31例新诊断IDH野生型GBM患者的192个组织边缘采集FLIm数据，由专家神经病理学家初始标注为7类肿瘤细胞丰度，经CL合并为3类后训练模型，达到96%准确率。
limitations: 仅针对IDH野生型GBM，可能不适用于其他胶质瘤亚型。
样本量较小（31例患者），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据为中心的AI框架，通过置信学习提升荧光寿命成像在胶质瘤手术中的分类准确率至96%。

papers.title: Ceci n'est pas une explication: Evaluating Explanation Failures as Explainability Pitfalls in Language Learning Systems
papers.abstract: AI-powered language learning tools increasingly provide instant, personalised feedback to millions of learners worldwide. However, this feedback can fail in ways that are difficult for learners--and even teachers--to detect, potentially reinforcing misconceptions and eroding learning outcomes over extended use. We present a portion of L2-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating AI systems in language education that includes (but is not limited to) six critical dimensions of effective feedback: diagnostic accuracy, awareness of appropriacy, causes of error, prioritisation, guidance for improvement, and supporting self-regulation. We analyse how AI systems can fail with respect to these dimensions. These failures, which we argue are conducive to "explainability pitfalls," are AI-generated explanations that appear helpful on the surface but are fundamentally flawed, increasing the risk of attainment, human-AI interaction, and socioaffective harms. We discuss how the specific context of language learning amplifies these risks and outline open questions we believe merit more attention when designing evaluation frameworks specifically. Our analysis aims to expand the community's understanding of both the typology of explainability pitfalls and the contextual dynamics in which they may occur in order to encourage AI developers to better design safe, trustworthy, and effective AI explanations.

analysis.tldr: 提出L2-Bench基准，系统分析AI语言学习反馈中的解释失败模式，将其定义为可解释性陷阱。
analysis.research_motivation: AI语言学习工具广泛使用，但反馈失败难以被用户察觉，可能强化错误观念并损害学习效果，现有评估缺乏对解释质量的多维考量。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和分类AI语言学习反馈中的解释失败，以识别可解释性陷阱并降低其风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成的解释表面看似有用但本质有缺陷，导致学习效果、人机交互和社会情感方面的危害，语言学习场景放大了这些风险。
analysis.method: 构建L2-Bench基准，包含诊断准确性、适当性意识、错误原因、优先级、改进指导和自我调节支持六个关键维度，用于评估AI系统反馈并分析失败模式。
contributions: 提出L2-Bench基准，覆盖语言教育中有效反馈的六个关键维度
定义并分类可解释性陷阱，分析其在语言学习中的特定风险
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有语言学习场景
未提供实证验证或量化评估结果
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出L2-Bench基准，系统分析AI语言学习反馈中的解释失败模式，将其定义为可解释性陷阱。

papers.title: ImproBR: Bug Report Improver Using LLMs
papers.abstract: Bug tracking systems play a crucial role in software maintenance, yet developers frequently struggle with low-quality user-submitted reports that omit essential details such as Steps to Reproduce (S2R), Observed Behavior (OB), and Expected Behavior (EB). We propose ImproBR, an LLM-based pipeline that automatically detects and improves bug reports by addressing missing, incomplete, and ambiguous S2R, OB, and EB sections. ImproBR employs a hybrid detector combining fine-tuned DistilBERT, heuristic analysis, and an LLM analyzer, guided by GPT-4o mini with section-specific few-shot prompts and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline grounded in Minecraft Wiki domain knowledge. Evaluated on Mojira, ImproBR improved structural completeness from 7.9% to 96.4%, more than doubled the proportion of executable S2R from 28.8% to 67.6%, and raised fully reproducible bug reports from 1 to 13 across 139 challenging real-world reports.

analysis.tldr: ImproBR 利用 LLM 自动检测并改进软件缺陷报告，显著提升结构完整性和可复现性。
analysis.research_motivation: 缺陷跟踪系统中用户提交的低质量报告常缺失关键信息（如复现步骤、观察行为、期望行为），导致开发者难以复现和修复，影响软件维护效率。
analysis.problem: 如何自动检测并改进缺陷报告中缺失、不完整或模糊的 S2R、OB 和 EB 部分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ImproBR 流水线，包含混合检测器（微调 DistilBERT、启发式分析、LLM 分析器），结合 GPT-4o mini 的少样本提示和基于 Minecraft Wiki 领域知识的 RAG 管道，自动检测并改进缺陷报告。
contributions: 提出一种基于 LLM 的缺陷报告改进流水线 ImproBR。
在 Mojira 数据集上验证了方法有效性，结构完整性从 7.9% 提升至 96.4%，可执行 S2R 比例从 28.8% 提升至 67.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在 Mojira 数据集上评估，使用 139 个真实世界缺陷报告，结构完整性从 7.9% 提升至 96.4%，可执行 S2R 比例从 28.8% 提升至 67.6%，完全可复现报告从 1 个增至 13 个。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域知识（如 Minecraft Wiki），泛化性需验证。
未讨论改进后报告的实际开发者接受度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ImproBR 利用 LLM 自动检测并改进软件缺陷报告，显著提升结构完整性和可复现性。

papers.title: MixerCA: An Efficient and Accurate Model for High-Performance Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.abstract: Over the past decade, hyperspectral image (HSI) classification has drawn considerable interest due to HSIs' ability to effectively distinguish terrestrial objects by capturing detailed, continuous spectral information. The strong performance of recent deep learning techniques in tasks like image classification and semantic segmentation has led to their growing use in HSI classification, due to their ability to capture complex spatial and spectral features more effectively than traditional methods. This paper presents MixerCA, a novel lightweight model for HSI classification that leverages depthwise convolution and a self-attention mechanism. MixerCA integrates depth-wise convolutions, token and channel mixing, and coordinate attention into a unified structure to decouple spatial and channel interactions, maintain consistent resolution throughout the network, and directly process HSI patches. Extensive experiments on four hyperspectral benchmark datasets reveal MixerCA's clear advantages over several competing algorithms, including 2D-CNN, 3D-CNN, Tri-CNN, HybridSN, ViT, and Swin Transformer. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerCA.

analysis.tldr: MixerCA 是一种轻量级高光谱图像分类模型，结合深度可分离卷积和自注意力机制，在四个基准数据集上优于多种 CNN 和 Transformer 方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像分类在遥感等领域有重要应用，但传统方法难以有效捕获复杂的空间-光谱特征，而现有深度学习方法往往计算量大或精度不足。
analysis.problem: 设计一种轻量级且高精度的模型，用于高光谱图像分类，以同时捕获空间和光谱特征并保持计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MixerCA 模型结合深度可分离卷积、token 和通道混合以及坐标注意力，通过解耦空间和通道交互、保持网络分辨率一致并直接处理 HSI 块来实现高效分类。
contributions: 提出 MixerCA 轻量级模型，集成深度可分离卷积、自注意力和坐标注意力，实现高效高光谱图像分类。
在四个高光谱基准数据集上验证了 MixerCA 优于 2D-CNN、3D-CNN、Tri-CNN、HybridSN、ViT 和 Swin Transformer 等算法。
analysis.experiments: 在四个高光谱基准数据集上进行实验，与多种 CNN 和 Transformer 方法比较，MixerCA 表现出明显优势。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定高光谱数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
轻量级设计可能在大规模或极高分辨率场景下性能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MixerCA 是一种轻量级高光谱图像分类模型，结合深度可分离卷积和自注意力机制，在四个基准数据集上优于多种 CNN 和 Transformer 方法。

papers.title: reward-lens: A Mechanistic Interpretability Library for Reward Models
papers.abstract: Every RLHF-trained language model is shaped by a reward model, yet the mechanistic interpretability toolkit -- logit lens, direct logit attribution, activation patching, sparse autoencoders -- was built for generative LLMs whose primitives all project onto a vocabulary unembedding. Reward models replace that with a scalar regression head, breaking each tool. We present reward-lens, an open-source library that ports this toolkit to reward models, organised around one observation: the reward head's weight vector $w_r$ is the natural axis for every interpretability question. The library provides a Reward Lens, component attribution, three-mode activation patching, a reward-hacking probe suite, TopK SAE feature attribution, cross-model comparison, and five theory-grounded extensions (distortion index, divergence-aware patching, misalignment cascade detection, reward-term conflict analysis, concept-vector analysis). A ten-method adapter protocol covers Llama, Mistral, Gemma-2, and ArmoRM multi-objective heads, with a generic adapter for any HuggingFace sequence classification model. We validate on two production reward models across ~695 RewardBench pairs. The central empirical finding is negative: linear attribution does not predict causal patching effects (mean Spearman $ρ= -0.256$ on Skywork, $-0.027$ on ArmoRM). The framework treats this disagreement as a property to expose, not a bug -- motivating a design that keeps observational and causal views first-class and directly comparable.

analysis.tldr: 为奖励模型构建机制可解释性工具库，发现线性归因无法预测因果补丁效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机制可解释性工具（如logit lens、激活补丁）专为生成式LLM设计，依赖词汇表反嵌入，而奖励模型使用标量回归头，导致这些工具失效。
analysis.problem: 如何将机制可解释性工具适配到奖励模型，并揭示其内部工作机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性归因与因果补丁效应之间呈负相关（Skywork上平均Spearman ρ=-0.256，ArmoRM上-0.027），表明观测视角与因果视角存在根本性分歧。
analysis.method: 提出reward-lens库，以奖励头权重向量为轴心，提供奖励透镜、组件归因、三模式激活补丁、奖励黑客探针套件、TopK SAE特征归因、跨模型比较及五个理论扩展模块，并设计十方法适配器协议。
contributions: 首个面向奖励模型的机制可解释性开源库，移植了生成式LLM的核心工具。
通过大规模实验揭示线性归因与因果补丁效应之间的负相关关系，强调观测与因果视角的差异。
analysis.experiments: 在两个生产级奖励模型上使用约695个RewardBench样本进行验证。
limitations: 线性归因与因果补丁的负相关可能限制基于归因的解释可靠性。
当前验证仅覆盖两个模型，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 为奖励模型构建机制可解释性工具库，发现线性归因无法预测因果补丁效应。

papers.title: Robustness of Transformer-Based Fluence Map Prediction Under Clinically Realistic Perturbations
papers.abstract: Learning-based fluence map prediction offers a fast alternative to iterative inverse planning in intensity-modulated radiation therapy (IMRT), but its robustness under realistic distribution shifts remains unclear. We study a two-stage transformer pipeline that maps anatomy (CT and contours) to dose and then to beamlet fluence maps. We compare fluence-stage transformer backbones with hierarchical, global, and hybrid attention, trained with a physics-informed loss enforcing energy consistency. Robustness is evaluated under geometric perturbations, radiometric noise, reduced training data, and domain shifts using a prostate IMRT dataset, with additional evaluation of the dose stage on public datasets. Results show smooth degradation under moderate perturbations but sharp failures under severe rotations and noise. Hierarchical transformers (e.g., SwinUNETR) exhibit slower growth in upper-quartile energy error, indicating improved robustness. We further show that SSIM alone fails to capture clinically relevant errors, highlighting the need for physics-informed evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 基于Transformer的IMRT通量图预测在临床扰动下表现平滑退化，但严重旋转和噪声下会失效，且SSIM不足以评估临床相关误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 学习型通量图预测为IMRT提供快速替代方案，但其在临床实际分布偏移下的鲁棒性尚不明确，现有评估方法可能忽略关键误差。
analysis.problem: 评估基于Transformer的通量图预测模型在几何扰动、辐射噪声、数据减少和域偏移等临床扰动下的鲁棒性，并揭示现有评估指标的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在中等扰动下性能平滑退化，但在严重旋转和噪声下出现急剧失败；层次化Transformer（如SwinUNETR）在上四分位能量误差上增长更慢，表现出更好的鲁棒性；SSIM无法捕捉临床相关误差。
analysis.method: 采用两阶段Transformer流水线（解剖→剂量→通量图），比较层次、全局和混合注意力骨干，使用物理信息损失函数强制能量一致性。
contributions: 系统评估了基于Transformer的通量图预测在多种临床扰动下的鲁棒性，揭示了严重扰动下的失败模式。
发现层次化Transformer（如SwinUNETR）在能量误差鲁棒性上优于全局和混合注意力模型。
指出SSIM不足以评估临床相关误差，强调物理信息评估的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 使用前列腺IMRT数据集评估几何扰动、辐射噪声、减少训练数据和域偏移，并在公共数据集上额外评估剂量阶段。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对前列腺IMRT数据集，泛化到其他部位或治疗方式需验证。
未探讨模型在更复杂扰动（如解剖变异）下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于Transformer的IMRT通量图预测在临床扰动下表现平滑退化，但严重旋转和噪声下会失效，且SSIM不足以评估临床相关误差。

papers.title: Hierarchical Multi-Persona Induction from User Behavioral Logs: Learning Evidence-Grounded and Truthful Personas
papers.abstract: Behavioral logs provide rich signals for user modeling, but are noisy and interleaved across diverse intents. Recent work uses LLMs to generate interpretable natural-language personas from user logs, yet evaluation often emphasizes downstream utility, providing limited assurance of persona quality itself. We propose a hierarchical framework that aggregates user actions into intent memories and induces multiple evidence-grounded personas by clustering and labeling these memories. We formulate persona induction as an optimization problem over persona quality-captured by cluster cohesion, persona-evidence alignment, and persona truthfulness-and train the persona model using a groupwise extension of Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Experiments on a large-scale service log and two public datasets show that our method induces more coherent, evidence-grounded, and trustworthy personas, while also improving future interaction prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化多角色归纳框架，从用户行为日志中生成有证据支撑且可信的角色画像。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户行为日志虽富含用户建模信号，但噪声大且意图交织；现有方法用LLM生成可解释的自然语言角色，但评估侧重下游效用，对角色本身质量保证不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从嘈杂、交织的用户行为日志中归纳出多个有证据支撑且可信的角色画像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出层次化框架：将用户行为聚合为意图记忆，通过聚类和标注生成多个有证据支撑的角色；将角色归纳形式化为优化问题，目标包括聚类内聚性、角色-证据对齐和角色真实性，并使用分组DPO训练角色模型。
contributions: 提出层次化多角色归纳框架，从用户日志中生成有证据支撑且可信的角色。
将角色归纳形式化为优化问题，并引入分组DPO进行训练。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模服务日志和两个公开数据集上实验，表明方法生成的角色更连贯、有证据支撑且可信，同时改进了未来交互预测。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户行为日志。
层次化框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化多角色归纳框架，从用户行为日志中生成有证据支撑且可信的角色画像。

papers.title: Sample Selection Using Multi-Task Autoencoders in Federated Learning with Non-IID Data
papers.abstract: Federated learning is a machine learning paradigm in which multiple devices collaboratively train a model under the supervision of a central server while ensuring data privacy. However, its performance is often hindered by redundant, malicious, or abnormal samples, leading to model degradation and inefficiency. To overcome these issues, we propose novel sample selection methods for image classification, employing a multitask autoencoder to estimate sample contributions through loss and feature analysis. Our approach incorporates unsupervised outlier detection, using one-class support vector machine (OCSVM), isolation forest (IF), and adaptive loss threshold (AT) methods managed by a central server to filter noisy samples on clients. We also propose a multi-class deep support vector data description (SVDD) loss controlled by a central server to enhance feature-based sample selection. We validate our methods on CIFAR10 and MNIST datasets across varying numbers of clients, non-IID distributions, and noise levels up to 40%. The results show significant accuracy improvements with loss-based sample selection, achieving gains of up to 7.02% on CIFAR10 with OCSVM and 1.83% on MNIST with AT. Additionally, our federated SVDD loss further improves feature-based sample selection, yielding accuracy gains of up to 0.99% on CIFAR10 with OCSVM. These results show the effectiveness of our methods in improving model accuracy across various client counts and noise conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于多任务自编码器的样本选择方法，通过损失和特征分析提升非IID联邦学习中的图像分类精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中，客户端数据中的冗余、恶意或异常样本会导致模型性能下降和效率降低，尤其在非IID数据分布下问题更为突出。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护数据隐私的前提下，有效过滤联邦学习中的噪声样本，提升模型在非IID数据上的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析，仅指出冗余、恶意或异常样本会阻碍联邦学习性能。
analysis.method: 提出基于多任务自编码器的样本选择方法，包括无监督异常检测（OCSVM、孤立森林、自适应损失阈值）和基于特征的多类深度SVDD损失，由中央服务器协调过滤客户端噪声样本。
contributions: 提出基于多任务自编码器的损失和特征分析样本选择方法，用于联邦学习中的图像分类。
在CIFAR10和MNIST数据集上验证了方法在不同客户端数量、非IID分布和噪声水平下的有效性，最高提升7.02%准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR10和MNIST数据集上，针对不同客户端数量、非IID分布和高达40%噪声水平进行实验，损失选择方法在CIFAR10上使用OCSVM提升7.02%，MNIST上使用AT提升1.83%；特征选择方法在CIFAR10上使用OCSVM提升0.99%。
limitations: 方法仅在图像分类任务上验证，未涉及其他模态或任务。
多任务自编码器的计算开销可能较大，未讨论效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于多任务自编码器的样本选择方法，通过损失和特征分析提升非IID联邦学习中的图像分类精度。

papers.title: A Light Weight Multi-Features-View Convolution Neural Network For Plant Disease Identification
papers.abstract: Agriculture is a key sector of the economies of developing countries. It serves as a primary source of income and employment for rural populations. However, each year, a large portion of crops is wasted because of pests and diseases. Well-timed prediction of plant diseases is crucial to sustainable, high-quality agricultural production. Detection of plant diseases through conventional methods is both labour-intensive and time-consuming. Researchers have developed image classification based automated techniques for this purpose. Most accurate methods are based on deep convolutional neural networks, which are computationally intensive, with many layers and millions of trainable parameters. In resource-constrained settings, especially in rural areas, it is difficult to deploy deep convolutional neural network models for efficient plant disease identification. To address these issues, an efficient and light-weight Multi-View Convolutional Neural Network is proposed. These additional features aid the proposed model to identify the plant diseases accurately and efficiently with less number of parameters. The proposed model is tested on a benchmark Plantvillage dataset and achieves an improvement of $ 2.9\%$ in classification accuracy compared to the baseline convolutional neural network model, which was trained only on Red, Green, and Blue (RGB) plant images. Compared with state-of-the-art deep convolutional neural network models, the proposed model is less computationally expensive and achieves comparable accuracy for plant disease identification on the PlantVillage dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量多视图CNN，在PlantVillage上以较少参数实现高精度植物病害识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 农业病害检测依赖人工，耗时费力；现有深度CNN模型计算量大，难以部署在资源受限的农村地区。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高识别精度的同时，降低模型计算复杂度和参数量，使其适用于资源受限环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出轻量多视图卷积神经网络，通过融合多种特征视图（如RGB之外的特征）提升识别效率，减少参数量。
contributions: 设计了一种轻量级多视图CNN架构，在减少参数的同时保持高精度。
在PlantVillage数据集上相比基线RGB模型提升2.9%分类准确率，且计算成本低于现有深度CNN。
analysis.experiments: 在PlantVillage数据集上测试，与基线RGB CNN和现有深度CNN对比，显示准确率提升和计算成本降低。
limitations: 仅在PlantVillage数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未提供具体参数量或计算量对比数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量多视图CNN，在PlantVillage上以较少参数实现高精度植物病害识别。

papers.title: Evaluating Strategic Reasoning in Forecasting Agents
papers.abstract: Forecasting benchmarks produce accuracy leaderboards but little insight into why some forecasters are more accurate than others. We introduce Bench to the Future 2 (BTF-2), 1,417 pastcasting questions with a frozen 15M-document research corpus in which agents reproducibly research and forecast offline, producing full reasoning traces. BTF-2 detects accuracy differences of 0.004 Brier score, and can distinguish differential agent strengths in research vs. judgment. We build a forecaster 0.011 Brier more accurate than any single frontier agent, and use it to evaluate agent strategic reasoning without hindsight bias. We find the better forecaster differs primarily in its pre-mortem analysis of its blind spots and consideration of black swans. Expert human forecasters found the dominant strategic reasoning failures of frontier agents are in assessing political and business leaders' incentives, judging their likelihood to follow through on stated plans, and modeling institutional processes.

analysis.tldr: 通过构建离线预测基准BTF-2，发现前沿AI智能体在战略推理中的主要缺陷是评估领导层激励和制度流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有预测基准仅提供准确率排行榜，但无法解释为何某些预测者更准确，缺乏对推理过程的深入分析。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和区分AI预测智能体在研究与判断方面的战略推理能力，并避免事后偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更准确的预测者主要优势在于对自身盲点的预检分析和黑天鹅事件的考虑；前沿智能体的主要战略推理失败在于评估政治和商业领导人的激励、判断其执行计划的可能性以及建模制度流程。
analysis.method: 构建包含1,417个离线预测问题（pastcasting）和冻结的1,500万文档研究语料库的基准BTF-2，使智能体可复现地离线研究和预测，产生完整推理轨迹；并集成多个智能体构建更优预测器。
contributions: 提出BTF-2基准，支持离线、可复现的预测评估，能检测0.004 Brier分数差异并区分研究与判断能力。
构建比任何单一前沿智能体Brier分数低0.011的预测器，并用于无事后偏差地评估战略推理。
识别出前沿智能体在战略推理中的关键失败模式：评估激励、判断承诺可信度和建模制度流程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到BTF-2能检测0.004 Brier分数差异，且集成预测器比单一前沿智能体准确0.011 Brier分数。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域（政治、商业）的预测问题，泛化性未知。
离线设置可能无法完全反映在线动态环境中的推理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过构建离线预测基准BTF-2，发现前沿AI智能体在战略推理中的主要缺陷是评估领导层激励和制度流程。

papers.title: AMMA: A Multi-Chiplet Memory-Centric Architecture for Low-Latency 1M Context Attention Serving
papers.abstract: All current LLM serving systems place the GPU at the center, from production-level attention-FFN disaggregation to NVIDIA's Rubin GPU-LPU heterogeneous platform. Even academic PIM/PNM proposals still treat the GPU as the central hub for cross-device communication. Yet the GPU's compute-rich architecture is fundamentally mismatched with the memory-bound nature of decode-phase attention, inflating serving latency while wasting power and die area on idle compute units. The problem is compounded as reasoning and agentic workloads push context lengths toward one million tokens, making attention latency the primary user-facing bottleneck. To address these inefficiencies, we present AMMA, a multi-chiplet, memory-centric architecture for low-latency long-context attention. AMMA replaces GPU compute dies with HBM-PNM cubes, roughly doubling the available memory bandwidth to better serve memory-bound attention workloads. To translate this bandwidth into proportional performance gains, we introduce (i) a logic-die microarchitecture that fully exploits per-cube internal bandwidth for decode attention under a minimal power and area budget, (ii) a two-level hybrid parallelism scheme, and (iii) a reordered collective flow that reduces intra-chip die-to-die communication overhead. We further conduct a design-space exploration over per-cube compute power and intra-chip D2D link bandwidth, providing actionable guidance for hardware designers. Evaluations show that AMMA achieves 15.5X lower attention latency and 6.9X lower energy consumption compared with the NVIDIA H100.

analysis.tldr: 提出多芯粒存算一体架构AMMA，通过HBM-PNM立方体替代GPU计算晶圆，实现长上下文注意力服务15.5倍延迟降低和6.9倍能效提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM服务系统以GPU为中心，但GPU的算力密集型架构与解码阶段注意力计算的访存瓶颈不匹配，导致延迟高、功耗浪费，尤其在百万token长上下文场景下问题加剧。
analysis.problem: 解决长上下文注意力服务中GPU架构与访存密集型计算不匹配导致的延迟和能效问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解码阶段注意力是访存密集型任务，GPU的算力单元闲置，带宽成为瓶颈；长上下文（百万token）使注意力延迟成为主要用户感知瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出AMMA多芯粒存算一体架构：用HBM-PNM立方体替代GPU计算晶圆，倍增带宽；设计逻辑晶圆微架构充分挖掘内部带宽；引入两级混合并行方案和重排序集合通信减少片间开销。
contributions: 提出以内存为中心的多芯粒架构AMMA，用HBM-PNM替代GPU晶圆，实现带宽翻倍。
设计逻辑晶圆微架构、两级混合并行和重排序集合流，有效利用带宽并降低片间通信开销。
通过设计空间探索给出每立方体算力和片间链路带宽的指导建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及与NVIDIA H100相比，AMMA实现15.5倍注意力延迟降低和6.9倍能耗降低。
limitations: 可能仅针对解码阶段注意力优化，未覆盖预填充阶段。
实际部署需考虑与现有GPU生态的兼容性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多芯粒存算一体架构AMMA，通过HBM-PNM立方体替代GPU计算晶圆，实现长上下文注意力服务15.5倍延迟降低和6.9倍能效提升。

papers.title: Momentum-Conserving Graph Neural Networks for Deformable Objects
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged as a versatile and efficient option for modeling the dynamic behavior of deformable materials. While GNNs generalize readily to arbitrary shapes, mesh topologies, and material parameters, existing architectures struggle to correctly predict the temporal evolution of key physical quantities such as linear and angular momentum. In this work, we propose MomentumGNN -- a novel architecture designed to accurately track momentum by construction. Unlike existing GNNs that output unconstrained nodal accelerations, our model predicts per-edge stretching and bending impulses which guarantee the preservation of linear and angular momentum. We train our network in an unsupervised fashion using a physics-based loss, and we show that our method outperforms baselines in a number of common scenarios where momentum plays a pivotal role.

analysis.tldr: 提出动量守恒图神经网络MomentumGNN，通过预测边冲量保证线动量和角动量守恒，在可变形物体动力学建模中优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络在可变形材料动力学建模中广泛应用，但现有架构无法正确预测线动量和角动量等关键物理量的时间演化，导致物理不一致。
analysis.problem: 现有GNN输出无约束节点加速度，无法保证动量守恒，需要设计能准确追踪动量的架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MomentumGNN，预测每条边的拉伸和弯曲冲量，通过构造保证线动量和角动量守恒，并使用基于物理的无监督损失训练。
contributions: 提出动量守恒图神经网络MomentumGNN，通过边冲量预测保证动量守恒。
在动量关键场景中，方法优于现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可变形物体，未验证刚体或其他材料。
无监督训练可能依赖物理损失设计，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动量守恒图神经网络MomentumGNN，通过预测边冲量保证线动量和角动量守恒，在可变形物体动力学建模中优于基线。

papers.title: Distill-Belief: Closed-Loop Inverse Source Localization and Characterization in Physical Fields
papers.abstract: {Closed-loop inverse source localization and characterization (ISLC) requires a mobile agent to select measurements that localize sources and infer latent field parameters under strict time constraints.} {The core challenge lies in the belief-space objective: valid uncertainty estimation requires expensive Bayesian inference, whereas using fast learned belief model leads to reward hacking, in which the policy exploits approximation errors rather than actually reducing uncertainty.} {We propose \textbf{Distill-Belief}, a teacher--student framework that decouples correctness from efficiency. A Bayes-correct particle-filter teacher maintains the posterior and supplies a dense information-gain signal, while a compact student distills the posterior into belief statistics for control and an uncertainty certificate for stopping. At deployment, only the student is used, yielding constant per-step cost.} {Experiments on seven field modalities and two stress tests show that Distill-Belief consistently reduces sensing cost and improves success, posterior contraction, and estimation accuracy over baselines, while mitigating reward hacking.}

analysis.tldr: 提出教师-学生框架Distill-Belief，用贝叶斯粒子滤波教师蒸馏信念到学生模型，实现闭环逆源定位与表征，缓解奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理场中移动代理需在严格时间约束下选择测量点以定位源并推断潜在场参数，但现有方法在不确定性估计与效率之间存在矛盾：精确贝叶斯推理计算昂贵，而快速学习信念模型易导致奖励黑客。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地进行闭环逆源定位与表征，避免奖励黑客，同时保持低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出使用快速学习信念模型会导致奖励黑客，即策略利用近似误差而非真正减少不确定性。
analysis.method: Distill-Belief教师-学生框架：教师使用贝叶斯正确的粒子滤波器维护后验并提供密集信息增益信号；学生蒸馏后验为信念统计用于控制，并输出不确定性证书用于停止。部署时仅使用学生模型，每步成本恒定。
contributions: 提出Distill-Belief框架，通过教师-学生蒸馏解耦正确性与效率。
在七种场模态和两个压力测试中验证了该方法在降低感知成本、提高成功率、后验收缩和估计精度方面的有效性，并缓解了奖励黑客。
analysis.experiments: 在七种场模态和两个压力测试上进行实验，结果表明Distill-Belief在多个指标上优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的准确性，若教师模型有偏则学生也会受影响。
框架可能仅适用于可建模为粒子滤波的物理场场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出教师-学生框架Distill-Belief，用贝叶斯粒子滤波教师蒸馏信念到学生模型，实现闭环逆源定位与表征，缓解奖励黑客问题。

papers.title: Operating-Layer Controls for Onchain Language-Model Agents Under Real Capital
papers.abstract: We study reliability in autonomous language-model agents that translate user mandates into validated tool actions under real capital. The setting is DX Terminal Pro, a 21-day deployment in which 3,505 user-funded agents traded real ETH in a bounded onchain market. Users configured vaults through structured controls and natural-language strategies, but only agents could choose normal buy/sell trades. The system produced 7.5M agent invocations, roughly 300K onchain actions, about $20M in volume, more than 5,000 ETH deployed, roughly 70B inference tokens, and 99.9% settlement success for policy-valid submitted transactions. Long-running agents accumulated thousands of sequential decisions, including 6,000+ prompt-state-action cycles for continuously active agents, yielding a large-scale trace from user mandate to rendered prompt, reasoning, validation, portfolio state, and settlement. Reliability did not come from the base model alone; it emerged from the operating layer around the model: prompt compilation, typed controls, policy validation, execution guards, memory design, and trace-level observability. Pre-launch testing exposed failures that text-only benchmarks rarely measure, including fabricated trading rules, fee paralysis, numeric anchoring, cadence trading, and misread tokenomics. Targeted harness changes reduced fabricated sell rules from 57% to 3%, reduced fee-led observations from 32.5% to below 10%, and increased capital deployment from 42.9% to 78.0% in an affected test population. We show that capital-managing agents should be evaluated across the full path from user mandate to prompt, validated action, and settlement.

analysis.tldr: 在真实资本环境下，通过操作层控制（提示编译、策略验证、执行守卫等）实现语言模型代理的高可靠性，而非仅依赖基础模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主语言模型代理在管理真实资本时面临可靠性挑战，现有文本基准无法暴露实际部署中的关键失败模式（如虚构交易规则、费用瘫痪等），亟需系统性的操作层控制方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计操作层控制机制，使语言模型代理在真实资本市场中可靠地将用户指令转化为经过验证的工具操作，并实现高成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，可靠性并非仅来自基础模型，而是源于操作层设计（提示编译、类型控制、策略验证、执行守卫、内存设计、追踪可观测性）；预发布测试揭示了文本基准难以测量的失败模式（如虚构交易规则、费用瘫痪、数字锚定、节奏交易、代币经济学误读）。
analysis.method: 提出操作层控制框架，包括提示编译、类型化控制、策略验证、执行守卫、内存设计和追踪级可观测性，并在DX Terminal Pro系统中部署21天。
contributions: 首次在真实资本（ETH）环境中大规模部署语言模型代理，并展示操作层控制对可靠性的关键作用。
识别并量化了文本基准无法暴露的多种失败模式，并通过针对性改进显著降低故障率。
analysis.experiments: 在DX Terminal Pro上进行了21天部署，涉及3,505个用户资助的代理，产生7.5M次调用、约300K链上操作、约$20M交易量、约70B推理token，结算成功率99.9%。预发布测试中，针对性改进将虚构卖出规则从57%降至3%，费用主导观察从32.5%降至10%以下，资本部署率从42.9%提升至78.0%。
limitations: 仅针对特定市场（DX Terminal Pro）和代币（ETH），泛化性有待验证。
操作层控制的具体组件（如提示编译、策略验证）的独立贡献未做消融实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在真实资本环境下，通过操作层控制（提示编译、策略验证、执行守卫等）实现语言模型代理的高可靠性，而非仅依赖基础模型。

papers.title: FruitProM-V2: Robust Probabilistic Maturity Estimation and Detection of Fruits and Vegetables
papers.abstract: Accurate fruit maturity identification is essential for determining harvest timing, as incorrect assessment directly affects yield and post-harvest quality. Although ripening is a continuous biological process, vision-based maturity estimation is typically formulated as a multi-class classification task, which imposes sharp boundaries between visually similar stages. To examine this limitation, we perform an annotation reliability study with two independent annotators on a held-out tomato dataset and observe disagreement concentrated near adjacent maturity stages. Motivated by this observation, we model maturity as a latent continuous variable and predict it probabilistically using a distributional detection head, converting the distribution into class probabilities through the cumulative distribution function (CDF). The proposed formulation maintains comparable performance to a standard detector under clean labels while better representing uncertainty. Furthermore, when controlled label noise is introduced during training, the probabilistic model demonstrates improved robustness relative to the baseline, indicating that explicitly modeling maturity uncertainty leads to more reliable visual maturity estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出概率成熟度估计方法，通过连续潜变量建模和分布检测头提升水果成熟度估计的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统多分类方法对连续成熟过程施加硬边界，导致标注不一致和估计不可靠，影响采收决策。
analysis.problem: 如何对连续生物过程（果实成熟）进行鲁棒的概率估计，并处理标注噪声和阶段间模糊性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标注者一致性实验显示，相邻成熟阶段的标注分歧集中，表明硬分类边界不合理。
analysis.method: 将成熟度建模为连续潜变量，使用分布检测头预测概率分布，并通过累积分布函数转换为类别概率。
contributions: 提出概率成熟度估计框架，将成熟度视为连续变量并建模不确定性。
在标注噪声下表现出比标准检测器更强的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在番茄数据集上进行了标注可靠性研究，并对比了干净标签和受控噪声下的性能。
limitations: 仅针对番茄数据集验证，泛化性未知。
未提供与其他概率方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概率成熟度估计方法，通过连续潜变量建模和分布检测头提升水果成熟度估计的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Simple Self-Conditioning Adaptation for Masked Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) generate discrete sequences by iterative denoising under an absorbing masking process. In standard masked diffusion, if a token remains masked after a reverse update, the model discards its clean-state prediction for that position. Thus, still-masked positions must be repeatedly inferred from the mask token alone. This design choice limits cross-step refinement. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a simple, yet effective, post-training adaptation for MDMs that conditions each denoising step on the model's own previous clean-state predictions. The resulting method, called Self-Conditioned Masked Diffusion Models (SCMDM), requires minimal architectural change, does not introduce a recurrent latent-state pathway, does not rely on an auxiliary reference model, and adds no extra denoiser evaluations during sampling. This is an important departure from partial self-conditioning approaches which requires expensive model training from scratch. In particular, the paper shows that partial self-conditioning, including the commonly used 50% dropout strategy for training self-conditioned models from scratch, is suboptimal in the post-training regime. Instead, once the model's self-generated clean-state estimates become informative, the specialization to refinement is preferable to mixing conditional and unconditional objectives. SCMDM is evaluated across multiple domains, demonstrating consistent improvement over vanilla MDM baselines, achieving nearly a 50% reduction in generative perplexity on OWT-trained models (42.89 to 23.72), alongside strong improvements in discretized image synthesis quality, small molecular generation, and enhanced fidelity in genomic distribution modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种后训练自条件适应方法，通过利用模型自身先前预测改进掩码扩散模型的去噪质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准掩码扩散模型中，仍被掩码的位置只能从掩码标记反复推断，限制了跨步细化能力。
analysis.problem: 解决掩码扩散模型在去噪过程中无法利用自身先前预测进行跨步细化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出部分自条件方法（如50% dropout策略）在后训练场景下是次优的，而一旦模型自生成估计变得信息丰富，专门进行细化优于混合条件和无条件目标。
analysis.method: 提出自条件掩码扩散模型（SCMDM），在采样时对每个去噪步骤以模型自身上一轮的干净状态预测为条件，仅需最小架构改动，无需额外去噪器评估。
contributions: 提出一种简单有效的后训练自条件适应方法，无需从头训练或辅助模型。
在多个领域（文本、图像、分子、基因组）上显著提升生成质量，如OWT模型生成困惑度降低近50%。
analysis.experiments: 在文本（OWT）、图像（离散图像合成）、小分子生成和基因组分布建模上评估，显示一致改进。
limitations: 可能依赖于模型自身预测的初始质量。
后训练适应可能不适用于所有类型的掩码扩散模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种后训练自条件适应方法，通过利用模型自身先前预测改进掩码扩散模型的去噪质量。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning Framework for Distributed Chemical Process Optimization
papers.abstract: Industrial chemical plants often operate under strict data confidentiality constraints, making centralized data-driven process modeling difficult. Federated learning (FL) provides a promising solution by enabling collaborative model training across distributed facilities without sharing raw operational data. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving federated learning framework for distributed chemical process optimization using data collected from multiple geographically separated plants. Each plant locally trains a neural-network-based process model using its own time-series sensor data, while only model parameters are transmitted to a central aggregation server through secure aggregation mechanisms. This design allows cross-plant knowledge sharing while maintaining strict data locality and industrial confidentiality. Experimental evaluation was conducted using process datasets from three independent chemical plants operating under heterogeneous conditions. The results demonstrate rapid convergence of the federated model, with the global mean squared error decreasing from approximately 2369 to below 50 within the first five communication rounds and stabilizing around 35 after 40 rounds. In comparison with local-only training, the proposed federated framework significantly improves prediction accuracy across all plants, while achieving performance comparable to centralized training. The findings indicate that federated learning provides an effective and scalable solution for collaborative industrial analytics, enabling privacy-preserving predictive modeling and process optimization across distributed chemical production facilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种隐私保护联邦学习框架，实现分布式化工厂间协同过程建模，在保持数据本地性的同时提升预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 化工企业因数据保密限制难以集中建模，联邦学习可在不共享原始数据的前提下实现跨厂协作，但现有方法在工业场景中的适用性尚未充分验证。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格数据隐私约束下，利用分布式化工厂的异构时间序列传感器数据协同训练高精度过程模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 联邦模型在前5轮通信中全局MSE从约2369降至50以下，40轮后稳定在35左右；相比本地训练，联邦框架显著提升所有工厂的预测精度，性能接近集中式训练。
analysis.method: 各工厂本地训练神经网络过程模型，仅通过安全聚合机制向中央服务器传输模型参数，实现跨厂知识共享。
contributions: 提出面向分布式化工过程优化的隐私保护联邦学习框架
在三座异构化工厂数据集上验证了快速收敛和接近集中式的预测性能
analysis.experiments: 使用三座独立化工厂的异构过程数据集，对比联邦学习与本地训练、集中式训练的预测误差（MSE）。
limitations: 摘要未提及对异构数据分布（如非IID）的鲁棒性分析
未讨论通信开销或安全聚合的具体计算成本
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种隐私保护联邦学习框架，实现分布式化工厂间协同过程建模，在保持数据本地性的同时提升预测精度。

papers.title: Validation of Whole-Slide Foundation Models for Image Retrieval in TCGA Data
papers.abstract: Foundation models are reshaping computational histopathology, yet their value for whole-slide image retrieval relative to strong patch-based and supervised aggregation baselines remains unclear. We benchmarked ten pipelines on 9,387 diagnostic slides spanning 17 organs and 60 diagnoses from The Cancer Genome Atlas (TCGA) using patient-level leave-one-patient-out evaluation. Methods included four pre-trained slide foundation models, a supervised attention-based multiple instance learning (ABMIL) aggregator on patch embeddings, and patch-level retrieval across five sampling densities. Performance varied more across organs and diagnoses than across architectures. Although the slide foundation model TITAN achieved the strongest overall results, its advantage was modest; ABMIL and patch-based methods reached comparable Top-1 and Top-3 accuracy, with no model consistently dominant. Morphologically distinctive entities approached ceiling performance, while rare, heterogeneous, and closely related subtypes remained challenging. Misclassifications aligned with organs exhibiting known inter-observer variability, suggesting an intrinsic ceiling for morphology-only retrieval. Performance was driven primarily by patch-level feature representations, with limited benefit from slide-level aggregation, indicating aggregation may be unnecessary in many settings. These findings argue against a universally optimal architecture and instead support organ-resolved benchmarking, diagnosis-aware or ensemble strategies, stronger feature representations, and multimodal retrieval frameworks. Notably, even the best model achieved only $\approx 68\% \pm 21\%$ retrieval accuracy on TCGA, and some subtypes showed $0\%$ accuracy across all methods, highlighting fundamental limitations of morphology-based representations and the need for substantial progress before reliable clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 全切片基础模型在TCGA图像检索中表现并不显著优于基于补丁的强基线，性能主要由补丁级特征驱动，聚合模块收益有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型在计算病理学中广泛应用，但其在全切片图像检索中的实际价值相对于强基线尚不明确，需要系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估全切片基础模型在TCGA数据上的图像检索性能，并与基于补丁和监督聚合的基线方法进行比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能在不同器官和诊断间差异大于不同架构间差异；TITAN模型整体最强但优势微弱；形态学独特实体接近上限，罕见、异质和相似亚型仍具挑战；错误分类与已知观察者间变异性器官一致；性能主要由补丁级特征驱动，聚合模块收益有限。
analysis.method: 在TCGA的9,387张诊断切片上，使用患者级留一法评估十种检索流程，包括四种预训练切片基础模型、基于注意力的多实例学习聚合器以及不同采样密度的补丁级检索。
contributions: 系统比较了全切片基础模型与强基线在图像检索中的性能，揭示了补丁级特征的主导作用。
发现性能主要受器官和诊断类型影响，而非架构，并指出形态学检索的内在上限。
提出器官级基准、诊断感知或集成策略、更强特征表示和多模态检索框架等未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 在TCGA的9,387张诊断切片上，覆盖17个器官和60种诊断，使用患者级留一法评估，报告了Top-1和Top-3准确率。最佳模型TITAN达到约68%±21%的检索准确率，部分亚型所有方法准确率为0%。
limitations: 仅基于TCGA数据集，可能不适用于其他染色或扫描协议。
仅评估了形态学检索，未考虑多模态信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 全切片基础模型在TCGA图像检索中表现并不显著优于基于补丁的强基线，性能主要由补丁级特征驱动，聚合模块收益有限。

papers.title: RADIO-ViPE: Online Tightly Coupled Multi-Modal Fusion for Open-Vocabulary Semantic SLAM in Dynamic Environments
papers.abstract: We present RADIO-ViPE (Reduce All Domains Into One -- Video Pose Engine), an online semantic SLAM system that enables geometry-aware open-vocabulary grounding, associating arbitrary natural language queries with localized 3D regions and objects in dynamic environments. Unlike existing approaches that require calibrated, posed RGB-D input, RADIO-ViPE operates directly on raw monocular RGB video streams, requiring no prior camera intrinsics, depth sensors, or pose initialization. The system tightly couples multi-modal embeddings -- spanning vision and language -- derived from agglomerative foundation models (e.g., RADIO) with geometric scene information. This coupling takes place in initialization, optimization and factor graph connections to improve the consistency of the map from multiple modalities. The optimization is wrapped within adaptive robust kernels, designed to handle both actively moving objects and agent-displaced scene elements (e.g., furniture rearranged during ego-centric session). Experiments demonstrate that RADIO-ViPE achieves state-of-the-art results on the dynamic TUM-RGBD benchmark while maintaining competitive performance against offline open-vocabulary methods that rely on calibrated data and static scene assumptions. RADIO-ViPE bridges a critical gap in real-world deployment, enabling robust open-vocabulary semantic grounding for autonomous robotics and unconstrained in-the-wild video streams. Project page: https://be2rlab.github.io/radio_vipe

analysis.tldr: 提出在线紧密耦合多模态融合的开放词汇语义SLAM系统，无需标定RGB-D输入，在动态场景中实现几何感知的开放词汇定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇语义SLAM方法依赖标定RGB-D输入和静态场景假设，难以在动态、无约束的真实环境中部署。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从原始单目RGB视频流中在线实现几何感知的开放词汇语义SLAM，并处理动态物体和场景变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 紧密耦合多模态嵌入（视觉和语言）与几何信息，在初始化、优化和因子图连接中融合，并采用自适应鲁棒核处理动态物体和场景元素。
contributions: 首个无需标定RGB-D输入、直接处理原始单目RGB视频流的在线开放词汇语义SLAM系统。
提出紧密耦合多模态融合框架，结合聚合基础模型与几何信息，提升地图一致性。
在动态TUM-RGBD基准上达到SOTA，且与依赖标定数据和静态假设的离线方法性能相当。
analysis.experiments: 在动态TUM-RGBD基准上评估，达到SOTA结果，并与离线开放词汇方法比较。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型（如RADIO）的预训练质量。
动态场景中的极端运动或遮挡可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线紧密耦合多模态融合的开放词汇语义SLAM系统，无需标定RGB-D输入，在动态场景中实现几何感知的开放词汇定位。

papers.title: Evaluating the Alignment Between GeoAI Explanations and Domain Knowledge in Satellite-Based Flood Mapping
papers.abstract: The increasing number of satellites has improved the temporal resolution of Earth observation, making satellite-based flood mapping a promising approach for operational flood monitoring. Deep learning-based approaches for flood mapping using satellite imagery, an important application within Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI), have shown improved predictive performance by learning complex spatial and spectral patterns from large volumes of remote sensing data. However, the opaque decision-making processes of deep learning models remain a major barrier to their integration into critical scientific and operational workflows. This highlights the need for a systematic assessment of whether model explanations align with established domain knowledge in remote sensing. To address this research gap, this study introduces the ADAGE (Alignment between Domain Knowledge And GeoAI Explanation Evaluation) framework. The proposed framework is designed to systematically evaluate how well explanations of deep learning models align with established remote sensing knowledge, particularly regarding the distinctive spectral properties of the Earth's surface. The ADAGE framework employs Channel-Group SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) method to estimate the contributions of grouped input channels to pixel-level predictions. Experiments on two satellite-based flood mapping tasks demonstrate that the ADAGE framework can (1) quantitatively assess the alignment between model explanations and reference explanations derived from domain knowledge and (2) help domain experts identify misaligned explanations through alignment scores. This study contributes to bridging the gap between explainability and domain knowledge in GeoAI for Earth observation, enhancing the applicability of GeoAI models in scientific and operational workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADAGE框架，系统评估深度学习洪水制图模型解释与遥感领域知识的一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在卫星洪水制图中表现优异，但其决策过程不透明，阻碍了在关键科学和操作流程中的应用，亟需评估模型解释是否与领域知识一致。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估深度学习洪水制图模型的解释与遥感领域知识（特别是地表光谱特性）的对齐程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ADAGE框架，采用Channel-Group SHAP方法估计分组输入通道对像素级预测的贡献，通过对齐分数定量评估模型解释与领域知识参考解释的一致性。
contributions: 提出ADAGE框架，用于系统评估GeoAI模型解释与遥感领域知识的对齐程度。
在两个卫星洪水制图任务上验证了框架的定量评估和识别不一致解释的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个卫星洪水制图任务上进行了实验，展示了ADAGE框架的定量评估和对齐分数识别功能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于遥感领域特定光谱知识，泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖预定义的领域知识参考解释，可能无法覆盖所有专家知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADAGE框架，系统评估深度学习洪水制图模型解释与遥感领域知识的一致性。

papers.title: RA-CMF: Region-Adaptive Conditional MeanFlow for CT Image Reconstruction
papers.abstract: The use of CT imaging is important for screening, diagnosis, therapy planning, and prognosis of lung cancers. Unfortunately, due to differences in imaging protocols and scanner models, CT images acquired by different means may show large differences in noise statistics, contrast, and texture. In this study, we develop a novel conditional MeanFlow pipeline for CT image reconstruction. We introduce a conditional MeanFlow network that models the enhancement trajectory by predicting image-conditioned flow fields given intermediate image states. The image enhancement network is trained with a MeanFlow consistency loss along with the image reconstruction loss. In order to provide an adaptive refinement process in terms of spatial location of enhancements, we integrate a regional reinforcement learning-driven policy network into our approach. The policy network receives information about the MeanFlow rollouts and provides predictions in terms of tile-wise refinement budgets, stopping criteria, and total budget allocation of enhancement processes. Our policy network is trained through reinforcement learning in a policy gradient framework, where the goal of the training reward is to maximize improvement of enhancements while minimizing unnecessary computations and avoiding instabilities. In this way, our approach combines conditional flow-based enhancement with reinforcement learning-based spatial enhancement control. This allows our approach to focus more attention on enhancing difficult areas while stabilizing areas already showing sufficient quality. Our results show high accuracy in the tumor ROI, with the average radiomic feature CCC being 0.96, an average PSNR of 31.30 $\pm$ 4.16, and average SSIM of 0.94 $\pm$ 0.07. Moreover, there is an improvement in the overall quality of images, with an average PSNR of 34.23 $\pm$ 1.71 and average SSIM of 0.95 $\pm$ 0.01.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域自适应条件MeanFlow（RA-CMF）用于CT图像重建，结合条件流增强和强化学习空间控制，在肿瘤ROI上达到高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同CT成像协议和扫描仪导致图像噪声、对比度和纹理差异大，现有方法难以自适应处理空间不均匀的增强需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现CT图像的自适应增强，在提升困难区域质量的同时避免过度处理已足够好的区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出条件MeanFlow网络预测图像条件流场，结合区域强化学习策略网络分配逐块增强预算、停止准则和总预算，通过策略梯度训练最大化增强收益并最小化计算。
contributions: 提出条件MeanFlow网络用于CT图像增强，通过MeanFlow一致性损失和重建损失联合训练。
引入区域强化学习策略网络实现空间自适应增强控制，优化计算资源分配。
analysis.experiments: 在CT图像重建任务上评估，肿瘤ROI平均放射组学特征CCC为0.96，平均PSNR 31.30±4.16，SSIM 0.94±0.07；整体图像平均PSNR 34.23±1.71，SSIM 0.95±0.01。
limitations: 可能依赖特定CT数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习训练可能不稳定，需要精细调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域自适应条件MeanFlow（RA-CMF）用于CT图像重建，结合条件流增强和强化学习空间控制，在肿瘤ROI上达到高精度。

papers.title: RaMP: Runtime-Aware Megakernel Polymorphism for Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: The optimal kernel configuration for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) inference depends on both batch size and the expert routing distribution, yet production systems dispatch from batch size alone, leaving 10-70% of kernel throughput unrealized. We present RaMP, a routing-aware dispatch framework. A performance-region analysis derives, from hardware constants alone, when each optimization helps, correctly predicting all 8 tested architectures, including 3 unseen. A four-parameter wave cost model selects the fastest configuration from the runtime expert histogram, achieving 0.93% mean regret versus exhaustive search, fitted from just 10-24 minutes of one-time profiling per model. Because the model depends only on CTA grid geometry, it is kernel-agnostic: applied to Alpha-MoE, it delivers 1.14x with no source modification. Paired with a co-designed CuTe DSL kernel exposing 134-268 polymorphic configurations, RaMP delivers 1.22x kernel speedup over static dispatch and 1.30x end-to-end speedup in vLLM serving over Triton, 1.41x over DeepGEMM, and 1.13x over FlashInfer CUTLASS.

analysis.tldr: RaMP通过运行时感知的多态内核调度，为混合专家模型推理实现最高1.41x加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MoE推理系统仅根据批次大小选择内核配置，忽略了专家路由分布对最优配置的影响，导致10-70%的内核吞吐量未被利用。
analysis.problem: 如何根据运行时专家路由分布动态选择最优内核配置，以最大化MoE推理吞吐量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出最优内核配置同时依赖于批次大小和专家路由分布，而现有系统仅考虑前者，造成显著性能损失。
analysis.method: 提出RaMP框架，包含性能区域分析（从硬件常数推导优化条件）和四参数波成本模型（根据运行时专家直方图选择最快配置），并设计CuTe DSL内核暴露多态配置。
contributions: 提出运行时感知的调度框架RaMP，实现内核配置对专家路由分布的动态适应。
设计仅依赖硬件常数的性能区域分析和轻量级波成本模型，无需大量预配置。
在多种MoE模型和推理系统中验证了显著加速效果，且方法具有内核无关性。
analysis.experiments: 在8种架构（含3种未见架构）上验证性能区域预测正确性；波成本模型平均遗憾0.93%；在Alpha-MoE上实现1.14x加速（无源码修改）；在vLLM中端到端加速1.30x（vs Triton）、1.41x（vs DeepGEMM）、1.13x（vs FlashInfer CUTLASS）。
limitations: 波成本模型可能对极端路由分布敏感，摘要未讨论。
方法依赖硬件常数分析，可能需针对新硬件调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RaMP通过运行时感知的多态内核调度，为混合专家模型推理实现最高1.41x加速。

papers.title: Report of the 5th PVUW Challenge: Towards More Diverse Modalities in Pixel-Level Understanding
papers.abstract: This report summarizes the objectives, datasets, and top-performing methodologies of the 2026 Pixel-level Video Understanding in the Wild (PVUW) Challenge, hosted at CVPR 2026, which evaluates state-of-the-art models under highly unconstrained conditions. To provide a comprehensive assessment, the 2026 edition features three specialized tracks: the MOSE track for tracking objects within densely cluttered and severely occluded scenarios; the MeViS-Text track for localizing targets via motion-focused linguistic expressions; and the newly inaugurated MeViS-Audio track, which pioneers acoustic-driven object segmentation. By introducing previously unreleased challenging data and analyzing the cutting-edge, multimodal solutions submitted by participants, this report highlights the community's latest technical advancements and charts promising future directions for robust video scene comprehension.

analysis.tldr: CVPR 2026 PVUW挑战赛总结，新增音频驱动分割赛道，推动像素级视频理解向多模态发展。
analysis.research_motivation: 像素级视频理解在真实场景中面临密集遮挡、运动模糊等挑战，现有方法对多模态信息（如音频）利用不足，亟需统一评测平台推动技术发展。
analysis.problem: 如何设计涵盖视觉、文本和音频的多模态像素级视频理解评测基准，并总结当前最优方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织三个赛道：MOSE（密集遮挡跟踪）、MeViS-Text（运动文本定位）、MeViS-Audio（音频驱动分割），并分析参赛者提交的多模态解决方案。
contributions: 发布新的挑战性数据集（如MeViS-Audio），首次引入音频驱动的目标分割任务。
系统总结多模态像素级视频理解的最新进展和未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅报告挑战赛结果，未提供独立方法创新。

papers.title: Generalized Disguise Makeup Presentation Attack Detection Using an Attention-Guided Patch-Based Framework
papers.abstract: Despite significant advances in facial recognition systems, they remain vulnerable to face presentation attacks. Among them, disguise makeup attacks are particularly challenging, as they use advanced cosmetics, prosthetic components, and artificial materials to realistically alter facial appearance, often making detection difficult even for humans. Despite their importance, this problem remains underexplored, and publicly available datasets are limited. To address this, we propose a generalized disguise makeup presentation attack detection framework. The method adopts a two-phase design in which a style-invariant full-face model, trained with metric learning and enhanced by a whitening transformation, extracts region attention scores via Grad-CAM. These scores guide a patch-based phase that performs localized analysis using region-specific subnetworks trained with metric learning for fine-grained discrimination. We also construct a new, diverse dataset of live and disguise makeup faces collected under real-world conditions, covering variations in subjects, environments, and disguise materials. Experimental results demonstrate strong generalization across both the collected dataset and SIW-Mv2, achieving 8.97% ACER and 9.76% EER on the collected dataset, and 0% ACER on Obfuscation and Impersonation and 1.34% on Cosmetics attacks of SIW-Mv2. The proposed method consistently outperforms prior works while maintaining robust performance across other spoof types.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种注意力引导的基于补丁的框架，用于广义化妆伪装呈现攻击检测，在多个数据集上取得优异性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脸识别系统易受呈现攻击，其中化妆伪装攻击使用高级化妆品和假体逼真改变面部外观，检测困难且研究不足，公开数据集有限。
analysis.problem: 广义化妆伪装呈现攻击检测，即区分真实人脸与经过化妆伪装的人脸。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用风格不变的全脸模型（度量学习+白化变换）通过Grad-CAM提取区域注意力分数；第二阶段基于注意力分数引导的补丁，使用区域特定子网络进行局部细粒度分析。
contributions: 提出一种广义化妆伪装呈现攻击检测框架，结合全局和局部特征。
构建了一个新的多样化真实世界数据集，包含活体与化妆伪装人脸。
在收集的数据集和SIW-Mv2上取得领先性能，泛化能力强。
analysis.experiments: 在收集的数据集上ACER为8.97%，EER为9.76%；在SIW-Mv2上，Obfuscation和Impersonation攻击ACER为0%，Cosmetics攻击ACER为1.34%，优于先前工作。
limitations: 可能对极端伪装或未见过的伪装材料泛化有限。
依赖Grad-CAM注意力图，可能受模型解释性偏差影响。

papers.title: Correcting Performance Estimation Bias in Imbalanced Classification with Minority Subconcepts
papers.abstract: Class-level evaluation can conceal substantial performance disparities across subconcepts within the same class, causing models that perform well on average to fail on specific subpopulations. Prior work has shown that common evaluation measures for imbalanced classification are biased toward larger minority subconcepts and that utility-based reweighting using true subconcept labels can mitigate this bias; however, such labels are rarely available at test time. We introduce a practical utility-weighted evaluation that replaces unavailable subconcept labels with predicted posterior probabilities from a multiclass subconcept model. Evaluation weights are defined as the expected utility under this posterior, yielding a soft, uncertainty-aware metric we call predicted-weighted balanced accuracy (pBA). Experiments on tabular benchmarks as well as medical-imaging and text datasets show that unweighted scores can be misleading under within-class heterogeneity, while pBA provides more stable and interpretable assessments when subconcept distributions are uneven but not pathological. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/correcting-bias-imbalance-9C6C/.

analysis.tldr: 提出预测加权平衡准确率(pBA)来修正不平衡分类中因子概念导致的性能估计偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 类别级评估可能掩盖同一类内不同子概念间的性能差异，导致平均表现好的模型在特定子群体上失败；现有不平衡分类评估指标偏向较大的少数子概念，而基于真实子概念标签的效用重加权在测试时不可用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实子概念标签的情况下，修正不平衡分类中因子概念分布不均导致的性能估计偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出类别级评估会掩盖子概念间的性能差异，且常见评估指标对较大的少数子概念有偏。
analysis.method: 用多类子概念模型预测的后验概率代替不可用的子概念标签，定义期望效用作为评估权重，提出预测加权平衡准确率(pBA)。
contributions: 提出一种实用的效用加权评估方法pBA，无需真实子概念标签即可修正偏差。
在表格、医学图像和文本数据集上验证了pBA比未加权分数更稳定和可解释。
analysis.experiments: 在表格基准、医学图像和文本数据集上进行了实验，表明未加权分数在类内异质性下可能误导，而pBA在子概念分布不均匀但非病态时提供更稳定和可解释的评估。
limitations: 依赖子概念模型的质量，若模型预测不准可能影响pBA效果。
仅适用于子概念分布不均匀但非病态的场景，极端分布下可能仍需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预测加权平衡准确率(pBA)来修正不平衡分类中因子概念导致的性能估计偏差。

papers.title: Training Computer Use Agents to Assess the Usability of Graphical User Interfaces
papers.abstract: Usability testing with experts and potential users can assess the effectiveness, efficiency, and user satisfaction of graphical user interfaces (GUIs) but doing so remains a costly and time-intensive process. Prior work has used computer use agents (CUAs) and other generative agents that can simulate user interactions and preference, but we show that agents still struggle to provide accurate usability assessments. In this work, we present a novel machine learning method that operationalizes a computational definition of usability to train CUAs to assess GUI usability by i) prioritizing important interaction flows, ii) executing them through human-like interactions, and iii) predicting a learned numerical usability score. We train a computer use agent, uxCUA, with our algorithm on a large-scale dataset of fully interactive user interfaces (UIs) paired with usability labels and human preferences. We show that uxCUA outperforms larger models in accurate usability assessments and produces realistic critiques of both synthetic and real UIs. More broadly, our work aims to build a principled, data-driven foundation for automated usability assessment in HCI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种训练计算机使用代理（CUA）评估GUI可用性的方法，通过优先交互流程、类人执行和预测可用性分数，优于大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 专家和用户进行可用性测试成本高、耗时长，现有代理在准确评估可用性方面仍有不足。
analysis.problem: 如何训练计算机使用代理（CUA）准确评估图形用户界面（GUI）的可用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有代理在提供准确可用性评估方面存在困难。
analysis.method: 提出一种机器学习方法，通过优先重要交互流程、类人执行交互、预测数值可用性分数来训练CUA（uxCUA），使用大规模交互UI数据集和可用性标签及人类偏好。
contributions: 提出一种计算可用性定义并操作化训练CUA评估可用性的方法。
训练出uxCUA代理，在准确可用性评估上优于更大模型，并能对合成和真实UI生成现实批评。

limitations: 可能依赖大规模标注数据，获取成本高。

papers.title: QERNEL: a Scalable Large Electron Model
papers.abstract: We introduce QERNEL, a foundational neural wavefunction that variationally solves families of parameterized many-electron Hamiltonians and captures their ground states throughout parameter space within a single model. QERNEL combines FiLM-based parameter conditioning with scale-efficient architectural elements -- mixture of experts and grouped-query attention, substantially improving expressivity at low computational cost. We apply QERNEL to interacting electrons in semiconductor moiré heterobilayers, training a single weight-shared model for systems of up to 150 electrons. By solving the many-electron Schrödinger equation conditioned on moiré potential depth, QERNEL captures both quantum liquid and crystal states and discovers the sharp phase transition between them, marked by abrupt changes in interaction energy and charge density. Our work establishes a foundation model for moiré quantum materials and a scalable architecture toward a Large Electron Model for solids.

analysis.tldr: QERNEL 是一个可扩展的神经波函数基础模型，通过变分法求解多电子薛定谔方程，捕捉从量子液体到晶体态的相变。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法求解多电子薛定谔方程计算成本高，且难以泛化到不同参数空间，需要一种可扩展的神经波函数模型来高效处理大规模电子系统。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可扩展的神经波函数模型，能够变分求解参数化多电子哈密顿量的基态，并捕捉整个参数空间中的量子相变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合 FiLM 参数条件化与混合专家（MoE）和分组查询注意力（GQA）的缩放高效架构，训练单一权重共享模型处理多达150个电子的系统。
contributions: 提出了 QERNEL，一个可扩展的神经波函数基础模型，用于变分求解多电子薛定谔方程。
在半导体莫尔异质双层中成功捕捉了量子液体和晶体态之间的尖锐相变。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的电子系统（如莫尔材料），泛化性有待验证。
