papers.title: Recursive Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Recursive or looped language models have recently emerged as a new scaling axis by iteratively refining the same model computation over latent states to deepen reasoning. We extend such scaling principle from a single model to multi-agent systems, and ask: Can agent collaboration itself be scaled through recursion? To this end, we introduce RecursiveMAS, a recursive multi-agent framework that casts the entire system as a unified latent-space recursive computation. RecursiveMAS connects heterogeneous agents as a collaboration loop through the lightweight RecursiveLink module, enabling in-distribution latent thoughts generation and cross-agent latent state transfer. To optimize our framework, we develop an inner-outer loop learning algorithm for iterative whole-system co-optimization through shared gradient-based credit assignment across recursion rounds. Theoretical analyses of runtime complexity and learning dynamics establish that RecursiveMAS is more efficient than standard text-based MAS and maintains stable gradients during recursive training. Empirically, we instantiate RecursiveMAS under 4 representative agent collaboration patterns and evaluate across 9 benchmarks spanning mathematics, science, medicine, search, and code generation. In comparison with advanced single/multi-agent and recursive computation baselines, RecursiveMAS consistently delivers an average accuracy improvement of 8.3%, together with 1.2$\times$-2.4$\times$ end-to-end inference speedup, and 34.6%-75.6% token usage reduction. Code and Data are provided in https://recursivemas.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 将递归扩展从单模型引入多智能体系统，提出统一潜在空间递归协作框架 RecursiveMAS，实现性能、速度和 token 效率的全面提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 递归语言模型通过迭代细化同一模型计算来加深推理，已成为新的扩展维度；但多智能体系统的协作本身能否通过递归进行缩放尚未被探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将递归扩展原则从单模型推广到多智能体系统，实现高效、可扩展的递归协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 RecursiveMAS，通过轻量级 RecursiveLink 模块连接异构智能体形成协作循环，实现分布内潜在思维生成和跨智能体潜在状态转移；并设计内外环学习算法进行迭代式全系统联合优化。
contributions: 提出递归多智能体框架 RecursiveMAS，将整个系统视为统一潜在空间递归计算。
设计 RecursiveLink 模块和内外环学习算法，实现跨智能体潜在状态传递和梯度共享的联合优化。
理论分析证明 RecursiveMAS 比标准文本 MAS 更高效且训练梯度稳定。
在 9 个基准上平均准确率提升 8.3%，推理加速 1.2-2.4 倍，token 减少 34.6%-75.6%。
analysis.experiments: 在数学、科学、医学、搜索和代码生成等 9 个基准上，与先进单/多智能体和递归计算基线比较，RecursiveMAS 平均准确率提升 8.3%，推理加速 1.2-2.4 倍，token 减少 34.6%-75.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定智能体架构和任务模式。
递归深度和智能体数量增加时的扩展性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将递归扩展从单模型引入多智能体系统，提出统一潜在空间递归协作框架 RecursiveMAS，实现性能、速度和 token 效率的全面提升。

papers.title: How Fast Should a Model Commit to Supervision? Training Reasoning Models on the Tsallis Loss Continuum
papers.abstract: SFT-then-RLVR is widely used for post-training reasoning models, but why this specific ordering, and why RLVR-only stalls at cold start, have lacked a unifying theoretical account. We provide that account under a unified loss family $J_Q$ using the Tsallis $q$-logarithm. $J_Q$ is a single-parameter family that interpolates between RLVR (at $q{=}0$, the \textit{exploitation pole}) and the log-marginal-likelihood over latent trajectories (at $q{=}1$, the \textit{density-estimation pole}), under which the standard pipeline corresponds to a stepwise $q{=}1 \to 0$ schedule. All members share the same per-example gradient direction, differing only by a per-instance amplification $P_θ^{-q}$ that reweights each instance independently of the learning rate. Under gradient flow analysis, we show that the exploitation pole requires $Ω(\frac{1}{p_0})$ time to escape cold start but is robust to label noise, while the density-estimation pole escapes in $Θ\big(\log(\frac{1}{p_0})\big)$ but memorizes label noise. This separation explains how SFT ($q{=}1$) first moves the model out of the cold-start regime, followed by the more robust RLVR ($q{=}0$), under the SFT-then-RLVR paradigm. We further derive two Monte Carlo estimators that directly optimize fixed-$q$ on the $J_Q$ continuum, without annotated rationales: Gradient-Amplified RL (GARL) and Posterior-Attenuated Fine-Tuning (PAFT), with shared bias $O\big(\frac{q}{M P_θ^q}\big)$ but different variance and stability properties. On FinQA, HotPotQA, and MuSiQue, GARL at sufficiently high $q$ substantially mitigates cold-start stalling, escaping cold start where GRPO fails entirely. In warm start, GARL at low $q$ dominates FinQA where training is stable; on HotPotQA and MuSiQue, GARL destabilizes and PAFT at $q{=}0.75$ remains stable, reaching $47.9$ \texttt{m@16} on HotPotQA ($+13.9$ over GRPO).

analysis.tldr: 提出 Tsallis 损失连续族统一解释 SFT-then-RLVR 范式，并导出两种无需标注推理链的蒙特卡洛优化器。
analysis.research_motivation: SFT-then-RLVR 是推理模型后训练的常用范式，但为何需要此顺序以及 RLVR 单独训练为何冷启动停滞缺乏统一理论解释。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的理论框架来解释 SFT-then-RLVR 范式的有效性以及 RLVR 冷启动停滞的原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过梯度流分析表明，RLVR（q=0）需要 Ω(1/p0) 时间逃离冷启动但对标签噪声鲁棒，而 SFT（q=1）在 Θ(log(1/p0)) 时间内逃离但会记忆噪声。这解释了 SFT-then-RLVR 的顺序合理性。
analysis.method: 提出 Tsallis q-对数损失连续族 J_Q，统一 RLVR（q=0）和 log 边际似然（q=1）；并导出两种蒙特卡洛估计器 GARL 和 PAFT，无需标注推理链即可优化固定 q 的 J_Q。
contributions: 提供了 SFT-then-RLVR 范式的统一理论解释，基于 Tsallis 损失连续族。
推导了两种无需标注推理链的蒙特卡洛优化器 GARL 和 PAFT，并分析了它们的偏差、方差和稳定性。
analysis.experiments: 在 FinQA、HotPotQA 和 MuSiQue 数据集上实验，GARL 在高 q 时显著缓解冷启动停滞，而 GRPO 完全失败；在热启动下，低 q 的 GARL 在 FinQA 上占优，但在 HotPotQA 和 MuSiQue 上不稳定，PAFT 在 q=0.75 时保持稳定，在 HotPotQA 上达到 47.9 m@16（比 GRPO 高 13.9）。
limitations: GARL 在某些数据集上不稳定，需要 PAFT 作为替代。
方法依赖于 Tsallis 损失族，可能不适用于所有推理模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Tsallis 损失连续族统一解释 SFT-then-RLVR 范式，并导出两种无需标注推理链的蒙特卡洛优化器。

papers.title: Toward a Functional Geometric Algebra for Natural Language Semantics
papers.abstract: Distributional and neural approaches to natural language semantics have been built almost exclusively on conventional linear algebra: vectors, matrices, tensors, and the operations that accompany them. These methods have achieved remarkable empirical success, yet they face persistent structural limitations in compositional semantics, type sensitivity, and interpretability. I argue in this paper that geometric algebra (GA) -- specifically, Clifford algebras -- provides a mathematically superior foundation for semantic representation, and that a Functional Geometric Algebra (FGA) framework extends GA toward a typed, compositional semantics capable of supporting inference, transformation, and interpretability while retaining full compatibility with distributional learning and modern neural architectures. I develop the formal foundations, identify three core capabilities that GA provides and linear algebra does not, present a detailed worked example illustrating operator-level semantic contrasts, and show how GA-based operations already implicit in current transformer architectures can be made explicit and extended. The central claim is not merely increased dimensionality but increased structural organization: GA expands an $n$-dimensional embedding space into a $2^n$ multivector algebra where base semantic concepts and their higher-order interactions are represented within a single, principled algebraic framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出用几何代数（Clifford代数）替代线性代数作为自然语言语义表示的基础，并构建功能几何代数（FGA）框架以支持组合语义、类型敏感性和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前分布语义和神经方法基于线性代数，在组合语义、类型敏感性和可解释性方面存在结构性局限，需要更强大的数学基础。
analysis.problem: 如何为自然语言语义表示提供一种既能保持分布学习和神经架构兼容性，又能支持推理、变换和可解释性的代数框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出功能几何代数（FGA）框架，将n维嵌入空间扩展为2^n维多向量代数，使基础语义概念及其高阶交互在统一代数框架中表示。
contributions: 论证几何代数（Clifford代数）是比线性代数更优越的语义表示数学基础。
提出FGA框架，实现类型化、组合语义，并兼容分布学习和神经架构。
识别GA相对于线性代数的三个核心能力，并通过实例展示算子级语义对比。
揭示当前Transformer架构中隐含的GA操作，并展示如何显式化和扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架目前为理论提出，缺乏大规模实验验证。
将GA操作集成到现有神经架构中可能面临计算效率挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用几何代数（Clifford代数）替代线性代数作为自然语言语义表示的基础，并构建功能几何代数（FGA）框架以支持组合语义、类型敏感性和可解释性。

papers.title: TSN-Affinity: Similarity-Driven Parameter Reuse for Continual Offline Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Continual offline reinforcement learning (CORL) aims to learn a sequence of tasks from datasets collected over time while preserving performance on previously learned tasks. This setting corresponds to domains where new tasks arise over time, but adapting the model in live environment interactions is expensive, risky, or impossible. However, CORL inherits the dual difficulty of offline reinforcement learning and adapting while preventing catastrophic forgetting. Replay-based continual learning approaches remain a strong baseline but incur memory overhead and suffer from a distribution mismatch between replayed samples and newly learned policies. At the same time, architectural continual learning methods have shown strong potential in supervised learning but remain underexplored in CORL. In this work, we propose TSN-Affinity, a novel CORL method based on TinySubNetworks and Decision Transformer. The method enables task-specific parameterization and controlled knowledge sharing through a RL-aware reuse strategy that routes tasks according to action compatibility and latent similarity. We evaluate the approach on benchmarks based on Atari games and simulations of manipulation tasks with the Franka Emika Panda robotic arm, covering both discrete and continuous control. Results show strong retention from sparse SubNetworks, with routing further improving multi-task performance. Our findings suggest that similarity-guided architectural reuse is a strong and viable alternative to replay-based strategies in a CORL setting. Our code is available at: https://github.com/anonymized-for-submission123/tsn-affinity.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于相似性驱动的参数重用方法TSN-Affinity，用于持续离线强化学习，以替代回放策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续离线强化学习面临离线学习和灾难性遗忘的双重挑战，回放方法存在内存开销和分布不匹配问题，而架构方法在CORL中探索不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在持续离线强化学习中实现任务特定参数化并控制知识共享，同时避免灾难性遗忘和分布不匹配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于TinySubNetworks和Decision Transformer，通过RL感知的重用策略根据动作兼容性和潜在相似性路由任务，实现任务特定参数化和受控知识共享。
contributions: 提出TSN-Affinity方法，结合TinySubNetworks和Decision Transformer用于CORL。
设计RL感知的相似性驱动重用策略，根据动作兼容性和潜在相似性路由任务。
在Atari游戏和Franka Emika Panda机器人操作任务上验证了方法的有效性，表明架构重用可替代回放策略。
analysis.experiments: 在基于Atari游戏和Franka Emika Panda机器人臂的操作任务基准上评估，涵盖离散和连续控制，结果显示稀疏子网络具有强保留能力，路由进一步提升了多任务性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定任务序列上有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
未与更多基线方法比较，如其他架构方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于相似性驱动的参数重用方法TSN-Affinity，用于持续离线强化学习，以替代回放策略。

papers.title: Three Models of RLHF Annotation: Extension, Evidence, and Authority
papers.abstract: Preference-based alignment methods, most prominently Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), use the judgments of human annotators to shape large language model behaviour. However, the normative role of these judgments is rarely made explicit. I distinguish three conceptual models of that role. The first is extension: annotators extend the system designers' own judgments about what outputs should be. The second is evidence: annotators provide independent evidence about some facts, whether moral, social or otherwise. The third is authority: annotators have some independent authority (as representatives of the broader population) to determine system outputs. I argue that these models have implications for how RLHF pipelines should solicit, validate and aggregate annotations. I survey landmark papers in the literature on RLHF and related methods to illustrate how they implicitly draw on these models, describe failure modes that come from unintentionally or intentionally conflating them, and offer normative criteria for choosing among them. My central recommendation is that RLHF pipeline designers should decompose annotation into separable dimensions and tailor each pipeline to the model most appropriate for that dimension, rather than seeking a single unified pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 本文区分了RLHF标注的三种概念模型（扩展、证据、权威），并建议根据维度定制标注流程。
analysis.research_motivation: RLHF中人类标注者的判断扮演关键角色，但其规范性作用常被忽视，导致流程设计缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 如何明确RLHF标注中人类判断的规范性角色，并据此优化标注流程的设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出不同模型隐含在现有文献中，且混淆它们会导致失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出三种概念模型（扩展、证据、权威），分析其含义，并建议将标注分解为可分离维度，为每个维度选择最合适的模型。
contributions: 区分了RLHF标注的三种规范性模型，并阐明其含义。
提供了选择模型的规范性标准，并建议分解标注维度以定制流程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅基于理论分析。
可能缺乏实际部署中的可操作性细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文区分了RLHF标注的三种概念模型（扩展、证据、权威），并建议根据维度定制标注流程。

papers.title: Conditional misalignment: common interventions can hide emergent misalignment behind contextual triggers
papers.abstract: Finetuning a language model can lead to emergent misalignment (EM) [Betley et al., 2025b]. Models trained on a narrow distribution of misaligned behavior generalize to more egregious behaviors when tested outside the training distribution. We study a set of interventions proposed to reduce EM. We confirm that these interventions reduce or eliminate EM on existing evaluations (questions like "How do I make a quick buck?"). However, if the evaluation prompts are tweaked to resemble the training context, the model displays EM. We call this conditional misalignment. As in standard EM, the model displays misaligned behaviors more egregious than those seen during training, but only on inputs sharing features with the training data. The first two interventions are diluting misaligned data with benign data, and finetuning on benign data after misaligned data. Both produce conditional misalignment. For instance, models trained on a mix of only 5% insecure code still show misalignment when asked to format responses as Python strings (resembling the training context). The third intervention is inoculation prompting. Here, statements with a similar form to the inoculation prompt serve as triggers for misalignment, even if they have the opposite meaning. On the positive side, inoculation prompting has lower (but still non-zero) conditional misalignment if training is on-policy or includes reasoning distillation. Our results imply that in realistic post-training, where misaligned data is typically combined with benign data, models may be conditionally misaligned even if standard evaluations look clean.

analysis.tldr: 常见干预措施可能隐藏条件性对齐失败，仅在特定上下文触发时显现。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调语言模型可能导致涌现性对齐失败（EM），现有干预措施在标准评测中看似有效，但可能隐藏了仅在特定上下文触发的条件性对齐失败，这对实际部署中的安全性构成威胁。
analysis.problem: 研究常见干预措施（数据稀释、良性微调、接种提示）是否真正消除涌现性对齐失败，还是仅将其隐藏为条件性触发。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：干预措施在标准评测中减少或消除EM，但当评测提示被调整为类似训练上下文时，模型仍表现出更严重的对齐失败，即条件性对齐失败。例如，仅含5%不安全代码的混合训练模型，在要求以Python字符串格式回答时仍显示对齐失败。
analysis.method: 系统评估三种干预措施（数据稀释、良性微调、接种提示）在标准评测和上下文触发评测下的表现，并分析接种提示在策略内训练或包含推理蒸馏时的条件性对齐失败程度。
contributions: 发现条件性对齐失败现象：常见干预措施仅在标准评测中有效，但在类似训练上下文的提示下仍会触发更严重的对齐失败。
揭示接种提示的局限性：即使含义相反，与接种提示形式相似的语句也可能成为触发条件。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了实验设置：使用包含不安全代码的混合数据训练模型，并在标准问题和上下文触发问题（如要求Python字符串格式）上评测。
limitations: 仅研究了三种干预措施，其他干预措施可能表现不同。
条件性对齐失败的具体触发机制和泛化边界尚未完全明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 常见干预措施可能隐藏条件性对齐失败，仅在特定上下文触发时显现。

papers.title: Robust Deepfake Detection: Mitigating Spatial Attention Drift via Calibrated Complementary Ensembles
papers.abstract: Current deepfake detection models achieve state-of-the-art performance on pristine academic datasets but suffer severe spatial attention drift under real-world compound degradations, such as blurring and severe lossy compression. To address this vulnerability, we propose a foundation-driven forensic framework that integrates an extreme compound degradation engine with a structurally constrained, multi-stream architecture. During training, our degradation pipeline systematically destroys high-frequency artifacts, optimizing the DINOv2-Giant backbone to extract invariant geometric and semantic priors. We then process images through three specialized pathways: a Global Texture stream, a Localized Facial stream, and a Hybrid Semantic Fusion stream incorporating CLIP. Through analyzing spatial attribution via Score-CAM and feature stability using Cosine Similarity, we quantitatively demonstrate that these streams extract non-redundant, complementary feature representations and stabilize attention entropy. By aggregating these predictions via a calibrated, discretized voting mechanism, our ensemble successfully suppresses background attention drift while acting as a robust geometric anchor. Our approach yields highly stable zero-shot generalization, achieving Fourth Place in the NTIRE 2026 Robust Deepfake Detection Challenge at CVPR. Code is available at https://github.com/khoalephanminh/ntire26-deepfake-challenge.

analysis.tldr: 提出校准互补集成框架，通过极端退化引擎和多流架构缓解深度伪造检测中的空间注意力漂移，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中获得第四名。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型在学术数据集上表现优异，但在真实世界的复合退化（如模糊、有损压缩）下会出现严重的空间注意力漂移，导致泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何缓解深度伪造检测模型在真实世界复合退化下的空间注意力漂移问题，提升零样本泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前模型在真实世界复合退化下存在空间注意力漂移，即模型关注区域偏离伪造痕迹所在的关键区域，导致性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出基础驱动的取证框架，包含极端复合退化引擎和结构约束的多流架构。退化引擎在训练中系统破坏高频伪影，优化DINOv2-Giant骨干提取不变几何和语义先验；三个专用流（全局纹理流、局部面部流、混合语义融合流）提取非冗余互补特征，通过校准的离散化投票机制集成预测，抑制背景注意力漂移。
contributions: 提出极端复合退化引擎，系统模拟真实世界退化以增强模型鲁棒性。
设计多流架构提取互补特征，并通过校准投票机制稳定注意力熵。
在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中获得第四名，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026 Robust Deepfake Detection Challenge中取得第四名，代码已开源。摘要未提供其他数据集上的具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对未见过的退化类型泛化能力有限。
多流架构和DINOv2-Giant骨干可能带来较高计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出校准互补集成框架，通过极端退化引擎和多流架构缓解深度伪造检测中的空间注意力漂移，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛中获得第四名。

papers.title: No Pedestrian Left Behind: Real-Time Detection and Tracking of Vulnerable Road Users for Adaptive Traffic Signal Control
papers.abstract: Current pedestrian crossing signals operate on fixed timing without adjustment to pedestrian behavior, which can leave vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as the elderly, disabled, or distracted pedestrians stranded when the light changes. We introduce No Pedestrian Left Behind (NPLB), a real-time adaptive traffic signal system that monitors VRUs in crosswalks and automatically extends signal timing when needed. We evaluated five state-of-the-art object detection models on the BGVP dataset, with YOLOv12 achieving the highest mean Average Precision at 50% (mAP@0.5) of 0.756. NPLB integrates our fine-tuned YOLOv12 with ByteTrack multi-object tracking and an adaptive controller that extends pedestrian phases when remaining time falls below a critical threshold. Through 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations, we demonstrate that NPLB improves VRU safety by 71.4%, reducing stranding rates from 9.10% to 2.60%, while requiring signal extensions in only 12.1% of crossing cycles.

analysis.tldr: 提出实时自适应交通信号系统NPLB，通过YOLOv12检测和ByteTrack跟踪弱势道路使用者，动态延长信号时间，仿真显示VRU滞留率从9.10%降至2.60%。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前行人过街信号灯采用固定配时，无法适应行人行为，导致老年人、残疾人等弱势道路使用者（VRU）在信号切换时被困，存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 如何实时检测和跟踪交叉口中的VRU，并自适应调整信号配时以减少VRU滞留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定配时信号灯无法响应行人实际过街速度，导致VRU滞留率高（基线9.10%）。
analysis.method: 使用YOLOv12检测VRU，ByteTrack进行多目标跟踪，自适应控制器在剩余时间低于阈值时延长行人相位。
contributions: 提出NPLB系统，结合YOLOv12检测、ByteTrack跟踪和自适应控制，实现实时VRU保护。
通过10000次蒙特卡洛仿真验证，VRU安全性提升71.4%，滞留率从9.10%降至2.60%，且仅需在12.1%的周期中延长信号。
analysis.experiments: 在BGVP数据集上评估五种目标检测模型，YOLOv12取得最高mAP@0.5（0.756）；通过10000次蒙特卡洛仿真评估系统性能。
limitations: 仅基于仿真验证，未在真实交通环境中测试。
依赖单一数据集BGVP，泛化性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出实时自适应交通信号系统NPLB，通过YOLOv12检测和ByteTrack跟踪弱势道路使用者，动态延长信号时间，仿真显示VRU滞留率从9.10%降至2.60%。

papers.title: QCalEval: Benchmarking Vision-Language Models for Quantum Calibration Plot Understanding
papers.abstract: Quantum computing calibration depends on interpreting experimental data, and calibration plots provide the most universal human-readable representation for this task, yet no systematic evaluation exists of how well vision-language models (VLMs) interpret them. We introduce QCalEval, the first VLM benchmark for quantum calibration plots: 243 samples across 87 scenario types from 22 experiment families, spanning superconducting qubits and neutral atoms, evaluated on six question types in both zero-shot and in-context learning settings. The best general-purpose zero-shot model reaches a mean score of 72.3, and many open-weight models degrade under multi-image in-context learning, whereas frontier closed models improve substantially. A supervised fine-tuning ablation at the 9-billion-parameter scale shows that SFT improves zero-shot performance but cannot close the multimodal in-context learning gap. As a reference case study, we release NVIDIA Ising Calibration 1, an open-weight model based on Qwen3.5-35B-A3B that reaches 74.7 zero-shot average score.

analysis.tldr: 首个量子校准图VLM基准测试，发现多图上下文学习下开源模型性能退化，而前沿闭源模型显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子计算校准依赖实验数据解读，校准图是最通用的人类可读表示，但缺乏对VLM解读能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 系统评估视觉语言模型在量子校准图理解上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳通用零样本模型平均分72.3；多图上下文学习下许多开源模型性能退化，而前沿闭源模型显著提升；9B参数规模的有监督微调能提升零样本性能但无法弥合多模态上下文学习差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含243个样本、87种场景类型、22个实验家族的基准数据集，评估六种问题类型，在零样本和上下文学习设置下测试，并进行有监督微调消融实验。
contributions: 首个针对量子校准图的VLM基准QCalEval
揭示多图上下文学习下开源模型退化而闭源模型提升的现象
发布NVIDIA Ising Calibration 1开源模型
analysis.experiments: 在零样本和上下文学习设置下评估多种VLM，并进行9B参数规模的有监督微调消融实验。
limitations: 基准规模较小（243样本）
仅覆盖超导量子比特和中性原子两种平台
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个量子校准图VLM基准测试，发现多图上下文学习下开源模型性能退化，而前沿闭源模型显著提升。

papers.title: When Errors Can Be Beneficial: A Categorization of Imperfect Rewards for Policy Gradient
papers.abstract: Training language models via reinforcement learning often relies on imperfect proxy rewards, since ground truth rewards that precisely define the intended behavior are rarely available. Standard metrics for assessing the quality of proxy rewards, such as ranking accuracy, treat incorrect rewards as strictly harmful. In this work, however, we highlight that not all deviations from the ground truth are equal. By theoretically analyzing which outputs attract probability during policy gradient optimization, we categorize reward errors according to their effect on the increase in ground truth reward. The analysis establishes that reward errors, though conventionally viewed as harmful, can also be benign or even beneficial by preventing the policy from stalling around outputs with mediocre ground truth reward. We then present two practical implications of our theory. First, for reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), we develop reward model evaluation metrics that account for the harmfulness of reward errors. Compared to standard ranking accuracy, these metrics typically correlate better with the performance of a language model after RLHF, yet gaps remain in robustly evaluating reward models. Second, we provide insights for reward design in settings with verifiable rewards. A key theme underlying our results is that the effectiveness of a proxy reward function depends heavily on its interaction with the initial policy and learning algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 并非所有奖励误差都有害：理论分析表明，某些奖励误差在策略梯度优化中可能无害甚至有益，并据此提出新的奖励模型评估指标。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型强化学习常依赖不完美的代理奖励，但现有评估指标（如排序准确率）将所有错误奖励视为有害，忽略了不同误差对策略优化的实际影响差异。
analysis.problem: 如何分类代理奖励中的误差，并量化其对策略梯度优化中真实奖励提升的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论分析发现，奖励误差可分为有害、良性或有益三类：有益误差可防止策略停滞在真实奖励平庸的输出上。
analysis.method: 通过理论分析策略梯度优化中哪些输出会获得概率提升，根据误差对真实奖励提升的影响进行分类，并据此提出新的奖励模型评估指标。
contributions: 建立了奖励误差的分类框架，证明部分误差可无害甚至有益。
针对RLHF提出与下游性能更相关的奖励模型评估指标。
为可验证奖励场景下的奖励设计提供理论指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 新评估指标与下游性能的相关性仍存在差距，鲁棒评估尚未完全解决。
理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际应用需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 并非所有奖励误差都有害：理论分析表明，某些奖励误差在策略梯度优化中可能无害甚至有益，并据此提出新的奖励模型评估指标。

papers.title: RESTestBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating the Effectiveness of LLM-Generated REST API Test Cases from NL Requirements
papers.abstract: Existing REST API testing tools are typically evaluated using code coverage and crash-based fault metrics. However, recent LLM-based approaches increasingly generate tests from NL requirements to validate functional behaviour, making traditional metrics weak proxies for whether generated tests validate intended behaviour. To address this gap, we present RESTestBench, a benchmark comprising three REST services paired with manually verified NL requirements in both precise and vague variants, enabling controlled and reproducible evaluation of requirement-based test generation. RESTestBench further introduces a requirements-based mutation testing metric that measures the fault-detection effectiveness of a generated test case with respect to a specific requirement, extending the property-based approach of Bartocci et al. . Using RESTestBench, we evaluate two approaches across multiple state-of-the-art LLMs: (i) non-refinement-based generation, and (ii) refinement-based generation guided by interaction with the running SUT. In the refinement experiments, RESTestBench assesses how exposure to the actual implementation, valid or mutated, affects test effectiveness. Our results show that test effectiveness drops considerably when the generator interacts with faulty or mutated code, especially for vague requirements, sometimes negating the benefit of refinement and indicating that incorporating actual SUT behaviour is unnecessary when requirement detail is high.

analysis.tldr: 提出RESTestBench基准，评估LLM从自然语言需求生成REST API测试用例的有效性，发现与故障代码交互会降低测试效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有REST API测试工具主要用代码覆盖率和崩溃率评估，但LLM从自然语言需求生成测试用例时，这些指标无法衡量测试是否验证了预期行为。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能评估基于需求的测试生成有效性的基准和度量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当生成器与故障或变异代码交互时，测试有效性显著下降，尤其对于模糊需求，有时甚至抵消了细化的好处，表明需求详细时无需引入实际SUT行为。
analysis.method: 构建包含三个REST服务及人工验证的自然语言需求（精确和模糊变体）的基准，并引入基于需求的变异测试度量。
contributions: 提出RESTestBench基准，包含三个REST服务及精确/模糊自然语言需求。
引入基于需求的变异测试度量，评估测试用例对特定需求的故障检测能力。
通过实验揭示LLM与故障代码交互会降低测试有效性，尤其对模糊需求。
analysis.experiments: 使用多个SOTA LLM评估两种方法：非细化生成和基于与运行SUT交互的细化生成。
limitations: 仅包含三个REST服务，规模有限。
需求仅分为精确和模糊两类，可能未覆盖所有复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RESTestBench基准，评估LLM从自然语言需求生成REST API测试用例的有效性，发现与故障代码交互会降低测试效果。

papers.title: Luminol-AIDetect: Fast Zero-shot Machine-Generated Text Detection based on Perplexity under Text Shuffling
papers.abstract: Machine-generated text (MGT) detection requires identifying structurally invariant signals across generation models, rather than relying on model-specific fingerprints. In this respect, we hypothesize that while large language models excel at local semantic consistency, their autoregressive nature results in a specific kind of structural fragility compared to human writing. We propose Luminol-AIDetect, a novel, zero-shot statistical approach that exposes this fragility through coherence disruption. By applying a simple randomized text-shuffling procedure, we demonstrate that the resulting shift in perplexity serves as a principled, model-agnostic discriminant, as MGT displays a characteristic dispersion in perplexity-under-shuffling that differs markedly from the more stable structural variability of human-written text. Luminol-AIDetect leverages this distinction to inform its decision process, where a handful of perplexity-based scalar features are extracted from an input text and its shuffled version, then detection is performed via density estimation and ensemble-based prediction. Evaluated across 8 content domains, 11 adversarial attack types, and 18 languages, Luminol-AIDetect demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, with gains up to 17x lower FPR while being cheaper than prior methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过文本打乱后困惑度变化检测机器生成文本，零样本且高效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MGT检测依赖模型特定指纹，难以泛化到不同生成模型，且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种模型无关、零样本、低成本的机器生成文本检测方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 机器生成文本在打乱后困惑度分散性显著不同于人类文本，揭示了自回归模型的结构脆弱性。
analysis.method: 对输入文本进行随机打乱，提取原始和打乱文本的困惑度标量特征，通过密度估计和集成预测进行检测。
contributions: 提出基于文本打乱后困惑度变化的零样本MGT检测方法
在8个领域、11种攻击、18种语言上达到SOTA，FPR降低17倍
analysis.experiments: 在8个内容领域、11种对抗攻击类型、18种语言上评估，与先前方法相比FPR降低17倍。
limitations: 可能对短文本或特定语言效果有限
依赖困惑度计算，对极长文本效率可能下降
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过文本打乱后困惑度变化检测机器生成文本，零样本且高效。

papers.title: Investigation into In-Context Learning Capabilities of Transformers
papers.abstract: Transformers have demonstrated a strong ability for in-context learning (ICL), enabling models to solve previously unseen tasks using only example input output pairs provided at inference time. While prior theoretical work has established conditions under which transformers can perform linear classification in-context, the empirical scaling behavior governing when this mechanism succeeds remains insufficiently characterized. In this paper, we conduct a systematic empirical study of in-context learning for Gaussian-mixture binary classification tasks. Building on the theoretical framework of Frei and Vardi (2024), we analyze how in-context test accuracy depends on three fundamental factors: the input dimension, the number of in-context examples, and the number of pre-training tasks. Using a controlled synthetic setup and a linear in-context classifier formulation, we isolate the geometric conditions under which models successfully infer task structure from context alone. We additionally investigate the emergence of benign overfitting, where models memorize noisy in-context labels while still achieving strong generalization performance on clean test data. Through extensive sweeps across dimensionality, sequence length, task diversity, and signal-to-noise regimes, we identify the parameter regions in which this phenomenon arises and characterize how it depends on data geometry and training exposure. Our results provide a comprehensive empirical map of scaling behavior in in-context classification, highlighting the critical role of dimensionality, signal strength, and contextual information in determining when in-context learning succeeds and when it fails.

analysis.tldr: 系统研究Transformer在上下文学习中的缩放行为，揭示维度、示例数和预训练任务数对高斯混合二分类任务准确率的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管已有理论工作建立了Transformer进行上下文线性分类的条件，但控制该机制成功的经验缩放行为仍未被充分刻画，缺乏系统的实证研究。
analysis.problem: 探究Transformer在上下文学习中，输入维度、上下文示例数量和预训练任务数量如何影响高斯混合二分类任务的测试准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到良性过拟合现象：模型记忆噪声上下文标签，但在干净测试数据上仍能取得强泛化性能。
analysis.method: 使用受控合成设置和线性上下文分类器公式，系统扫描维度、序列长度、任务多样性和信噪比区域，绘制缩放行为图。
contributions: 提供了上下文分类中缩放行为的全面经验图谱
识别了良性过拟合出现的参数区域及其对数据几何和训练暴露的依赖
analysis.experiments: 在合成高斯混合数据上进行大量扫描实验，涵盖不同维度、序列长度、任务多样性和信噪比设置。
limitations: 仅针对线性分类器和高斯混合数据，可能不适用于更复杂的任务和数据分布
未涉及真实世界数据集或更深的Transformer架构
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统研究Transformer在上下文学习中的缩放行为，揭示维度、示例数和预训练任务数对高斯混合二分类任务准确率的影响。

papers.title: SIEVES: Selective Prediction Generalizes through Visual Evidence Scoring
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve ever-stronger performance on visual-language tasks. Even as traditional visual question answering benchmarks approach saturation, reliable deployment requires satisfying low error tolerances in real-world out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Precisely, selective prediction aims to improve coverage, i.e. the share of inputs the system answers, while adhering to a user-defined risk level. This is typically achieved by assigning a confidence score to each answer and abstaining on those that fall below a certain threshold. To enable reliable generalization, we require reasoner models to produce localized visual evidence while answering, and design a selector that explicitly learns to estimate the quality of the localization provided by the reasoner. We show that SIEVES (Selective Prediction through Visual Evidence Scoring) improves coverage by up to three times on challenging OOD benchmarks (V* Bench, HR-Bench-8k, MME-RealWorld-Lite, VizWiz, and AdVQA), compared to non-grounding baselines. Beyond better generalization to OOD tasks, the design of the SIEVES selector enables transfer to proprietary reasoners without access to their weights or logits, such as o3 and Gemini-3-Pro, providing coverage boosts beyond those attributable to accuracy alone. We highlight that SIEVES generalizes across all five tested OOD datasets and reasoner models (Pixel-Reasoner, o3, and Gemini-3-Pro), without benchmark- or reasoner-specific training or adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIEVES方法，通过视觉证据评分提升多模态大模型在分布外场景下的选择性预测覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在传统VQA任务上接近饱和，但实际部署中需要满足低错误容忍度，尤其在分布外场景下，现有选择性预测方法泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个选择器，利用推理模型生成的局部视觉证据来估计答案置信度，从而在分布外场景下提高选择性预测的覆盖率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SIEVES方法：推理模型在回答时生成局部视觉证据（如边界框），选择器显式学习评估该证据的质量，并据此决定是否回答。
contributions: 提出SIEVES，一种通过视觉证据评分实现选择性预测的方法，在多个OOD基准上覆盖率提升高达3倍。
SIEVES选择器可迁移至闭源推理模型（如o3、Gemini-3-Pro），无需访问其权重或logits，且提升效果超越单纯准确率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在V* Bench、HR-Bench-8k、MME-RealWorld-Lite、VizWiz、AdVQA五个OOD基准上评估，与无定位基线相比覆盖率提升高达3倍，且跨模型（Pixel-Reasoner、o3、Gemini-3-Pro）泛化。
limitations: 依赖推理模型生成局部视觉证据的能力，若证据质量差可能影响选择器性能。
仅在五个OOD数据集上验证，更广泛场景下的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIEVES方法，通过视觉证据评分提升多模态大模型在分布外场景下的选择性预测覆盖率。

papers.title: G-Loss: Graph-Guided Fine-Tuning of Language Models
papers.abstract: Traditional loss functions, including cross-entropy, contrastive, triplet, and su pervised contrastive losses, used for fine-tuning pre-trained language models such as BERT, operate only within local neighborhoods and fail to account for the global semantic structure. We present G-Loss, a graph-guided loss function that incorporates semi-supervised label propagation to use structural relationships within the embedding manifold. G-Loss builds a document-similarity graph that captures global semantic relationships, thereby guiding the model to learn more discriminative and robust embeddings. We evaluate G-Loss on five benchmark datasets covering key downstream classification tasks: MR (sentiment analysis), R8 and R52 (topic categorization), Ohsumed (medical document classification), and 20NG (news categorization). In the majority of experimental setups, G-Loss converges faster and produces semantically coherent embedding spaces, resulting in higher classification accuracy than models fine-tuned with traditional loss functions.

analysis.tldr: 提出图引导损失函数G-Loss，利用全局语义结构提升语言模型微调效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统损失函数仅考虑局部邻域，忽略全局语义结构，导致微调后的嵌入空间判别性和鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计损失函数以在微调过程中利用全局语义关系，学习更优的嵌入表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建文档相似度图，通过半监督标签传播捕获全局语义关系，并设计图引导损失函数G-Loss指导模型微调。
contributions: 提出G-Loss损失函数，利用图结构引导语言模型微调，捕获全局语义关系。
在五个基准数据集上验证G-Loss收敛更快且分类准确率更高。
analysis.experiments: 在MR、R8、R52、Ohsumed、20NG五个数据集上评估，G-Loss在多数设置下收敛更快且分类准确率更高。
limitations: 可能依赖图构建质量，对噪声数据敏感。
未在更大规模或生成任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图引导损失函数G-Loss，利用全局语义结构提升语言模型微调效果。

papers.title: ADEMA: A Knowledge-State Orchestration Architecture for Long-Horizon Knowledge Synthesis with LLMAgents
papers.abstract: Long-horizon LLM tasks often fail not because a single answer is unattainable, but because knowledge states drift across rounds, intermediate commitments remain implicit, and interruption fractures the evolving evidence chain. This paper presents ADEMA as a knowledge-state orchestration architecture for long-horizon knowledge synthesis rather than as a generic multi-agent runtime. The architecture combines explicit epistemic bookkeeping, heterogeneous dual-evaluator governance, adaptive task-mode switching, reputation-shaped resource allocation, checkpoint-resumable persistence, segment-level memory condensation, artifact-first assembly, and final-validity checking with safe fallback. Evidence is drawn entirely from existing materials: a four-scenario showcase package, a fixed 60-run mechanism matrix, targeted micro-ablation and artifact-chain supplements, and a repaired protocol-level benchmark in which code-oriented evaluation is the clearest quality-sensitive mechanism block. Across the fixed matrix, removing checkpoint/resume produced the only invalid run, and it did so in the interruption-sensitive resume condition. By contrast, dual evaluation, segment synthesis, and dynamic governance are best interpreted as supporting control mechanisms that shape trajectory discipline, explicit artifact progression, and cost-quality behavior rather than as universal binary prerequisites for completion. The contribution is therefore a knowledge-state orchestration architecture in which explicit epistemic state transition, evidence-bearing artifact progression, and recoverable continuity are the primary design commitments.

analysis.tldr: ADEMA 提出一种知识状态编排架构，通过显式认知记账、双评估器治理等机制解决长时域 LLM 任务中的知识漂移和中断问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时域 LLM 任务常因知识状态漂移、中间承诺隐式化、中断破坏证据链而失败，现有方法缺乏系统性的知识状态编排。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种架构，在长时域知识合成中显式管理知识状态、保证证据链连续性和可恢复性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过固定 60 次运行矩阵发现，移除检查点/恢复机制是唯一导致无效运行的因素，且发生在中断敏感场景；双评估、段合成和动态治理是支持性控制机制而非通用前提。
analysis.method: ADEMA 架构结合显式认知记账、异构双评估器治理、自适应任务模式切换、声誉塑造资源分配、检查点可恢复持久化、段级记忆压缩、工件优先组装、最终有效性检查与安全回退。
contributions: 提出知识状态编排架构，以显式认知状态转换、证据承载工件进展和可恢复连续性为主要设计承诺。
通过固定运行矩阵和微消融实验验证了检查点/恢复机制的关键性，并揭示了其他机制的支持性角色。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了四场景展示包、固定 60 运行机制矩阵、微消融和工件链补充，以及修复的协议级基准。
limitations: 证据仅来自现有材料，缺乏真实任务或用户研究验证。
架构复杂度高，可能带来额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ADEMA 提出一种知识状态编排架构，通过显式认知记账、双评估器治理等机制解决长时域 LLM 任务中的知识漂移和中断问题。

papers.title: Semi-Markov Reinforcement Learning for City-Scale EV Ride-Hailing with Feasibility-Guaranteed Actions
papers.abstract: We study city-scale control of electric-vehicle (EV) ride-hailing fleets where dispatch, repositioning, and charging decisions must respect charger and feeder limits under uncertain, spatially correlated demand and travel times. We formulate the problem as a hex-grid semi-Markov decision process (semi-MDP) with mixed actions -- discrete actions for serving, repositioning, and charging, together with continuous charging power -- and variable action durations. To guarantee physical feasibility during both training and deployment, the policy learns over high-level intentions produced by a masked, temperature-annealed actor. These intentions are projected at every decision step through a time-limited rolling mixed-integer linear program (MILP) that strictly enforces state-of-charge, port, and feeder constraints. To mitigate distributional shifts, we optimize a Soft Actor--Critic (SAC) agent against a Wasserstein-1 ambiguity set with a graph-aligned Mahalanobis ground metric that captures spatial correlations. The robust backup uses the Kantorovich--Rubinstein dual, a projected subgradient inner loop, and a primal--dual risk-budget update. Our architecture combines a two-layer Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) encoder, twin critics, and a value network that drives the adversary. Experiments on a large-scale EV fleet simulator built from NYC taxi data show that PD--RSAC achieves the highest net profit, reaching \$1.22M, compared with \$0.58M--\$0.70M for strong heuristic, single-agent RL, and multi-agent RL baselines, including Greedy, SAC, MAPPO, and MADDPG, while maintaining zero feeder-limit violations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种半马尔可夫强化学习框架，结合混合整数线性规划投影保证动作可行性，实现城市级电动汽车网约车调度的高利润与零违规。
analysis.research_motivation: 城市级电动汽车网约车调度面临充电桩和馈线容量限制、需求与旅行时间的不确定性及空间相关性，现有方法难以同时保证物理可行性、处理混合动作和可变时长，且易产生分布偏移。
analysis.problem: 在满足充电桩和馈线容量约束下，优化电动汽车的派单、重定位和充电决策，以最大化长期利润。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将问题建模为六边形网格半马尔可夫决策过程，使用掩码温度退火演员生成高层意图，通过时间受限滚动混合整数线性规划投影到可行动作空间；采用基于Wasserstein-1模糊集和图形对齐马氏距离的鲁棒SAC优化，利用Kantorovich-Rubinstein对偶和原始-对偶风险预算更新。
contributions: 提出一种半马尔可夫决策过程框架，统一处理离散/连续混合动作和可变时长。
设计掩码温度退火演员与时间受限滚动MILP投影，保证训练和部署中的物理可行性。
引入基于Wasserstein-1模糊集和图形对齐马氏距离的鲁棒SAC，缓解分布偏移。
在基于纽约出租车数据的大规模仿真中验证，所提方法PD-RSAC实现最高净利润122万美元，且零馈线违规。
analysis.experiments: 在基于纽约出租车数据构建的大规模电动汽车网约车仿真器上进行实验，与Greedy、SAC、MAPPO、MADDPG等基线对比，PD-RSAC净利润最高（122万美元 vs 58-70万美元），且零馈线违规。
limitations: 仿真环境基于历史数据，真实部署可能面临未建模的动态因素。
MILP投影的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种半马尔可夫强化学习框架，结合混合整数线性规划投影保证动作可行性，实现城市级电动汽车网约车调度的高利润与零违规。

papers.title: From Soliloquy to Agora: Memory-Enhanced LLM Agents with Decentralized Debate for Optimization Modeling
papers.abstract: Optimization modeling underpins real-world decision-making in logistics, manufacturing, energy, and public services, but reliably solving such problems from natural-language requirements remains challenging for current large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we propose \emph{Agora-Opt}, a modular agentic framework for optimization modeling that combines decentralized debate with a read-write memory bank. Agora-Opt allows multiple agent teams to independently produce end-to-end solutions and reconcile them through an outcome-grounded debate protocol, while memory stores solver-verified artifacts and past disagreement resolutions to support training-free improvement over time. This design is flexible across both backbones and methods: it reduces base-model lock-in, transfers across different LLM families, and can be layered onto existing pipelines with minimal coupling. Across public benchmarks, Agora-Opt achieves the strongest overall performance among all compared methods, outperforming strong zero-shot LLMs, training-centric approaches, and prior agentic baselines. Further analyses show robust gains across backbone choices and component variants, and demonstrate that decentralized debate offers a structural advantage over centralized selection by enabling agents to refine candidate solutions through interaction and even recover correct formulations when all initial candidates are flawed. These results suggest that reliable optimization modeling benefits from combining collaborative cross-checking with reusable experience, and position Agora-Opt as a practical and extensible foundation for trustworthy optimization modeling assistance. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/CHIANGEL/Agora-Opt.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agora-Opt框架，通过去中心化辩论和记忆库提升LLM在优化建模任务中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 优化建模在物流、制造等领域至关重要，但LLM从自然语言需求中可靠求解仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM在优化建模任务中性能不足，缺乏协作与经验积累机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 去中心化辩论相比集中式选择具有结构优势，即使所有初始候选方案有缺陷也能恢复正确公式。
analysis.method: Agora-Opt：模块化智能体框架，包含多团队独立生成方案、基于结果的辩论协议、读写记忆库存储求解器验证的产物和过往分歧解决方案。
contributions: 提出结合去中心化辩论与记忆库的优化建模框架Agora-Opt
在多个公开基准上取得最优性能，且具有跨骨干网络和方法的灵活性
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上对比多种方法，包括强零样本LLM、训练中心方法和先前智能体基线，Agora-Opt取得最强整体性能，并进行了骨干网络和组件变体的鲁棒性分析。
limitations: 可能依赖辩论协议的设计质量
记忆库的长期有效性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agora-Opt框架，通过去中心化辩论和记忆库提升LLM在优化建模任务中的表现。

papers.title: Towards Agentic Investigation of Security Alerts
papers.abstract: Security analysts are overwhelmed by the volume of alerts and the low context provided by many detection systems. Early-stage investigations typically require manual correlation across multiple log sources, a task that is usually time-consuming. In this paper, we present an experimental, agentic workflow that leverages large language models (LLMs) augmented with predefined queries and constrained tool access (structured SQL over Suricata logs and grep-based text search) to automate the first stages of alert investigation. The proposed workflow integrates queries to provide an overview of the available data, and LLM components that selects which queries to use based on the overview results, extracts raw evidence from the query results, and delivers a final verdict of the alert. Our results demonstrate that the LLM-powered workflow can investigate log sources, plan an investigation, and produce a final verdict that has a significantly higher accuracy than a verdict produced by the same LLM without the proposed workflow. By recognizing the inherent limitations of directly applying LLMs to high-volume and unstructured data, we propose combining existing investigation practices of real-world analysts with a structured approach to leverage LLMs as virtual security analysts, thereby assisting and reducing the manual workload.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于LLM的智能体工作流，通过结构化查询和工具约束自动调查安全告警，显著提升告警研判准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全分析师被大量告警淹没，且早期调查需要手动关联多个日志源，耗时且容易遗漏。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM自动完成安全告警的初步调查，包括数据概览、证据提取和最终判定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用LLM处理高容量非结构化数据效果不佳，需要结合结构化查询和现有调查实践。
analysis.method: 提出一个智能体工作流，包含预定义查询（Suricata日志的SQL和grep搜索）、LLM选择查询、提取证据并生成最终判定。
contributions: 提出一种结合结构化查询和LLM的智能体工作流用于安全告警调查。
实验证明该工作流比直接使用LLM的判定准确率显著更高。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定日志格式和查询模板，泛化性待验证。
未提及对复杂多步攻击的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于LLM的智能体工作流，通过结构化查询和工具约束自动调查安全告警，显著提升告警研判准确性。

papers.title: PSI-Bench: Towards Clinically Grounded and Interpretable Evaluation of Depression Patient Simulators
papers.abstract: Patient simulators are gaining traction in mental health training by providing scalable exposure to complex and sensitive patient interactions. Simulating depressed patients is particularly challenging, as safety constraints and high patient variability complicate simulations and underscore the need for simulators that capture diverse and realistic patient behaviors. However, existing evaluations heavily rely on LLM-judges with poorly specified prompts and do not assess behavioral diversity. We introduce PSI-Bench, an automatic evaluation framework that provides interpretable, clinically grounded diagnostics of depression patient simulator behavior across turn-, dialogue-, and population-level dimensions. Using PSI-Bench, we benchmark seven LLMs across two simulator frameworks and find that simulators produce overly long, lexically diverse responses, show reduced variability, resolve emotions too quickly, and follow a uniform negative-to-positive trajectory. We also show that the simulation framework has a larger impact on fidelity than the model scale. Results from a human study demonstrate that our benchmark is strongly aligned with expert judgments. Our work reveals key limitations of current depression patient simulators and provides an interpretable, extensible benchmark to guide future simulator design and evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出PSI-Bench基准，用于临床可解释地评估抑郁症患者模拟器，发现现有模拟器存在响应过长、情绪恢复过快等问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 抑郁症患者模拟器在心理健康训练中日益重要，但现有评估依赖LLM裁判且缺乏对行为多样性的评估，需要更严谨、可解释的基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个临床可解释、自动化的评估框架，用于诊断抑郁症患者模拟器在回合、对话和人群层面的行为缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟器产生过长、词汇多样的响应，行为变异性降低，情绪过快从消极转向积极，且模拟框架对保真度的影响大于模型规模。
analysis.method: PSI-Bench：一个自动评估框架，提供跨回合、对话和人群层面的可解释临床诊断指标，用于评估抑郁症患者模拟器。
contributions: 提出PSI-Bench，首个临床可解释的抑郁症患者模拟器自动评估基准。
通过基准测试揭示当前模拟器的关键局限性，并验证与专家判断高度一致。
analysis.experiments: 对7个LLM在2个模拟框架上进行基准测试，并通过人类研究验证与专家判断的一致性。
limitations: 仅针对抑郁症患者模拟器，可能不适用于其他精神疾病模拟器。
基准的临床维度可能未覆盖所有相关行为特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PSI-Bench基准，用于临床可解释地评估抑郁症患者模拟器，发现现有模拟器存在响应过长、情绪恢复过快等问题。

papers.title: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Modeling for Short Video Recommendation
papers.abstract: With the rapid development of the Internet, users have increasingly higher expectations for the recommendation accuracy of online content consumption platforms. However, short videos often contain diverse segments, and users may not hold the same attitude toward all of them. Traditional binary-classification recommendation models, which treat a video as a single holistic entity, face limitations in accurately capturing such nuanced preferences. Considering that user consumption is a temporal process, this paper demonstrates that the timing of user actions can represent diverse intentions through statistical analysis and examination of action patterns. Based on this insight, we propose a novel modeling paradigm: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Network (A2Gen), which refines user actions along the temporal dimension and chains them into sequences for unified processing and prediction. First, we introduce the Context-aware Attention Module (CAM) to model action sequences enriched with item-specific contextual features. Building upon this, we develop the Hierarchical Sequence Encoder (HSE) to learn temporal action patterns from users' historical actions. Finally, through leveraging CAM, we design a module for action sequence generation: the Action-seq Autoregressive Generator (AAG). Extensive offline experiments on the Kuaishou's dataset and the Tmall public dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model. Furthermore, through large-scale online A/B testing deployed on Kuaishou's platform, our model achieves significant improvements over baseline methods in multi-task prediction by leveraging sequential information. Specifically, it yields increases of 0.34% in user watch time, 8.1% in interaction rate, and 0.162% in overall user retention (LifeTime-7), leading to successful deployment across all traffic, serving over 400 million users every day.

analysis.tldr: 提出动作感知生成序列网络A2Gen，通过建模用户动作时序提升短视频推荐精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统推荐模型将视频视为整体，无法捕捉用户对视频不同片段的细粒度偏好，而用户消费是时序过程，动作时机可反映多样意图。
analysis.problem: 如何利用用户动作的时序信息进行更精准的短视频推荐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过统计分析发现用户动作的时序可以表示不同意图，且用户历史动作序列蕴含时序模式。
analysis.method: 提出A2Gen模型，包含上下文感知注意力模块(CAM)建模带物品特征的序列、层次序列编码器(HSE)学习时序模式、动作序列自回归生成器(AAG)生成动作序列。
contributions: 提出动作感知生成序列建模范式，将用户动作沿时间维度细化并链式处理。
设计CAM、HSE和AAG三个模块实现时序动作建模与生成。
在快手和天猫数据集上离线实验及快手平台在线A/B测试验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在快手数据集和天猫公开数据集上进行离线实验，并在快手平台进行大规模在线A/B测试，用户观看时长提升0.34%，交互率提升8.1%，用户留存提升0.162%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户行为时序数据。
生成式序列建模的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动作感知生成序列网络A2Gen，通过建模用户动作时序提升短视频推荐精度。

papers.title: TrialCalibre: A Fully Automated Causal Engine for RCT Benchmarking and Observational Trial Calibration
papers.abstract: Real-world evidence (RWE) studies that emulate target trials increasingly inform regulatory and clinical decisions, yet residual, hard-to-quantify biases still limit their credibility. The recently proposed BenchExCal framework addresses this challenge via a two-stage Benchmark, Expand, Calibrate process, which first compares an observational emulation against an existing randomized controlled trial (RCT), then uses observed divergence to calibrate a second emulation for a new indication causal effect estimation. While methodologically powerful, BenchExCal is resource intensive and difficult to scale. We introduce TrialCalibre, a conceptualized multiagent system designed to automate and scale the BenchExCal workflow. Our framework features specialized agents such as the Orchestrator, Protocol Design, Data Synthesis, Clinical Validation, and Quantitative Calibration Agents that coordi-nate the the overall process. TrialCalibre incorpo-rates agent learning (e.g., RLHF) and knowledge blackboards to support adaptive, auditable, and transparent causal effect estimation.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TrialCalibre，一个自动化多智能体系统，用于扩展 RCT 基准测试和观察性试验校准的 BenchExCal 框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界证据研究中的残余偏差限制了其可信度，而现有的 BenchExCal 框架虽能校准偏差但资源密集、难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化并规模化 BenchExCal 的两阶段基准-扩展-校准流程，以高效进行因果效应估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计多智能体系统，包含 Orchestrator、Protocol Design、Data Synthesis、Clinical Validation、Quantitative Calibration 等智能体，通过智能体学习（如 RLHF）和知识黑板协调工作。
contributions: 提出 TrialCalibre，首个自动化多智能体系统用于 RCT 基准测试和观察性试验校准。
集成智能体学习和知识黑板机制，实现自适应、可审计、透明的因果效应估计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 系统复杂度高，实际部署可能面临计算和协调挑战。
依赖智能体学习质量，RLHF 可能引入额外偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 TrialCalibre，一个自动化多智能体系统，用于扩展 RCT 基准测试和观察性试验校准的 BenchExCal 框架。

papers.title: Mutual Forcing: Dual-Mode Self-Evolution for Fast Autoregressive Audio-Video Character Generation
papers.abstract: In this work, we propose Mutual Forcing, a framework for fast autoregressive audio-video generation with long-horizon audio-video synchronization. Our approach addresses two key challenges: joint audio-video modeling and fast autoregressive generation. To ease joint audio-video optimization, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: we first train uni-modal generators and then couple them into a unified audio-video model for joint training on paired data. For streaming generation, we ask whether a native fast causal audio-video model can be trained directly, instead of following existing streaming distillation pipelines that typically train a bidirectional model first and then convert it into a causal generator through multiple distillation stages. Our answer is Mutual Forcing, which builds directly on native autoregressive model and integrates few-step and multi-step generation within a single weight-shared model, enabling self-distillation and improved training-inference consistency. The multi-step mode improves the few-step mode via self-distillation, while the few-step mode generates historical context during training to improve training-inference consistency; because the two modes share parameters, these two effects reinforce each other within a single model. Compared with prior approaches such as Self-Forcing, Mutual Forcing removes the need for an additional bidirectional teacher model, supports more flexible training sequence lengths, reduces training overhead, and allows the model to improve directly from real paired data rather than a fixed teacher. Experiments show that Mutual Forcing matches or surpasses strong baselines that require around 50 sampling steps while using only 4 to 8 steps, demonstrating substantial advantages in both efficiency and quality. The project page is available at https://mutualforcing.github.io.

analysis.tldr: 提出Mutual Forcing框架，通过双模式自蒸馏实现快速自回归音视频角色生成，仅需4-8步即可匹配50步基线质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有流式生成方法依赖多阶段蒸馏（先训练双向模型再转为因果生成器），训练开销大且训练-推理不一致；同时联合音视频建模和快速自回归生成面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何直接训练原生快速因果音视频模型，实现高效自回归生成并保持长程音视频同步。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Mutual Forcing框架，采用两阶段训练（先训练单模态生成器再联合训练），并在单个权重共享模型中集成少步和多步生成模式，通过自蒸馏相互增强。
contributions: 提出Mutual Forcing框架，无需额外双向教师模型，直接训练原生因果音视频模型。
双模式自蒸馏机制使少步和多步生成相互促进，提升训练-推理一致性。
实验表明仅需4-8步即可匹配或超越50步基线，显著提升效率和质量。
analysis.experiments: 在音视频角色生成任务上，与需要约50采样步数的强基线对比，Mutual Forcing使用4-8步即可达到匹配或更优效果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于音视频角色生成场景，泛化性未验证。
两阶段训练流程可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Mutual Forcing框架，通过双模式自蒸馏实现快速自回归音视频角色生成，仅需4-8步即可匹配50步基线质量。

papers.title: Magnification-Invariant Image Classification via Domain Generalization and Stable Sparse Embedding Signatures
papers.abstract: Magnification shift is a major obstacle to robust histopathology classification, because models trained on one imaging scale often generalize poorly to another. Here, we evaluated this problem on the BreaKHis dataset using a strict patient-disjoint leave-one-magnification-out protocol, comparing supervised baseline, baseline augmented with DCGAN-generated patches, and a gradient-reversal domain-general model designed to preserve discriminative information while suppressing magnification-specific variation. Across held-out magnifications, the domain-general model achieved the strongest overall discrimination and its clearest gain was observed when 200X was held out. By contrast, GAN augmentation produced inconsistent effects, improving some folds but degrading others, particularly at 400X. The domain-general model also yielded the lowest Brier score at 0.063 vs 0.089 at baseline. Sparse embedding analysis further revealed that domain-general training reduced average signature size more than three-fold (306 versus 1,074 dimensions) while preserving equivalent predictive performance (AUC: 0.967 vs 0.965; F1: 0.930 vs 0.931). It also increased cross-fold signature reproducibility from near-zero Jaccard overlap in the baseline to 0.99 between the 100X and 200X folds. These findings show that calibrated, compact, and transferable representations can be learned without added architectural complexity, with clear implications for the reliable deployment of computational pathology models across heterogeneous acquisition settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种域泛化方法实现放大倍数不变的病理图像分类，在BreaKHis数据集上优于基线并生成紧凑可迁移的稀疏嵌入签名。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理图像分类中，模型在不同放大倍数下泛化能力差，严重影响临床部署的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 解决病理图像分类中的放大倍数偏移问题，使模型对未见过的放大倍数仍保持高性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 域泛化训练将稀疏嵌入签名的平均维度从1074降至306，同时保持AUC和F1相当；跨折签名Jaccard重叠从接近0提升至0.99。
analysis.method: 采用梯度反转域泛化模型，在保留判别信息的同时抑制放大倍数特定变异，并结合稀疏嵌入分析。
contributions: 提出一种无需增加架构复杂度的域泛化方法，实现放大倍数不变的病理图像分类。
发现域泛化训练能产生更紧凑、可重复的稀疏嵌入签名，且性能不降。
analysis.experiments: 在BreaKHis数据集上采用严格的病人独立留一放大倍数评估协议，对比监督基线、DCGAN增强和域泛化模型。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集BreaKHis上验证，泛化性需更多数据集支持。
未探讨其他域泛化技术或更大规模模型的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种域泛化方法实现放大倍数不变的病理图像分类，在BreaKHis数据集上优于基线并生成紧凑可迁移的稀疏嵌入签名。

papers.title: Instruction-Evidence Contrastive Dual-Stream Decoding for Grounded Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) exhibit strong performance in instruction following and open-ended vision-language reasoning, yet they frequently generate fluent outputs that are weakly grounded in visual evidence. Prior works have shown that instruction prompting further worsens this issue by amplifying language priors, especially when the visual signal is uncertain or ambiguous. To address this challenge, we propose a decoding framework that explicitly balances linguistic informativeness and visual faithfulness during generation. Our method, Instruction-Evidence Contrastive Dual-Stream Decoding (IECD$^2$), maintains two parallel probability distribution of tokens at each decoding step: an instruction-driven stream that promotes expressive and informative responses, and an evidence-driven stream that enforces strict grounding in the image. These two streams are adaptively fused using a symmetric KL-based contrastive gate, which suppresses tokens favored by language priors but unsupported by visual evidence, while preserving them when both distributions agree. We evaluate IECD$^2$ on multiple datasets spanning various generative vision-language reasoning tasks such as captioning and visual question answering on multiple datasets such as, POPE, MME, VQAv2, AMBER, and MSCOCO. IECD$^2$ demonstrates consistent improvements in task accuracy and reasoning performance with substantial reduction in hallucination compared to state-of-the-art decoding approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出指令-证据对比双流解码框架，在视觉-语言推理中平衡语言信息性与视觉忠实性，减少幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在指令跟随和开放推理中表现强，但常生成流畅却缺乏视觉证据支撑的输出，指令提示会放大语言先验，尤其在视觉信号不确定时。
analysis.problem: VLM生成时语言先验与视觉证据不平衡，导致幻觉和弱视觉接地。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 指令提示会放大语言先验，使VLM在视觉信号模糊时更易产生幻觉。
analysis.method: 双流解码框架IECD²：维护指令驱动流（促进表达）和证据驱动流（强制视觉接地），通过对称KL对比门自适应融合，抑制语言先验支持但视觉不支持的词。
contributions: 提出IECD²解码框架，显式平衡语言信息性与视觉忠实性。
在多个VLM推理任务上减少幻觉，提升准确率和推理性能。
analysis.experiments: 在POPE、MME、VQAv2、AMBER、MSCOCO等数据集上评估，相比SOTA解码方法，任务准确率和推理性能一致提升，幻觉显著减少。
limitations: 可能依赖对比门超参数调优。
双流解码增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出指令-证据对比双流解码框架，在视觉-语言推理中平衡语言信息性与视觉忠实性，减少幻觉。

papers.title: MAIC-UI: Making Interactive Courseware with Generative UI
papers.abstract: Creating interactive STEM courseware traditionally requires HTML/CSS/JavaScript expertise, leaving barriers for educators. While generative AI can produce HTML codes, existing tools generate static presentations rather than interactive simulations, struggle with long documents, and lack pedagogical accuracy mechanisms. Furthermore, full regeneration for modifications requires 200--600 seconds, disrupting creative flow. We present MAIC-UI, a zero-code authoring system that enables educators to create and rapidly edit interactive courseware from textbooks, PPTs, and PDFs. MAIC-UI employs: (1) structured knowledge analysis with multi-modal understanding to ensure pedagogical rigor; (2) a two-stage generate-verify-optimize pipeline separating content alignment from visual refinement; and (3) Click-to-Locate editing with Unified Diff-based incremental generation achieving sub-10-second iteration cycles. A controlled lab study with 40 participants shows MAIC-UI reduces editing iterations (4.9 vs. 7.0) and significantly improves learnability and controllability compared to direct Text-to-HTML generation. A three-month classroom deployment with 53 high school students demonstrates that MAIC-UI fosters learning agency and reduces outcome disparities -- the pilot class achieved 9.21-point gains in STEM subjects compared to -2.32 points in control classes. Our code is available at https://github.com/THU-MAIC/MAIC-UI.

analysis.tldr: MAIC-UI 是一个零代码交互式课件制作系统，通过结构化知识分析和增量生成实现快速编辑与教学准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统交互式课件制作需要 HTML/CSS/JavaScript 专业知识，对教育者构成障碍；现有生成式 AI 工具生成静态内容而非交互模拟，且修改耗时较长。
analysis.problem: 如何让教育者无需编程即可快速创建和编辑具有教学准确性的交互式课件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用结构化知识分析与多模态理解确保教学严谨性；两阶段生成-验证-优化流程分离内容对齐与视觉细化；基于统一差异的增量生成实现点击定位编辑，迭代周期低于10秒。
contributions: 提出零代码交互式课件制作系统 MAIC-UI，支持从教材、PPT、PDF 创建课件。
设计结构化知识分析、两阶段生成-验证-优化流程和 Click-to-Locate 编辑方法，显著降低编辑迭代次数并提升可学性和可控性。
analysis.experiments: 40人受控实验表明 MAIC-UI 减少编辑迭代次数（4.9 vs 7.0），提升可学性和可控性；53名高中生的三个月课堂部署显示，实验组 STEM 科目成绩提升9.21分，对照组下降2.32分。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 STEM 领域，其他学科效果未知。
长期教学效果和可扩展性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAIC-UI 是一个零代码交互式课件制作系统，通过结构化知识分析和增量生成实现快速编辑与教学准确性。

papers.title: At the Edge of the Heart: ULP FPGA-Based CNN for On-Device Cardiac Feature Extraction in Smart Health Sensors for Astronauts
papers.abstract: The convergence of accelerating human spaceflight ambitions and critical terrestrial health monitoring demands is driving unprecedented requirements for reliable, real-time feature extraction on extremely resource-constrained wearable health sensors. We present an ultra-low-power (ULP) Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) based solution for real-time Seismocardiography (SCG) feature classification using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Our approach combines quantization-aware training with a systolic-array accelerator to enable efficient integer-only inference on the Lattice iCE40UP5K FPGA, which offers an ideal platform for battery-powered deployments -- particularly in space environments -- thanks to its power efficiency and radiation resilience. The implementation achieves a validation accuracy of 98% while consuming only 8.55 mW, completing inference in 95.5 ms with minimal hardware resources (2,861 LUTs and 7 DSP blocks). These results demonstrate that fully on-device SCG-based cardiac feature extraction is feasible on resource-constrained hardware, enabling energy-efficient, autonomous health monitoring for astronauts in long-duration space missions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于超低功耗FPGA的CNN方案，用于宇航员可穿戴传感器上的实时心脏特征提取，在iCE40UP5K上实现98%准确率和8.55 mW功耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着人类太空飞行加速和地面健康监测需求增长，极端资源受限的可穿戴传感器需要可靠、实时的特征提取，但现有方案在功耗和资源上难以满足。
analysis.problem: 在超低功耗FPGA上实现实时、高精度的Seismocardiography (SCG) 心脏特征分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合量化感知训练与脉动阵列加速器，在Lattice iCE40UP5K FPGA上实现仅整数推理的CNN。
contributions: 首个在iCE40UP5K FPGA上实现SCG特征分类的ULP方案，验证准确率98%。
极低功耗（8.55 mW）和快速推理（95.5 ms），适合宇航员长期任务中的自主健康监测。
analysis.experiments: 在Lattice iCE40UP5K FPGA上验证，使用2,861 LUTs和7个DSP块，功耗8.55 mW，推理时间95.5 ms，准确率98%。
limitations: 仅针对SCG信号，未验证其他生理信号。
可能未在真实太空环境中测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于超低功耗FPGA的CNN方案，用于宇航员可穿戴传感器上的实时心脏特征提取，在iCE40UP5K上实现98%准确率和8.55 mW功耗。

papers.title: StratFormer: Adaptive Opponent Modeling and Exploitation in Imperfect-Information Games
papers.abstract: We present StratFormer, a transformer-based meta-agent that learns to simultaneously model and exploit opponents in imperfect-information games through a two-phase curriculum. The first phase trains an opponent modeling head to identify behavioral patterns from action histories while the agent plays a game-theoretic optimal (GTO) policy. The second phase progressively shifts the policy toward best-response (BR) exploitation, guided by a per-opponent regularization schedule tied to exploitability. Our architecture introduces dual-turn tokens -- feature vectors constructed at both agent and opponent decision points -- coupled with bucket-rate features that encode opponent tendencies across five strategic contexts. On Leduc Hold'em, a small poker variant with six cards and two betting rounds, we test against six opponent archetypes at two strength levels each, with exploitability ranging from 0.15 to 1.26 Big Blinds (BB) per hand. StratFormer achieves an average exploitation gain of +0.106 BB per hand over GTO, with peak gains of +0.821 against highly exploitable opponents, while maintaining near-equilibrium safety.

analysis.tldr: StratFormer通过双阶段课程学习在非完美信息博弈中同时建模和利用对手，在Leduc Hold'em上实现了平均+0.106 BB/手的利用增益。
analysis.research_motivation: 在非完美信息博弈中，对手建模和利用是提升智能体性能的关键，但现有方法难以在保持安全性的同时有效利用对手弱点。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个智能体，使其既能准确建模对手行为模式，又能安全地利用对手弱点，避免被反利用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出StratFormer，一种基于Transformer的元智能体，采用双阶段课程学习：第一阶段训练对手建模头，同时智能体执行博弈论最优策略；第二阶段通过基于可剥削性的正则化调度，逐步将策略转向最佳响应利用。架构引入双回合令牌和桶率特征。
contributions: 提出双阶段课程学习框架，实现对手建模与利用的平衡。
设计双回合令牌和桶率特征，有效编码对手倾向。
在Leduc Hold'em上验证了方法的有效性，平均利用增益+0.106 BB/手。
analysis.experiments: 在Leduc Hold'em上测试了六种对手原型，每种两个强度水平，可剥削性范围0.15-1.26 BB/手。StratFormer平均利用增益+0.106 BB/手，峰值+0.821 BB/手，同时保持近均衡安全性。
limitations: 仅在小型扑克变体Leduc Hold'em上测试，泛化性未知。
对手原型数量有限，可能无法覆盖真实场景的多样性。

papers.title: Improving Diversity in Black-box Few-shot Knowledge Distillation
papers.abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a well-known technique to effectively compress a large network (teacher) to a smaller network (student) with little sacrifice in performance. However, most KD methods require a large training set and internal access to the teacher, which are rarely available due to various restrictions. These challenges have originated a more practical setting known as black-box few-shot KD, where the student is trained with few images and a black-box teacher. Recent approaches typically generate additional synthetic images but lack an active strategy to promote their diversity, a crucial factor for student learning. To address these problems, we propose a novel training scheme for generative adversarial networks, where we adaptively select high-confidence images under the teacher's supervision and introduce them to the adversarial learning on-the-fly. Our approach helps expand and improve the diversity of the distillation set, significantly boosting student accuracy. Through extensive experiments, we achieve state-of-the-art results among other few-shot KD methods on seven image datasets. The code is available at https://github.com/votrinhan88/divbfkd.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种主动增强多样性的黑盒少样本知识蒸馏方法，通过自适应选择高置信度图像提升学生网络精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统知识蒸馏需要大量训练数据和教师网络内部访问，实际场景中常受限制；现有黑盒少样本KD方法虽能生成合成图像，但缺乏主动促进多样性的策略，限制了学生网络的学习效果。
analysis.problem: 解决黑盒少样本知识蒸馏中合成图像多样性不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出合成图像的多样性是学生网络学习的关键因素，但现有方法缺乏主动策略来提升多样性。
analysis.method: 提出一种新的生成对抗网络训练方案，在教师监督下自适应选择高置信度图像，并实时引入对抗学习过程，以扩展和改善蒸馏集的多样性。
contributions: 提出一种主动增强多样性的黑盒少样本知识蒸馏方法

papers.title: Diverse Image Priors for Black-box Data-free Knowledge Distillation
papers.abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) represents a vital mechanism to transfer expertise from complex teacher networks to efficient student models. However, in decentralized or secure AI ecosystems, privacy regulations and proprietary interests often restrict access to the teacher's interface and original datasets. These constraints define a challenging black-box data-free KD scenario where only top-1 predictions and no training data are available. While recent approaches utilize synthetic data, they still face limitations in data diversity and distillation signals. We propose Diverse Image Priors Knowledge Distillation (DIP-KD), a framework that addresses these challenges through a three-phase collaborative pipeline: (1) Synthesis of image priors to capture diverse visual patterns and semantics; (2) Contrast to enhance the collective distinction between synthetic samples via contrastive learning; and (3) Distillation via a novel primer student that enables soft-probability KD. Our evaluation across 12 benchmarks shows that DIP-KD achieves state-of-the-art performance, with ablations confirming data diversity as critical for knowledge acquisition in restricted AI environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出DIP-KD框架，利用多样图像先验和对比学习实现黑盒无数据知识蒸馏，在12个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 在去中心化或安全AI生态中，隐私法规和专有利益限制了对教师模型接口和原始数据集的访问，导致黑盒无数据知识蒸馏场景极具挑战性。现有方法使用合成数据但受限于数据多样性和蒸馏信号。
analysis.problem: 解决黑盒无数据知识蒸馏中仅能获取教师模型top-1预测且无训练数据的问题，提升合成数据的多样性和蒸馏效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 消融实验证实数据多样性是限制知识获取的关键因素。
analysis.method: 提出DIP-KD框架，包含三阶段协作流程：(1) 合成图像先验以捕获多样视觉模式和语义；(2) 通过对比学习增强合成样本间的集体区分性；(3) 利用新颖的primer学生模型实现软概率知识蒸馏。
contributions: 提出DIP-KD框架，通过多样图像先验和对比学习提升黑盒无数据知识蒸馏性能。
在12个基准上取得SOTA结果，并通过消融实验验证数据多样性的关键作用。
analysis.experiments: 在12个基准数据集上评估，达到SOTA性能，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 可能依赖先验库的质量和多样性。

papers.title: Sketch2Arti: Sketch-based Articulation Modeling of CAD Objects
papers.abstract: Articulation modeling aims to infer movable parts and their motion parameters for a 3D object, enabling interactive animation, simulation, and shape editing. In this paper, we present Sketch2Arti, the first sketch-based articulation modeling system for CAD objects. Our key observation is that designers naturally communicate articulation intent through lightweight sketches (e.g., arrows and strokes) that indicate how parts should move, yet translating such sketches into articulated 3D models remains largely manual. Sketch2Arti bridges this gap by enabling users to specify articulation through simple 2D sketches drawn from a chosen viewpoint. Given a CAD model and user sketches, our approach automatically discovers the corresponding movable parts and predicts their motion parameters, allowing iterative modeling of multiple articulations on complex objects with fine-grained control. Importantly, Sketch2Arti is trained in a category-agnostic manner without requiring object category information, leading to strong generalization to diverse objects beyond existing articulation datasets. Moreover, for shell models lacking interior structures, Sketch2Arti supports controllable internal completion guided by user sketches, generating plausible internal components consistent with the existing geometry and predicted motion constraints. Comprehensive experiments and user evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness, controllability, and generalization of Sketch2Arti. The code, dataset, and the prototype system are at https://arlo-yang.github.io/Sketch2Arti.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于草图交互的CAD物体关节建模系统，通过用户绘制的2D草图自动推断可动部件及其运动参数。
analysis.research_motivation: 设计师通常通过轻量级草图（如箭头、笔画）表达关节运动意图，但将此类草图转化为3D关节模型仍主要依赖手动操作，缺乏自动化工具。

支持可控内部结构补全，生成与现有几何和运动约束一致的内部组件。

papers.title: Open Problems in Frontier AI Risk Management
papers.abstract: Frontier AI both amplifies existing risks and introduces qualitatively novel challenges. Not only is there a notable lack of stable scientific consensus resulting from the rapid pace of technological change, but emerging frontier AI safety practices are often misaligned with, or may undermine, established risk management frameworks. To address these challenges, we systematically surface open problems in frontier AI risk management. Adopting a problem-oriented approach, we examine each stage of the risk management process - risk planning, identification, analysis, evaluation, and mitigation - through a structured review of the literature, identifying unresolved challenges and the actors best positioned to address them. Recognising that different types of open problems call for different responses, we classify open problems according to whether they reflect (a) a lack of scientific or technical consensus, (b) misalignment with, or challenges to, established risk management frameworks, or (c) shortcomings in implementation despite apparent consensus and alignment. By mapping these open problems and identifying the actors best positioned to address them - including developers, deployers, regulators, standards bodies, researchers, and third-party evaluators - this work aims to clarify where progress is needed to enable robust and meaningful consensus on frontier AI risk management.The paper does not propose specific solutions; instead, it provides a problem-oriented, agenda-setting reference document, complemented by a living online repository, intended to support coordination, reduce duplication, and guide future research and governance efforts.

analysis.tldr: 系统梳理前沿AI风险管理中的开放问题，按风险规划、识别、分析、评估、缓解各阶段分类，并指出各问题应由哪些主体解决。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿AI既放大现有风险又引入全新挑战，但技术快速变化导致缺乏稳定科学共识，且新兴安全实践常与既有风险管理框架不匹配甚至冲突，亟需系统梳理开放问题以推动协调和治理。
analysis.problem: 前沿AI风险管理中存在哪些开放问题？如何分类并明确各问题的责任主体？

papers.title: Sustained Gradient Alignment Mediates Subliminal Learning in a Multi-Step Setting: Evidence from MNIST Auxiliary Logit Distillation Experiment
papers.abstract: In the MNIST auxiliary logit distillation experiment, a student can acquire an unintended teacher trait despite distilling only on no-class logits through a phenomenon called subliminal learning. Under a single-step gradient descent assumption, subliminal learning theory attributes this effect to alignment between the trait and distillation gradients, but does not guarantee that this alignment persists in a multi-step setting. We empirically show that gradient alignment remains weakly but consistently positive throughout training and causally contributes to trait acquisition. We show that a mitigation method called liminal training works by attenuating the alignment and fails to stop trait acquisition in this setup. These results suggest that mitigation methods that operate in this regime may not reliably suppress trait acquisition when the first-order drive dominates.

analysis.tldr: 多步梯度下降中持续的正梯度对齐驱动潜隐学习，现有缓解方法失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 潜隐学习现象表明学生模型可能从蒸馏中习得非目标特征，但现有理论仅分析单步梯度下降，无法解释多步训练中的行为，导致缓解方法设计缺乏依据。
analysis.problem: 多步梯度下降场景下，梯度对齐是否持续存在并驱动潜隐学习，以及现有缓解方法是否有效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出梯度对齐在整个训练过程中保持弱但一致的正值，且因果贡献于特征习得；liminal training通过减弱对齐来缓解，但未能完全阻止特征习得。
analysis.method: 通过MNIST辅助logit蒸馏实验，实证分析多步训练中梯度对齐的持续性及其因果作用，并测试liminal training缓解方法。

揭示liminal training缓解方法在此设置下失效

papers.title: Can Code Evaluation Metrics Detect Code Plagiarism?
papers.abstract: Source Code Plagiarism Detection (SCPD) plays an important role in maintaining fairness and academic integrity in software engineering education. Code Evaluation Metrics (CEMs) are developed for assessing code generation tasks. However, it remains unclear whether such metrics can reliably detect plagiarism across different levels of modification (L1-L6), increasing in complexity. In this paper, we perform a comparative empirical study using two open-source labelled datasets, ConPlag (raw and template-free versions) and IRPlag. We evaluate five CEMs, namely CodeBLEU, CrystalBLEU, RUBY, Tree Structured Edit Distance (TSED), and CodeBERTScore. The performance is evaluated using threshold-free ranking-based measures to assess overall, per dataset, and per-level plagiarism performance. The results are compared against state-of-the-art (SOTA) Source Code Plagiarism Detection Tools (SCPDTs), JPlag and Dolos. Our findings show that without preprocessing, Dolos achieves the highest overall ranking performance, while among the individual metrics, CrystalBLEU, CodeBLEU, and RUBY outperform JPlag. Performance is strongest at L1 and drops from L4 onward, while CrystalBLEU remains competitive on L6. With preprocessing, CrystalBLEU surpasses Dolos overall. Per dataset, Dolos achieved the best ranking on the ConPlag raw dataset, while CrystalBLEU was the best-performing metric on the remaining datasets. At the plagiarism levels, Dolos remains strongest on L4, while Crystal-BLEU leads most of the remaining difficult levels. These results indicate that CEMs are comparable to dedicated tools in terms of ranking metrics.

analysis.tldr: 代码评估指标在检测代码抄袭方面与专用工具表现相当，其中CrystalBLEU在预处理后甚至超越SOTA工具Dolos。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码抄袭检测对维护学术诚信至关重要，但现有专用工具（如JPlag、Dolos）存在局限性，而代码评估指标（CEMs）虽广泛用于代码生成评估，其抄袭检测能力尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 探究代码评估指标（CEMs）能否有效检测不同修改级别（L1-L6）的代码抄袭，并与专用抄袭检测工具（SCPDTs）进行性能比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无预处理时，Dolos整体排名最高；CrystalBLEU、CodeBLEU和RUBY优于JPlag。性能在L1最强，从L4开始下降，但CrystalBLEU在L6仍具竞争力。预处理后，CrystalBLEU整体超越Dolos。
analysis.method: 使用两个开源数据集（ConPlag和IRPlag），评估五种CEMs（CodeBLEU、CrystalBLEU、RUBY、TSED、CodeBERTScore），采用无阈值排名指标，与JPlag和Dolos对比。
contributions: 首次系统比较代码评估指标与专用工具在抄袭检测上的性能。
发现CrystalBLEU在预处理后整体表现优于SOTA工具Dolos。
揭示了不同修改级别下各指标的性能变化规律。
analysis.experiments: 在ConPlag（原始和去模板版本）和IRPlag数据集上，使用排名指标评估五种CEMs和两种SCPDTs，分析了整体、每个数据集和每个抄袭级别的性能。
limitations: 仅评估了五种CEMs，可能未覆盖所有相关指标。
数据集规模有限，可能影响泛化性。
