papers.title: CGU-ILALab at FoodBench-QA 2026: Comparing Traditional and LLM-based Approaches for Recipe Nutrient Estimation
papers.abstract: Accurate nutrient estimation from unstructured recipe text is an important yet challenging problem in dietary monitoring, due to ambiguous ingredient terminology and highly variable quantity expressions. We systematically evaluate models spanning a wide range of representational capacity, from lexical matching methods (TF-IDF with Ridge Regression), to deep semantic encoders (DeBERTa-v3), to generative reasoning with large language models (LLMs). Under the strict tolerance criteria defined by EU Regulation 1169/2011, our empirical results reveal a clear trade-off between predictive accuracy and computational efficiency. The TF-IDF baseline achieves moderate nutrient estimation performance with near-instantaneous inference, whereas the DeBERTa-v3 encoder performs poorly under task-specific data scarcity. In contrast, few-shot LLM inference (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Flash) and a hybrid LLM refinement pipeline (TF-IDF combined with Gemini 2.5 Flash) deliver the highest validation accuracy across all nutrient categories. These improvements likely arise from the ability of LLMs to leverage pre-trained world knowledge to resolve ambiguous terminology and normalize non-standard units, which remain difficult for purely lexical approaches. However, these gains come at the cost of substantially higher inference latency, highlighting a practical deployment trade-off between real-time efficiency and nutritional precision in dietary monitoring systems.

analysis.tldr: 在食谱营养估算任务中，LLM方法精度最高但推理延迟大，传统TF-IDF基线速度快但精度中等，DeBERTa-v3因数据稀缺表现最差。
analysis.research_motivation: 从非结构化食谱文本中准确估算营养成分对于饮食监测至关重要，但存在成分术语歧义和数量表达多变等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何在不同模型容量下平衡营养估算的预测精度与计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TF-IDF基线在近即时推理下达到中等性能；DeBERTa-v3在任务特定数据稀缺时表现差；少样本LLM推理和混合LLM精炼管道在所有营养类别上取得最高验证精度，但推理延迟显著增加。
analysis.method: 系统比较了TF-IDF+Ridge回归、DeBERTa-v3、少样本LLM推理（Gemini 2.5 Flash）以及TF-IDF+LLM混合精炼管道。
contributions: 在EU法规严格容差标准下，系统评估了从传统方法到LLM的多种营养估算方法。
揭示了预测精度与计算效率之间的实际部署权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在FoodBench-QA 2026数据集上，使用EU Regulation 1169/2011的严格容差标准进行评估。
limitations: 仅评估了单一LLM（Gemini 2.5 Flash），未探索其他LLM。
未提供具体数值结果或统计显著性检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在食谱营养估算任务中，LLM方法精度最高但推理延迟大，传统TF-IDF基线速度快但精度中等，DeBERTa-v3因数据稀缺表现最差。

papers.title: Lightweight Quantum Agent for Edge Systems: Joint PQC and NOMA Resource Allocation
papers.abstract: In the context of quantum secure scenarios, existing research on mobile edge devices and intelligent computing and edge (ICE) systems based on the Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA) communication model have overlooked the energy consumption overhead of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) modules, and the high complexity of traditional resource allocation algorithms fails to meet the demands of real-time decision-making. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a lightweight agentic AI framework designed for online joint optimization within ICE-enabled mobile devices. The scheme constructs a multi-stage stochastic Mixed Integer Nonlinear Programming (MINLP) model that incorporates static power-consumption constraints for PQC modules. Based on Lyapunov optimization theory, the long-term optimization problem is decoupled, and a linear complexity algorithm is proposed to solve the nonconvex challenges of NOMA power allocation . Simulation results verify that the proposed scheme significantly improves computational throughput while ensuring system queue stability and energy consumption constraints. Compared with traditional Successive Convex Approximation (SCA) algorithms, the complexity is reduced to $\mathcal{O}(N)$, achieving a speedup of approximately 46 times when the number of devices $N=35$, thereby meeting the real-time decision-making requirements in dynamic wireless environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级量子智能体框架，联合优化PQC与NOMA资源分配，实现线性复杂度与实时决策。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有移动边缘设备研究忽视PQC模块能耗开销，传统资源分配算法复杂度高，无法满足实时决策需求。
analysis.problem: 在量子安全场景下，联合优化PQC能耗与NOMA资源分配，实现低复杂度实时决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建多阶段随机MINLP模型，基于Lyapunov优化解耦长期优化问题，提出线性复杂度算法求解非凸功率分配。
contributions: 提出轻量级智能体框架，联合优化PQC与NOMA资源分配。
基于Lyapunov优化设计线性复杂度算法，复杂度降至O(N)，相比SCA加速约46倍。
analysis.experiments: 仿真验证了方案在保证队列稳定性和能耗约束下显著提升计算吞吐量，N=35时复杂度降低至O(N)，加速约46倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定NOMA场景，泛化性未验证。
未讨论实际硬件部署中的量子噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级量子智能体框架，联合优化PQC与NOMA资源分配，实现线性复杂度与实时决策。

papers.title: Measuring the Sensitivity of Classification Models with the Error Sensitivity Profile
papers.abstract: The quality of training data is critical to the performance of machine learning models. In this paper, the Error Sensitivity Profile (ESP) is proposed. It quantifies the sensitivity of model performance to errors in a single feature or in multiple features. By leveraging ESP, data-cleaning efforts can be prioritized based on error types and features most likely to affect model performance. To support the computation of this metric, an integrated suite of tools, called \dirty, is created. We conduct an extensive experimental study on two widely used datasets using 14 classification models, revealing that performance degradation is not always predictable from simple correlations with the target variable.

analysis.tldr: 提出错误敏感性剖面（ESP）来量化分类模型对数据错误的敏感性，并开发了配套工具dirty。
analysis.research_motivation: 训练数据质量对模型性能至关重要，但现有方法难以量化不同特征或错误类型对模型性能的具体影响，导致数据清洗工作缺乏优先级指导。
analysis.problem: 如何量化分类模型对单个或多个特征中错误的敏感性，以便优先处理最影响性能的错误类型和特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现性能下降并不总是与目标变量的简单相关性可预测，表明错误敏感性具有复杂性。
analysis.method: 提出错误敏感性剖面（ESP），通过测量模型性能对特征错误的敏感程度来量化，并开发集成工具dirty支持计算。
contributions: 提出ESP指标，量化模型对单个或多个特征错误的敏感性。
开发dirty工具套件，支持ESP计算。
在14个分类模型和两个数据集上实验，揭示性能下降与简单相关性的不可预测性。
analysis.experiments: 在两个广泛使用的数据集上使用14个分类模型进行实验，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类模型，未扩展到回归或其他任务。
实验数据集有限，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Threat-Oriented Digital Twinning for Security Evaluation of Autonomous Platforms
papers.abstract: Open, unclassified research on secure autonomy is constrained by limited access to operational platforms, contested communications infrastructure, and representative adversarial test conditions. This paper presents a threat-oriented digital twinning methodology for cybersecurity evaluation of learning-enabled autonomous platforms. The approach is instantiated as an open-source, modular twin of a representative autonomy stack with separated sensing, autonomy, and supervisory-control functions; confidence-gated multi-modal perception; explicit command and telemetry trust boundaries; and runtime hold-safe behavior. The contribution is methodological: a reproducible design pattern that translates threat analysis into observable, controllable tests for spoofing, replay, malformed-input injection, degraded sensing, and adversarial ML stress. Although the implemented proxy is ground based, the architecture is intentionally framed around stack elements shared with UAV and space systems, including constrained onboard compute, intermittent or high-latency links, probabilistic perception, and mission-critical recovery behavior. The result is an implementable research scaffold for dependable and secure autonomy studies across UAV and space domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出威胁导向数字孪生方法，用于自主平台网络安全评估，并开源模块化代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放、非密的安全自主研究受限于对操作平台、争议通信基础设施和代表性对抗测试条件的访问，缺乏可复现的测试环境。

contributions: 提出一种可复现的设计模式，将威胁分析转化为针对欺骗、重放、恶意输入注入、感知退化及对抗性ML压力的可观察、可控测试。
开源实现一个代表自主栈的模块化数字孪生，架构设计面向无人机和空间系统共享的栈元素（如受限机载计算、间歇/高延迟链路、概率感知等）。

papers.title: Quantum-Inspired Robust and Scalable SAR Object Classification
papers.abstract: SAR image classification naturally has to deal with huge noise and a high dynamic range particularly requiring robust classification models. Additionally, the deployment of these models on edge devices, such as drones and military aircraft, requires a careful balance between model size and classification accuracy. This study explores the potential of tensor networks to meet these robustness requirements, specifically evaluating their resilience to data poisoning. Unlike previous works that concentrated on conventional neural networks for SAR object detection, this research focuses on the robustness and model reduction capabilities of tensor networks in object classification. Our findings indicate that tensor networks are adept at addressing both the challenges of robustness and the need for model efficiency, thereby contributing valuable insights to the ongoing discourse in radar applications and deep learning methodologies in general.

analysis.tldr: 探索张量网络在SAR图像分类中的鲁棒性和模型压缩能力。
analysis.research_motivation: SAR图像分类面临巨大噪声和高动态范围，需要鲁棒模型；同时边缘设备部署要求模型大小与精度平衡。
analysis.problem: 现有基于传统神经网络的SAR目标检测方法在鲁棒性和模型效率方面存在不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: QAROO: AI-Driven Online Task Offloading for Energy-Efficient and Sustainable MEC Networks
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) and intelligent science, intelligent edge computing has been widely adopted. However, the limitations of traditional methods, such as poor adaptability and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, are becoming increasingly evident. To enable sustainable and resource-efficient edge applications, this paper proposes an online task offloading framework for wireless powered mobile edge computing (MEC) networks, called Quantum Attention-based Reinforcement learning for Online Offloading (QAROO). The system employs a binary offloading strategy with the aim of co-optimizing computing and energy resources in dynamic channel environments. In response to the issues of poor adaptability in traditional approaches and the slow convergence of heuristic algorithms, the framework integrates quantum neural networks and attention mechanisms, introducing three key improvements: using recurrent neural networks to enhance temporal modeling capability, proposing an uncertainty-guided quantization method to improve exploration efficiency, and incorporating attention mechanisms into quantum networks to strengthen feature representation. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms comparative schemes in terms of normalized computation speed and processing time, offering an efficient and stable solution for online task offloading in large-scale Internet of Things (IoT) dynamic environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出QAROO框架，结合量子神经网络与注意力机制，实现MEC网络中的在线任务卸载与能效优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统任务卸载方法适应性差、启发式算法收敛慢，难以满足动态信道环境下大规模IoT网络的能效与资源协同优化需求。
analysis.problem: 无线供能MEC网络中，如何在动态信道环境下实现计算与能源资源的联合优化，并解决传统方法适应性差和收敛慢的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法在动态环境中适应性差，启发式算法收敛速度慢，导致卸载决策效率低。
analysis.method: 提出QAROO框架，采用二进制卸载策略，集成量子神经网络与注意力机制，通过RNN增强时序建模、不确定性引导量化提升探索效率、注意力机制强化特征表示。
contributions: 提出QAROO在线任务卸载框架，融合量子神经网络与注意力机制。
引入三项改进：RNN时序建模、不确定性引导量化、注意力增强特征表示。

limitations: 可能未在真实硬件或大规模场景中验证。
量子神经网络的实际部署可行性未讨论。

papers.title: SAFEdit: Does Multi-Agent Decomposition Resolve the Reliability Challenges of Instructed Code Editing?
papers.abstract: Instructed code editing is a significant challenge for large language models (LLMs). On the EditBench benchmark, 39 of 40 evaluated models obtain a task success rate (TSR) below 60 percent, highlighting a gap between general code generation and the ability to perform instruction-driven editing under executable test constraints. To address this, we propose SAFEdit, a multi-agent framework for instructed code editing that decomposes the editing process into specialized roles to improve reliability and reduce unintended code changes. A Planner Agent produces an explicit, visibility-aware edit plan, an Editor Agent applies minimal, literal code modifications, and a Verifier Agent executes real test runs. When tests fail, SAFEdit uses a Failure Abstraction Layer (FAL) to transform raw test logs into structured diagnostic feedback, which is fed back to the Editor to support iterative refinement. We compare SAFEdit against both prior single-model results reported for EditBench and an implemented ReAct single-agent baseline under the same evaluation conditions. We used EditBench to evaluate SAFEdit on 445 code editing instances in five languages (English, Polish, Spanish, Chinese, and Russian) under varying spatial context variants. SAFEdit achieved 68.6 percent TSR, outperforming the single-model baseline by 3.8 percentage points and the ReAct single-agent baseline by 8.6 percentage points. The iterative refinement loop was found to contribute 17.4 percentage points to SAFEdit's overall success rate. SAFEdit's automated error analysis further indicates a reduction in instruction-level hallucinations compared to single-agent approaches, providing an additional framework component for interpreting failures beyond pass or fail outcomes.

analysis.tldr: SAFEdit通过多智能体分解和失败抽象层，将代码编辑任务成功率提升至68.6%，显著优于单模型和单智能体基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令驱动的代码编辑对LLM极具挑战，现有模型在EditBench基准上成功率普遍低于60%，存在通用代码生成与指令编辑能力之间的显著差距。
analysis.problem: 如何提高LLM在指令代码编辑任务中的可靠性和成功率，减少非预期的代码变更和指令级幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单模型和单智能体方法在EditBench上表现不佳，且迭代细化循环对成功率贡献显著（17.4个百分点），表明多轮反馈机制的有效性。
analysis.method: 提出SAFEdit多智能体框架，包含规划器（生成可见性感知编辑计划）、编辑器（执行最小字面修改）和验证器（运行测试）；失败时通过失败抽象层（FAL）将原始测试日志转化为结构化诊断反馈，驱动编辑器迭代改进。
contributions: 提出SAFEdit多智能体框架，通过角色分解和失败抽象层提升指令代码编辑的可靠性。
在EditBench上跨5种语言和空间变体取得68.6% TSR，超过单模型基线3.8个百分点和ReAct单智能体基线8.6个百分点。
验证了迭代细化循环对成功率的显著贡献（17.4个百分点），并展示了自动错误分析在减少指令级幻觉方面的作用。
analysis.experiments: 在EditBench基准上使用445个代码编辑实例，涵盖5种语言（英语、波兰语、西班牙语、中文、俄语）和不同空间上下文变体，评估了SAFEdit与单模型基线及ReAct单智能体基线的对比。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨语言或跨任务泛化能力的具体分析。
未讨论框架在更大规模或更复杂代码库上的扩展性。

papers.title: Verification of Neural Networks (Lecture Notes)
papers.abstract: These lecture notes provide an introduction to the verification of neural networks from a theoretical perspective. We discuss feed-forward neural networks, recurrent neural networks, attention mechanisms, and transformers, together with specification languages and algorithmic verification techniques.

analysis.tldr: 从理论视角介绍神经网络验证的讲义，涵盖前馈、循环、注意力机制和Transformer。

contributions: 提供神经网络验证的理论入门，涵盖多种网络架构。

papers.title: Toward Scalable Terminal Task Synthesis via Skill Graphs
papers.abstract: Terminal agents have demonstrated strong potential for autonomous command-line execution, yet their training remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality and diverse execution trajectories. Existing approaches mitigate this bottleneck by synthesizing large-scale terminal task instances for trajectory sampling. However, they primarily focus on scaling the number of tasks while providing limited control over the diversity of execution trajectories that agents actually experience during training. In this paper, we present SkillSynth, an automated framework for terminal task synthesis built on a scenario-mediated skill graph. SkillSynth first constructs a large-scale skill graph, where scenarios serve as intermediate transition nodes that connect diverse command-line skills. It then samples paths from this graph as abstractions of real-world workflows, and uses a multi-agent harness to instantiate them into executable task instances. By grounding task synthesis in graph-sampled workflow paths, SkillSynth explicitly controls the diversity of minimal execution trajectories required to solve the synthesized tasks. Experiments on Terminal-Bench demonstrate the effectiveness of SkillSynth. Moreover, task instances synthesized by SkillSynth have been adopted to train Hy3 Preview, contributing to its enhanced agentic capabilities in terminal-based settings.

analysis.tldr: SkillSynth 通过技能图控制终端任务合成中的轨迹多样性，提升智能体训练效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 终端智能体训练受限于高质量执行轨迹的稀缺，现有方法虽能合成大量任务实例，但缺乏对训练轨迹多样性的控制。
analysis.problem: 如何自动合成终端任务实例，使其在执行轨迹多样性上可控，以提升智能体训练效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建以场景为中介节点的技能图，采样路径作为工作流抽象，再用多智能体框架实例化为可执行任务。
contributions: 提出 SkillSynth 框架，基于场景中介的技能图实现终端任务合成。
通过图采样路径显式控制执行轨迹多样性，并在 Terminal-Bench 上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Terminal-Bench 上评估，并用于训练 Hy3 Preview 模型，提升了终端智能体能力。
limitations: 可能依赖技能图的构建质量。

papers.title: Scalable Inference Architectures for Compound AI Systems: A Production Deployment Study
papers.abstract: Modern enterprise AI applications increasingly rely on compound AI systems - architectures that compose multiple models, retrievers, and tools to accomplish complex tasks. Deploying such systems in production demands inference infrastructure that can efficiently serve concurrent, heterogeneous model invocations while maintaining cost-effectiveness and low latency. This paper presents a production deployment study of a modular, platform-agnostic inference architecture developed at Salesforce to support compound AI use cases including Agentforce (autonomous AI agents) and ApexGuru (AI-powered code analysis). The system integrates serverless execution, dynamic autoscaling, and MLOps pipelines to deliver consistent low-latency inference across multi-component agent workflows. We report production results demonstrating over 50% reduction in tail latency (P95), up to 3.9x throughput improvement, and 30 to 40% cost savings compared to prior static deployments. We further present a novel analysis of compound-system-specific challenges including multi-model fan-out overhead, cascading cold-start propagation, and heterogeneous scaling dynamics that emerge uniquely when serving agentic workloads. Through detailed case studies and operational lessons, we illustrate how the architecture enables compound AI systems to scale model invocations in parallel, handle bursty multi-agent workloads, and support rapid model iteration - capabilities essential for operationalizing agentic AI at enterprise scale.

analysis.tldr: Salesforce 提出模块化推理架构，通过无服务器执行和动态扩缩容，在复合 AI 系统中实现 P95 延迟降低 50%、吞吐量提升 3.9 倍、成本节省 30-40%。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业级 AI 应用依赖复合 AI 系统（多模型、检索器、工具组合），但现有推理基础设施难以高效服务并发、异构的模型调用，面临成本高、延迟大、扩缩容困难等挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可扩展的推理架构，以支持复合 AI 系统中多组件、异构模型的高效并发推理，同时保持低延迟、高吞吐和成本效益。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要分析了复合 AI 系统特有的挑战：多模型扇出开销、级联冷启动传播、异构扩缩容动态，这些在代理工作负载中尤为突出。
analysis.method: 提出模块化、平台无关的推理架构，集成无服务器执行、动态自动扩缩容和 MLOps 流水线，支持多组件代理工作流的低延迟推理。
contributions: 设计并部署了可扩展的推理架构，在 Salesforce 生产环境中验证了延迟、吞吐和成本效益的显著提升。
首次分析了复合 AI 系统特有的挑战（多模型扇出、级联冷启动、异构扩缩容），并提供了案例研究和操作经验。
analysis.experiments: 在 Salesforce 生产环境中部署，报告了 P95 延迟降低 50% 以上、吞吐量提升 3.9 倍、成本节省 30-40% 的结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工作负载模式，通用性需进一步验证。
未讨论极端负载下的性能边界或故障恢复机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Salesforce 提出模块化推理架构，通过无服务器执行和动态扩缩容，在复合 AI 系统中实现 P95 延迟降低 50%、吞吐量提升 3.9 倍、成本节省 30-40%。

papers.title: Toward Multimodal Conversational AI for Age-Related Macular Degeneration
papers.abstract: Despite strong performance of deep learning models in retinal disease detection, most systems produce static predictions without clinical reasoning or interactive explanation. Recent advances in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) integrate diagnostic predictions with clinically meaningful dialogue to support clinical decision-making and patient counseling. In this study, OcularChat, an MLLM, was fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-VL using simulated patient-physician dialogues to diagnose age-related macular degeneration (AMD) through visual question answering on color fundus photographs (CFPs). A total of 705,850 simulated dialogues paired with 46,167 CFPs were generated to train OcularChat to identify key AMD features and produce reasoned predictions. OcularChat demonstrated strong classification performance in AREDS, achieving accuracies of 0.954, 0.849, and 0.678 for the three diagnostic tasks: advanced AMD, pigmentary abnormalities, and drusen size, significantly outperforming existing MLLMs. On AREDS2, OcularChat remained the top-performing method on all tasks. Across three independent ophthalmologist graders, OcularChat achieved higher mean scores than a strong baseline model for advanced AMD (3.503 vs. 2.833), pigmentary abnormalities (3.272 vs. 2.828), drusen size (3.064 vs. 2.433), and overall impression (2.978 vs. 2.464) on a 5-point clinical grading rubric. Beyond strong objective performance in AMD severity classification, OcularChat demonstrated the ability to provide diagnostic reasoning, clinically relevant explanations, and interactive dialogue, with high performance in subjective ophthalmologist evaluation. These findings suggest that MLLMs may enable accurate, interpretable, and clinically useful image-based diagnosis and classification of AMD.

analysis.tldr: OcularChat是一个基于Qwen2.5-VL微调的多模态大模型，通过模拟医患对话在眼底彩照上诊断年龄相关性黄斑变性，在分类和临床评估上均优于现有模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习模型在视网膜疾病检测中表现强劲，但大多产生静态预测，缺乏临床推理或交互式解释，限制了其在临床决策和患者咨询中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够通过视觉问答进行交互式诊断推理的多模态对话系统，用于年龄相关性黄斑变性的分类和解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Qwen2.5-VL，使用705,850个模拟医患对话和46,167张眼底彩照进行微调，训练OcularChat识别AMD关键特征并生成有推理依据的预测。
contributions: 构建了OcularChat，一个针对AMD诊断的多模态对话AI，能够进行交互式诊断推理和解释。
在AREDS和AREDS2数据集上，OcularChat在三个诊断任务上均显著优于现有MLLMs，并在眼科医生主观评估中获得更高评分。
analysis.experiments: 在AREDS数据集上，OcularChat在晚期AMD、色素异常和玻璃膜疣大小三个任务上分别达到0.954、0.849和0.678的准确率，显著优于现有MLLMs；在AREDS2上保持最优。三名独立眼科医生在5分制临床评分中，OcularChat在晚期AMD（3.503 vs. 2.833）、色素异常（3.272 vs. 2.828）、玻璃膜疣大小（3.064 vs. 2.433）和总体印象（2.978 vs. 2.464）上均高于强基线模型。
limitations: 模拟对话可能与真实临床对话存在差异，需进一步验证泛化性。
仅针对AMD，未评估对其他视网膜疾病的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OcularChat是一个基于Qwen2.5-VL微调的多模态大模型，通过模拟医患对话在眼底彩照上诊断年龄相关性黄斑变性，在分类和临床评估上均优于现有模型。

papers.title: Cross-Lingual Jailbreak Detection via Semantic Codebooks
papers.abstract: Safety mechanisms for large language models (LLMs) remain predominantly English-centric, creating systematic vulnerabilities in multilingual deployment. Prior work shows that translating malicious prompts into other languages can substantially increase jailbreak success rates, exposing a structural cross-lingual security gap. We investigate whether such attacks can be mitigated through language-agnostic semantic similarity without retraining or language-specific adaptation. Our approach compares multilingual query embeddings against a fixed English codebook of jailbreak prompts, operating as a training-free external guardrail for black-box LLMs. We conduct a systematic evaluation across four languages, two translation pipelines, four safety benchmarks, three embedding models, and three target LLMs (Qwen, Llama, GPT-3.5). Our results reveal two distinct regimes of cross-lingual transfer. On curated benchmarks containing canonical jailbreak templates, semantic similarity generalizes reliably across languages, achieving near-perfect separability (AUC up to 0.99) and substantial reductions in absolute attack success rates under strict low-false-positive constraints. However, under distribution shift - on behaviorally diverse and heterogeneous unsafe benchmarks - separability degrades markedly (AUC $\approx$ 0.60-0.70), and recall in the security-critical low-FPR regime drops across all embedding models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于语义码本的跨语言越狱检测方法，发现其在规范基准上有效但在分布偏移下性能显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全机制以英语为中心，多语言部署存在系统性漏洞，恶意提示翻译后越狱成功率显著增加，亟需无需重新训练的语言无关检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练或语言特定适配的情况下，通过语言无关的语义相似性检测跨语言越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在包含规范越狱模板的基准上，语义相似性跨语言泛化可靠（AUC高达0.99），但在行为多样、异质的不安全基准上，分布偏移导致可分离性显著下降（AUC约0.60-0.70），低假阳性率下的召回率在所有嵌入模型中均下降。
analysis.method: 将多语言查询嵌入与固定的英语越狱提示码本进行比较，作为无需训练的外部防护栏，适用于黑盒LLM。
contributions: 提出一种基于语义码本的跨语言越狱检测方法，无需训练或语言适配。
系统评估揭示跨语言迁移的两种不同模式：规范基准上有效，分布偏移下性能退化。
analysis.experiments: 在四种语言、两种翻译管道、四个安全基准、三种嵌入模型和三种目标LLM（Qwen、Llama、GPT-3.5）上进行系统评估。
limitations: 在分布偏移下性能显著下降，低假阳性率下召回率低。
依赖固定英语码本，可能无法覆盖新型或变体越狱提示。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于语义码本的跨语言越狱检测方法，发现其在规范基准上有效但在分布偏移下性能显著下降。

papers.title: Learning Generalizable Multimodal Representations for Software Vulnerability Detection
papers.abstract: Source code and its accompanying comments are complementary yet naturally aligned modalities-code encodes structural logic while comments capture developer intent. However, existing vulnerability detection methods mostly rely on single-modality code representations, overlooking the complementary semantic information embedded in comments and thus limiting their generalization across complex code structures and logical relationships. To address this, we propose MultiVul, a multimodal contrastive framework that aligns code and comment representations through dual similarity learning and consistency regularization, augmented with diverse code-text pairs to improve robustness. Experiments on widely adopted DiverseVul and Devign datasets across four large language models (LLMs) (i.e., DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, StarCoder2-7B, and CodeLlama-7B) show that MultiVul achieves up to 27.07% F1 improvement over prompting-based methods and 13.37% over code-only Fine-Tuning, while maintaining comparable inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态对比框架MultiVul，通过对齐代码与注释提升软件漏洞检测的泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有漏洞检测方法多依赖单一模态代码表示，忽略了注释中蕴含的开发者意图等互补语义信息，导致在复杂代码结构和逻辑关系上泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合代码和注释两种模态的信息，提升软件漏洞检测的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MultiVul多模态对比框架，通过双重相似性学习和一致性正则化对齐代码与注释表示，并利用多样化的代码-文本对增强鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出多模态对比学习框架MultiVul，首次将代码与注释对齐用于漏洞检测。
在多个LLM和数据集上验证了方法有效性，F1提升显著且推理效率相当。
analysis.experiments: 在DiverseVul和Devign数据集上，使用DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B、Qwen2.5-Coder-7B、StarCoder2-7B和CodeLlama-7B四种LLM进行实验，相比基于提示的方法F1提升最高27.07%，相比仅代码微调提升13.37%，推理效率相当。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量注释，对于注释缺失或质量低下的代码效果有限。
仅评估了7B规模的LLM，更大模型上的表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态对比框架MultiVul，通过对齐代码与注释提升软件漏洞检测的泛化性。

papers.title: RADD: Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion for Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Completion
papers.abstract: Most multi-modal knowledge graph completion (MMKGC) models use one embedding scorer to do both retrieval over the full entity set and final decision making. We argue that this coupling is a core bottleneck: global high-recall search and local fine-grained disambiguation require different inductive biases. Therefore, we propose a Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion (RADD) framework to decouple retrieve and reranking for MMKGC. A relation-aware multimodal KGE retriever serves as both global retriever and distillation teacher, while a conditional discrete denoiser performs shortlist-level entity-identity generation for reranking. Training combines KGE supervision, denoising cross-entropy, and temperature-scaled distillation from the retriever to the denoiser. At inference, the designed Diff-Rerank first forms a top-$K$ shortlist with the retriever and then reranks it with the denoiser, ensuring that recall is a strict prerequisite for precision. Experiments on three MMKGC benchmarks show that RADD achieves the best performance and consistent gains over strong unimodal, multimodal, and LLM-based baselines, while ablations further verify the contribution of each component.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索增强离散扩散框架RADD，解耦检索与重排序以提升多模态知识图谱补全性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MMKGC模型将全局检索与局部细粒度决策耦合在同一嵌入评分器中，导致两者所需的归纳偏置冲突，成为性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 多模态知识图谱补全中检索与重排序任务耦合导致的性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局高召回搜索与局部细粒度消歧需要不同的归纳偏置，耦合设计限制了模型在两者上的表现。
analysis.method: 提出RADD框架，包含关系感知多模态KGE检索器（全局检索+蒸馏教师）和条件离散去噪器（短列表实体身份生成重排序），训练结合KGE监督、去噪交叉熵和温度缩放蒸馏，推理时通过Diff-Rerank先检索top-K再重排序。
contributions: 首次将检索增强与离散扩散模型结合用于MMKGC，实现检索与重排序的解耦。
设计Diff-Rerank推理策略，确保召回是精度的严格前提。
在三个基准上取得最佳性能，超越强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在三个MMKGC基准上实验，RADD取得最佳性能，消融实验验证各组件贡献。
limitations: 依赖检索器质量，若检索器召回不足可能影响最终性能。
离散扩散模型的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索增强离散扩散框架RADD，解耦检索与重排序以提升多模态知识图谱补全性能。

papers.title: Spreadsheet Modeling Experiments Using GPTs on Small Problem Statements and the Wall Task
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how GPT-based tools can assist in building reusable analytical spreadsheet models. After a screening, we evaluate five GPT extensions and select Excel AI by pulsrai.com for detailed testing. Through structured experiments on simple problem statements, we assess Excel AI's performance against the ERFR criteria (each input in a cell; cell formulas; no hardwired numbers; labels; accurate). Results show that while Excel AI can produce well-structured models, it is inconsistent and often non-reproducible. We identify two central challenges - "the problem of confidence" and "the problem of workflow" - which highlight the need for skilled users to verify and adapt GPT-generated spreadsheets. Though GPTs show promise for generating draft models that may reduce development time or lower skill requirements, current tools remain unreliable for professional use. We conclude with recommendations for future research into prompt engineering, reproducibility, and larger-scale modeling tasks.

analysis.tldr: GPT工具在构建可复用的分析性电子表格模型时表现不一致且不可复现，需要熟练用户验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子表格建模在商业和工程中广泛使用，但手动构建耗时且易出错，GPT工具可能降低门槛，但当前缺乏系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估GPT扩展工具（特别是Excel AI）在构建可复用分析性电子表格模型时的可靠性和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GPT生成的模型结构良好，但结果不一致且不可复现，存在“信心问题”和“工作流问题”。
analysis.method: 筛选五个GPT扩展，选择Excel AI进行结构化实验，基于ERFR标准（每个输入在单元格、单元格公式、无硬编码数字、标签、准确）评估。
contributions: 系统评估了GPT工具在电子表格建模中的表现，揭示了不一致性和不可复现性。
识别出“信心问题”和“工作流问题”两大核心挑战，并给出未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了Excel AI一个工具，可能不具代表性。
实验基于简单问题陈述，未涉及大规模或复杂建模任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GPT工具在构建可复用的分析性电子表格模型时表现不一致且不可复现，需要熟练用户验证。

papers.title: QB-LIF: Learnable-Scale Quantized Burst Neurons for Efficient SNNs
papers.abstract: Binary spike coding enables sparse and event-driven computation in spiking neural networks (SNNs), yet its 1-bit-per-timestep representation fundamentally limits information throughput. This bottleneck becomes increasingly restrictive in deep architectures under short simulation horizons. We propose the Quantized Burst-LIF (QB-LIF) neuron, which reformulates burst spiking as a saturated uniform quantization of membrane potentials with a learnable scale. Instead of relying on predefined multi-threshold structures, QB-LIF treats the quantization scale as a trainable parameter, allowing each layer to autonomously adapt its spiking resolution to the underlying membrane-potential statistics. To preserve hardware efficiency, we introduce an absorbable scale strategy that folds the learned quantized scale into synaptic weights during inference, maintaining a strict accumulate-only (AC) execution paradigm. To enable stable optimization in the discrete multi-level space, we further design ReLSG-ET, a rectified-linear surrogate gradient with exponential tails that sustains gradient flow across burst intervals. Extensive experiments on static (CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet) and event-driven (CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-Gesture) benchmarks demonstrate that QB-LIF consistently outperforms binary and fixed-burst SNNs, achieving higher accuracy under ultra-low latency while preserving neuromorphic compatibility.

analysis.tldr: 提出可学习尺度的量化爆发神经元QB-LIF，通过可训练量化尺度提升SNN信息吞吐量，在超低延迟下实现更高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 二进制脉冲编码的1比特/时间步表示限制了SNN的信息吞吐量，在深层架构和短仿真时间下尤为严重，亟需更高效的多比特脉冲编码方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏SNN硬件效率（累加计算范式）的前提下，实现可学习、自适应的多比特脉冲编码以提升信息容量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QB-LIF神经元，将爆发脉冲建模为膜电位的饱和均匀量化，并引入可学习量化尺度；设计可吸收尺度策略，在推理时将量化尺度融合到突触权重中，保持纯累加执行；提出ReLSG-ET替代梯度，在离散多级空间中维持稳定优化。
contributions: 提出QB-LIF神经元，以可学习量化尺度实现自适应多比特脉冲编码。
设计可吸收尺度策略，在不增加推理开销的前提下保持累加计算范式。
提出ReLSG-ET替代梯度，解决离散多级空间的优化困难。
analysis.experiments: 在静态数据集（CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet）和事件驱动数据集（CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-Gesture）上，QB-LIF在超低延迟下优于二进制和固定爆发SNN。
limitations: 可能仅在短仿真时间下优势明显，长仿真时间下收益未知。
可学习尺度策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可学习尺度的量化爆发神经元QB-LIF，通过可训练量化尺度提升SNN信息吞吐量，在超低延迟下实现更高精度。

papers.title: Robustness Evaluation of a Foundation Segmentation Model Under Simulated Domain Shifts in Abdominal CT: Implications for Health Digital Twin Deployment
papers.abstract: Foundation segmentation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) have demonstrated strong generalization across natural images; however, their robustness under clinically realistic medical imaging domain shifts remains insufficiently quantified. We present a systematic slice-level robustness audit of SAM (ViT-B) for spleen segmentation in abdominal CT using 1,051 nonempty slices from 41 volumes in the Medical Segmentation Decathlon. A standardized ground-truth-derived bounding-box protocol was used to isolate encoder robustness from prompt uncertainty. Controlled perturbations simulating inter-scanner variability, including Gaussian noise, blur, contrast scaling, gamma correction, and resolution mismatch, were applied across ten conditions. The clean baseline achieved a mean Dice score of 0.9145 (95% CI: [0.909, 0.919]) with a failure rate of 0.67%. Across all perturbations, the absolute mean ΔDice remained below 0.01. Paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate correction identified statistically significant but small-magnitude changes under selected conditions, while McNemar analysis showed no significant increase in failure probability. These findings indicate that SAM exhibits stable segmentation behavior under moderate CT domain shifts, supporting its role as a robust foundation baseline for medical image segmentation research. As health digital twins increasingly incorporate foundation segmentation models for anatomical modeling and organ-level monitoring, formal characterization of robustness under real-world imaging variability is a necessary step toward trustworthy deployment.

analysis.tldr: SAM在腹部CT脾脏分割中对模拟域偏移表现出稳健性，支持其在健康数字孪生中的应用。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础分割模型如SAM在自然图像中泛化能力强，但在临床医学成像域偏移下的鲁棒性尚未充分量化，这对健康数字孪生的可信部署至关重要。
analysis.problem: 评估SAM在腹部CT中面对模拟域偏移（如噪声、模糊、对比度变化等）时的分割鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Medical Segmentation Decathlon中41个体积的1051个非空切片，通过标准化的真实边界框协议隔离编码器鲁棒性，施加十种模拟域偏移（高斯噪声、模糊、对比度缩放、伽马校正、分辨率不匹配），评估Dice分数变化和失败率。
contributions: 系统评估了SAM在腹部CT脾脏分割中对模拟域偏移的鲁棒性。
为健康数字孪生中基础分割模型的可信部署提供了鲁棒性证据。
analysis.experiments: 在41个体积的1051个切片上进行了十种域偏移实验，基线Dice为0.9145，失败率0.67%，所有扰动下绝对平均ΔDice低于0.01。
limitations: 仅评估了脾脏分割，其他器官或任务可能表现不同。
模拟域偏移可能无法完全代表真实临床场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAM在腹部CT脾脏分割中对模拟域偏移表现出稳健性，支持其在健康数字孪生中的应用。

papers.title: Think Before You Act -- A Neurocognitive Governance Model for Autonomous AI Agents
papers.abstract: The rapid deployment of autonomous AI agents across enterprise, healthcare, and safety-critical environments has created a fundamental governance gap. Existing approaches, runtime guardrails, training-time alignment, and post-hoc auditing treat governance as an external constraint rather than an internalized behavioral principle, leaving agents vulnerable to unsafe and irreversible actions. We address this gap by drawing on how humans self-govern naturally: before acting, humans engage deliberate cognitive processes grounded in executive function, inhibitory control, and internalized organizational rules to evaluate whether an intended action is permissible, requires modification, or demands escalation. This paper proposes a neurocognitive governance framework that formally maps this human self-governance process to LLM-driven agent reasoning, establishing a structural parallel between the human brain and the large language model as the cognitive core of an agent. We formalize a Pre-Action Governance Reasoning Loop (PAGRL) in which agents consult a four-layer governance rule set: global, workflow-specific, agent-specific, and situational before every consequential action, mirroring how human organizations structure compliance hierarchies across enterprise, department, and role levels. Implemented on a production-grade retail supply chain workflow, the framework achieves 95% compliance accuracy and zero false escalations to human oversight, demonstrating that embedding governance into agent reasoning produces more consistent, explainable, and auditable compliance than external enforcement. This work offers a principled foundation for autonomous AI agents that govern themselves the way humans do: not because rules are imposed upon them, but because deliberation is embedded in how they think.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种神经认知治理框架，将人类自我治理的认知过程映射到LLM驱动的智能体推理中，实现内化式合规。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI智能体治理方法（运行时护栏、训练时对齐、事后审计）将治理视为外部约束而非内化行为原则，导致智能体易发生不安全且不可逆的行为。
analysis.problem: 如何让自主AI智能体在行动前内化治理规则，像人类一样通过深思熟虑的认知过程评估行动是否允许、需要修改或升级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经认知治理框架，形式化人类自我治理过程到LLM驱动的智能体推理的映射，建立Pre-Action Governance Reasoning Loop (PAGRL)，智能体在每次重要行动前咨询四层治理规则集（全局、工作流特定、智能体特定、情境）。
contributions: 提出神经认知治理框架，将人类自我治理的认知过程映射到LLM驱动的智能体推理。
形式化Pre-Action Governance Reasoning Loop (PAGRL)，包含四层治理规则集。
在零售供应链工作流中实现，达到95%合规准确率和零误报升级。
analysis.experiments: 在零售供应链工作流中评估，框架达到95%合规准确率和零误报升级到人工监督。
limitations: 仅在单一零售供应链场景验证，泛化性未知。
四层规则集的设计可能依赖领域专家，扩展成本高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种神经认知治理框架，将人类自我治理的认知过程映射到LLM驱动的智能体推理中，实现内化式合规。

papers.title: Exploring Remote Photoplethysmography for Neonatal Pain Detection from Facial Videos
papers.abstract: Unaddressed pain in neonates can lead to adverse effects, including delayed development and slower weight gain, emphasising the need for more objective and reliable pain assessment methods. Hence, automated methods using behavioural and physiological pain indicators have been developed to aid healthcare professionals in the Neonatal ICU. Traditional contact-based methods for physiological parameter estimation are unsuitable for long-term monitoring and increase the risk of spreading diseases like COVID-19. We introduce a novel approach using remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) to estimate pulse signals in a non-contact manner and employ them for neonatal pain detection. The temporal signals acquired from regions-of-interest (ROIs) affected by skin deformations may exhibit lower quality and provide erroneous rPPG signals. Therefore, we incorporated a quality parameter to select the temporal signals obtained from ROIs that are least affected by skin deformations. Further, we employed signal-to-noise ratio as a fitness parameter to extract the rPPG signal corresponding to the clip that is least affected by noise. Experimental findings demonstrate that the rPPG signals provide useful information for neonatal pain detection, and signals extracted from the blue colour channel outperform those extracted from other colour channels. We also show that combining rPPG and audio features provides better results than individual modalities.

analysis.tldr: 利用远程光电容积描记法(rPPG)从面部视频中无接触检测新生儿疼痛，结合音频特征提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 新生儿疼痛未处理会导致发育迟缓和体重增长缓慢，现有接触式生理监测方法不适合长期监控且增加感染风险，需要更客观、无接触的疼痛评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从面部视频中无接触地提取可靠的生理信号用于新生儿疼痛检测，并克服皮肤变形和噪声干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 受皮肤变形影响的ROI提取的rPPG信号质量较低；蓝色通道信号优于其他颜色通道；rPPG与音频特征融合效果优于单模态。
analysis.method: 使用rPPG从面部视频无接触估计脉搏信号，引入质量参数选择受皮肤变形影响最小的ROI，采用信噪比作为适应度参数提取噪声影响最小的rPPG信号，并与音频特征融合进行疼痛检测。
contributions: 首次将rPPG用于新生儿疼痛检测，实现无接触生理信号提取。
提出基于质量参数和信噪比的信号选择策略，提升rPPG信号可靠性。
证明rPPG与音频特征融合优于单模态，为多模态新生儿疼痛评估提供新思路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论不同光照或运动场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用远程光电容积描记法(rPPG)从面部视频中无接触检测新生儿疼痛，结合音频特征提升性能。

papers.title: CORAL: Adaptive Retrieval Loop for Culturally-Aligned Multilingual RAG
papers.abstract: Multilingual retrieval-augmented generation (mRAG) is often implemented within a fixed retrieval space, typically via query or document translation or multilingual embedding vector representations. However, this approach may be inadequate for culturally grounded queries, in which retrieval-condition misalignment may occur. Even strong retrievers and generators may struggle to produce culturally relevant answers when sourcing evidence from inappropriate linguistic or regional contexts. To this end, we introduce CORAL (COntext-aware Retrieval with Agentic Loop, an adaptive retrieval methodology for mRAG that enables iterative refinement of both the retrieval space (corpora) and the retrieval probe (query) based on the quality of the evidence. The overall process includes: (1) selecting corpora, (2) retrieving documents, (3) critiquing evidence for relevance and cultural alignment, and (4) checking sufficiency. If the retrieved documents are insufficient to answer the query correctly, the system (5) reselects corpora and rewrites the query. Across two cultural QA benchmarks, CORAL achieves up to a 3.58%p accuracy improvement on low-resource languages relative to the strongest baselines.

analysis.tldr: CORAL通过自适应检索循环迭代优化语料库和查询，提升多语言RAG在文化对齐查询上的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有mRAG系统在固定检索空间中处理文化相关查询时，常因检索条件不匹配（如语言或区域上下文不当）导致生成结果缺乏文化相关性，亟需一种能动态调整检索策略的方法。
analysis.problem: 多语言RAG在处理文化对齐查询时，固定检索空间导致检索条件与查询文化背景不匹配，影响答案的相关性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，即使使用强大的检索器和生成器，当证据来自不恰当的语言或区域上下文时，也难以产生文化相关的答案。
analysis.method: 提出CORAL，一种自适应检索循环方法，通过迭代选择语料库、检索文档、评估证据的相关性和文化对齐度、检查充分性，并在不足时重新选择语料库和重写查询。
contributions: 提出CORAL自适应检索循环框架，动态调整检索空间和查询以提升文化对齐。
在两个文化QA基准上，对低资源语言实现高达3.58%的准确率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在两个文化QA基准上评估，CORAL在低资源语言上相比最强基线提升高达3.58%准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的文化对齐评估标准。
迭代过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CORAL通过自适应检索循环迭代优化语料库和查询，提升多语言RAG在文化对齐查询上的准确性。

papers.title: Mini-Batch Class Composition Bias in Link Prediction
papers.abstract: Prior work on node classification has shown that Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) can learn representations that transfer across graphs, when underlying graph properties are shared. For a fixed graph, one would then expect GNNs trained for link prediction to learn a representation consistent with that learnt for node classification. We show this intuition does not hold in the general case. Instead, we find popular link prediction models can learn a trivial mini-batch dependent heuristic, enabled by batch-normalisation layers, to solve the edge classification task. When correcting for this, we observe increased alignment of the network representation with node-class relevant features, suggesting the network has learnt a graph representation that better aligns with the underlying graph's properties. Our findings suggest that standard link prediction training may be leading us to overestimate link predictors' ability to learn a generalised representation of a graph that is consistent across tasks.

analysis.tldr: 发现链接预测模型会利用批归一化学习小批量类别组成偏差，导致对图表示能力的过高估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 节点分类任务中GNN能学习跨图迁移的表征，但链接预测是否也能学到一致的图表示尚不明确，现有方法可能高估了模型能力。
analysis.problem: 揭示并纠正链接预测训练中因小批量类别组成偏差导致的伪学习现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 链接预测模型通过批归一化层学习小批量中正负样本比例相关的简单启发式，而非真正的图结构特征。
analysis.method: 通过分析批归一化对梯度的影响，提出修正策略以消除小批量类别组成偏差。
contributions: 发现链接预测模型存在小批量类别组成偏差，依赖批归一化学习琐碎启发式。
提出修正方法后，模型表征与节点分类特征更对齐，表明学习到了更真实的图表示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 修正方法可能增加训练复杂度。
仅在特定模型和数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现链接预测模型会利用批归一化学习小批量类别组成偏差，导致对图表示能力的过高估计。

papers.title: LLM-ReSum: A Framework for LLM Reflective Summarization through Self-Evaluation
papers.abstract: Reliable evaluation of large language model (LLM)-generated summaries remains an open challenge, particularly across heterogeneous domains and document lengths. We conduct a comprehensive meta-evaluation of 14 automatic summarization metrics and LLM-based evaluators across seven datasets spanning five domains, covering documents from short news articles to long scientific, governmental, and legal texts (2K-27K words) with over 1,500 human-annotated summaries. Our results show that traditional lexical overlap metrics (e.g., ROUGE, BLEU) exhibit weak or negative correlation with human judgments, while task-specific neural metrics and LLM-based evaluators achieve substantially higher alignment, especially for linguistic quality assessment. Leveraging these findings, we propose LLM-ReSum, a self-reflective summarization framework that integrates LLM-based evaluation and generation in a closed feedback loop without model finetuning. Across three domains, LLM-ReSum improves low-quality summaries by up to 33% in factual accuracy and 39% in coverage, with human evaluators preferring refined summaries in 89% of cases. We additionally introduce PatentSumEval, a new human-annotated benchmark for legal document summarization comprising 180 expert-evaluated summaries. All code and datasets will be released in GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM-ReSum框架，利用LLM自评估反馈循环改进摘要质量，在多个领域提升事实准确性和覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成摘要的可靠评估仍具挑战，传统指标与人类判断相关性弱，缺乏跨领域、长文档的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需微调、利用LLM自评估反馈来迭代改进摘要质量的框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统词汇重叠指标（如ROUGE、BLEU）与人类判断相关性弱或负相关，而任务特定神经指标和LLM评估器与人类判断一致性更高，尤其在语言质量评估上。
analysis.method: LLM-ReSum框架：将LLM评估器与生成器结合，形成闭环反馈，通过自评估迭代优化摘要，无需模型微调。
contributions: 对14种自动摘要指标和LLM评估器进行了跨7个数据集、5个领域的元评估，揭示了传统指标的局限性。
提出LLM-ReSum框架，通过自评估反馈循环提升摘要质量，在三个领域实现事实准确性提升33%、覆盖率提升39%。
引入PatentSumEval，一个包含180个专家评估摘要的法律文档摘要新基准。
analysis.experiments: 在7个数据集（覆盖新闻、科学、政府、法律等，文档长度2K-27K词）上评估14种指标，并在三个领域测试LLM-ReSum，人类偏好率达89%。
limitations: 框架依赖LLM评估器的质量，可能受评估偏差影响。
仅测试了三个领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM-ReSum框架，利用LLM自评估反馈循环改进摘要质量，在多个领域提升事实准确性和覆盖率。

papers.title: Auditing Marketing Budget Allocation with Hindsight Regret
papers.abstract: Organizations routinely make strategic budget allocations under operational constraints, but often lack a principled way to assess whether realized allocations were close to the best feasible choices in hindsight. We present a retrospective auditing framework based on hindsight regret, defined as the opportunity cost of the realized allocation relative to a constraint-faithful benchmark under the same budget and stability guardrails. The framework estimates regime-specific spend--response functions from historical logs, computes feasible hindsight allocations via constrained optimization, and propagates uncertainty through Monte Carlo evaluation to produce regret distributions, expected lift, and probability-of-improvement summaries. This separates allocation inefficiency from uncertainty in the estimated response surfaces. Experiments on real marketing allocation logs show that the framework yields interpretable post-hoc diagnostics and reveals a practical trade-off between allocation flexibility and detectability: moderate feasible reallocations often capture most measurable gain, while larger shifts move into weak-support regions with higher uncertainty. The result is a practical method for auditing historical budget decisions when online experimentation is costly or infeasible.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于事后遗憾的预算分配审计框架，通过约束优化和不确定性传播评估历史决策效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 组织在运营约束下进行战略预算分配，但缺乏原则性方法来评估实际分配是否接近事后最优可行选择，在线实验成本高或不可行时问题更突出。
analysis.problem: 如何审计历史预算分配决策，量化其与最优可行分配之间的机会成本，并分离分配低效与估计不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于事后遗憾的审计框架：从历史日志估计特定场景的支出-响应函数，通过约束优化计算可行事后分配，利用蒙特卡洛评估传播不确定性，生成遗憾分布、预期提升和改进概率摘要。
contributions: 提出基于事后遗憾的回顾性审计框架，用于评估预算分配效率。
通过蒙特卡洛传播不确定性，分离分配低效与估计不确定性。
在真实营销分配日志上验证，揭示分配灵活性与可检测性之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在真实营销分配日志上实验，框架产生可解释的事后诊断，并揭示适度可行再分配能捕获大部分可测量收益，而较大转移进入弱支持区域导致更高不确定性。
limitations: 依赖历史日志中支出-响应函数的准确估计。
约束优化可能面临计算复杂性或局部最优问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于事后遗憾的预算分配审计框架，通过约束优化和不确定性传播评估历史决策效率。

papers.title: SAMe: A Semantic Anatomy Mapping Engine for Robotic Ultrasound
papers.abstract: Robotic ultrasound has advanced local image-driven control, contact regulation, and view optimization, yet current systems lack the anatomical understanding needed to determine what to scan, where to begin, and how to adapt to individual patient anatomy. These gaps make systems still reliant on expert intervention to initiate scanning. Here we present SAMe, a semantic anatomy mapping engine that provides robotic ultrasound with an explicit anatomical prior layer. SAMe addresses scan initiation as a target-to-anatomy-to-action process: it grounds under-specified clinical complaints into structured target organs, instantiates a patient-specific anatomical representation for the grounded targets from a single external body image, and translates this representation into control-facing 6-DoF probe initialization states without any additional registration using preoperative CT or MRI. The anatomical representation maintained by SAMe is explicit, lightweight (single-organ inference in 0.08s), and compatible with downstream control by design. Across semantic grounding, anatomical instantiation, and real-robot evaluation, SAMe shows strong performance across the full initialization pipeline. In real-robot experiments, SAMe achieved overall organ-hit rates of 97.3% for liver initialization and 81.7% for kidney initialization across the evaluated target sets. Even when restricted to the centroid target, SAMe outperformed the surface-heuristic baseline for both liver and kidney initialization. These results establish an explicit anatomical prior layer that addresses scan initialization and is designed to support broader downstream autonomous scanning pipelines, providing the anatomical foundation for complaint-driven, anatomically informed robotic ultrasonography.

analysis.tldr: SAMe 为机器人超声提供语义解剖先验，实现从临床主诉到探头初始化的全流程自动化。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前机器人超声系统缺乏解剖理解，无法自主决定扫描目标、起始位置和适应个体差异，仍依赖专家干预。
analysis.problem: 解决机器人超声的扫描初始化问题，即如何将模糊的临床主诉转化为具体的、患者特异性的探头初始位姿。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义解剖映射引擎 SAMe，包含三个步骤：将临床主诉语义映射到目标器官、从单张外部身体图像实例化患者特异性解剖表示、将解剖表示转换为控制所需的6自由度探头初始状态，无需术前CT/MRI配准。
contributions: 提出首个为机器人超声提供显式解剖先验层的语义解剖映射引擎 SAMe。
实现从临床主诉到探头初始化的全流程自动化，无需术前影像配准。
在真实机器人实验中，肝脏初始化器官命中率达97.3%，肾脏达81.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在语义接地、解剖实例化和真实机器人评估中验证了完整初始化流程的性能。真实机器人实验中，肝脏初始化器官命中率97.3%，肾脏81.7%，且优于基于表面启发式的基线。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定器官（肝、肾）进行了评估，泛化性待验证。
依赖单张外部身体图像，可能受患者体型或姿势影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAMe 为机器人超声提供语义解剖先验，实现从临床主诉到探头初始化的全流程自动化。

papers.title: Prefill-Time Intervention for Mitigating Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in visual-textual understanding, yet their reliability is critically undermined by hallucinations, i.e., the generation of factually incorrect or inconsistent responses. While recent studies using steering vectors demonstrated promise in reducing hallucinations, a notable challenge remains: they inadvertently amplify the severity of residual hallucinations. We attribute this to their exclusive focus on the decoding stage, where errors accumulate autoregressively and progressively worsen subsequent hallucinatory outputs. To address this, we propose Prefill-Time Intervention (PTI), a novel steering paradigm that intervenes only once during the prefill stage, enhancing the initial Key-Value (KV) cache before error accumulation occurs. Specifically, PTI is modality-aware, deriving distinct directions for visual and textual representations. This intervention is decoupled to steer keys toward visually-grounded objects and values to filter background noise, correcting hallucination-prone representations at their source. Extensive experiments demonstrate PTI's significant performance in mitigating hallucinations and its generalizability across diverse decoding strategies, LVLMs, and benchmarks. Moreover, PTI is orthogonal to existing decoding-stage methods, enabling plug-and-play integration and further boosting performance. Code is available at: https://github.com/huaiyi66/PTI.

analysis.tldr: 提出预填充阶段干预（PTI）方法，在KV缓存初始化时修正多模态表征，从源头减少LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM的幻觉问题严重影响可靠性，现有解码阶段干预方法虽能减少幻觉，但会放大残余幻觉的严重性，因为错误在自回归生成中逐步累积。
analysis.problem: 如何在不放大残余幻觉的前提下，从源头减少LVLM的幻觉生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出解码阶段干预方法会无意中放大残余幻觉的严重性，原因是错误在自回归生成中累积。
analysis.method: 提出Prefill-Time Intervention (PTI)，在预填充阶段仅干预一次，通过模态感知的方式为视觉和文本表征推导不同方向，解耦地调整键（keys）以关注视觉对象、调整值（values）以过滤背景噪声，从而在错误累积前修正易产生幻觉的表征。
contributions: 提出PTI范式，在预填充阶段而非解码阶段进行干预，从源头减少幻觉。
PTI是模态感知且解耦的，能分别修正视觉和文本表征。
实验证明PTI显著减少幻觉，具有跨解码策略、LVLM和基准的泛化性，且与现有解码方法正交，可即插即用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多种解码策略、LVLM和基准上进行实验，显示PTI显著减少幻觉并具有泛化性，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于Transformer的LVLM架构。
预填充阶段的干预可能对长文本生成场景效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预填充阶段干预（PTI）方法，在KV缓存初始化时修正多模态表征，从源头减少LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: Large language models eroding science understanding: an experimental study
papers.abstract: This paper is under review in AI and Ethics This study examines whether large language models (LLMs) can reliably answer scientific questions and demonstrates how easily they can be influenced by fringe scientific material. The authors modified custom LLMs to prioritise knowledge in selected fringe papers on the Fine Structure Constant and Gravitational Waves, then compared their responses with those of domain experts and standard LLMs. The altered models produced fluent, convincing answers that contradicted scientific consensus and were difficult for non-experts to detect as misleading. The results show that LLMs are vulnerable to manipulation and cannot replace expert judgment, highlighting risks for public understanding of science and the potential spread of misinformation.

analysis.tldr: LLM易受边缘科学材料操纵，生成流畅但误导性回答，无法替代专家判断。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在科学问答中可能传播错误信息，威胁公众科学理解，需评估其可靠性与脆弱性。
analysis.problem: LLM是否可靠地回答科学问题，以及它们如何被边缘科学材料影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 修改后的LLM生成流畅、令人信服但违背科学共识的回答，非专家难以察觉误导性。
analysis.method: 修改定制LLM以优先考虑选定边缘论文的知识，然后比较其与领域专家和标准LLM的回答。
contributions: 实证表明LLM易受操纵，无法可靠替代专家判断。
揭示LLM在科学传播中传播错误信息的风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了两个科学主题，泛化性有限。
未评估专家检测误导性回答的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM易受边缘科学材料操纵，生成流畅但误导性回答，无法替代专家判断。

papers.title: Refinement via Regeneration: Enlarging Modification Space Boosts Image Refinement in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) integrate visual understanding and generation within a single framework. For text-to-image (T2I) tasks, this unified capability allows UMMs to refine outputs after their initial generation, potentially extending the performance upper bound. Current UMM-based refinement methods primarily follow a refinement-via-editing (RvE) paradigm, where UMMs produce editing instructions to modify misaligned regions while preserving aligned content. However, editing instructions often describe prompt-image misalignment only coarsely, leading to incomplete refinement. Moreover, pixel-level preservation, though necessary for editing, unnecessarily restricts the effective modification space for refinement. To address these limitations, we propose Refinement via Regeneration (RvR), a novel framework that reformulates refinement as conditional image regeneration rather than editing. Instead of relying on editing instructions and enforcing strict content preservation, RvR regenerates images conditioned on the target prompt and the semantic tokens of the initial image, enabling more complete semantic alignment with a larger modification space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RvR, improving Geneval from 0.78 to 0.91, DPGBench from 84.02 to 87.21, and UniGenBench++ from 61.53 to 77.41.

analysis.tldr: 提出Refinement via Regeneration (RvR)框架，将统一多模态模型的图像精炼从编辑范式转为再生范式，扩大修改空间以提升文本-图像对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 统一多模态模型（UMMs）具备视觉理解与生成能力，可用于文本到图像（T2I）任务的输出精炼，但现有基于编辑的精炼方法（RvE）因编辑指令粗糙和像素级保留限制，导致修改空间不足、对齐不完整。
analysis.problem: 如何克服UMMs中基于编辑的精炼方法的局限性，实现更完整的语义对齐和更大的修改空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编辑指令只能粗略描述提示-图像不匹配，且像素级保留虽对编辑必要但限制了精炼的有效修改空间。
analysis.method: 提出Refinement via Regeneration (RvR)框架，将精炼重新定义为条件图像再生而非编辑：以目标提示和初始图像的语义token为条件，直接再生图像，无需编辑指令和严格内容保留。
contributions: 提出RvR范式，将UMMs中的图像精炼从编辑转为再生，扩大修改空间。
在Geneval、DPGBench和UniGenBench++上取得显著提升，验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Geneval（0.78→0.91）、DPGBench（84.02→87.21）和UniGenBench++（61.53→77.41）上评估，显示性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖初始图像语义token的质量。
再生计算成本可能高于编辑方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Refinement via Regeneration (RvR)框架，将统一多模态模型的图像精炼从编辑范式转为再生范式，扩大修改空间以提升文本-图像对齐。

papers.title: Multibit neural inference in a N-ary crossbar architecture
papers.abstract: In-memory computing (IMC) enables energy-efficient neural network inference by computing analog matrix-vector multiplications (MVM) in memory crossbar arrays. In this work we present a simulation framework for N-ary crossbar architectures that retrieves MVM results with minimal implementation assumptions. The XOR and MNIST classification tasks were successfully inferred using a simulated crossbar array of (4x4) 4-states magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJ). MNIST accuracy reached 94.48% (vs. 97.56% software baseline). The software-hardware performance gap was further reduced using PCA dimensionality reduction. We identified weight quantization as the primary error source, and studied its impact alongside systematic nonidealities and random noise. We find that cell-specific random noise is less detrimental than systematic errors due to averaging across the array. Finally, we demonstrate an optimal number of states per cell that balances quantization error against resistance state resolution to minimize total MVM error.

analysis.tldr: 提出N元交叉架构仿真框架，用4x4多态MTJ实现MNIST推理，分析量化误差主导的硬件-软件性能差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 存内计算通过模拟矩阵乘法实现能效推理，但现有交叉架构多限于二元或三元，且缺乏对多态器件误差的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 如何在N元交叉架构中高效实现多比特神经网络推理，并量化器件非理想性对精度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 权重量化是主要误差源；单元特定随机噪声因阵列平均效应危害小于系统误差；存在最优每单元状态数平衡量化误差与电阻分辨率。
analysis.method: 提出N元交叉架构仿真框架，支持任意状态数器件，通过PCA降维缩小软硬件差距，并分析量化、系统非理想性和随机噪声的误差贡献。
contributions: 提出N元交叉架构仿真框架，最小化实现假设下恢复MVM结果。
通过MNIST实验识别权重量化为主要误差源，并揭示随机噪声与系统误差的不同影响。
证明存在最优每单元状态数以最小化总MVM误差。
analysis.experiments: 在XOR和MNIST分类任务上仿真，MNIST准确率94.48%（软件基线97.56%），使用PCA降维后差距缩小。摘要未提供其他数据集或硬件实测结果。
limitations: 仅基于仿真，未在真实硬件上验证。
仅使用简单任务（XOR、MNIST），未在更大规模网络或数据集上测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出N元交叉架构仿真框架，用4x4多态MTJ实现MNIST推理，分析量化误差主导的硬件-软件性能差距。

papers.title: HotComment: A Benchmark for Evaluating Popularity of Online Comments
papers.abstract: Online comments play a crucial role in shaping public sentiment and opinion dynamics on social media. However, evaluating their popularity remains challenging, not only because it depends on linguistic quality, originality, and emotional resonance, but also because stylistic preferences vary widely across platforms and user groups, causing the same comment to resonate differently in different communities. In this work, we present HotComment, a multimodal benchmark integrating video and text modalities that comprehensively quantifies popularity from three enhanced aspects: (1) Content Quality, which evaluates semantic similarity with ground-truth human comments and extends quality assessment through four interpretable dimensions; (2) Popularity Prediction, based on trends from models trained on real-world interaction data; and (3) User Behavior Simulation, which models the distribution of platform users and approximates \textbf{engagement scores} through an agent-based framework. Furthermore, we propose StyleCmt, inspired by social ripple effects, where multiple stylistic dimensions align to amplify socially resonant expressions and suppress incongruent ones.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态基准HotComment评估在线评论流行度，并设计StyleCmt方法增强社交共鸣。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线评论对公众情绪和舆论动态影响重大，但其流行度评估因语言质量、原创性、情感共鸣以及跨平台/用户群体的风格偏好差异而极具挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何全面量化在线评论的流行度，并处理不同平台和用户群体间的风格偏好差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一评论在不同社区中反响不同，表明风格偏好存在显著差异。
analysis.method: 提出HotComment基准，从内容质量、流行度预测和用户行为模拟三个维度评估；并设计StyleCmt方法，通过多风格维度对齐放大社交共鸣表达、抑制不协调表达。
contributions: 提出多模态基准HotComment，整合视频和文本模态，从三个增强方面量化评论流行度。
提出StyleCmt方法，受社会涟漪效应启发，通过多风格维度对齐增强社交共鸣。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能依赖特定平台数据，泛化性需验证。
StyleCmt方法可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态基准HotComment评估在线评论流行度，并设计StyleCmt方法增强社交共鸣。

papers.title: The Nonverbal Syntax Framework: An Evidence-Based Tiered System for Inferring Learner States from Observable Behavioral Cues
papers.abstract: Understanding learners' cognitive and affective states underpins adaptive educational systems and effective teaching. Although research links nonverbal cues to internal states, no framework calibrates them to evidence. We present the Nonverbal Syntax Framework, drawn from a systematic review of 908 studies and 17,043 cue-state mappings (Turaev et al., 2026). The framework addresses three challenges: terminological fragmentation (behaviors described inconsistently), evidence heterogeneity (single observations to replicated findings), and state ambiguity (similar patterns indicating multiple states). Normalization consolidated 5,537 state labels into 2,010 canonical states (63.7%) and 11,521 cues into 6,434 normalized cues (44.2%) across nine behavioral channels. Dual-evidence assessment separately evaluates Component Evidence (coverage of cues and states) and Relationship Evidence (independent studies per cue-state link). 52% of "Very High" relationships rest on one paper, so separation enables calibrated rather than overconfident inference from preliminary findings. The framework's four levels comprise a Cue Vocabulary of 6,434 indicators classified as observable/instrumental; State Clusters linking 2,010 states to indicative cues; State Profiles with multimodal behavioral signatures and actionable specifications; and Discriminative Analysis distinguishing 1,215 confusable state pairs. We identify 480 actionable R1-R4 relationships (three or more independent papers), the replicated core of six decades of research, covering 35.5% of mappings across 47 key learning states and 111 distinct indicators. The remaining 91.5% (9,653 single-paper findings) form exploratory hypotheses for replication. The framework gives researchers an empirical foundation for identifying gaps, practitioners evidence-based tools for state inference, and technologists validated features for multimodal detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出非言语语法框架，通过系统综述将行为线索与学习者状态映射为证据分级的四层体系。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究虽将非言语线索与内部状态关联，但缺乏基于证据的校准框架，面临术语碎片化、证据异质性和状态模糊性三大挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地整合非言语行为线索与学习者认知/情感状态的映射关系，并基于证据强度进行分级。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出52%的“非常高”关系仅基于一篇论文，表明初步发现易导致过度自信推断。
analysis.method: 基于908项研究和17,043个线索-状态映射的系统综述，通过标准化合并状态标签和线索，采用双证据评估（组件证据和关系证据），构建四层框架：线索词汇表、状态簇、状态画像和判别分析。
contributions: 提出非言语语法框架，包含6,434个标准化线索和2,010个规范状态的四层体系。
识别出480个可操作的R1-R4关系（基于三篇以上独立论文），覆盖35.5%的映射，作为六十年研究的可复制核心。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但基于系统综述的统计（如908项研究、17,043个映射）支撑框架构建。
limitations: 框架依赖现有文献，可能遗漏未发表或非英语研究。
91.5%的单篇论文发现尚需复制验证，框架的预测效度有待实证检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非言语语法框架，通过系统综述将行为线索与学习者状态映射为证据分级的四层体系。

papers.title: Health System Scale Semantic Search Across Unstructured Clinical Notes
papers.abstract: Introduction: Semantic search, which retrieves documents based on conceptual similarity rather than keyword matching, offers substantial advantages for retrieval of clinical information. However, deploying semantic search across entire health systems, comprising hundreds of millions of clinical notes, presents formidable engineering, cost, and governance challenges that have prevented adoption. Methods: We deployed a semantic search system at a large children's hospital indexing 166 million clinical notes (484 million vectors) from 1.68 million patients. The system uses instruction-tuned qwen3-embedding-0.6B embeddings, stores vectors in a managed database with storage-optimized indexing, maintains full-text metadata in a low-latency key-value store, and operates within a HIPAA-compliant governance framework. We evaluated the system through three experiments: optimization of embedding model and chunking strategy using a physician-authored benchmark dataset, characterization of full-scale performance (cost, latency, retrieval quality), and clinical utility assessment via comparison of chart abstraction efficiency across three tasks. Results: The system delivers sub-second query latency (median 237 ms single-user, 451 ms 20-user concurrency) with monthly costs of approximately USD 4,000. Qwen3 embeddings with 300-token chunk size achieved 94.6% accuracy on a clinical question-answering benchmark. In clinical utility evaluation across three abstraction tasks, semantic search reduced time-to-completion by 24 to 89% compared to clinician-performed chart review while maintaining comparable inter-rater agreement. Conclusion: Health-system-scale semantic search is both technically and operationally feasible. The system provides infrastructure supporting interactive search, cohort generation, and downstream LLM-powered clinical applications without requiring specialized informatics expertise.

analysis.tldr: 在大型儿童医院部署语义搜索系统，索引1.66亿份临床笔记，实现亚秒级延迟并显著提升病历审查效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统关键词搜索难以捕捉临床笔记中的语义概念，而语义搜索虽能提升检索质量，但部署到涵盖数亿份笔记的全院规模时面临工程、成本和治理挑战，此前未被实际采用。
analysis.problem: 如何在全健康系统规模下（数亿份非结构化临床笔记）实现高效、低成本、合规的语义搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用指令微调的qwen3-embedding-0.6B模型生成嵌入，结合存储优化索引的向量数据库和低延迟键值存储元数据，在HIPAA合规框架下部署。通过优化嵌入模型和分块策略（300 token分块达到94.6%准确率），实现全规模性能评估。
contributions: 首次在全健康系统规模（1.66亿份笔记）上部署并评估语义搜索系统，证明其技术和运营可行性。
提出结合指令微调嵌入、存储优化索引和合规治理框架的系统架构，实现亚秒级延迟和低成本（月均4000美元）。
通过三项临床任务验证，语义搜索将病历审查时间减少24%-89%，且保持与人工审查相当的评分者间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 通过三项实验评估：1）使用医生撰写的基准数据集优化嵌入模型和分块策略；2）全规模性能表征（成本、延迟、检索质量）；3）临床效用评估：比较三项病历审查任务的效率。
limitations: 仅在一个儿童医院部署，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论罕见病或复杂病例的检索效果。
成本估算可能因数据规模或云服务变化而不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在大型儿童医院部署语义搜索系统，索引1.66亿份临床笔记，实现亚秒级延迟并显著提升病历审查效率。

papers.title: OxyGent: Making Multi-Agent Systems Modular, Observable, and Evolvable via Oxy Abstraction
papers.abstract: Deploying production-ready multi-agent systems (MAS) in complex industrial environments remains challenging due to limitations in scalability, observability, and autonomous evolution. We present OxyGent, an open-source framework driven by two core novelties: a unified Oxy abstraction and the OxyBank evolution engine. The unified abstraction encapsulates agents, tools, LLMs, and reasoning flows as pluggable atomic components, enabling Lego-like scalable system composition and non-intrusive monitoring. To enhance observability, OxyGent introduces permission-driven dynamic planning that replaces rigid workflows with execution graphs generated at runtime, providing adaptive visualizations. Furthermore, to support continuous evolution, OxyBank serves as an AI asset management platform that drives automated data backflow, annotation, and joint evolution. Empirical evaluations and real-world case studies show that OxyGent provides a robust and scalable foundation for MAS. OxyGent is fully open-sourced under the Apache License 2.0 at https://github.com/jd-opensource/OxyGent.

analysis.tldr: 提出OxyGent框架，通过Oxy抽象和OxyBank引擎实现多智能体系统的模块化、可观测和可演化。
analysis.research_motivation: 生产级多智能体系统在工业环境中面临可扩展性、可观测性和自主演化能力不足的挑战。
analysis.problem: 现有MAS框架在复杂工业部署中缺乏模块化组合、运行时监控和持续演化机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Oxy统一抽象（将智能体、工具、LLM、推理流封装为可插拔原子组件）和OxyBank演化引擎（支持自动化数据回流、标注和联合演化）。
contributions: 提出Oxy抽象实现Lego式可扩展系统组合和非侵入式监控。
引入权限驱动的动态规划，生成运行时执行图以增强可观测性。
设计OxyBank平台驱动MAS的持续演化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提及实证评估和真实世界案例研究，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工业场景，泛化性需验证。
动态规划的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OxyGent框架，通过Oxy抽象和OxyBank引擎实现多智能体系统的模块化、可观测和可演化。

papers.title: Emotive Architectures: The Role of LLMs in Adjusting Work Environments
papers.abstract: In remote and hybrid work contexts, the integration of physical and digital environments is revolutionizing spatial experiences, collaboration, and interpersonal interactions. This study examines three fundamental spatial conditions: the physical environment, characterized by material and sensory attributes; the virtual environment, influenced by immersive technologies; and their fusion into hybrid environments where digital and physical components interact dynamically. The increasing number of AI tools in contemporary society, extensively utilized in both professional and personal spheres, has led to a varied landscape of developing technologies. For instance, ChatGPT has emerged as one of the most downloaded applications, a statistically substantiated fact that demonstrates the swift incorporation of language-based AI into daily life. It also underscores the function of large language models (LLMs) as meaningful bridges between concepts at reading emotional and behavioral signals via natural language. These models provide real-time modifications such as altering illumination, acoustics, or interface configurations, converting static settings into dynamic, emotionally receptive environments. We investigate the integration of language models into professional settings and their potential to enhance user experience by promoting focus, well-being, and engagement. The study investigates ethical concerns, including privacy, emotional tracking, and user agency, emphasizing the importance of inclusive and transparent design. This research formulates a framework for creating co-adaptive environments that merge technological innovation with human-centered experiences, offering a fresh viewpoint on responsive and supportive hybrid workspaces.

analysis.tldr: 探讨LLM如何通过自然语言感知情绪并实时调整物理/虚拟环境参数，以提升远程与混合办公中的用户体验。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程与混合办公中物理与数字环境融合带来新挑战，现有静态环境无法动态响应用户情绪与行为，而LLM的普及为环境自适应提供了新可能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM作为桥梁，通过自然语言理解情绪信号，实时调整照明、声学、界面等环境参数，创造动态、情感响应的工作空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个概念框架，将LLM集成到工作环境中，通过自然语言读取情绪和行为信号，实时修改环境属性（如照明、声学、界面配置），实现静态环境向动态情感响应环境的转换。
contributions: 提出将LLM作为环境自适应桥梁的新框架，实现物理-虚拟-混合环境的动态情感响应。
系统分析了隐私、情感追踪、用户能动性等伦理问题，强调包容性与透明设计。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚处于概念阶段，缺乏实证验证。
伦理问题（如隐私、情感追踪）的解决方案未具体展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探讨LLM如何通过自然语言感知情绪并实时调整物理/虚拟环境参数，以提升远程与混合办公中的用户体验。

papers.title: Walking Through Uncertainty: An Empirical Study of Uncertainty Estimation for Audio-Aware Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent audio-aware large language models (ALLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across diverse audio understanding and reasoning tasks, but they still frequently produce hallucinated or overly confident outputs. While uncertainty estimation has been extensively studied in text-only LLMs, it remains largely unexplored for ALLMs, where audio-conditioned generation introduces additional challenges such as perceptual ambiguity and cross-modal grounding. In this work, we present the first systematic empirical study of uncertainty estimation in ALLMs. We benchmark five representative methods, including predictive entropy, length-normalized entropy, semantic entropy, discrete semantic entropy, and P(True), across multiple models and diverse evaluation settings spanning general audio understanding, reasoning, hallucination detection, and unanswerable question answering. Our results reveal two key findings. First, semantic-level and verification-based methods consistently outperform token-level baselines on general audio reasoning benchmarks. Second, on trustworthiness-oriented benchmarks, the relative effectiveness of uncertainty methods becomes notably more model- and benchmark-dependent, indicating that conclusions drawn from general reasoning settings do not straightforwardly transfer to hallucination and unanswerable-question scenarios. We further explore uncertainty-based adaptive inference as a potential downstream application. We hope this study provides a foundation for future research on reliable, uncertainty-aware audio-language systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个系统研究音频感知大语言模型不确定性估计的实证工作，发现语义级方法在通用推理中更优，但可信度场景下结论不通用。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频感知大语言模型（ALLM）在多种任务中表现强劲，但常产生幻觉或过度自信输出；不确定性估计在纯文本LLM中已有广泛研究，但在ALLM中几乎未被探索，而音频条件生成引入了感知模糊和跨模态对齐等额外挑战。
analysis.problem: ALLM中不确定性估计方法缺乏系统性评估，现有结论是否从文本域迁移到音频域未知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义级和基于验证的方法在通用音频推理基准上一致优于基于token的基线；但在可信度导向基准上，不确定性方法的相对有效性高度依赖模型和基准，表明通用推理的结论不能直接迁移到幻觉和不可回答问题场景。
analysis.method: 基准测试五种不确定性估计方法（预测熵、长度归一化熵、语义熵、离散语义熵、P(True)），在多个ALLM和多种评估设置（通用音频理解、推理、幻觉检测、不可回答问题）上进行实证比较。
contributions: 首次对ALLM不确定性估计进行系统性实证研究
揭示语义级方法在通用推理中更优，但可信度场景下结论不通用
探索基于不确定性的自适应推理作为下游应用
analysis.experiments: 在多个ALLM和多种评估设置（通用音频理解、推理、幻觉检测、不可回答问题）上基准测试五种不确定性方法。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估五种方法，可能未覆盖所有不确定性估计技术
结论的泛化性可能受限于所选模型和基准
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个系统研究音频感知大语言模型不确定性估计的实证工作，发现语义级方法在通用推理中更优，但可信度场景下结论不通用。

papers.title: DualFact+: A Multimodal Fact Verification Framework for Procedural Video Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce DualFact, a dual-layer, multimodal factuality evaluation framework for procedural video captioning. DualFact separates factual correctness into conceptual facts, capturing abstract semantic roles (e.g., Action, Ingredient, Tool, Location), and contextual facts, capturing their grounded predicate-argument realizations in video. To support complete and role-consistent evaluation, DualFact incorporates implicit argument augmentation (VIA) and contrastive fact sets. We instantiate DualFact in two modes: DualFact-T, which verifies facts against textual evidence, and DualFact-V, which verifies facts against video-grounded visual evidence. Experiments on YouCook3-Fact and CraftBench-Fact show that state-of-the-art multimodal language models produce fluent but often factually incomplete captions, with systematic omissions and role-level inconsistencies. DualFact correlates more strongly with human factuality judgments than standard metrics, particularly for contextual facts, and reveals that caption-only evaluation overestimates hallucinations compared to video-grounded verification. Overall, DualFact offers an interpretable and human-aligned evaluation protocol that highlights persistent challenges in multimodal factual grounding, extending beyond surface-level fluency.

analysis.tldr: 提出双层次多模态事实验证框架DualFact，用于评估程序性视频字幕的事实正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频字幕评估指标主要关注流畅性，忽略事实正确性，且多模态语言模型生成的描述虽流畅但常存在事实遗漏和角色不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估程序性视频字幕的事实正确性，包括概念事实和上下文事实，并解决隐含论元缺失和角色不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到最先进的多模态语言模型生成的字幕流畅但事实不完整，存在系统性遗漏和角色级不一致；仅基于字幕的评估会高估幻觉，而视频接地验证更准确。
analysis.method: 提出DualFact框架，将事实正确性分为概念事实（抽象语义角色）和上下文事实（接地谓词-论元实现），并引入隐含论元增强和对比事实集。
contributions: 提出双层次事实验证框架DualFact，区分概念事实和上下文事实。
引入隐含论元增强和对比事实集，支持完整且角色一致的事实评估。
在YouCook3-Fact和CraftBench-Fact上验证，DualFact与人类判断相关性优于标准指标。
analysis.experiments: 在YouCook3-Fact和CraftBench-Fact数据集上评估，比较DualFact与标准指标，显示DualFact与人类事实判断相关性更强，尤其对上下文事实。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的事实类型和论元结构，可能无法覆盖所有程序性视频场景。
隐含论元增强可能引入噪声，影响评估准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双层次多模态事实验证框架DualFact，用于评估程序性视频字幕的事实正确性。

papers.title: Marco-MoE: Open Multilingual Mixture-of-Expert Language Models with Efficient Upcycling
papers.abstract: We present Marco-MoE, a suite of fully open multilingual sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models. Marco-MoE features a highly sparse design in which only around 5\% of the total parameters are activated per input token. This extreme sparsity, combined with upcycling from dense models, enables efficient pre-training on 5T tokens. Our models surpass similarly-sized competitors on English and multilingual benchmarks, achieving a best-in-class performance-to-compute ratio. We further post-train these models to create Marco-MoE-\textsc{Instruct} variants, which surpass the performance of competing models possessing $3$--$14\times$ more activated parameters. Our analysis reveals that Marco-MoE learns structured expert activation patterns shared across related languages, while maintaining highly specialized utilization for linguistically isolated ones. We further show that Marco-MoE allows for scalable language expansion without the interference typical of dense models. To support the community, we disclose our full training datasets, recipes, and model weights.

analysis.tldr: Marco-MoE 通过高效升级策略训练出高度稀疏的多语言 MoE 模型，在英语和多语言基准上超越同类模型，并实现最佳性能-计算比。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言语言模型在扩展时面临计算成本高和语言间干扰的问题，现有密集模型难以高效平衡性能与资源消耗。
analysis.problem: 如何高效预训练多语言稀疏 MoE 模型，使其在极低激活参数比例下仍能超越密集模型，并支持可扩展的语言扩展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Marco-MoE 学习到结构化专家激活模式：相关语言共享专家，而语言隔离的语言则保持高度专用化；同时，MoE 架构允许语言扩展而不产生密集模型常见的干扰。
analysis.method: 从密集模型升级（upcycling）得到高度稀疏的 MoE 模型，仅激活约 5% 的参数，并在 5T token 上高效预训练；随后进行指令微调得到 Instruct 变体。
contributions: 提出 Marco-MoE 系列完全开源的多语言稀疏 MoE 模型，具有极低激活参数比例。
通过升级策略实现高效预训练，在英语和多语言基准上达到最佳性能-计算比。
公开完整训练数据集、配方和模型权重，促进社区研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在英语和多语言基准上超越同类模型，且 Instruct 变体超越具有 3-14 倍激活参数的竞争模型。
limitations: 摘要未讨论模型在极端低资源语言上的表现。
未提供与更大规模模型的对比细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Marco-MoE 通过高效升级策略训练出高度稀疏的多语言 MoE 模型，在英语和多语言基准上超越同类模型，并实现最佳性能-计算比。

papers.title: Control Your Queries: Heterogeneous Query Interaction for Camera-Radar Fusion
papers.abstract: In autonomous driving, camera-radar fusion offers complementary sensing and low deployment cost. Existing methods perform fusion through input mixing, feature map mixing, or query-based feature sampling. We propose a new fusion paradigm, termed heterogeneous query interaction, and present ConFusion, a camera-radar 3D object detector. ConFusion combines image queries, radar queries, and learnable world queries distributed in 3D space to improve query initialization and object coverage. To encourage cross-type interaction among heterogeneous queries, we introduce heterogeneous query mixing (QMix), which performs dedicated cross-type attention after feature sampling to consolidate complementary object evidence. We further propose interactive query swap sampling (QSwap), which improves feature sampling by allowing related queries to exchange informative feature tokens under attention and geometric constraints. Experiments on the nuScenes dataset show that ConFusion achieves state-of-the-art performance, reaching 59.1 mAP and 65.6 NDS on the validation set, and 61.6 mAP and 67.9 NDS on the test set.

analysis.tldr: 提出异构查询交互范式ConFusion，通过图像查询、雷达查询和可学习世界查询的混合与交换采样，实现相机-雷达融合3D目标检测SOTA。
