analysis.research_motivation: 相机-雷达融合在自动驾驶中具有互补感知和低成本优势，但现有方法（输入混合、特征图混合、基于查询的特征采样）未能充分利用异构查询之间的交互，限制了检测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种新的融合范式，使相机和雷达的异构查询能够有效交互，提升3D目标检测的查询初始化和目标覆盖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ConFusion检测器，包含异构查询混合（QMix）和交互式查询交换采样（QSwap）。QMix在特征采样后执行跨类型注意力以整合互补证据；QSwap允许相关查询在注意力和几何约束下交换信息特征令牌。
contributions: 提出异构查询交互范式，结合图像查询、雷达查询和可学习世界查询以改善初始化与覆盖。
设计QMix和QSwap模块，实现跨类型查询交互和特征交换，提升融合效果。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上验证，验证集达到59.1 mAP和65.6 NDS，测试集达到61.6 mAP和67.9 NDS，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对雷达噪声敏感，未讨论鲁棒性。
计算开销可能较高，未提供效率分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异构查询交互范式ConFusion，通过图像查询、雷达查询和可学习世界查询的混合与交换采样，实现相机-雷达融合3D目标检测SOTA。

papers.title: Vision SmolMamba: Spike-Guided Token Pruning for Energy-Efficient Spiking State-Space Vision Models
papers.abstract: Spiking Transformers have shown strong potential for long-range visual modeling through spike-driven self-attention. However, their quadratic token interactions remain fundamentally misaligned with the sparse and event-driven nature of spiking neural computation. To address this limitation, we propose Vision SmolMamba, an energy-efficient spiking state-space architecture that integrates spike-driven dynamics with linear-time selective recurrence. The key idea is a Spike-Guided Spatio-Temporal Token Pruner (SST-TP), which estimates token importance using both spike activation strength and first-spike latency. This mechanism progressively removes redundant tokens while preserving salient spatio-temporal information, enabling efficient scaling with token sparsity. Based on this mechanism, the proposed SmolMamba block incorporates spike events directly into bidirectional state-space recurrence, forming a spiking state-space vision backbone for efficient long-range modeling. Extensive experiments on both static and event-based benchmarks, including ImageNet-1K, CIFAR10/100, CIFAR10-DVS, and DVS128 Gesture, demonstrate that Vision SmolMamba consistently achieves superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. In particular, it reduces the estimated energy cost by at least 1.5x compared with prior spiking Transformer baselines and a Spiking Mamba variant while maintaining competitive or improved accuracy. These results demonstrate that combining spike-guided token sparsity with state-space modeling offers a scalable and energy-efficient paradigm for spiking vision systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Spike-Guided Token Pruning 与状态空间模型结合的节能脉冲视觉架构 Vision SmolMamba。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲 Transformer 在长程视觉建模中表现优异，但其二次复杂度的 token 交互与脉冲神经计算的稀疏、事件驱动本质不匹配，导致能效瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种与脉冲计算特性对齐的线性复杂度视觉架构，同时实现高精度与低能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Vision SmolMamba，核心是 Spike-Guided Spatio-Temporal Token Pruner (SST-TP)，利用脉冲激活强度和首次脉冲延迟估计 token 重要性，逐步剪枝冗余 token；并将脉冲事件直接融入双向状态空间循环，形成脉冲状态空间视觉骨干。
contributions: 提出 Spike-Guided Spatio-Temporal Token Pruner (SST-TP)，实现基于脉冲稀疏性的高效 token 剪枝。
构建 Vision SmolMamba 架构，将脉冲驱动与线性时间选择性状态空间模型结合，实现节能长程建模。
在多个静态和事件基准上验证了优于脉冲 Transformer 的精度-能效权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageNet-1K、CIFAR10/100、CIFAR10-DVS、DVS128 Gesture 上评估，相比脉冲 Transformer 基线能耗降低至少 1.5 倍，精度相当或更优。
limitations: 可能仅在特定脉冲数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
剪枝策略可能引入额外延迟，需硬件协同优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Spike-Guided Token Pruning 与状态空间模型结合的节能脉冲视觉架构 Vision SmolMamba。

papers.title: Benchmarking bandgap prediction in semiconductors under experimental and realistic evaluation settings
papers.abstract: Accurate bandgap prediction is crucial for semiconductor applications, yet machine learning models trained on computational data often struggle to generalize to experimental bandgap measurements. Challenges related to data fidelity, domain generalization, and model interpretability remain insufficiently addressed in existing evaluation frameworks. To bridge this gap, we introduce RealMat-BaG, a benchmark for assessing model reliability under experimentally relevant conditions. We curate an open-access dataset of experimental bandgaps with aligned crystal structures and compare graph neural networks as well as classical machine learning baselines. Our framework evaluates performance across statistical and domain-based splits, examines transfer from DFT-computed to experimental bandgaps, and analyzes interpretability at both elemental-property and structural levels. Our results reveal the fundamental generalization limitations of current bandgap prediction models and establish a benchmark aligned with experimental measurements for developing more reliable learning strategies for materials discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出RealMat-BaG基准，评估半导体带隙预测模型在实验条件下的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习模型在计算数据上表现良好，但难以泛化到实验带隙测量，现有评估框架在数据保真度、域泛化和模型可解释性方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 解决带隙预测模型在实验相关条件下的泛化能力评估问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前模型从DFT计算数据迁移到实验数据时存在根本性泛化限制。
analysis.method: 构建包含实验带隙和晶体结构的开放数据集RealMat-BaG，比较图神经网络和经典机器学习基线，在统计和域划分下评估性能，分析从DFT到实验的迁移以及可解释性。
contributions: 引入RealMat-BaG基准，用于实验相关条件下的模型可靠性评估。
揭示当前带隙预测模型的泛化局限性，建立与实验测量对齐的基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注带隙预测，未涵盖其他半导体性质。
数据集规模可能有限，影响泛化结论的普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RealMat-BaG基准，评估半导体带隙预测模型在实验条件下的可靠性。

papers.title: SnapGuard: Lightweight Prompt Injection Detection for Screenshot-Based Web Agents
papers.abstract: Web agents have emerged as an effective paradigm for automating interactions with complex web environments, yet remain vulnerable to prompt injection attacks that embed malicious instructions into webpage content to induce unintended actions. This threat is further amplified for screenshot-based web agents, which operate on rendered visual webpages rather than structured textual representations, making predominant text-centric defenses ineffective. Although multimodal detection methods have been explored, they often rely on large vision-language models (VLMs), incurring significant computational overhead. The bottleneck lies in the complexity of modern webpages: VLMs must comprehend the global semantics of an entire page, resulting in substantial inference time and GPU memory usage. This raises a critical question: can we detect prompt injection attacks from screenshots in a lightweight manner? In this paper, we observe that injected webpages exhibit distinct characteristics compared to benign ones from both visual and textual perspectives. Building on this insight, we propose SnapGuard, a lightweight yet accurate method that reformulates prompt injection detection as multimodal representation analysis over webpage screenshots. SnapGuard leverages two complementary signals: a visual stability indicator that identifies abnormally smooth gradient distributions induced by malicious content, and action-oriented textual signals recovered via contrast-polarity reversal. Extensive evaluations across eight attacks and two benign settings demonstrate that SnapGuard achieves an F1 score of 0.75, outperforming GPT-4o-prompt while being 8x faster (1.81s vs. 14.50s) and introducing no additional memory overhead.

analysis.tldr: SnapGuard 是一种轻量级的截图型网页代理提示注入检测方法，通过视觉稳定性和动作导向文本信号实现高效检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 截图型网页代理易受提示注入攻击，现有文本防御无效，而多模态检测依赖大型VLM导致计算开销大，亟需轻量级解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何从网页截图中轻量级地检测提示注入攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到被注入的网页在视觉和文本上与良性网页存在明显差异：视觉上梯度分布异常平滑，文本上可通过对比度极性反转恢复动作导向信号。
analysis.method: SnapGuard 将提示注入检测转化为多模态表征分析，利用视觉稳定性指标（检测异常平滑梯度）和动作导向文本信号（通过对比度极性反转恢复）两个互补信号。
contributions: 首次提出针对截图型网页代理的轻量级提示注入检测方法。
发现注入网页在视觉和文本上的独特特征，并设计两种互补检测信号。
实验证明SnapGuard在F1分数上优于GPT-4o-prompt，且速度快8倍，无额外内存开销。
analysis.experiments: 在8种攻击和2种良性设置下进行评估，SnapGuard达到0.75的F1分数，推理时间1.81秒（对比GPT-4o-prompt的14.50秒），无额外内存开销。
limitations: 可能对特定类型的注入攻击或复杂网页布局效果有限。
视觉稳定性指标可能受网页设计风格影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SnapGuard 是一种轻量级的截图型网页代理提示注入检测方法，通过视觉稳定性和动作导向文本信号实现高效检测。

papers.title: LatentDiff: Scaling Semantic Dataset Comparison to Millions of Images
papers.abstract: We present LatentDiff, a scalable framework for semantic dataset comparison that operates directly in the latent space of pretrained vision encoders. By combining sparse autoencoder-based divergence testing with density ratio estimation, LatentDiff identifies interpretable semantic differences between datasets at a fraction of the computational cost of caption-based alternatives. We also introduce Noisy-Diff, a benchmark capturing realistic sparse distribution shifts that cause existing methods to struggle. Experiments demonstrate that LatentDiff achieves superior accuracy while remaining robust to settings where an extremely small fraction of images (from 5% to <1% ) differ semantically.

analysis.tldr: 提出 LatentDiff，在预训练视觉编码器的潜在空间中进行可扩展的语义数据集比较，结合稀疏自编码器散度测试和密度比估计，计算成本远低于基于标题的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义数据集比较方法（如基于标题的方法）计算成本高，难以扩展到百万级图像，且对稀疏分布偏移敏感。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且可解释地比较大规模图像数据集之间的语义差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在预训练视觉编码器的潜在空间中，结合稀疏自编码器（sparse autoencoder）的散度测试与密度比估计（density ratio estimation）来识别语义差异。
contributions: 提出 LatentDiff，一种可扩展的语义数据集比较框架，在潜在空间操作，计算成本低。
引入 Noisy-Diff 基准，用于评估方法在真实稀疏分布偏移下的表现。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，LatentDiff 在准确性和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，尤其在仅有 5% 到 <1% 图像存在语义差异的极端稀疏场景下。
limitations: 依赖预训练视觉编码器的质量，可能无法捕捉编码器未学习的语义。
稀疏自编码器的训练和调参可能增加额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 LatentDiff，在预训练视觉编码器的潜在空间中进行可扩展的语义数据集比较，结合稀疏自编码器散度测试和密度比估计，计算成本远低于基于标题的方法。

papers.title: Rethinking KV Cache Eviction via a Unified Information-Theoretic Objective
papers.abstract: Key-value (KV) caching is essential for large language model inference, yet its memory overhead poses a critical bottleneck for long-context generation. Existing eviction policies predominantly rely on empirical heuristics, lacking a rigorous theoretical foundation. This work rethinks KV cache eviction through the lens of the Information Bottleneck principle. Under a linear-Gaussian surrogate of attention, we derive a closed-form mutual information objective that characterizes the effective information capacity of a retained KV cache subset. This formulation reveals that a wide range of existing eviction strategies can be interpreted as different approximations of the same capacity-maximization principle. Guided by this insight, we introduce CapKV, a capacity-aware eviction method that directly targets information preservation via a log-determinant approximation using statistical leverage scores. This approach replaces heuristic selection with a theoretically grounded mechanism that preserves the maximum predictive signal. Extensive experiments across multiple models and long-context benchmarks show that CapKV consistently outperforms prior methods, achieving a better trade-off between memory efficiency and generational fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 基于信息瓶颈理论统一KV缓存驱逐策略，提出容量感知方法CapKV。
analysis.research_motivation: KV缓存是LLM长上下文推理的关键，但内存开销大；现有驱逐策略依赖经验启发式，缺乏理论基础。
analysis.problem: 如何从信息论角度统一并优化KV缓存驱逐策略，以在有限内存下最大化保留预测信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在线性高斯注意力近似下推导闭式互信息目标，揭示现有策略是同一容量最大化原理的不同近似；提出CapKV，利用统计杠杆分数的对数行列式近似直接优化信息保留。
contributions: 从信息瓶颈原理出发，为KV缓存驱逐提供统一的理论框架。
提出容量感知驱逐方法CapKV，替代启发式选择，实现理论驱动的信息保留。
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型和长上下文基准上，CapKV优于先前方法，在内存效率与生成保真度间取得更好权衡。
limitations: 理论推导基于线性高斯注意力近似，可能不适用于所有注意力模式。
未讨论与计算效率相关的额外开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于信息瓶颈理论统一KV缓存驱逐策略，提出容量感知方法CapKV。

papers.title: From CRUD to Autonomous Agents: Formal Validation and Zero-Trust Security for Semantic Gateways in AI-Native Enterprise Systems
papers.abstract: Enterprise software engineering is shifting away from deterministic CRUD/REST architectures toward AI-native systems where large language models act as cognitive orchestrators. This transition introduces a critical security tension: probabilistic LLMs weaken classical mechanisms for validation, access control, and formal testing. This paper proposes the design, formal validation, and empirical evaluation of a Semantic Gateway governed by the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The gateway reframes the enterprise API as a semantic surface where tools are dynamically discovered, authorized, and executed based on intent and policy enforcement. The central contribution rests on a paradigm shift: autonomous agents must not be validated as traditional software nor as simple API consumers, but as stochastic state-transition systems whose behavior must be abstracted, fuzzed, and audited through enabled-tool graphs. The architecture introduces a three-layer Zero-Trust security model comprising a pre-inference Semantic Firewall, deterministic Tool-Level RBAC, and out-of-band Cryptographic Human-in-the-Loop approval. Enabledness-Preserving Abstractions (EPAs) and greybox semantic fuzzing--originally developed for blockchain smart contract verification--are adapted to audit agent behavior in enterprise environments. Results demonstrate an 84.2% reduction in incidental code. Across 500,000 multi-turn fuzzing sequences, the methodology achieved a 100% discovery rate of hidden unauthorized state transitions, proving that dynamic formal verification is strictly necessary for secure agentic deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向AI原生企业系统的语义网关，通过形式化验证和零信任安全架构实现自主Agent的安全部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业软件从确定性CRUD架构转向AI原生系统，LLM作为认知编排器引入安全张力：概率性LLM削弱了传统验证、访问控制和形式化测试机制。
analysis.problem: 如何为自主Agent设计一种新的安全验证框架，使其行为可被抽象、模糊测试和审计，而非作为传统软件或简单API消费者验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的语义网关，包含三层零信任安全模型（预推理语义防火墙、确定性工具级RBAC、带外加密人机循环审批），并采用启用保持抽象（EPA）和灰盒语义模糊测试（源自区块链智能合约验证）审计Agent行为。
contributions: 提出语义网关架构，将企业API重构为语义表面，实现基于意图和策略的动态工具发现、授权和执行。
将自主Agent视为随机状态转移系统，引入启用-工具图进行抽象、模糊测试和审计。
改编区块链智能合约验证方法（EPA和灰盒语义模糊测试）用于企业Agent行为审计。
analysis.experiments: 在500,000轮多轮模糊测试序列中，方法实现了100%的隐藏未授权状态转移发现率，并减少了84.2%的偶然代码。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于MCP的特定架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
实验环境为模拟，真实企业部署效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向AI原生企业系统的语义网关，通过形式化验证和零信任安全架构实现自主Agent的安全部署。

papers.title: On Halting vs Converging in Recurrent Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Recurrent Graph Neural Networks (RGNNs) extend standard GNNs by iterating message-passing until some stopping condition is met. Various RGNN models have been proposed in the literature. In this paper, we study three such models: converging RGNNs, where all vertex representations must stabilise; output-converging RGNNs, where only the output classifications must stabilise; and halting RGNNs, where a per-vertex halting classifier determines when to stop. We establish expressiveness relationships between these models: over undirected graphs, converging RGNNs are equally expressive as graded-bisimulation-invariant halting RGNNs, while output-converging RGNNs are at least as expressive. Combined with prior results on halting RGNNs, this shows that, relative to the classifiers expressible in monadic second-order logic (MSO), converging RGNNs express exactly the graded modal $μ$-calculus ($μ$GML), and output-converging RGNNs express at least $μ$GML. These results hold even when restricting to ReLU networks with sum aggregation. The main technical challenge is simulating halting RGNNs by converging ones: without a global halting classifier, vertices may locally decide to halt at different times, causing desynchronisation. We develop a "traffic-light" protocol that enables vertices to coordinate despite this asynchrony. Our results answer an open question from Bollen et al. (2025) and show that the RGNN model of Pflueger et al. (2024) retains full $μ$GML expressiveness even when convergence is guaranteed.

analysis.tldr: 循环图神经网络中，收敛模型与停机模型在表达能力上等价，且都能表达μGML逻辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 循环图神经网络（RGNN）通过迭代消息传递直到满足停止条件来扩展标准GNN，但不同停止机制（收敛、输出收敛、停机）之间的表达能力关系尚不明确，存在开放问题。
analysis.problem: 研究三种RGNN模型（收敛、输出收敛、停机）之间的表达能力关系，特别是停机模型能否被收敛模型模拟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 停机模型中顶点可能在不同时间局部决定停止，导致异步问题，而收敛模型要求全局同步稳定。
analysis.method: 提出一种“交通灯”协议，使顶点能在异步情况下协调，从而用收敛模型模拟停机模型。
contributions: 建立了收敛RGNN与停机RGNN在无向图上的表达能力等价关系，并证明输出收敛RGNN至少同样表达能力强。
回答了Bollen等人(2025)的开放问题，并表明Pflueger等人(2024)的RGNN模型在保证收敛时仍保持完整的μGML表达能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 结果仅限于无向图，有向图情况未讨论。
理论分析基于特定逻辑（μGML），实际应用中的表达能力可能受限于网络架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 循环图神经网络中，收敛模型与停机模型在表达能力上等价，且都能表达μGML逻辑。

papers.title: TopoMamba: Topology-Aware Scanning and Fusion for Segmenting Heterogeneous Medical Visual Media
papers.abstract: Visual state-space models (SSMs) have shown strong potential for medical image segmentation, yet their effectiveness is often limited by two practical issues: axis-biased scan ordering weakens the modeling of oblique and curved structures, and naive multi-branch fusion tends to amplify redundant responses. We present TopoMamba, a topology-aware scan-and-fuse framework for segmenting heterogeneous medical visual media. The method combines a diagonal/anti-diagonal TopoA-Scan branch with the standard Cross-Scan branch to provide complementary structural priors, and introduces ScanCache, a device-aware caching mechanism that amortizes explicit scan-index construction across recurring resolutions. To fuse heterogeneous scan features efficiently, we further propose a lightweight HSIC Gate that regulates branch interaction using a dependence-aware scalar gating rule. We also instantiate a volumetric TopoMamba-3D for practical 3D clinical segmentation. Experiments on Synapse CT, ISIC 2017 dermoscopy, and CVC-ClinicDB endoscopy show that TopoMamba consistently improves segmentation quality over strong CNN, Transformer, and SSM baselines, with particularly clear gains on thin or curved targets such as the pancreas and gallbladder, while maintaining favorable deployment efficiency under dynamic input resolutions. These results suggest that topology-aware scan ordering and lightweight dependence-aware fusion form an effective and practical design for medical multimedia segmentation. The code will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: TopoMamba通过拓扑感知扫描和轻量融合机制提升医学图像分割质量，尤其对细长和弯曲目标效果显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉状态空间模型在医学图像分割中表现潜力，但存在轴偏扫描顺序削弱斜向和弯曲结构建模、朴素多分支融合放大冗余响应的问题，亟需更有效的扫描与融合设计。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉SSM在医学图像分割中因扫描顺序偏差和冗余融合导致的细长/弯曲目标分割质量不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准Cross-Scan存在轴偏扫描顺序，对斜向和弯曲结构建模弱；朴素多分支融合易放大冗余响应。
analysis.method: 提出TopoMamba框架，包含对角线/反对角线TopoA-Scan分支与标准Cross-Scan分支互补，引入ScanCache缓存机制加速扫描索引构建，以及轻量HSIC Gate实现依赖感知的标量门控融合。
contributions: 提出拓扑感知扫描分支TopoA-Scan，提供互补结构先验，增强对斜向和弯曲结构的建模。
设计ScanCache设备感知缓存机制，高效复用扫描索引。
提出轻量HSIC Gate，通过依赖感知标量门控高效融合异构扫描特征。
在Synapse CT、ISIC 2017、CVC-ClinicDB上超越CNN、Transformer和SSM基线，尤其对胰腺、胆囊等细长弯曲目标提升明显。
analysis.experiments: 在Synapse CT、ISIC 2017 dermoscopy、CVC-ClinicDB endoscopy三个数据集上评估，与CNN、Transformer、SSM基线对比，TopoMamba一致提升分割质量，对细长弯曲目标（如胰腺、胆囊）增益显著，且动态输入分辨率下部署效率良好。
limitations: 可能仅在特定医学影像模态（CT、内镜、皮肤镜）上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
HSIC Gate的依赖感知机制可能增加少量计算开销，虽称轻量但未与更复杂融合方法对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TopoMamba通过拓扑感知扫描和轻量融合机制提升医学图像分割质量，尤其对细长和弯曲目标效果显著。

papers.title: Medoid Prototype Alignment for Cross-Plant Unknown Attack Detection in Industrial Control Systems
papers.abstract: Deploying an intrusion detector trained in one industrial plant to another remains difficult because Industrial Control System (ICS) traffic is highly site-dependent, labels are scarce, and unseen attacks often appear after deployment. To address this challenge, this paper introduces a medoid prototype alignment framework for cross-plant unknown attack detection. Instead of aligning all source and target samples directly, the method first compresses heterogeneous traffic into a comparable representation space and then extracts robust medoid prototypes that summarize local operational structure in each domain. A prototype-calibrated transfer objective is further designed to align target prototypes with source prototypes while preserving source-domain discrimination and encouraging confident target predictions. This strategy reduces noisy cross-domain matching and improves transfer stability under heterogeneous industrial conditions. Experiments conducted on natural gas and water storage control systems show that the proposed method achieves the best average performance among all compared models, reaching an average accuracy of 0.843 and an average F1-score of 0.838 across four unknown-attack transfer tasks. The analysis also shows clear transfer asymmetry between source-target directions and confirms that prototype guidance is especially helpful on challenging reverse-transfer settings. These findings suggest that medoid prototype alignment is a practical solution for robust industrial intrusion detection under domain shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出中值原型对齐框架，实现跨工厂工业控制系统未知攻击检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业控制系统流量高度依赖站点、标签稀缺且部署后常出现未知攻击，导致跨工厂入侵检测困难。
analysis.problem: 解决跨工厂工业控制系统中未知攻击检测的域迁移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到源-目标方向间存在迁移不对称性，且原型引导在反向迁移任务中尤其有效。
analysis.method: 先压缩异构流量到可比表示空间，提取中值原型总结局部运行结构，再设计原型校准迁移目标对齐目标与源原型，同时保持源域判别性并鼓励目标域置信预测。
contributions: 提出中值原型对齐框架用于跨工厂未知攻击检测。
设计原型校准迁移目标，减少噪声跨域匹配并提高迁移稳定性。
在天然气和水存储控制系统上验证有效性，平均准确率0.843，F1-score 0.838。
analysis.experiments: 在天然气和水存储控制系统上进行了四个未知攻击迁移任务实验，平均准确率0.843，平均F1-score 0.838。
limitations: 可能依赖中值原型的代表性，在极端异构场景下效果可能下降。
未讨论对大规模或实时系统的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出中值原型对齐框架，实现跨工厂工业控制系统未知攻击检测。

papers.title: Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms often require a large amount of data and struggle in sparse-reward domains with long planning horizons and multiple sub-goals. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic extension of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) that transfers partial logical policy specifications learned in easier instances to guide learning in more challenging settings. We introduce two integrations of symbolic guidance: (i) H-PPO-Product, which biases the action distribution at sampling time, and (ii) H-PPO-SymLoss, which augments the PPO loss with a symbolic regularization term. We evaluate our methods on three benchmarks (OfficeWorld, WaterWorld, and DoorKey), showing consistently faster learning and higher return at convergence than PPO and a Reward Machine baseline, also under imperfect symbolic knowledge.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号PPO变体，利用逻辑策略规范引导强化学习，在稀疏奖励任务中加速收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度强化学习在稀疏奖励、长规划任务中样本效率低，现有方法难以利用结构化知识。
analysis.problem: 如何将符号逻辑知识有效整合到PPO中，提升稀疏奖励环境下的学习效率和最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两种神经符号PPO变体：H-PPO-Product在采样时偏置动作分布，H-PPO-SymLoss在PPO损失中添加符号正则化项。
contributions: 提出两种神经符号PPO集成方法，利用逻辑策略规范引导学习。
在三个基准上验证了比PPO和Reward Machine基线更快的收敛和更高的回报。
analysis.experiments: 在OfficeWorld、WaterWorld和DoorKey三个基准上评估，显示更快学习和更高收敛回报，且对不完美符号知识鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖符号知识的可用性和质量。
未在更复杂或高维状态空间任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号PPO变体，利用逻辑策略规范引导强化学习，在稀疏奖励任务中加速收敛。

papers.title: DualGeo: A Dual-View Framework for Worldwide Image Geo-localization
papers.abstract: Worldwide image geo-localization aims to infer the geographic location of an image captured anywhere on Earth, spanning street, city, regional, national, and continental scales. Existing methods rely on visual features that are sensitive to environmental variations (e.g., lighting, season, and weather) and lack effective post-processing to filter outlier candidates, limiting localization accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose DualGeo, a two-stage framework for worldwide image geo-localization. First, it establishes a geo-representational foundation by fusing image and semantic segmentation features via bidirectional cross-attention. The fused features are then aligned with GPS coordinates through dual-view contrastive learning to build a global retrieval database. Second, it performs geo-cognitive refinement by re-ranking retrieved candidates using geographic clustering. It then feeds them into large multimodal models (LMMs) for final coordinate prediction. Experiments on IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, and YFCC4k show that DualGeo outperforms state-of-the-art methods, improving street-level (<1 km) and city-level (<25 km) localization accuracy by 3.6%-16.58% and 1.29%-8.77%, respectively. Our code and datasets are available : https://github.com/CJ310177/DualGeo.

analysis.tldr: 提出双视图框架DualGeo，融合图像与语义特征并通过地理聚类重排序提升全球图像地理定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全球图像地理定位方法依赖视觉特征，对环境变化敏感，且缺乏有效的后处理来过滤异常候选，导致定位精度受限。
analysis.problem: 如何提升全球图像地理定位在街道、城市等不同尺度下的准确性，克服视觉特征对环境变化的敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段通过双向交叉注意力融合图像和语义分割特征，并利用双视图对比学习与GPS坐标对齐构建检索数据库；第二阶段通过地理聚类重排序候选，并利用大多模态模型进行最终坐标预测。
contributions: 提出DualGeo两阶段框架，融合图像与语义特征并利用地理聚类重排序。
在多个基准数据集上显著提升街道级和城市级定位精度。
analysis.experiments: 在IM2GPS、IM2GPS3k和YFCC4k数据集上实验，街道级（<1 km）和城市级（<25 km）定位精度分别提升3.6%-16.58%和1.29%-8.77%。
limitations: 依赖大多模态模型，可能带来计算开销。
地理聚类重排序的有效性可能受候选分布影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双视图框架DualGeo，融合图像与语义特征并通过地理聚类重排序提升全球图像地理定位精度。

papers.title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Recent knowledge distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation introduce increasingly complex hand-crafted objectives, yet are typically evaluated under fixed iteration schedules. These objectives substantially increase per-iteration cost, meaning equal iteration counts do not correspond to equal training budgets. It is therefore unclear whether reported gains reflect stronger distillation signals or simply greater compute. We show that iteration-based comparisons are misleading: when wall-clock compute is matched, canonical logit- and feature-based KD outperform recent segmentation-specific methods. Under extended training, feature-based distillation achieves state-of-the-art ResNet-18 performance on Cityscapes and ADE20K. A PSPNet ResNet-18 student closely approaches its ResNet-101 teacher despite using only one quarter of the parameters, reaching 99% of the teacher's mIoU on Cityscapes (79.0 vs 79.8) and 92% on ADE20K. Our results challenge the prevailing assumption that KD for segmentation requires task-specific mechanisms and suggest that scaling, rather than complex hand-crafted objectives, should guide future method design.

analysis.tldr: 在语义分割知识蒸馏中，简单规范的方法在计算量匹配时优于复杂定制方法，挑战了任务特定机制的必要性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语义分割知识蒸馏方法依赖复杂手工目标，但评估时未考虑计算成本，导致性能提升可能来自额外计算而非蒸馏信号。
analysis.problem: 解决语义分割知识蒸馏中迭代次数比较的误导性，揭示计算量匹配下简单方法的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当计算时间匹配时，规范的对数-和特征蒸馏优于近期分割专用方法；延长训练后特征蒸馏达到SOTA。
analysis.method: 采用标准logit蒸馏和特征蒸馏，在匹配计算量的条件下与复杂方法对比。
contributions: 指出迭代次数比较的误导性，提出计算量匹配评估标准
实验证明规范蒸馏在计算量匹配下优于复杂定制方法
挑战语义分割蒸馏需要任务特定机制的假设
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes和ADE20K上使用ResNet-18学生和ResNet-101教师，PSPNet学生达到教师99%和92%的mIoU。
limitations: 仅验证了语义分割任务，其他密集预测任务未测试

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在语义分割知识蒸馏中，简单规范的方法在计算量匹配时优于复杂定制方法，挑战了任务特定机制的必要性。

papers.title: AI as Consumer and Participant: A Co-Design Agenda for MBSE Substrates and Methodology
papers.abstract: AI tools are being deployed over MBSE models today, and those models were not designed for this kind of consumption. The problem is not simply that tools hallucinate: well-prompted frontier models produce competent, useful output over a conformant SysML model, but the reasoning they produce is drawn from training rather than retrieved from the model itself, and different tools over the same model produce different results with nothing in the record to adjudicate between them. The model, in other words, is functioning as a prompt rather than as a knowledge base. Attaching better tools to the same model does not resolve this. The model and the methodology that governs its construction need to be designed together for AI participation, treating the model as a machine-queryable knowledge substrate rather than a structured artefact for human navigation, and that co-design has not yet happened in any systematic way. This paper works through a concrete workflow scenario to show what that gap looks like in practice, proposes three principles that jointly characterise what model and methodology must achieve together, and closes with a call to the community to begin this work before the architectural decisions about AI integration settle without the methodological foundation they require.

analysis.tldr: 本文指出当前MBSE模型未针对AI消费设计，提出模型与方法论协同设计的三项原则。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具正在被部署到MBSE模型上，但这些模型并非为此设计，导致模型仅作为提示而非知识库，不同工具产生不一致结果且无法裁决。
analysis.problem: MBSE模型和方法论需要协同设计以支持AI作为消费者和参与者，但目前缺乏系统性设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：即使提示良好的前沿模型能在合规SysML模型上产生有用输出，其推理来自训练而非模型本身；不同工具对同一模型产生不同结果且无记录可裁决。
analysis.method: 通过具体工作流场景展示差距，提出三项原则来刻画模型和方法论必须共同实现的目标。
contributions: 通过具体工作流场景展示了当前MBSE模型与AI消费之间的差距
提出了三项原则，为模型和方法论的协同设计提供方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未提供实证验证或定量评估
原则的具体实现和有效性有待后续研究

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文指出当前MBSE模型未针对AI消费设计，提出模型与方法论协同设计的三项原则。

papers.title: Automated Adversarial Collaboration for Advancing Theory Building in the Cognitive Sciences
papers.abstract: Cognitive science often evaluates theories through narrow paradigms and local model comparisons, limiting the integration of evidence across tasks and realizations. We introduce an automated adversarial collaboration framework for adjudicating among competing theories even when the candidate models and experiments must be discovered during the adjudication process. The system combines LLM-based theory agents, program synthesis, and information-theoretic experimental design in a closed loop. In a simulation study spanning three classic categorization theories, the framework recovered the ground-truth theory across noise settings with weaker reliability in the hardest settings. Together, the framework and findings provide a concrete proof of concept for closed-loop, in-silico theory adjudication in cognitive science.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动化对抗协作框架，结合LLM、程序合成与信息论实验设计，在认知科学中实现理论裁决。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知科学中理论评估常局限于窄范式和局部模型比较，缺乏跨任务和实现的证据整合，需要自动化方法促进理论竞争与裁决。
analysis.problem: 如何在候选模型和实验需动态发现的情况下，自动化地裁决竞争理论。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合基于LLM的理论智能体、程序合成和信息论实验设计，形成闭环系统，自动生成实验并比较理论。
contributions: 提出自动化对抗协作框架，用于认知科学中的理论裁决。
通过模拟实验证明框架能在多种噪声设置下恢复真实理论。
analysis.experiments: 在三种经典分类理论的模拟研究中，框架在不同噪声设置下恢复了真实理论，但在最难设置下可靠性较弱。
limitations: 模拟研究仅覆盖分类理论，实际认知理论更复杂。
最难噪声设置下可靠性较弱，需进一步改进。

papers.title: PHISHREV: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Post-Hoc Non-monotonic Reasoning Framework for Context-Aware Phishing Website Classification
papers.abstract: Phishing detection systems are predominantly rely on statistical machine learning models, which often lack contextual reasoning and are vulnerable to adversarial manipulation. In this work, we propose a hybrid framework that integrates machine learning classifiers with non-monotonic reasoning using Answer Set Programming (ASP) to enable context-aware decision refinement. The proposed post-hoc reasoning layer incorporates expert knowledge to revise classifier predictions through formal belief revisions. Experimental results indicate that the reasoning module modifies 5.08\% of classifier outputs, leading to improved decision consistency. A key advantage is that new domain knowledge can be incorporated into the reasoning layer in $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time, eliminating the need for model retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合ML与ASP非单调推理的钓鱼网站检测框架，后验推理层修正5.08%的分类结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有钓鱼检测系统依赖统计ML模型，缺乏上下文推理能力且易受对抗攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何将专家知识与形式推理融入ML分类器，实现上下文感知的决策修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合框架：ML分类器 + 基于回答集编程(ASP)的非单调推理层，通过信念修正调整分类输出。
contributions: 提出首个结合ML与ASP非单调推理的钓鱼网站分类框架
推理层可在线性时间内融入新领域知识，无需重训练

papers.title: Assistants, Not Architects: The Role of LLMs in Networked Systems Design
papers.abstract: Designing the architecture of modern networked systems requires navigating a large, combinatorial space of hardware, systems, and configuration choices with complex cross-layer interactions. Architects must balance competing objectives such as performance, cost, and deployability while satisfying compatibility and resource constraints, often relying on scattered rules-of-thumb drawn from benchmarks, papers, documentation, and expert experience. This raises a natural question: can large language models (LLMs) reliably perform this kind of architectural reasoning? We find that they cannot. While LLMs produce plausible configurations, they frequently miss critical constraints, encode incorrect assumptions, and exhibit ``stickiness'' to familiar patterns. A natural workaround--iterative validation via simulation or experimentation--is often prohibitively expensive at scale and, in many cases, infeasible, particularly when comparing hardware-dependent alternatives. Motivated by this gap, we present Kepler, a lightweight reasoning framework for architecture design that combines structured, expert-driven specifications with SMT-based optimization. Kepler encodes architecturally significant properties--requirements, incompatibilities, and qualitative trade-offs--about systems, hardware, and workloads as constraints, and synthesizes feasible designs that optimize user-defined objectives. It operates at an abstract level, capturing ``rules-of-thumb'' rather than detailed system behavior, enabling tractable reasoning while preserving key interactions, and provides explanations for its decisions. Through experiments and case studies, we show that Kepler uncovers interactions missed by LLMs and supports systematic, explainable design exploration.

analysis.tldr: LLM无法可靠进行网络系统架构设计，Kepler通过结构化专家规范与SMT优化实现可解释的设计探索。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络系统架构设计需要平衡性能、成本、可部署性等多目标，现有方法依赖分散的经验法则，而LLM虽能生成看似合理的配置但常遗漏关键约束，且迭代验证成本高昂或不可行。
analysis.problem: LLM在架构推理中不可靠，且缺乏可扩展、可解释的系统化设计方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM生成配置时频繁遗漏关键约束、编码错误假设，并表现出对熟悉模式的“粘性”；迭代验证在规模上成本过高，且硬件依赖场景下不可行。
analysis.method: Kepler：结合结构化专家驱动规范与SMT优化的轻量级推理框架，将需求、不兼容性、定性权衡编码为约束，合成满足用户定义目标的可行设计，并提供决策解释。
contributions: 揭示LLM在网络系统架构设计中的不可靠性及现有验证方法的局限性
提出Kepler框架，通过抽象规则与SMT优化实现可解释、系统化的设计探索
analysis.experiments: 通过实验和案例研究，Kepler发现了LLM遗漏的交互，并支持系统化、可解释的设计探索。
limitations: Kepler依赖专家提供的结构化规范，可能难以覆盖所有领域知识
抽象层次可能忽略某些细粒度系统行为
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM无法可靠进行网络系统架构设计，Kepler通过结构化专家规范与SMT优化实现可解释的设计探索。

papers.title: Defeasible Conditional Obligation in a Two-tiered Preference-based Semantics (Extended Version)
papers.abstract: In response to a concern raised by Horty, this paper develops a two-tiered, preference-based semantic framework for modeling defeasible conditional obligations. The paper extends a Hansson-Lewis style preference semantics for dyadic deontic logic by incorporating a nonmonotonic reasoning mechanism that enables previously derived obligations to be withdrawn when new, potentially conflicting information comes in. The account is bi-preferential: two orderings--ideality and normality--on worlds are employed to address shortcomings in earlier approaches, with a separate ranking method for each. At the nonmonotonic layer, a number of postulates are considered, including antecedent strengthening, inclusion and no-drowning. A connection is established with so-called constrained input/output (I/O) logic--an existing standard for normative reasoning based on a different methodology.

analysis.tldr: 提出双偏好语义框架建模可废止条件义务，解决Horty提出的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有道义逻辑偏好语义在处理可废止条件义务时存在不足，Horty的批评表明需要更灵活的框架来应对新信息导致的义务撤销。
analysis.problem: 如何建模可废止条件义务，使得先前推导的义务能在新冲突信息出现时被撤销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建双偏好语义：使用理想性（ideality）和规范性（normality）两个世界排序，分别处理义务的优先性和可废止性，并引入非单调推理机制。
contributions: 提出双偏好语义框架，扩展Hansson-Lewis风格偏好语义，支持可废止条件义务。
建立与约束输入/输出逻辑的联系，为非单调规范推理提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能仅适用于特定类型的规范推理场景。

papers.title: SymphonyGen: 3D Hierarchical Orchestral Generation with Controllable Harmony Skeleton
papers.abstract: Generating symphonic music requires simultaneously managing high-level structural form and dense, multi-track orchestration. Existing symbolic models often struggle with a "complexity-control imbalance", in which scaling bottlenecks limit long-term granular steerability. We present SymphonyGen, a 3D hierarchical framework for contemporary cinematic orchestration. SymphonyGen employs a cascading decoder architecture that decomposes the Bar, Track, and Event axes, improving computational efficiency and scalability over conventional 1D or 2D models. We introduce "short-score" conditioning via a beat-quantized multi-voice harmony skeleton, enabling outline control while preserving textural diversity. The model is further refined using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a cross-modal audio-perceptual reward, aligning symbolic output with modern acoustic expectations. Additionally, we implement a dissonance-averse sampling algorithm to suppress unintended tonal clashes during inference. Objective evaluations show that both reinforcement learning and dissonance-averse sampling effectively enhance harmonic cleanliness while maintaining melodic expression. Subjective evaluations demonstrate that SymphonyGen outperforms baselines in musicality and preference for orchestral music generation. Demo page: https://symphonygen.github.io/

analysis.tldr: SymphonyGen通过3D分层框架和可控和声骨架，解决了交响乐生成中的复杂度-控制失衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 交响乐生成需要同时管理高层结构形式和密集的多轨配器，现有符号模型存在复杂度-控制失衡，即扩展瓶颈限制了长期细粒度可操控性。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成具有长期结构可控性和多轨配器多样性的交响乐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有1D或2D模型在扩展时难以兼顾计算效率和细粒度控制，导致和声清晰度与旋律表达之间的平衡困难。
analysis.method: 提出3D分层框架，采用级联解码器分解小节、音轨和事件轴；引入节拍量化的多声部和声骨架（短谱）实现轮廓控制；使用GRPO和跨模态音频感知奖励进行强化学习微调；并设计避 dissonance 采样算法抑制音调冲突。
contributions: 提出3D分层级联解码器架构，提升计算效率和可扩展性
引入短谱条件控制和避 dissonance 采样算法，实现可控性和和声清晰度
analysis.experiments: 客观评估显示强化学习和避 dissonance 采样有效提升和声清晰度并保持旋律表达；主观评估表明在音乐性和偏好上优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定风格（当代电影配乐），泛化性待验证
短谱条件可能限制创作自由度

papers.title: Improving Zero-Shot Offline RL via Behavioral Task Sampling
papers.abstract: Offline zero-shot reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn agents that optimize unseen reward functions without additional environment interaction. The standard approach to this problem trains task-conditioned policies by sampling task vectors that define linear reward functions over learned state representations. In most existing algorithms, these task vectors are randomly sampled, implicitly assuming this adequately captures the structure of the task space. We argue that doing so leads to suboptimal zero-shot generalization. To address this limitation, we propose extracting task vectors directly from the offline dataset and using them to define the task distribution used for policy training. We introduce a simple and general reward function extraction procedure that integrates into existing offline zero-shot RL algorithms. Across multiple benchmark environments and baselines, our approach improves zero-shot performance by an average of 20%, highlighting the importance of principled task sampling in offline zero-shot RL.

analysis.tldr: 通过从离线数据集中提取任务向量来改进任务采样，显著提升零样本离线强化学习的泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有零样本离线RL方法随机采样任务向量，未能充分捕捉任务空间结构，导致零样本泛化次优。
analysis.problem: 如何设计更有效的任务采样策略以提升离线零样本RL的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机任务采样假设任务空间结构均匀，但实际中任务分布可能具有特定模式，导致策略训练不充分。
analysis.method: 提出从离线数据集中提取任务向量的方法，用于定义策略训练的任务分布，并集成到现有离线零样本RL算法中。
contributions: 揭示了随机任务采样在离线零样本RL中的局限性

papers.title: The Forensic Cost of Watermark Removal
papers.abstract: Current watermark removal methods are evaluated on two axes: attack success rate and perceptual quality. We show this is insufficient. While state-of-the-art attacks successfully degrade the watermark signal without visible distortion, they leave distinct statistical artifacts that betray the removal attempt. We name this overlooked axis Watermark Removal Detection (WRD) and demonstrate that a modern classifier trained on these artifacts achieves state-of-the-art detection rates at $10^{-3}$ FPR across every removal method tested. No existing attack accounts for this forensic leakage. We benchmark leading watermarking schemes against standard removal pipelines under the extended evaluation triple of attack success, perceptual quality, and forensic detectability, and find that no current method balances all three. Our results establish forensic stealthiness as a necessary requirement for watermark removal.

analysis.tldr: 水印去除方法会留下可被检测的统计痕迹，提出水印去除检测（WRD）作为新的评估维度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有水印去除评估仅关注攻击成功率和感知质量，忽略了去除行为本身可能留下的可检测痕迹，导致水印保护存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 水印去除方法在消除水印信号的同时会引入统计伪影，这些伪影可被用于检测去除行为，但现有方法未考虑这一维度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最先进的水印去除攻击虽能无可见失真地降解水印信号，但会留下独特的统计伪影，这些伪影可被分类器以极低假阳性率检测。
analysis.method: 提出水印去除检测（WRD）作为新评估轴，训练现代分类器检测去除伪影，并在多种水印方案和去除管道下进行基准测试。
contributions: 识别并命名了水印去除检测（WRD）这一被忽视的评估维度
证明现有水印去除方法均存在可被检测的统计伪影，且分类器可在10^{-3} FPR下实现高检测率
建立包含攻击成功率、感知质量和法医可检测性的三维评估框架，并发现无方法能同时平衡三者
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未考虑自适应攻击者针对检测器的对抗性优化
检测器泛化性可能受限于训练数据中的去除方法类型
