papers.title: From World-Gen to Quest-Line: A Dependency-Driven Prompt Pipeline for Coherent RPG Generation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for narrative generation, but their use in complex, multi-layered role-playing game (RPG) worlds is still limited by issues of coherence, controllability, and structural consistency. This paper explores a dependency-aware, multi-stage prompt pipeline for procedural RPG content generation that models narrative dependencies through structured intermediate representations. The approach decomposes generation into sequential stages: world building, non-player character creation, player character creation, campaign-level quest planning, and quest expansion. Each stage conditions on structured JSON outputs from previous stages. By enforcing schemas and explicit data flow, the pipeline reduces narrative drift, limits hallucinations, and supports scalable creation of interconnected narrative elements. The system is evaluated qualitatively through human-centered analysis across multiple independent runs. Outputs are assessed using criteria such as structural completeness, internal consistency, narrative coherence, diversity, and actionability. Results show that the pipeline consistently generates logically sound and structurally valid RPG content, without quality degradation as complexity increases. Separating high-level campaign planning from detailed quest expansion improves both global structure and local storytelling. These findings suggest that dependency-aware prompt pipelines with structured intermediate representations are an effective design pattern for LLM-based procedural content generation. This approach may also generalize to other domains requiring sequential reasoning over evolving contextual states.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线，通过结构化中间表示生成连贯的RPG内容。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在复杂多层的RPG世界生成中面临连贯性、可控性和结构一致性问题，现有方法难以处理多阶段叙事依赖。
analysis.problem: 如何通过结构化依赖管理实现RPG内容的连贯、可控和可扩展生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线，包括世界构建、NPC创建、玩家角色创建、战役级任务规划和任务扩展，每个阶段基于前一阶段的结构化JSON输出，通过模式约束和显式数据流减少叙事漂移和幻觉。
contributions: 提出一种依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线用于RPG内容生成
通过结构化中间表示和模式约束提升叙事连贯性和结构一致性
analysis.experiments: 通过人工分析评估多个独立运行输出，使用结构完整性、内部一致性、叙事连贯性、多样性和可操作性等标准，结果显示流水线能一致生成逻辑合理且结构有效的RPG内容，且质量不随复杂度增加而下降。
limitations: 仅依赖人工评估，缺乏定量指标
可能局限于RPG领域，泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种依赖感知的多阶段提示流水线，通过结构化中间表示生成连贯的RPG内容。

papers.title: DDA-Thinker: Decoupled Dual-Atomic Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning-Driven Image Editing
papers.abstract: Recent image editing models have achieved strong visual fidelity but often struggle with tasks requiring complex reasoning. To investigate and enhance the reasoning-grounded planning for image editing, we propose DDA-Thinker, a Thinker-centric framework designed for the independent optimization of a planning module (Thinker) over a fixed generative model (Editor). This decoupled Thinker-centric paradigm facilitates a controlled analysis of the planning module and makes its contribution under a fixed Editor easier to assess. To effectively guide this Thinker, we introduce a dual-atomic reinforcement learning framework. This framework decomposes feedback into two distinct atomic rewards implemented through verifiable checklists: a cognitive-atomic reward to directly assess the quality of the Thinker's executable plan, which serves as the actionable outcome of the Thinker's reasoning, and a visual-atomic reward to assess the final image quality. To improve checklist quality, our checklist synthesis is grounded not only in the source image and user instruction but also in a rational reference description of the ideal post-edit scene. To support this training, we further develop a two-stage data curation pipeline that first synthesizes a diverse and reasoning-focused dataset, then applies difficulty-aware refinement to curate an effective training curriculum for reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments on reasoning-driven image editing benchmarks, including RISE-Bench and KRIS-Bench, demonstrate that our approach substantially improves overall performance. Our method enables a community model to achieve results competitive with strong proprietary models, highlighting the practical potential of Thinker-centric optimization under a fixed-editor setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦双原子强化学习框架DDA-Thinker，通过独立优化规划模块提升推理驱动图像编辑性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑模型虽视觉保真度高，但在需要复杂推理的任务中表现不佳，且规划模块与生成模型耦合紧密，难以独立评估和优化规划能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改生成模型的前提下，独立优化规划模块以提升推理驱动的图像编辑效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DDA-Thinker框架，采用解耦的Thinker-centric范式，固定Editor并独立优化Thinker；引入双原子强化学习，将反馈分解为认知原子奖励（评估规划质量）和视觉原子奖励（评估最终图像质量）；基于源图像、用户指令和理想场景的理性参考描述合成检查清单；两阶段数据构建流程：先合成多样化推理数据集，再通过难度感知精炼构建训练课程。
contributions: 提出解耦的Thinker-centric框架，实现规划模块与生成模型的独立优化与评估。
设计双原子强化学习框架，通过认知和视觉原子奖励分别指导规划质量和图像质量。
开发基于理性参考描述的检查清单合成方法和两阶段数据构建流程。
analysis.experiments: 在RISE-Bench和KRIS-Bench等推理驱动图像编辑基准上实验，方法显著提升整体性能，使社区模型达到与强专有模型竞争的结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量检查清单合成，对复杂场景的泛化性有待验证。
固定Editor设置可能限制规划模块的潜力上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦双原子强化学习框架DDA-Thinker，通过独立优化规划模块提升推理驱动图像编辑性能。

papers.title: SciEval: A Benchmark for Automatic Evaluation of K-12 Science Instructional Materials
papers.abstract: The need to evaluate instructional materials for K-12 science education has become increasingly important, as more educators use generative AI to create instructional materials. However, the review of instructional materials is time-consuming, expertise-intensive, and difficult to scale, motivating interest in automated evaluation approaches. While large language models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on general evaluation tasks, their performance and reliability on instructional materials remain unclear. To address this gap, we formulate Automatic Instructional Materials Evaluation (AIME) as a generative AI task that predicts scores and evidence using the rubric designed by the educator. We create a benchmark dataset and develop baseline models for AIME. First, we curate the first AIME dataset, SciEval, consisting of instructional materials annotated with pedagogy-aligned evaluation scores and evidence-based rationales. Expert annotations achieve high inter-rater reliability, resulting in a dataset of 273 lesson-level instructional materials evaluated across 13 criteria (N=3549) using the EQuIP rubric. Second, we test mainstream LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Llama, and Qwen) on SciEval and find that none achieve strong performance. Then we fine-tune Qwen3 on SciEval. Results on a held-out test set show that domain-aligned fine-tuning can achieve up to 11 percent performance gains, highlighting the importance of domain-specific fine-tuning for AIME and facilitating the use of LLMs in other educational tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出K-12科学教学材料自动评估基准SciEval，发现通用LLM表现不佳，领域微调可提升11%。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着生成式AI用于创建教学材料，人工评估耗时且难以扩展，亟需自动化评估方法，但LLM在教学材料评估上的性能尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对K-12科学教学材料的自动评估基准和领域专用模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 主流LLM（GPT、Gemini、Llama、Qwen）在SciEval上均未取得强性能，表明通用模型难以直接胜任教学材料评估。
analysis.method: 构建包含273份教学材料、13个评估标准（共3549个标注）的SciEval数据集，并基于Qwen3进行领域微调。
contributions: 首次提出自动教学材料评估（AIME）任务并构建基准数据集SciEval，包含专家标注的评分和证据。
系统评估主流LLM在AIME上的表现，发现领域微调可带来高达11%的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在保留测试集上，领域对齐微调相比基线获得最高11%的性能提升。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（273份材料），可能限制泛化性。
仅基于EQuIP评分标准，未覆盖其他教学评估框架。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出K-12科学教学材料自动评估基准SciEval，发现通用LLM表现不佳，领域微调可提升11%。

papers.title: Generalizable Human Gaussian Splatting via Multi-view Semantic Consistency
papers.abstract: Recently, generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs has been actively studied for the photorealistic human rendering. Most existing methods rely on explicit geometric constraints or predefined structural representations to accurately position 3D Gaussians. Although these approaches have shown the remarkable progress in this field, they still suffer from inconsistent feature representations across multi-view inputs due to complex articulations of the human body and limited overlaps between different views. To address this problem, we propose a novel method to accurately localize 3D Gaussians and ultimately improve the quality of human rendering. The key idea is to unproject latent embeddings encoded from each viewpoint into a shared 3D space through predicted depth maps and recalibrate them belonging to the same body part based on cross-view attention. This helps the model resolve the spatial ambiguity occurring in highly textured regions as well as occluded body parts, thus leading to the accurate localization of 3D Gaussians. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that the proposed method efficiently improves the performance of generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs.

analysis.tldr: 通过跨视图语义一致性提升稀疏视角下可泛化人体高斯泼溅的渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可泛化人体高斯泼溅方法依赖显式几何约束或预定义结构表示，但在多视图输入中因人体复杂关节和视图间重叠有限导致特征表示不一致，影响渲染质量。
analysis.problem: 解决稀疏多视角输入下人体高斯泼溅中因特征不一致导致的空间模糊和渲染质量下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在多视图特征表示上存在不一致，尤其在高度纹理区域和遮挡部位出现空间模糊。
analysis.method: 将各视角编码的潜在嵌入通过预测深度图反投影到共享3D空间，并基于跨视图注意力重新校准属于同一身体部分的特征，从而实现3D高斯精确定位。
contributions: 提出跨视图注意力机制校准多视图特征，解决空间模糊问题
在基准数据集上验证了该方法在稀疏视角下可泛化人体高斯泼溅的性能提升
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖深度图预测的准确性
跨视图注意力计算复杂度可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过跨视图语义一致性提升稀疏视角下可泛化人体高斯泼溅的渲染质量。

papers.title: Image Compression with Bubble-Aware Frame Rate Adaptation for Energy-Efficient Video Capsule Endoscopy
papers.abstract: Video Capsule Endoscopy (VCE) is a promising method for improving the medical examination of the small intestine in the gastrointestinal tract. A key challenge is their limited size, resulting in a short battery lifetime which conflicts with high energy consumption for image capturing and transmission to an on-body device. Thus, we propose an image compression pipeline that substantially reduces the transmitted data while preserving diagnostic image quality. Furthermore, we exploit characteristics of the compression process to identify frames with low diagnostic value mainly caused by bubbles, without requiring additional image analysis. For low-visibility frames, a dynamic bubble-aware frame rate adaptation strategy reduces image acquisition and transmission during these phases while preserving sensitivity to potential anomalies. The proposed compression and frame rate adaptation are evaluated on a RISC-V platform using the Kvasir-Capsule and Galar datasets. The compression method achieves a compression ratio of 5.748 (82.6%) at a peak signal-to-noise ratio of 40.3 dB, indicating negligible loss of visual quality. The compression accomplished a mean energy reduction of the whole system by 20.58%. Additionally, the proposed bubble-aware frame rate adaptation reduced the energy consumption by up to 40%. These results demonstrate the potential of our method to increase the applicability of VCE.

analysis.tldr: 提出气泡感知帧率自适应图像压缩方法，在保持诊断质量的同时显著降低胶囊内窥镜能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频胶囊内窥镜（VCE）受限于尺寸导致电池寿命短，而图像采集和传输能耗高，亟需在保持诊断质量的前提下降低能耗。
analysis.problem: 如何在VCE中实现高压缩比、低能耗的图像传输，同时避免因气泡等低可见度帧导致诊断信息丢失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 气泡会导致帧的可见度降低，这些帧的诊断价值低，但传统方法仍需全速率采集和传输，造成能量浪费。
analysis.method: 提出图像压缩流水线，利用压缩过程特征识别气泡主导的低可见度帧，并动态调整帧率以减少采集和传输。
contributions: 提出一种结合气泡感知帧率自适应的图像压缩方法，在RISC-V平台上实现高压缩比（5.748）和低能耗（系统能耗降低20.58%，帧率自适应额外降低40%）。
无需额外图像分析即可识别低诊断价值帧，保持对异常的高敏感性。
analysis.experiments: 在RISC-V平台上使用Kvasir-Capsule和Galar数据集评估，压缩比5.748（82.6%），PSNR 40.3 dB，系统能耗降低20.58%，帧率自适应进一步降低40%。
limitations: 仅针对气泡导致的低可见度帧，其他干扰因素（如食物残渣）未考虑。
实验仅在RISC-V平台，通用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出气泡感知帧率自适应图像压缩方法，在保持诊断质量的同时显著降低胶囊内窥镜能耗。

papers.title: GramSR: Visual Feature Conditioning for Diffusion-Based Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Despite recent advances, single-image super-resolution (SR) remains challenging, especially in real-world scenarios with complex degradations. Diffusion-based SR methods, particularly those built on Stable Diffusion, leverage strong generative priors but commonly rely on text conditioning derived from semantic captioning. Such textual descriptions provide only high-level semantics and lack the spatially aligned visual information required for faithful restoration, leading to a representation gap between abstract semantics and spatially aligned visual details. To address this limitation, we propose GramSR, a one-step diffusion-based SR framework that replaces text conditioning with dense visual features extracted from the low-resolution input using a pre-trained DINOv3 encoder. GramSR adopts a three-stage LoRA architecture, where pixel-level, semantic-level, and texture-level LoRA modules are trained sequentially. The pixel-level module focuses on degradation removal using $\ell_2$ loss, the semantic-level module enhances perceptual details via LPIPS and CSD losses, and the texture-level module enforces feature correlation consistency through a Gram matrix loss computed from DINOv3 features. At inference, independent guidance scales enable flexible control over degradation removal, semantic enhancement, and texture preservation. Extensive experiments on standard SR benchmarks demonstrate that GramSR consistently outperforms existing one-step diffusion-based methods, achieving superior structural fidelity and texture realism. The code for this work is available at: https://github.com/aimagelab/GramSR.

analysis.tldr: 提出GramSR，用DINOv3视觉特征替代文本条件，通过三阶段LoRA实现一步扩散超分辨率，提升结构保真度和纹理真实感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散超分辨率方法依赖文本条件，但文本仅提供高层语义，缺乏空间对齐的视觉细节，导致语义与视觉细节之间存在表征鸿沟，影响真实场景下的超分辨率效果。
analysis.problem: 如何用密集视觉特征替代文本条件，弥合语义与空间细节之间的表征差距，实现一步扩散超分辨率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GramSR框架，使用预训练DINOv3编码器从低分辨率输入提取密集视觉特征，替代文本条件；采用三阶段LoRA架构，依次训练像素级（ℓ2损失）、语义级（LPIPS和CSD损失）和纹理级（Gram矩阵损失）模块，推理时通过独立引导尺度灵活控制退化去除、语义增强和纹理保持。
contributions: 提出用DINOv3视觉特征替代文本条件，解决语义与视觉细节的表征鸿沟。
设计三阶段LoRA训练策略，分别处理像素、语义和纹理层面，实现可控的一步扩散超分辨率。
analysis.experiments: 在标准超分辨率基准上，GramSR一致优于现有一步扩散方法，实现更优的结构保真度和纹理真实感。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖DINOv3特征的质量和泛化能力。
三阶段训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GramSR，用DINOv3视觉特征替代文本条件，通过三阶段LoRA实现一步扩散超分辨率，提升结构保真度和纹理真实感。

papers.title: An Investigation of Linguistic Biases in LLM-Based Recommendations
papers.abstract: We investigate linguistic biases in LLM-based restaurant and product recommendations given prompts varying across Southern American English (AE), Indian English (IE), and Code-Switched Hindi-English dialects, using the Yelp Open dataset (Yelp Inc., 2023) and Walmart product reviews dataset (PromptCloud,2020). We add lists of restaurant and product names balanced by cuisine type and product category to the prompts given to the LLM, and we zero-shot prompt the LLMs in a cold-start setting to select the top-20 restaurant and product recommendations from these lists for each of the dialect-varied prompts. We prompt LLMs using different list samples across 20 seeds for better generalization, and aggregate per cuisine-type and per category response counts for each seed, question/prompt, and LLM model. We run mixed-effects regression models for each model family and topic (restaurant/product) with the aggregate response counts as the dependent, and conduct likelihood ratio tests for the fixed effects with post-hoc pairwise testing of estimated marginal means differences, to investigate group-level differences in recommendation counts by model size and dialect type. Results show that dialect plays a role in the type of restaurant selected across the models tested with the mistral-small-3.1 model and both the llama-3.1 family models tested showing more sensitivity to Indian English and Code-Switched prompts. In terms of product recommendations, the llama-3.1-70B-model is particularly sensitive to Code-Switched prompts in four out of seven categories, and more beauty and home category recommendations are seen when using the Indian English and Code-Switched prompts for larger and smaller models, respectively. No broad trends are seen in the model-size based differences, with differing recommendations based on model sizes conditioned by the type of dialect.

analysis.tldr: LLM在推荐任务中表现出对非标准英语方言的推荐偏差，不同模型和规模对印度英语和代码混合提示的敏感度不同。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在推荐系统中广泛应用，但可能隐含语言偏见，导致对非标准英语方言用户的不公平推荐，影响用户体验和公平性。
analysis.problem: 系统性地量化LLM在餐厅和产品推荐中因提示语言方言（美国英语、印度英语、印地语-英语代码混合）而产生的推荐偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到方言类型影响推荐结果：mistral-small-3.1和llama-3.1系列对印度英语和代码混合提示更敏感；llama-3.1-70B对代码混合提示在7个类别中的4个类别敏感；不同模型规模下推荐差异依赖于方言类型，无统一趋势。
analysis.method: 使用Yelp和Walmart数据集，构建平衡的餐厅和产品列表，对LLM进行零样本冷启动提示，要求从列表中推荐前20项；跨20个种子重复，聚合每类响应计数；使用混合效应回归模型和似然比检验分析方言和模型大小对推荐计数的固定效应。
contributions: 首次系统研究LLM推荐中针对美国英语、印度英语和代码混合印地语-英语方言的语言偏见。
通过混合效应模型和统计检验，揭示了不同模型和规模对非标准方言的敏感度差异。
analysis.experiments: 在Yelp餐厅推荐和Walmart产品推荐两个数据集上，测试了多个LLM（如mistral-small-3.1、llama-3.1系列），使用20个种子和混合效应回归进行统计分析。
limitations: 仅针对餐厅和产品推荐任务，可能不适用于其他推荐场景。
仅测试了三种方言，未涵盖更多语言变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在推荐任务中表现出对非标准英语方言的推荐偏差，不同模型和规模对印度英语和代码混合提示的敏感度不同。

papers.title: Generative UI as an Accessibility Bridge: Lessons from C2C E-Commerce
papers.abstract: Web accessibility rests on static standards and developer compliance. That model frays in platforms where content is user-generated: photos arrive blurry or off-frame, descriptions skip size and condition, and page structure shifts from listing to listing. Drawing on six studies conducted between 2022 and 2025 with blind, low-vision, and older adult users of customer-to-customer (C2C) marketplaces, I argue that generative UI can produce adapted interfaces at the point of use, addressing barriers that static design cannot anticipate. Three interventions from this program -- HTML regeneration for screen readers, conversational guidance for older sellers, and audio-guided photo framing for blind sellers -- demonstrate how runtime generation can bridge gaps that standards leave open. I outline what these findings imply for HCI practice: generative UI extends beyond the screen, complements rather than replaces ability-based design, and shifts the designer's role from specifying layouts to specifying policies. This is an expanded arXiv version of a position paper accepted at the CHI 2026 workshop "What does Generative UI mean for HCI Practice?"

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式UI作为无障碍桥梁，通过运行时生成界面解决C2C电商中静态标准无法覆盖的用户生成内容障碍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Web无障碍依赖静态标准和开发者合规，但在用户生成内容（UGC）平台（如C2C电商）中，内容质量参差不齐、页面结构多变，静态设计无法预见并解决这些动态障碍。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生成式UI在运行时动态适配界面，以解决C2C电商中盲人、低视力及老年用户面临的特定无障碍问题（如模糊照片、缺失描述、结构变化）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析，但指出静态标准在UGC平台中失效，用户生成内容（如模糊照片、缺失尺寸描述）导致无障碍问题。
analysis.method: 提出三种生成式UI干预措施：1）为屏幕阅读器进行HTML重生成；2）为老年卖家提供对话式指导；3）为盲人卖家提供音频引导的拍照取景。这些干预在运行时生成适配界面。
contributions: 论证生成式UI可在使用点生成适配界面，解决静态设计无法预见的无障碍障碍。
提出三种具体干预措施并展示其效果。
总结对HCI实践的启示：生成式UI超越屏幕、补充而非替代能力导向设计、设计师角色从指定布局转向指定策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及基于2022至2025年间对盲人、低视力及老年C2C市场用户进行的六项研究。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模定量实验验证。
干预措施可能仅适用于特定场景（C2C电商），泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式UI作为无障碍桥梁，通过运行时生成界面解决C2C电商中静态标准无法覆盖的用户生成内容障碍。

papers.title: PI-TTA: Physics-Informed Source-Free Test-Time Adaptation for Robust Human Activity Recognition on Mobile Devices
papers.abstract: Source-free test-time adaptation (TTA) is appealing for mobile and wearable sensing because it enables on-device personalization from unlabeled test streams without centralizing private data. However, sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) poses challenges that are less pronounced in standard vision benchmarks: behavioral inertial streams are temporally correlated and often exhibit within-session shifts caused by sensor rotation, placement change, and sampling-rate drift. Under this streaming non-i.i.d. setting, widely used vision-style TTA objectives can become unstable, leading to overconfident errors, representation collapse, and catastrophic forgetting. We propose PI-TTA, a lightweight source-free adaptation framework that stabilizes online updates through three physics-consistent constraints: gravity consistency, short-horizon temporal continuity, and spectral stability. PI-TTA updates the same small parameter subset as strong source-free baselines and incurs only modest overhead, making it suitable for on-device deployment. Experiments on USCHAD, PAMAP2, and mHealth under long-sequence stress tests and factorized shift protocols show that PI-TTA mitigates the severe degradation observed in confidence-driven baselines and preserves stable adaptation under sustained streaming conditions. It improves long-sequence accuracy by up to 9.13% and reduces physical-violation rates by 27.5%, 24.1%, and 45.4% on USCHAD, PAMAP2, and mHealth, respectively. These results demonstrate that physics-informed adaptation can improve accuracy, stability, and deployment reliability for real-world mobile sensing systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息约束的源自由测试时自适应方法，提升移动设备上人体活动识别的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动和可穿戴传感中，源自由测试时自适应（TTA）可实现设备端个性化，但传感器数据存在时间相关性和会话内偏移（如传感器旋转、放置变化、采样率漂移），标准视觉TTA目标不稳定，导致过置信错误、表征崩溃和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.problem: 解决传感器人体活动识别（HAR）在流式非独立同分布设置下，现有TTA方法不稳定、性能退化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在流式非i.i.d.设置下，视觉风格的TTA目标变得不稳定，导致过置信错误、表征崩溃和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出PI-TTA，通过三个物理一致约束（重力一致性、短时域连续性、频谱稳定性）来稳定在线更新，仅更新与强源自由基线相同的小参数子集，开销适中。
contributions: 提出物理信息约束的源自由测试时自适应框架PI-TTA，针对移动HAR的流式非i.i.d.挑战。
在三个数据集上验证，PI-TTA缓解了置信驱动基线的严重退化，长序列准确率提升高达9.13%，物理违规率降低27.5%-45.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在USCHAD、PAMAP2和mHealth数据集上进行了长序列压力测试和因子化偏移协议实验。
limitations: 可能仅适用于惯性传感器数据，泛化到其他模态需验证。
物理约束的设计依赖领域知识，可能不适用于所有HAR场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息约束的源自由测试时自适应方法，提升移动设备上人体活动识别的鲁棒性。

papers.title: SARU: A Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified Framework for Remote Sensing Images with New Benchmarks
papers.abstract: Shadows are a prevalent problem in remote sensing imagery (RSI), degrading visual quality and severely limiting the performance of downstream tasks like object detection and semantic segmentation. Most prior works treat shadow detection and removal as separate, cascaded tasks, which can lead to cumbersome process and error accumulation. Furthermore, many deep learning methods rely on paired shadow and non-shadow images for training, which are often unavailable in practice. To address these challenges, we propose Shadow-Aware and Removal Unified (SARU) Framework , a cohesive two-stage framework. First, its dual-branch detection module (DBCSF-Net) fuses multi-color space and semantic features to generate high-fidelity shadow masks, effectively distinguishing shadows from dark objects. Then, leveraging these masks, a novel, training-free physical algorithm (N$^2$SGSR) restores illumination by transferring properties from adjacent non-shadow regions within the single input image. To facilitate rigorous evaluation and foster future work, we also introduce two new benchmark datasets: the RSI Shadow Detection (RSISD) dataset and the Single-image Shadow Removal Benchmark (SiSRB). Extensive experiments demonstrate that SARU achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public AISD dataset and our newly introduced benchmarks. By holistically integrating shadow detection and removal to mitigate error propagation and eliminating the dependency on paired training data, SARU establishes a robust, practical framework for real-world RSI analysis. The source code and datasets are publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/SARU-Framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一阴影感知与去除框架SARU，结合双分支检测模块和无训练物理算法，并发布两个新基准数据集，在遥感图像阴影处理上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像中阴影普遍存在，严重影响视觉质量和下游任务性能；现有方法将检测与去除分离导致流程繁琐和误差累积，且依赖成对阴影/非阴影训练数据，实际难以获取。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖成对训练数据的情况下，统一且鲁棒地完成遥感图像的阴影检测与去除，避免级联误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SARU框架，包含双分支检测模块DBCSF-Net（融合多色彩空间和语义特征生成高保真阴影掩码）和无训练物理算法N$^2$SGSR（从单幅图像相邻非阴影区域转移光照属性恢复亮度）。
contributions: 提出SARU统一框架，将阴影检测与去除整合为两阶段流程，减少误差传播。
设计DBCSF-Net双分支检测模块，有效区分阴影与暗物体。
提出无训练物理算法N$^2$SGSR，无需成对数据即可恢复光照。
构建两个新基准数据集RSISD和SiSRB，促进遥感阴影研究。
analysis.experiments: 在公共AISD数据集和新基准上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 物理算法可能对复杂光照场景适应性有限。
双分支结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一阴影感知与去除框架SARU，结合双分支检测模块和无训练物理算法，并发布两个新基准数据集，在遥感图像阴影处理上达到SOTA。

papers.title: A Systematic Post-Train Framework for Video Generation
papers.abstract: While large-scale video diffusion models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in generating high-resolution and semantically rich content, a significant gap remains between their pretraining performance and real-world deployment requirements due to critical issues such as prompt sensitivity, temporal inconsistency, and prohibitive inference costs. To bridge this gap, we propose a comprehensive post-training framework that systematically aligns pretrained models with user intentions through four synergistic stages: we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to transform the base model into a stable instruction-following policy, followed by a Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) stage that utilizes a novel Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) method tailored for video diffusion to enhance perceptual quality and temporal coherence; subsequently, we integrate Prompt Enhancement via a specialized language model to refine user inputs, and finally address system efficiency through Inference Optimization. Together, these components provide a systematic approach to improving visual quality, temporal coherence, and instruction following, while preserving the controllability learned during pretraining. The result is a practical blueprint for building scalable post-training pipelines that are stable, adaptable, and effective in real-world deployment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this unified pipeline effectively mitigates common artifacts and significantly improves controllability and visual aesthetics while adhering to strict sampling cost constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个系统性的视频生成后训练框架，通过SFT、RLHF、提示增强和推理优化四个阶段弥合预训练与部署之间的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模视频扩散模型在预训练后存在提示敏感性、时间不一致性和推理成本高等问题，阻碍了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地对齐预训练视频扩散模型与用户意图，同时提升视觉质量、时间连贯性和指令遵循能力，并降低推理成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出预训练模型存在提示敏感、时间不一致和推理成本高的问题，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出包含四个阶段的系统性后训练框架：监督微调（SFT）将基础模型转化为稳定的指令遵循策略；基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）采用针对视频扩散的组相对策略优化（GRPO）提升感知质量和时间连贯性；提示增强通过专用语言模型优化用户输入；推理优化提升系统效率。
contributions: 提出首个系统性的视频生成后训练框架，整合SFT、RLHF、提示增强和推理优化。
设计针对视频扩散的GRPO方法，有效提升时间连贯性和感知质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到大量实验表明该框架能有效缓解常见伪影并显著提升可控性和视觉美学，但未提供具体实验设置或结果。
limitations: 框架复杂度高，各阶段协同可能引入额外调参成本。
未讨论不同视频类型或长视频场景下的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个系统性的视频生成后训练框架，通过SFT、RLHF、提示增强和推理优化四个阶段弥合预训练与部署之间的差距。

papers.title: Do LLMs Capture Embodied Cognition and Cultural Variation? Cross-Linguistic Evidence from Demonstratives
papers.abstract: Do large language models (LLMs) truly acquire embodied cognition and cultural conventions from text? We introduce demonstratives, fundamental spatial expressions like "this/that" in English and "zhè/nà" in Chinese, as a novel probe for grounded knowledge. Using 6,400 responses from 320 native speakers, we establish a human baseline: English speakers reliably distinguish proximal-distal referents but struggle with perspective-taking, while Chinese speakers switch perspectives fluently but tolerate distal ambiguity. In contrast, five state-of-the-art LLMs fail to inherently understand the proximal-distal contrast and show no cultural differences, defaulting to English-centric reasoning. Our study contributes (i) a new task, based on demonstratives, as a new lens for evaluating embodied cognition and cultural conventions; (ii) empirical evidence of cross-cultural asymmetries in human interpretation; (iii) a new perspective on the egocentric-sociocentric debate, showing both orientations coexist but vary across languages; and (iv) a call to address individual variation in future model design.

analysis.tldr: LLM无法像人类一样理解指示词中的具身认知和文化差异，表现出英语中心化倾向。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估缺乏对具身认知和文化惯例的检验，指示词作为空间语言的基本元素，为探究LLM是否真正习得这些知识提供了新视角。
analysis.problem: LLM是否能够理解指示词（如this/that, zhè/nà）所蕴含的具身认知和文化差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 英语母语者能区分近指-远指但视角转换困难，汉语母语者能灵活切换视角但容忍远指歧义；LLM则无法理解近远指对比，且无文化差异，默认英语中心推理。
analysis.method: 构建基于指示词的新任务，收集320名母语者的6400条响应作为人类基线，对比5个SOTA LLM的表现。
contributions: 提出基于指示词的新任务，用于评估具身认知和文化惯例。
提供人类跨文化解释不对称性的实证证据。
揭示自我中心-社会中心辩论的新视角，表明两种取向共存但语言间有差异。
呼吁未来模型设计考虑个体差异。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涉及英语和汉语两种语言，可能无法推广到其他语言。
未深入分析LLM内部机制为何导致英语中心化。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM无法像人类一样理解指示词中的具身认知和文化差异，表现出英语中心化倾向。

papers.title: FED-FSTQ: Fisher-Guided Token Quantization for Communication-Efficient Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Federated fine-tuning provides a practical route to adapt large language models (LLMs) on edge devices without centralizing private data, yet in mobile deployments the training wall-clock is often bottlenecked by straggler-limited uplink communication under heterogeneous bandwidth and intermittent participation. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) reduces trainable parameters, per-round payloads remain prohibitive in non-IID regimes, where uniform compression can discard rare but task-critical signals. We propose Fed-FSTQ, a Fisher-guided token quantization system primitive for communication-efficient federated LLM fine-tuning. Fed-FSTQ employs a lightweight Fisher proxy to estimate token sensitivity, coupling importance-aware token selection with non-uniform mixed-precision quantization to allocate higher fidelity to informative evidence while suppressing redundant transmission. The method is model-agnostic, serves as a drop-in module for standard federated PEFT pipelines, e.g., LoRA, without modifying the server aggregation rule, and supports bandwidth-heterogeneous clients via compact sparse message packing. Experiments on multilingual QA and medical QA under non-IID partitions show that Fed-FSTQ reduces cumulative uplink traffic required to reach a fixed quality threshold by 46x relative to a standard LoRA baseline, and improves end-to-end wall-clock time-to-accuracy by 52%. Furthermore, enabling Fisher-guided token reduction at inference yields up to a 1.55x end-to-end speedup on NVIDIA Jetson-class edge devices, demonstrating deployability under tight resource constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出Fisher引导的令牌量化方法，在联邦微调LLM时减少上行通信量46倍，并提升端到端时间-准确率52%。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦微调LLM在边缘设备上受限于异构带宽和间歇参与导致的通信瓶颈，现有PEFT方法在非IID场景下均匀压缩会丢失关键信号。
analysis.problem: 如何在非IID联邦微调中实现通信高效的令牌量化，同时保留任务关键信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非IID数据分布下，均匀压缩会丢弃稀有但任务关键的信号；异构带宽和间歇参与导致上行通信成为训练瓶颈。
analysis.method: Fed-FSTQ：使用轻量级Fisher代理估计令牌敏感性，结合重要性感知令牌选择和非均匀混合精度量化，对信息性证据分配更高精度，抑制冗余传输；支持异构带宽客户端通过紧凑稀疏消息打包。
contributions: 提出Fisher引导的令牌量化系统原语，实现通信高效的联邦LLM微调。
在非IID多语言QA和医学QA任务上，相比标准LoRA减少上行流量46倍，提升端到端时间-准确率52%。
推理时启用Fisher引导令牌缩减，在Jetson边缘设备上实现1.55倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在非IID划分的多语言QA和医学QA数据集上进行实验，与标准LoRA基线对比，报告了上行流量减少46倍、端到端时间-准确率提升52%以及推理加速1.55倍。
limitations: Fisher代理的计算开销可能在某些极端资源受限场景下成为瓶颈。
方法在非IID程度极高或客户端数量极大时的扩展性未在摘要中明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Fisher引导的令牌量化方法，在联邦微调LLM时减少上行通信量46倍，并提升端到端时间-准确率52%。

papers.title: JURY-RL: Votes Propose, Proofs Dispose for Label-Free RLVR
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) enhances the reasoning of large language models (LLMs), but standard RLVR often depends on human-annotated answers or carefully curated reward specifications. In machine-checkable domains, label-free alternatives such as majority voting or LLM-as-a-judge remove annotation cost but can introduce false positives that destabilize training. We introduce JURY-RL, a label-free RLVR framework that decouples answer proposal from reward disposal: votes from model rollouts propose a candidate answer, and a formal verifier determines whether that candidate can receive positive reward. Concretely, only rollouts matching the plurality-voted answer are rewarded when that answer is successfully verified in Lean. When verification is inconclusive, we invoke ResZero (Residual-Zero), a fallback reward that discards the unverified plurality proposal and redistributes a zero-mean, variance-preserving signal over the residual answers. This design maintains a stable optimization gradient without reinforcing unverifiable consensus. Across three backbone models trained on mathematical data, JURY-RL consistently outperforms other label-free baselines on mathematical reasoning benchmarks and transfers competitively to code generation and general benchmarks. It attains pass@1 performance comparable to supervised ground-truth training, with superior generalization demonstrated by higher pass@k and response diversity.

analysis.tldr: JURY-RL 提出一种解耦投票与验证的无标签 RLVR 框架，通过形式验证和残差奖励机制提升数学推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准 RLVR 依赖人工标注或精心设计的奖励，成本高；无标签替代方案如多数投票或 LLM 评判会引入假阳性，破坏训练稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在无标签条件下实现稳定且有效的 RLVR 训练，避免假阳性奖励导致的训练不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数投票等无标签方法会产生假阳性奖励，导致训练不稳定；形式验证可提供可靠信号但覆盖不全。
analysis.method: JURY-RL 框架：投票提出候选答案，形式验证器（Lean）决定是否给予正奖励；验证不通过时使用 ResZero 残差奖励，丢弃未验证的多数答案，在剩余答案上分配零均值、方差保持的信号。
contributions: 提出解耦投票与验证的无标签 RLVR 框架 JURY-RL，减少假阳性影响。
设计 ResZero 残差奖励机制，在验证不通过时维持稳定优化梯度。
在数学推理、代码生成等基准上超越无标签基线，性能接近有监督训练。
analysis.experiments: 在三种骨干模型上使用数学数据训练，在数学推理基准上一致优于其他无标签基线，并迁移到代码生成和通用基准，pass@1 接近有监督训练，pass@k 和响应多样性更高。
limitations: 依赖形式验证器（Lean），仅适用于可形式化验证的领域。
ResZero 机制在验证不通过时可能损失部分有效信号。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JURY-RL 提出一种解耦投票与验证的无标签 RLVR 框架，通过形式验证和残差奖励机制提升数学推理性能。

papers.title: One-shot emergency psychiatric triage across 15 frontier AI chatbots
papers.abstract: AI chatbots are increasingly used for health advice, but their performance in psychiatric triage remains undercharacterized. Psychiatric triage is particularly challenging because urgency must often be inferred from thoughts, behavior, and context rather than from objective findings. We evaluated the performance of 15 frontier AI chatbots on psychiatric triage from realistic single-message disclosures using 112 clinical vignettes, each paired with 1 of 4 original benchmark triage labels: A, routine; B, assessment within 1 week; C, assessment within 24 to 48 hours; and D, emergency care now. Vignettes covered 9 psychiatric presentation clusters and 9 focal risk dimensions, organized into 28 presentation-by-risk groups. Each group contributed 4 distinct vignettes, with 1 vignette at each triage level. Each vignette was rendered as a realistic human-authored conversational query, and the AI chatbots were tasked with assigning a triage label from that disclosure. Emergency under-triage occurred in 23 of 410 level D trials (5.6%), and all under-triaged emergencies were reassigned to level C urgency. Across target models, average accuracy ranged from 42.0% to 71.8%. Accuracy was highest for level D vignettes (94.3%) and lowest for level B vignettes (19.7%). Mean signed ordinal error was positive (+0.47 triage levels), indicating net over-triage. Dispersion was highest around the middle triage levels. All results were confirmed relative to clinician consensus labels from 50 medical doctors. When presented with user messages containing sufficient clinical information, frontier AI chatbots thus recognized psychiatric emergencies as requiring urgent medical assessment with near-zero error rates, yet showed marked over-triage for low and intermediate risk presentations.

analysis.tldr: 15个前沿AI聊天机器人在精神科急诊分诊中表现出对紧急情况的高识别率，但存在过度分诊倾向。
analysis.research_motivation: AI聊天机器人越来越多地用于健康咨询，但其在精神科急诊分诊中的表现尚不清楚，而精神科分诊因需从思想、行为等推断紧急程度而尤为困难。
analysis.problem: 评估15个前沿AI聊天机器人在单次消息披露中进行精神科急诊分诊的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：紧急情况漏诊率低（5.6%），但整体准确率中等（42.0%-71.8%），且存在净过度分诊（平均符号序误差+0.47），中间分诊级别离散度最高。
analysis.method: 使用112个临床案例，每个案例对应4个基准分诊标签（A常规、B一周内、C24-48小时、D紧急），覆盖9种精神科表现和9个风险维度，由AI聊天机器人分配分诊标签。
contributions: 首次系统评估15个前沿AI聊天机器人在精神科急诊分诊中的表现
揭示了AI在紧急情况识别上的高准确性但存在过度分诊的倾向
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了具体实验结果：410次D级试验中23次漏诊（5.6%），平均准确率42.0%-71.8%，D级准确率94.3%，B级准确率19.7%，并与50名医生的共识标签进行了验证。
limitations: 仅基于单次消息披露，未考虑多轮对话或额外信息
案例为临床案例，可能不完全代表真实世界多样性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 15个前沿AI聊天机器人在精神科急诊分诊中表现出对紧急情况的高识别率，但存在过度分诊倾向。

papers.title: Beyond Fidelity: Semantic Similarity Assessment in Low-Level Image Processing
papers.abstract: Low-level image processing has long been evaluated mainly from the perspective of visual fidelity. However, with the rise of deep learning and generative models, processed images may preserve perceptual quality while altering semantic content, making conventional Image Quality Assessment (IQA) insufficient for semantic-level assessment. In this paper, we formalize \textit{Semantic Similarity} as a new evaluation task for low-level image processing, aimed at measuring whether semantic content is preserved after processing. We further present a structured formulation of image semantics based on semantic entities and their relations, and discuss the desired properties and constraints of a valid semantic similarity index. Based on this formulation, we propose Triplet-based Semantic Similarity Score (T3S), which models image semantics through foreground entities, background entities, and relations. T3S combines semantic entity extraction, foreground-background disentanglement, and open-world class/relation modeling. Experiments on COCO and SPA-Data show that T3S consistently outperforms existing fidelity-oriented metrics and representative semantic-level baselines, while better reflecting progressive semantic changes under diverse degradations. These results highlight the importance of semantic assessment in modern low-level vision.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义相似度指标T3S，用于评估低层图像处理中语义内容是否被保留。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统图像质量评估（IQA）主要关注视觉保真度，但深度学习与生成模型可能改变语义内容，现有指标无法评估语义层面的变化。
analysis.problem: 低层图像处理缺乏衡量语义内容保留程度的评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，处理后的图像可能保持感知质量但改变语义内容，现有保真度指标无法反映这种变化。
analysis.method: 提出基于三元组的语义相似度分数（T3S），通过前景实体、背景实体和关系建模图像语义，结合语义实体提取、前景-背景解耦和开放世界类/关系建模。
contributions: 形式化定义了低层图像处理中的语义相似度评估任务。
提出T3S指标，在COCO和SPA-Data上优于现有保真度指标和语义基线。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO和SPA-Data数据集上实验，T3S在多种退化下优于现有指标。
limitations: 可能依赖语义提取器的质量。
开放世界建模的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义相似度指标T3S，用于评估低层图像处理中语义内容是否被保留。

papers.title: Leveraging Previous-Traversal Point Cloud Map Priors for Camera-Based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
papers.abstract: Camera-based 3D object detection and tracking are central to autonomous driving, yet precise 3D object localization remains fundamentally constrained by depth ambiguity when no expensive, depth-rich online LiDAR is available at inference. In many deployments, however, vehicles repeatedly traverse the same environments, making static point cloud maps from prior traversals a practical source of geometric priors. We propose DualViewMapDet, a camera-only inference framework that retrieves such map priors online and leverages them to mitigate the absence of a LiDAR sensor during deployment. The key idea is a dual-space camera-map fusion strategy that avoids one-sided view conversion. Specifically, we (i) project the map into perspective view (PV) and encode multi-channel geometric cues to enrich image features and support BEV lifting, and (ii) encode the map directly in bird's-eye view (BEV) with a sparse voxel backbone and fuse it with lifted camera features in a shared metric space. Extensive evaluations on nuScenes and Argoverse 2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong camera-only baselines, with particularly strong gains in object localization. Ablations further validate the contributions of PV/BEV fusion and prior-map coverage. We make the code and pre-trained models available at https://dualviewmapdet.cs.uni-freiburg.de .

analysis.tldr: 利用历史点云地图先验，通过双视角融合策略提升纯相机3D检测与跟踪精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯相机3D检测受深度模糊限制，而部署时通常无在线LiDAR；但车辆常重复经过相同环境，历史遍历的点云地图可作为廉价几何先验。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时仅用相机，利用历史点云地图先验提升3D目标检测与跟踪的定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DualViewMapDet框架，包含双空间相机-地图融合策略：1) 将地图投影到透视视图(PV)编码多通道几何线索增强图像特征并辅助BEV提升；2) 在鸟瞰视图(BEV)中用稀疏体素骨干直接编码地图，并与提升的相机特征在共享度量空间融合。
contributions: 提出一种利用历史点云地图先验的纯相机推理框架，无需在线LiDAR。
设计双视角（PV和BEV）相机-地图融合策略，有效缓解深度模糊。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2上评估，相比强纯相机基线有一致提升，尤其在目标定位上；消融实验验证了PV/BEV融合和地图覆盖的贡献。
limitations: 依赖历史点云地图的可用性和覆盖范围。
未讨论动态环境或地图过时的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用历史点云地图先验，通过双视角融合策略提升纯相机3D检测与跟踪精度。

papers.title: GeoSearch: Augmenting Worldwide Geolocalization with Web-Scale Reverse Image Search and Image Matching
papers.abstract: Worldwide image geolocalization, which aims to predict the GPS coordinates of any image on Earth, remains challenging due to global visual diversity. Recent generative approaches based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) leverage candidates retrieved from fixed databases for reasoning, but often struggle with scenes that are absent from the reference set. In this work, we propose GeoSearch, an open-world geolocation framework that integrates web-scale reverse image search into the RAG pipeline. GeoSearch augments LMM prompts with database-retrieved coordinates and textual evidence extracted from web pages. To mitigate noise from irrelevant content, we introduce a two-layer filtering mechanism consisting of image matching, followed by confidence-based gating. Experiments on standard benchmarks Im2GPS3k and YFCC4k demonstrate the superiority of GeoSearch under leakage-aware evaluation. Our code and data are publicly available to support reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: GeoSearch 通过集成网络级反向图像搜索和图像匹配过滤，提升了开放世界图像地理定位的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球图像地理定位因视觉多样性而困难，现有基于固定数据库检索的方法在参考集缺失场景下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何利用网络级反向图像搜索增强检索增强生成（RAG）管道，以解决开放世界图像地理定位中参考集覆盖不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GeoSearch框架，将网络级反向图像搜索集成到RAG管道中，通过图像匹配和置信度门控的两层过滤机制，从网页中提取坐标和文本证据，增强LMM提示。
contributions: 提出GeoSearch，首个将网络级反向图像搜索集成到RAG管道中的开放世界地理定位框架。
引入两层过滤机制（图像匹配+置信度门控）以减轻噪声干扰。
analysis.experiments: 在Im2GPS3k和YFCC4k基准上评估，在泄漏感知评估下显示优越性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖网络搜索的实时性和可用性。
过滤机制可能仍无法完全消除噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoSearch 通过集成网络级反向图像搜索和图像匹配过滤，提升了开放世界图像地理定位的准确性。

papers.title: Co-Writing with AI: An Empirical Study of Diverse Academic Writing Workflows
papers.abstract: Despite AI tools becoming increasingly embedded in academic practice, little is known about how university students integrate them into their writing processes. We examine how students engage with AI across different writing tasks, and how this engagement is shaped by individual factors including AI literacy, writing confidence, trust, authorship concerns, and motivation. Study~1 surveys 107 UK university students to map task-specific and co-occurring patterns of AI use across five writing stages (ideation, sourcing, planning, drafting, and reviewing) and their associations with individual factors. Study~2 complements this by exploring how these patterns can be assembled in practice, through interviews with 12 postgraduates reflecting on their established use of AI in assessed writing. Together, the studies suggest that AI integration is selective and heterogeneous, forming three recurring and value-oriented configurations: (1) early-stage (learning-oriented), where tools support exploration and understanding; (2) late-stage (quality-oriented), where tools support drafting and refinement; and (3) peripheral (productivity-oriented), where tools are used to reduce friction and sustain momentum across the process. We offer a workflow-level account of AI-supported academic writing, showing how students navigate competing priorities of learning, quality, productivity, and authorship, and how they evaluate and take responsibility for AI-generated outputs.

analysis.tldr: 通过调查和访谈揭示大学生在学术写作中与AI协作的三种典型工作流模式。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具已深入学术实践，但学生对AI的整合方式及其影响因素尚不明确，缺乏对写作全流程中AI使用模式的系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 探究大学生在不同写作任务中如何与AI协作，以及AI素养、写作信心、信任、作者身份担忧和动机等个体因素如何塑造这种协作模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI整合具有选择性和异质性，形成三种价值导向的配置：早期学习导向、晚期质量导向和外围效率导向。
analysis.method: 混合方法：研究1对107名英国大学生进行问卷调查，映射AI在五个写作阶段的使用模式；研究2对12名研究生进行半结构化访谈，深入探讨模式的实际组装方式。
contributions: 首次提供工作流层面的AI辅助学术写作实证分析，识别三种典型配置。
揭示学生在学习、质量、效率和作者身份之间的权衡策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及两项研究：问卷调查（107人）和访谈（12人）。
limitations: 样本仅限于英国大学，可能不具跨文化普适性。
自我报告数据可能存在回忆偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过调查和访谈揭示大学生在学术写作中与AI协作的三种典型工作流模式。

papers.title: COMPASS: COmpact Multi-channel Prior-map And Scene Signature for Floor-Plan-Based Visual Localization
papers.abstract: Architectural floor plans are widely available priors which contain not only geometry but also the semantic information of the environment, yet existing localization methods largely ignore this semantic information. To address this, we present COMPASS, an algorithm that exploits both geometric and semantic priors from floor plans to estimate the pose of a robot equipped with dual fisheye cameras. Inspired by scan context descriptor from LiDAR-based place recognition, we design a multi-channel radial descriptor that encodes the geometric layout surrounding a position. From the floor plan, rays are cast in 360 azimuth bins and the results are encoded into five channels: normalized range, structural hit type (wall, window, or opening), range gradient, inverse range, and local range variance. From the image side, the same descriptor structure is populated by detecting structural elements in the fisheye imagery. As a first step toward full cross-modal matching, we present a window detection algorithm for fisheye images that uses a line segment detector to identify window frames via vertical edge clustering and brightness verification. Detected windows are projected to azimuthal bearings through the fisheye camera model, producing the hit-type channel of the visual descriptor. As a proof of concept, we generate both descriptors at a single known pose from the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026 dataset and demonstrate that the wall-window pattern extracted from the first frame of each camera closely matches the floor plan descriptor, validating the feasibility of cross-modal structural matching.

analysis.tldr: 利用建筑平面图的几何与语义先验，通过多通道径向描述符实现双鱼眼相机机器人的视觉定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有定位方法大多忽略建筑平面图中丰富的语义信息（如墙壁、窗户类型），而平面图作为广泛可用的先验，其语义信息可提升定位鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合平面图的几何与语义先验，实现跨模态（平面图-鱼眼图像）的视觉定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计多通道径向描述符，从平面图通过射线投射编码5个通道（归一化距离、结构命中类型、距离梯度、逆距离、局部距离方差）；从鱼眼图像通过窗口检测算法（线段检测+垂直边缘聚类+亮度验证）生成相同结构的视觉描述符，实现跨模态匹配。
contributions: 提出COMPASS算法，首次利用平面图的几何和语义先验进行双鱼眼相机定位。
设计多通道径向描述符，统一表示平面图和鱼眼图像的布局信息。
提出鱼眼图像窗口检测算法，支持跨模态结构匹配。
analysis.experiments: 在Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026数据集上，对单个已知位姿生成两种描述符，验证了墙壁-窗户模式匹配的可行性。摘要未提供定量实验结果。
limitations: 目前仅作为概念验证，仅在单个已知位姿上测试，未评估完整定位精度。
依赖鱼眼图像中窗口的可检测性，在无窗或遮挡场景可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用建筑平面图的几何与语义先验，通过多通道径向描述符实现双鱼眼相机机器人的视觉定位。

papers.title: Fitting Horn DL Ontologies to ABox and Query Examples: A Tale of Simulation Quantifiers and Finite Models
papers.abstract: We study the problem of fitting a description logic (DL) ontology to a given set of positive and negative examples that take the form of an ABox and a Boolean query. While previous work has investigated this problem for the expressive DLs ALC and ALCI, we here focus on the Horn DLs EL and ELI, as well as their extensions with the bottom concept. As the query language, we consider atomic queries (AQs), conjunctive queries (rooted CQs), and unions thereof (rooted UCQs). We provide characterization of the existence of a fitting ontology based on simulations, use them to develop decision procedures, and clarify the exact computational complexity. For AQs, the problem is in PTime for both EL and ELI. For rooted CQs and UCQ, it is Sigma_P^2-complete for EL and ExpTime-complete for ELI. Adding the bottom concept does not change any of these complexities. Interestingly, moving from ALC and ALCI to EL and ELI introduces additional technical challenges rather than simplifying the matter.

analysis.tldr: 研究在Horn DLs（EL和ELI）中基于ABox和查询示例拟合本体的计算复杂性与决策过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 描述逻辑本体拟合问题在知识表示中具有重要应用，但先前工作主要关注表达性更强的DLs（如ALC和ALCI），而Horn DLs（如EL和ELI）虽然在实际中广泛使用（如医学本体），其拟合问题的复杂性尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 给定一组正负示例（ABox和布尔查询），确定是否存在一个Horn DL本体（EL或ELI）使得所有正示例被蕴含而负示例不被蕴含，并刻画该问题的计算复杂性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，从ALC/ALCI转向EL/ELI并未简化问题，反而引入了额外的技术挑战，例如需要处理模拟量词和有限模型。
analysis.method: 基于模拟（simulations）刻画拟合本体存在的条件，并据此设计决策过程，同时分析不同查询语言（AQs、根CQs、根UCQs）下的计算复杂性。
contributions: 给出了EL和ELI中基于ABox和查询示例拟合本体存在性的模拟刻画。
明确了不同查询语言下问题的计算复杂性：AQs为PTime，根CQs和UCQs下EL为Sigma_P^2-complete，ELI为ExpTime-complete，且添加底概念不改变复杂性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑Horn DLs（EL和ELI），未涵盖更一般的Horn片段。
未讨论实际应用中的可扩展性或近似方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究在Horn DLs（EL和ELI）中基于ABox和查询示例拟合本体的计算复杂性与决策过程。

papers.title: ML-SAN: Multi-Level Speaker-Adaptive Network for Emotion Recognition in Conversations
papers.abstract: To establish empathy with machines, it is essential to fully understand human emotional changes. However, research in multimodal emotion recognition often overlooks one problem: individual expressive traits vary significantly, which means that different people may express emotions differently. In our daily lives, we can see this. When communicating with different people, some express "happiness" through their facial expressions and words, while others may hide their happiness or express it through their actions. Both are expressions of 'happiness,' but such differences in emotional expression are still too difficult for machines to distinguish. Current emotion recognition remains at a 'static' level, using a single recognition model to identify all emotional styles. This "simplification" often affects the recognition results, especially in multi-turn dialogues. To address this problem, this paper introduces a novel Multi-Level Speaker Adaptive Network (ML-SAN), which, specifically, effectively addresses the challenge of speaker identity information confusion. ML-SAN does not simply assign a speaker's ID after recognition; instead, it employs a three-stage adaptive process: First, Input-level Calibration uses Feature-Level Linear Modulation (FiLM) to adjust the raw audio and visual features into a neutral space unrelated to the speaker. Then, Interaction-level Gating re-adjusts the trust level for each modality (e.g., voice or facial features) based on the speaker's identity information. Finally, Output-level Regularization maintains the consistency of speaker features in the latent space. Tests on the MELD and IEMOCAP datasets show that our model (ML-SAN) achieves better results, performs exceptionally well in handling challenging tail sentiment categories, and better addresses the diversity of speakers in real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出多级说话人自适应网络ML-SAN，通过输入校准、交互门控和输出正则化三阶段自适应过程，解决对话情感识别中个体表达差异导致的说话人身份信息混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感识别模型忽略了个体表达特质的显著差异，使用单一模型识别所有情感风格，导致多轮对话中识别结果受影响。
analysis.problem: 对话情感识别中说话人身份信息混淆，即不同个体表达相同情感的方式不同，现有静态模型难以区分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同人表达同一情感（如“快乐”）的方式存在差异，有的通过面部表情和语言，有的隐藏或通过动作表达，这种差异在机器识别中造成混淆。
analysis.method: ML-SAN采用三阶段自适应过程：输入级校准（使用FiLM调整原始音视频特征到与说话人无关的中性空间）、交互级门控（根据说话人身份重新调整每个模态的信任度）、输出级正则化（保持说话人特征在潜在空间的一致性）。
contributions: 提出多级说话人自适应网络ML-SAN，有效解决说话人身份信息混淆问题。
在MELD和IEMOCAP数据集上取得更好结果，尤其在处理尾部情感类别和真实场景中说话人多样性方面表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在MELD和IEMOCAP数据集上进行测试，模型取得更好结果，尤其在处理尾部情感类别和说话人多样性方面表现优异。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态特征（音频和视觉），未提及文本模态。
三阶段自适应过程可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多级说话人自适应网络ML-SAN，通过输入校准、交互门控和输出正则化三阶段自适应过程，解决对话情感识别中个体表达差异导致的说话人身份信息混淆问题。

papers.title: Benchmarking and Improving GUI Agents in High-Dynamic Environments
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents have predominantly focused on training paradigms like supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL). However, the challenge of high-dynamic GUI environments remains largely underexplored. Existing agents typically rely on a single screenshot after each action for decision-making, leading to a partially observable (or even unobservable) Markov decision process, where the key GUI state including important information for actions is often inadequately captured. To systematically explore this challenge, we introduce DynamicGUIBench, a comprehensive online GUI benchmark spanning ten applications and diverse interaction scenarios characterized by important interface changes between actions. Furthermore, we present DynamicUI, an agent designed for dynamic interfaces, which takes screen-recording videos of the interaction process as input and consists of three components: a dynamic perceiver, a refinement strategy, and a reflection. Specifically, the dynamic perceiver clusters frames of the GUI video, generates captions for the centroids, and iteratively selects the most informative frames as the salient dynamic context. Considering that there may be inconsistencies and noise between the selected frames and the textual context of the agent, the refinement strategy employs an action-conditioned filtering to refine thoughts to mitigate thought-action inconsistency and redundancy. Based on the refined agent trajectories, the reflection module provides effective and accurate guidance for further actions. Experiments on DynamicGUIBench demonstrate that DynamicUI significantly improves the performance in dynamic GUI environments, while maintaining competitive performance on other public benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态GUI基准DynamicGUIBench和面向动态界面的智能体DynamicUI，通过视频帧聚类与动作条件过滤提升高动态环境下的GUI交互性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI智能体主要关注训练范式，但高动态GUI环境（界面在动作间发生重要变化）的挑战未被充分探索，传统单截图决策导致部分可观测甚至不可观测的马尔可夫决策过程，关键状态信息捕获不足。
analysis.problem: 解决高动态GUI环境中智能体因依赖单截图而无法充分捕获动态状态信息的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有智能体在动态环境中面临部分可观测问题，单截图无法反映动作间的界面变化，导致决策信息不完整。
analysis.method: 提出DynamicUI，以交互过程的屏幕录制视频为输入，包含三个组件：动态感知器（对视频帧聚类、生成质心描述并迭代选择信息量最大的帧作为动态上下文）、精炼策略（通过动作条件过滤减少思想-动作不一致和冗余）、反思模块（基于精炼轨迹提供后续动作指导）。
contributions: 构建DynamicGUIBench，首个覆盖十个应用和多种动态交互场景的在线GUI基准。
提出DynamicUI，利用视频帧聚类和动作条件过滤提升动态环境下的GUI智能体性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DynamicGUIBench上DynamicUI显著提升动态GUI环境性能，并在其他公开基准上保持竞争力。
limitations: 依赖屏幕录制视频输入，可能增加计算开销。
动态感知器的聚类和迭代选择策略在极端动态场景下可能存在延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态GUI基准DynamicGUIBench和面向动态界面的智能体DynamicUI，通过视频帧聚类与动作条件过滤提升高动态环境下的GUI交互性能。

papers.title: Safe-Support Q-Learning: Learning without Unsafe Exploration
papers.abstract: Ensuring safety during reinforcement learning (RL) training is critical in real-world applications where unsafe exploration can lead to devastating outcomes. While most safe RL methods mitigate risk through constraints or penalization, they still allow exploration of unsafe states during training. In this work, we adopt a stricter safety requirement that eliminates unsafe state visitation during training. To achieve this goal, we propose a Q-learning-based safe RL framework that leverages a behavior policy supported on a safe set. Under the assumption that the induced trajectories remain within the safe set, this policy enables sufficient exploration within the safe region without requiring near-optimality. We adopt a two-stage framework in which the Q-function and policy are trained separately. Specifically, we introduce a KL-regularized Bellman target that constrains the Q-function to remain close to the behavior policy. We then derive the policy induced from the trained Q-values and propose a parametric policy extraction method to approximate the optimal policy. Our approach provides a unified framework that can be adapted to different action spaces and types of behavior policies. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves stable learning and well-calibrated value estimates and yields safer behavior with comparable or better performance than existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Safe-Support Q-Learning，通过安全集上的行为策略消除训练中的不安全探索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界强化学习应用中，不安全探索可能导致灾难性后果，现有安全RL方法虽通过约束或惩罚降低风险，但仍允许训练中访问不安全状态。
analysis.problem: 如何在强化学习训练过程中完全避免不安全状态访问，同时保证有效探索和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段框架：先通过KL正则化Bellman目标学习Q函数，使其接近安全集上的行为策略；再通过参数化策略提取方法从Q值导出近似最优策略。
contributions: 提出一种消除训练中不安全状态访问的Q学习安全RL框架
引入KL正则化Bellman目标约束Q函数，并设计参数化策略提取方法
analysis.experiments: 实验表明方法实现稳定学习、良好校准的价值估计，且比现有基线更安全，性能相当或更优。
limitations: 依赖安全集假设，实际中安全集构建可能困难
两阶段训练可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Safe-Support Q-Learning，通过安全集上的行为策略消除训练中的不安全探索。

papers.title: CoRE: Concept-Reasoning Expansion for Continual Brain Lesion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Accurate brain lesion segmentation in MRI is vital for effective clinical diagnosis and treatment planning. Due to high annotation costs and strict data privacy regulations, universal models require employing Continual Learning (CL) to adapt to evolving clinical tasks without losing previously acquired knowledge. However, existing CL paradigms often suffer from capacity limits or redundant parameter growth, and even advanced dynamic methods rely mostly on image-perception strategies that struggle to handle the substantial pathological and multimodal heterogeneity inherent in brain imaging. To address this issue, we propose Concept-Reasoning Expansion (CoRE) framework, which establishes a joint decision-making mechanism by integrating visual features with structured concepts. Through the alignment of image tokens with a hierarchical concept library, CoRE simulates clinical reasoning to guide both interpretable expert routing and demand-based model growth. This collaborative process ensures model evolution is grounded in clinical priors, preventing redundant parameter expansion while maximizing knowledge reuse. Extensive evaluations across 12 sequential brain lesion MRI tasks demonstrate that CoRE achieves state-of-the-art performance and provides a high knowledge starting point for efficient future adaptation. Its superior few-shot transferability and clinical interpretability further validate its effectiveness in managing non-stationary clinical data streams. Our code will be released soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出概念推理扩展框架，通过视觉特征与结构化概念对齐实现持续脑病变分割，在12个MRI任务上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑病变MRI分割中标注成本高、数据隐私严格，通用模型需持续学习适应新任务，但现有方法存在容量限制或参数冗余，且难以处理病理和多模态异质性。
analysis.problem: 现有持续学习范式在脑病变分割中面临容量限制、参数冗余及对病理异质性处理不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出概念推理扩展框架，通过图像token与分层概念库对齐，模拟临床推理以指导可解释专家路由和按需模型增长，实现视觉特征与结构化概念的联合决策。
contributions: 提出CoRE框架，融合视觉特征与结构化概念实现持续学习中的联合决策。
通过概念对齐模拟临床推理，防止冗余参数扩展并最大化知识复用。
在12个连续脑病变MRI任务上达到SOTA性能，并展示优越的少样本迁移性和临床可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在12个连续脑病变MRI任务上进行评估，达到SOTA性能，并验证了少样本迁移性和临床可解释性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的概念库构建。
在更广泛医学影像任务上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出概念推理扩展框架，通过视觉特征与结构化概念对齐实现持续脑病变分割，在12个MRI任务上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Language corpora for the Dutch medical domain
papers.abstract: \textbf{Background:} Dutch medical corpora are scarce, limiting NLP development. \\ \textbf{Methods:} We translated English datasets, identified medical text in generic corpora, and extracted open Dutch medical resources. \\ \textbf{Results:} The resulting corpus comprises $\pm$ 35 billion tokens across the medical domain in about 100 million documents, freely available on Hugging Face. \\ \textbf{Conclusion:} This work establishes the first large-scale Dutch medical language corpus for pre-training and downstream NLP tasks.

analysis.tldr: 构建了首个大规模荷兰语医学语料库，包含约350亿词元，免费公开。
analysis.research_motivation: 荷兰语医学语料库稀缺，限制了自然语言处理在该领域的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模、高质量的荷兰语医学语料库用于预训练和下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过翻译英语数据集、识别通用语料库中的医学文本以及提取开放的荷兰语医学资源，构建了包含约350亿词元的荷兰语医学语料库。
contributions: 构建了首个大规模荷兰语医学语料库，包含约350亿词元、约1亿文档。
语料库在Hugging Face上免费开放，支持预训练和下游NLP任务。

papers.title: PhyloSDF: Phylogenetically-Conditioned Neural Generation of 3D Skull Morphology via Residual Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Generating novel, biologically plausible three-dimensional morphological structures is a fundamental challenge in computational evolutionary biology, hampered by extreme data scarcity and the requirement that generated shapes respect phylogenetic relationships among species. In this work, we present PhyloSDF, a phylogenetically-conditioned neural generative model for 3D biological morphology that integrates two innovations: (1) a DeepSDF auto-decoder regularized by a novel Phylogenetic Consistency Loss that structures the latent space to correlate with evolutionary distances (Pearson $r=0.993$); (2) a Residual Conditional Flow Matching (Residual CFM) architecture that factorizes generation into analytic species-centroid lookup and learned residual prediction, enabling generation from as few as ~4 specimens per species. We evaluate PhyloSDF on 100 micro-CT-scanned skulls of Darwin's Finches and their relatives across 24 species. The model generates novel meshes achieving 88-129% of real intra-species variation at the code level, with all 180 generated meshes verified as non-memorized. Residual CFM surpasses denoising diffusion (which fails entirely at this scale), standard flow matching (which mode-collapses to 3-6% variation), and a Gaussian mixture baseline in both fidelity (Chamfer Distance 0.00181 vs. 0.00190) and morphometric Fréchet distance (10,641 vs. 13,322). Leave-one-species-out experiments across 18 species demonstrate phylogenetic extrapolation capability, and smooth latent interpolations produce biologically plausible ancestral skull reconstructions.

analysis.tldr: 提出PhyloSDF，结合系统发育一致性损失和残差条件流匹配，从极少样本生成3D颅骨形态。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算进化生物学中生成新颖、生物合理的3D形态结构面临数据稀缺和必须尊重物种间系统发育关系的挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何从极少量样本（每物种约4个）生成符合系统发育关系的3D生物形态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准扩散模型在此规模下完全失败，标准流匹配模式坍缩至3-6%变异，而残差条件流匹配能有效生成。
analysis.method: PhyloSDF包含两个创新：1) DeepSDF自动解码器，通过系统发育一致性损失正则化潜空间，使其与进化距离相关（Pearson r=0.993）；2) 残差条件流匹配架构，将生成分解为解析物种质心查找和学习的残差预测。
contributions: 提出系统发育一致性损失，使潜空间结构反映进化距离。
提出残差条件流匹配，实现从极少量样本生成3D形态。
在达尔文雀及其近缘物种的100个微CT扫描颅骨上验证，生成网格达到真实种内变异的88-129%，且未记忆。
analysis.experiments: 在24个物种的100个微CT扫描颅骨上评估，包括留一物种外推实验和潜空间插值生成祖先颅骨。
limitations: 可能仅适用于颅骨等特定形态，泛化性待验证。
依赖系统发育树，树的不确定性可能影响生成。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PhyloSDF，结合系统发育一致性损失和残差条件流匹配，从极少样本生成3D颅骨形态。

papers.title: GPT-Image-2 in the Wild: A Twitter Dataset of Self-Reported AI-Generated Images from the First Week of Deployment
papers.abstract: The release of GPT-image-2 by OpenAI marks a watershed moment in AI-generated imagery: the boundary between photographic reality and synthetic content has never been more difficult to discern. We introduce the GPT-Image-2 Twitter Dataset, the first published dataset of GPT-image-2 generated images, sourced from publicly available Twitter/X posts in the immediate aftermath of the model's April 21, 2026 release. Leveraging the Twitter API v2 and a multi-stage curation pipeline spanning multilingual text heuristics (English, Japanese, and Chinese), browser-automated Twitter "Made with AI" badge verification, and model name variant matching, we curate 10,217 confirmed GPT-image-2 images from 27,662 collected records over a six-day window. We characterize the dataset across four analyses: CLIP-based zero-shot subject taxonomy, OCR text legibility (82.0% of images contain detectable text), face detection (59.2% of images, 22,583 total faces), and semantic clustering (137 CLIP ViT-L/14 clusters). A key negative result is that C2PA content credentials are systematically stripped by Twitter's CDN on upload, rendering cryptographic provenance verification infeasible for social-media-sourced AI images. The dataset and all curation code are released publicly.

analysis.tldr: 首个公开的GPT-Image-2生成图像数据集，包含10,217张来自Twitter的图片，并分析了其内容特征与C2PA凭证被剥离的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: GPT-Image-2的发布使得AI生成图像与真实照片难以区分，但缺乏公开数据集来研究其传播与特征，且社交媒体上的AI图像溯源面临技术挑战。
analysis.problem: 构建并分析首个公开的GPT-Image-2生成图像数据集，揭示其内容分布、文本可读性、人脸出现频率及C2PA凭证在社交媒体上的失效问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: C2PA内容凭证在Twitter上传时被系统性地剥离，导致加密来源验证不可行；82.0%的图像包含可检测文本，59.2%的图像含有人脸。
analysis.method: 通过Twitter API v2收集数据，结合多语言文本启发式过滤、浏览器自动化“Made with AI”徽章验证及模型名称变体匹配，构建多阶段筛选流程，最终获得10,217张确认图像。
contributions: 发布了首个公开的GPT-Image-2生成图像数据集（10,217张），附带完整筛选代码。
通过CLIP分类、OCR、人脸检测和语义聚类，系统分析了数据集的内容特征。
揭示了C2PA凭证在社交媒体上传过程中被剥离的关键负结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了数据集构建流程和四项分析（CLIP零样本分类、OCR文本可读性、人脸检测、语义聚类）的统计结果。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖发布后六天，可能无法代表长期分布。
仅依赖Twitter平台，存在平台偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个公开的GPT-Image-2生成图像数据集，包含10,217张来自Twitter的图片，并分析了其内容特征与C2PA凭证被剥离的问题。

papers.title: Multi-action Tangled Program Graphs for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning with Continuous Control
papers.abstract: Over the past few decades, machine learning has been widely used to learn complex tasks. Reinforcement Learning (RL), inspired by human behavior, is a great example, as it involves developing specific behaviours for specific tasks. To further challenge algorithms, Multi-Task RL (MTRL) environments have been introduced, requiring a single model to learn multiple behaviors. The Tangled Program Graph (TPG) algorithm is a Genetic Programming (GP) algorithm designed for discrete MTRL environments. Recently, the MAPLE algorithm has been proposed, as another GP algorithm that achieves high results in single task continuous RL environments. A variation of the TPG is proposed alongside MAPLE, named Multi-Action TPG (MATPG) that aggregates MAPLE agents, and creates a control flow to activate them. Initially tested on single task RL environments only, MATPG achieved similar results to MAPLE. In this work, we present a new benchmark based on the MuJoCo Half Cheetah from Gymnasium. This benchmark features five distinct obstacles that are randomly positioned in front of the agent, each of which demands a unique behavior. This benchmark serves as a use case for MATPG, to prove its ability as a GP solution for continuous MTRL environments. Our experiments demonstrate its superiority in this multi-task use case when combined with lexicase selection. Furthermore, we examine the interpretability of the evolved graph, revealing that the decision flow of the model is fully interpretable.

analysis.tldr: 提出Multi-Action TPG算法，结合lexicase选择在连续控制多任务RL中优于基线，且模型决策流完全可解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务强化学习（MTRL）要求单一模型学习多种行为，现有遗传编程（GP）算法如TPG仅适用于离散环境，而MAPLE虽在连续单任务中表现优异但缺乏多任务能力，亟需一种能处理连续控制MTRL的GP方法。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种遗传编程算法，使其在连续控制的多任务强化学习环境中有效学习多种行为，同时保持模型的可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在Tangled Program Graph（TPG）基础上引入Multi-Action TPG（MATPG），通过聚合MAPLE智能体并创建控制流来激活它们，结合lexicase选择策略优化多任务性能。
contributions: 提出MATPG算法，将TPG扩展到连续控制多任务RL环境。
基于MuJoCo Half Cheetah设计包含五种随机障碍物的多任务基准，验证MATPG的有效性。
实验证明MATPG结合lexicase选择在多任务场景中优于基线，且模型决策流完全可解释。
analysis.experiments: 在基于MuJoCo Half Cheetah设计的五障碍物多任务基准上测试，MATPG结合lexicase选择表现出优越性，并分析了模型的可解释性。
limitations: 仅在一个特定基准（Half Cheetah五障碍物）上验证，泛化性待进一步评估。
未与深度RL方法（如PPO、SAC）进行对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Multi-Action TPG算法，结合lexicase选择在连续控制多任务RL中优于基线，且模型决策流完全可解释。

papers.title: Self-DACE++: Robust Low-Light Enhancement via Efficient Adaptive Curve Estimation
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present Self-DACE++, an improved unsupervised and lightweight framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement (LLIE), building upon our previous Self-Reference Deep Adaptive Curve Estimation (Self-DACE). To better address the trade-off between computational efficiency and restoration quality, Self-DACE++ introduces enhanced Adaptive Adjustment Curves (AACs). These curves, governed by minimal trainable parameters, flexibly adjust the dynamic range while preserving the color fidelity, structural integrity, and naturalness of the enhanced images. To achieve an extremely lightweight architecture without sacrificing performance, we propose a randomized order training strategy coupled with a network fusion mechanism, which compresses the model into an efficient iterative inference structure. Furthermore, we formulate a physics-grounded objective function based on Retinex theory and incorporate a dedicated denoising module to effectively estimate and suppress latent noise in dark regions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on multiple real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that Self-DACE++ outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, delivering superior enhancement quality with real-time inference capability. The code is available at https://github.com/John-Wendell/Self-DACE.

analysis.tldr: 提出Self-DACE++，一种无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架，通过改进的自适应曲线和随机顺序训练实现高效实时增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光图像增强需要在计算效率和恢复质量之间取得平衡，现有方法要么计算量大，要么增强效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既轻量又高质量的无监督低光图像增强方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Retinex理论构建物理引导的目标函数，引入增强自适应调整曲线（AACs）和随机顺序训练策略，结合网络融合机制压缩模型为高效迭代推理结构，并加入专用去噪模块。
contributions: 提出Self-DACE++，一种改进的无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架。
引入增强自适应调整曲线（AACs），以最少可训练参数灵活调整动态范围，保持色彩、结构和自然度。
提出随机顺序训练策略和网络融合机制，实现极轻量架构。
基于Retinex理论构建物理引导的目标函数，并集成去噪模块有效抑制暗区噪声。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上进行定性和定量评估，结果表明Self-DACE++优于现有最先进方法，并具有实时推理能力。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景的泛化能力有限。
去噪模块可能引入轻微细节模糊。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Self-DACE++，一种无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架，通过改进的自适应曲线和随机顺序训练实现高效实时增强。

papers.title: HuM-Eval: A Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Human-Centric Video Evaluation
papers.abstract: Video generation models have developed rapidly in recent years, where generating natural human motion plays a pivotal role. However, accurately evaluating the quality of generated human motion video remains a significant challenge. Existing evaluation metrics primarily focus on global scene statistics, often overlooking fine-grained human details and consequently failing to align with human subjective preference. To bridge this gap, we propose HuM-Eval, a novel human-centric evaluation framework that adopts a coarse-to-fine strategy. Specifically, our framework first utilizes a Vision Language Model to perform a coarse assessment of global video quality. It then proceeds to a fine-grained analysis, using 2D pose to verify anatomical correctness and 3D human motion to evaluate motion stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HuM-Eval achieves an average human correlation of 58.2%, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. Furthermore, we introduce HuM-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 1,000 diverse prompts, and conduct a detailed evaluation of existing text-to-video models, paving the way for next-generation human motion generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出HuM-Eval，一种从粗到细的人体中心视频评估框架，在人类相关性上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成评估指标主要关注全局场景统计，忽略细粒度人体细节，无法与人类主观偏好对齐。
analysis.problem: 准确评估生成的人体运动视频质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有指标与人类主观偏好不一致，缺乏对人体细节的细粒度评估。
analysis.method: 粗到细策略：先使用VLM进行全局视频质量粗评估，再通过2D姿态验证解剖正确性，3D人体运动评估运动稳定性。
contributions: 提出HuM-Eval，一种从粗到细的人体中心视频评估框架，平均人类相关性达58.2%，超越现有基线。
构建HuM-Bench基准，包含1000个多样化提示，用于评估文本到视频模型的人体运动生成能力。
analysis.experiments: 在HuM-Bench上评估，HuM-Eval平均人类相关性58.2%，优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM和姿态估计的准确性。
未提及对非人体视频的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HuM-Eval，一种从粗到细的人体中心视频评估框架，在人类相关性上超越现有方法。

papers.title: The Structured Output Benchmark: A Multi-Source Benchmark for Evaluating Structured Output Quality in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models are increasingly being deployed to extract structured data from unstructured and semi-structured sources: parsing invoices, medical records, and converting PDF documents to database entries. Yet existing benchmarks for structured output generation either focus on schema compliance alone, or evaluate value correctness within a single source domain. We introduce SOB (The Structured Output Benchmark), a multi-source benchmark spanning three source modalities: native text, images, and audio conversations. All models receive a text-normalized representation of their context regardless of source modality; this deliberate design isolates structured-output capability from raw vision or speech-processing quality, ensuring a fair, source-agnostic comparison. Our benchmark comprises 5,000 text evaluation records derived from multi-hop QA drawn from a 25,091-record full corpus, 209 image records from OCR-processed PDFs across seven document types including multi-column layouts, dense tables, scanned historical documents, small-print text, and mathematical typesetting, and 115 audio records from the AMI corpus. Each record pairs a natural-language question with a JSON schema that the model must follow and a ground-truth answer verified against the source context. We evaluate 21 frontier and open-weight models across three source domains and seven metrics. Our results reveal a consistent pattern: models achieve near-perfect schema compliance, yet the best Value Accuracy, measured by exact leaf-value match, reaches only 83.0% on text, 67.2% on images, and 23.7% on audio, where longer context makes extraction substantially harder. We release the dataset, evaluation pipeline, and all related code.

analysis.tldr: 提出多源结构化输出基准SOB，发现LLM在文本、图像、音频上的值准确率依次大幅下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有结构化输出基准要么只关注模式合规性，要么在单一源域内评估值正确性，缺乏跨模态公平比较。
analysis.problem: 需要统一的多源基准来公平评估LLM从不同模态（文本、图像、音频）提取结构化数据的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在模式合规性上接近完美，但值准确率在文本（83.0%）、图像（67.2%）、音频（23.7%）上依次显著下降，长上下文使提取更困难。
analysis.method: 构建包含文本、图像、音频三种模态的基准SOB，共5000文本记录、209图像记录、115音频记录，每对包含自然语言问题、JSON模式和真实答案。
contributions: 提出首个多源结构化输出基准SOB，覆盖文本、图像、音频三种模态。
通过文本归一化设计隔离结构化输出能力与原始感知能力，实现公平跨模态比较。
评估21个前沿和开源模型，揭示模式合规性高但值准确率低的普遍现象。
analysis.experiments: 在21个模型上评估，使用7个指标，报告了文本、图像、音频上的值准确率。
limitations: 音频数据量较小（115条），可能不足以全面代表音频结构化输出挑战。
基准主要关注值准确率，未深入评估其他维度如输出格式灵活性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多源结构化输出基准SOB，发现LLM在文本、图像、音频上的值准确率依次大幅下降。

papers.title: Benchmarking Layout-Guided Diffusion Models through Unified Semantic-Spatial Evaluation in Closed and Open Settings
papers.abstract: Evaluating layout-guided text-to-image generative models requires assessing both semantic alignment with textual prompts and spatial fidelity to prescribed layouts. Assessing layout alignment requires collecting fine-grained annotations, which is costly and labor-intensive. Consequently, current benchmarks rarely provide comprehensive layout evaluation and often remain limited in scale or coverage, making model comparison, ranking, and interpretation difficult. In this work, we introduce a closed-set benchmark (C-Bench) designed to isolate key generative capabilities while providing varying levels of complexity in both prompt structure and layout. To complement this controlled setting, we propose an open-set benchmark (O-Bench) that evaluates models using real-world prompts and layouts, offering a measure of semantic and spatial alignment in the wild. We further develop a unified evaluation protocol that combines semantic and spatial accuracy into a single score, ensuring consistent model ranking. Using our benchmarks, we conduct a large-scale evaluation of six state-of-the-art layout-guided diffusion models, totaling 319,086 generated and evaluated images. We establish a model ranking based on their overall performance and provide detailed breakdowns for text and layout alignment to enhance interpretability. Fine-grained analyses across scenarios and prompt complexities highlight the strengths and limitations of current models. Code is available at https://github.com/lparolari/cobench.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一语义-空间评估的布局引导扩散模型基准，包含封闭和开放两种设置。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有布局引导文本到图像生成模型的评估缺乏全面性，细粒度标注成本高，导致基准规模有限、覆盖不全，难以进行模型比较和排名。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能隔离关键生成能力又能覆盖真实场景的布局评估基准，并统一语义和空间对齐的评分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出封闭集基准C-Bench和开放集基准O-Bench，并开发统一评估协议将语义和空间准确性合并为单一分数。
contributions: 提出C-Bench和O-Bench两个布局评估基准，分别用于控制变量和真实场景评估。
开发统一评估协议，结合语义和空间对齐分数，实现一致的模型排名。
大规模评估六种布局引导扩散模型，提供细粒度分析和模型排名。
analysis.experiments: 对六种最先进的布局引导扩散模型进行了大规模评估，共生成和评估319,086张图像，并建立了模型排名和细粒度分析。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有可能的布局类型或复杂场景。
统一评分可能无法完全反映某些特定应用的需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一语义-空间评估的布局引导扩散模型基准，包含封闭和开放两种设置。

papers.title: GraphPL: Leveraging GNN for Efficient and Robust Modalities Imputation in Patchwork Learning
papers.abstract: Current research on distributed multi-modal learning typically assumes that clients can access complete information across all modalities, which may not hold in practice. In this paper, we explore patchwork learning, in which the modalities available to different clients vary, and the objective is to impute the missing modalities for each client in an unsupervised manner. Existing methods are shown not to fully utilize the modality information as they tend to rely on only a subset of the observed modalities. To address this issue, we propose GraphPL, which combines graph neural networks with patchwork learning to flexibly integrate all observed modalities and remains robust with noisy inputs. Experimental results show that GraphPL achieves SOTA performance on benchmark datasets. Our results on real-world distributed electronic health record dataset show GraphPL learns strong downstream features and enables tasks like disease prediction via superior modality imputation.

analysis.tldr: GraphPL 利用图神经网络在分布式多模态学习中高效鲁棒地填补缺失模态。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分布式多模态学习假设客户端拥有完整模态，但实际中模态分布不均，且已有方法未能充分利用所有观测模态信息。
analysis.problem: 在 patchwork learning 场景下，如何无监督地填补各客户端的缺失模态，并充分利用所有观测模态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法倾向于仅依赖部分观测模态，未能充分利用全部可用信息。
