analysis.method: 提出 GraphPL，结合图神经网络与 patchwork learning，灵活整合所有观测模态，并对噪声输入保持鲁棒。
contributions: 提出 GraphPL 框架，首次将 GNN 用于 patchwork learning 中的模态填补。
在基准数据集和真实分布式电子健康记录数据集上实现 SOTA 性能，并展示下游任务（如疾病预测）的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集和真实分布式电子健康记录数据集上评估，GraphPL 达到 SOTA，并学习到强下游特征。
limitations: 可能依赖图结构设计的合理性。
未讨论极端缺失率下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GraphPL 利用图神经网络在分布式多模态学习中高效鲁棒地填补缺失模态。

papers.title: A Faceted Proposal for Transparent Attribution of AI-Assisted Text Production
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence systems are increasingly integrated into writing processes, challenging traditional notions of authorship, responsibility, and intellectual contribution. Current disclosure practices usually indicate whether AI was used, but rarely explain how it was used, where it intervened, or how its output was reviewed. This paper proposes a faceted model for representing AI-assisted text production at the levels of documents, chapters, sections, and paragraphs. The proposal introduces a core model based on Form, Generation, and Evaluation, and an extended model that adds Intent, Control, and Traceability. The model is positioned as a minimal operational baseline with extensibility toward higher-fidelity representations. A worked example based on the production of this article demonstrates applicability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多面模型，用于透明归因AI辅助文本生成，涵盖形式、生成、评估、意图、控制和可追溯性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI辅助写作的披露实践通常只说明是否使用了AI，但缺乏对如何使用、何处干预以及输出如何审查的详细说明，导致作者归属和责任不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地表示AI辅助文本生成过程中的贡献细节，以实现透明归因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个多面模型，核心模型包括形式（Form）、生成（Generation）和评估（Evaluation），扩展模型增加意图（Intent）、控制（Control）和可追溯性（Traceability），并基于本文的生成过程进行示例验证。
contributions: 提出了一个用于透明归因AI辅助文本生成的多面模型。
通过实际示例展示了模型的适用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型可能需要在更大规模或不同场景下验证。
扩展模型的实现细节和实际应用效果未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多面模型，用于透明归因AI辅助文本生成，涵盖形式、生成、评估、意图、控制和可追溯性。

papers.title: Plausible but Wrong: A case study on Agentic Failures in Astrophysical Workflows
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems are increasingly being integrated into scientific workflows, yet their behavior under realistic conditions remains insufficiently understood. We evaluate CMBAgent across two workflow paradigms and eighteen astrophysical tasks. In the One-Shot setting, access to domain-specific context yields an approximately ~6x performance improvement (0.85 vs. ~0 without context), with the primary failure mode being silent incorrect computation - syntactically valid code that produces plausible but inaccurate results. In the Deep Research setting, the system frequently exhibits silent failures across stress tests, producing physically inconsistent posteriors without self-diagnosis. Overall, performance is strong on well-specified tasks but degrades on problems designed to probe reasoning limits, often without visible error signals. These findings highlight that the most concerning failure mode in agentic scientific workflows is not overt failure, but confident generation of incorrect results. We release our evaluation framework to facilitate systematic reliability analysis of scientific AI agents.

analysis.tldr: Agentic AI在科学工作流中常自信地生成看似合理但错误的结果，且不自知。
analysis.research_motivation: Agentic AI系统正被越来越多地集成到科学工作流中，但它们在现实条件下的行为尚未被充分理解，尤其是失败模式。
analysis.problem: 评估Agentic AI在科学工作流中的可靠性，特别是其产生看似合理但错误结果的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在One-Shot设置中，领域上下文带来约6倍性能提升，但主要失败模式是静默错误计算（语法正确但结果不准确）；在Deep Research设置中，系统在压力测试中频繁产生物理上不一致的后验而不自知。
analysis.method: 通过两个工作流范式和18个天体物理任务评估CMBAgent，并发布评估框架。
contributions: 系统评估了Agentic AI在天体物理工作流中的失败模式，发现静默错误计算是最令人担忧的失败模式。
发布了评估框架以促进科学AI代理的系统可靠性分析。
analysis.experiments: 在One-Shot设置中，领域上下文带来约6倍性能提升（0.85 vs 无上下文约0）；在Deep Research设置中，系统在压力测试中频繁失败。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了单一代理（CMBAgent）和天体物理领域，泛化性有限。
未提供定量结果（如准确率、错误率）的详细统计。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agentic AI在科学工作流中常自信地生成看似合理但错误的结果，且不自知。

papers.title: VAE-Inf: A statistically interpretable generative paradigm for imbalanced classification
papers.abstract: Imbalanced classification remains a pervasive challenge in machine learning, particularly when minority samples are too scarce to provide a robust discriminative boundary. In such extreme scenarios, conventional models often suffer from unstable decision boundaries and a lack of reliable error control. To bridge the gap between generative modeling and discriminative classification, we propose a two-stage framework \textbf{VAE-Inf} that integrates deep representation learning with statistically interpretable hypothesis testing. In the first stage, we adopt a one-class modeling perspective by training a variational autoencoder (VAE) exclusively on majority-class data to capture the underlying reference distribution. The resulting latent posteriors are aggregated via a Wasserstein barycenter to construct a global Gaussian reference model, providing a geometrically principled baseline for the majority class. In the second stage, we transform this generative foundation into a discriminative classifier by fine-tuning the encoder with limited minority samples. This is achieved through a novel distribution-aware loss that enforces probabilistic separation between classes based on variance-normalized projection statistics. For inference, we introduce a projection-based score that admits a natural hypothesis testing interpretation, allowing for a distribution-free calibration procedure. This approach yields exact finite-sample control of the Type-I error (false positive rate) without relying on restrictive parametric assumptions. Extensive experiments on diverse real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our framework achieves competitive performance against other approaches. The codes are available upon request.

analysis.tldr: 提出VAE-Inf框架，将VAE与假设检验结合，实现不平衡分类的统计可解释生成范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 不平衡分类中少数类样本稀缺导致判别边界不稳定且缺乏可靠误差控制，现有方法难以兼顾生成建模与统计可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在极端不平衡场景下，利用生成模型构建具有统计可解释性的分类器，并实现有限样本下的错误率控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用多数类数据训练VAE，通过Wasserstein重心聚合隐变量后验构建全局高斯参考分布；第二阶段用少量少数类样本微调解码器，引入分布感知损失（基于方差归一化投影统计量）实现概率分离，推理时采用投影分数进行分布自由校准以控制第一类错误。
contributions: 提出将VAE与假设检验结合的统计可解释生成分类框架
设计分布感知损失和投影分数实现有限样本下的Type-I误差控制
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界基准上进行了实验，性能具有竞争力，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖多数类数据分布假设
少数类样本极少时微调效果可能受限
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VAE-Inf框架，将VAE与假设检验结合，实现不平衡分类的统计可解释生成范式。

papers.title: A Survey of Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning with Graph Neural Network-Based Communication
papers.abstract: In multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), the integration of a communication mechanism, allowing agents to better learn to coordinate their actions and converge on their objectives by sharing information. Based on an interaction graph, a subclass of methods employs graph neural networks (GNNs) to learn the communication, enabling agents to improve their internal representations by enriching them with information exchanged. With growing research, we note a lack of explicit structure and framework to distinguish and classify MARL approaches with communication based on GNNs. Thus, this paper surveys recent works in this field. We propose a generalized GNN-based communication process with the goal of making the underlying concepts behind the methods more obvious and accessible.

analysis.tldr: 综述图神经网络通信的多智能体强化学习方法，提出通用通信流程框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体强化学习中通信机制对协调至关重要，但现有基于图神经网络的通信方法缺乏统一框架和分类体系，阻碍了方法对比与理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏显式结构来区分和分类基于GNN通信的MARL方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个广义的GNN通信过程框架，将方法分解为信息编码、消息传递、聚合和动作生成等步骤，并基于此对现有工作分类。
contributions: 首次系统综述基于GNN通信的MARL方法，填补分类框架空白。
提出通用GNN通信流程，使方法背后的概念更清晰易懂。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述可能未覆盖所有最新方法。
框架的通用性可能忽略某些方法的特殊设计。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述图神经网络通信的多智能体强化学习方法，提出通用通信流程框架。

papers.title: AHASD: Asynchronous Heterogeneous Architecture for LLM Adaptive Drafting Speculative Decoding on Mobile Devices
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding enhances the inference efficiency of large language models (LLMs) by generating drafts using a small draft language model (DLM) and verifying them in batches with a large target language model (TLM). However, adaptive drafting inference on a mobile single-NPU-PIM system faces idle overhead in traditional operator-level synchronous execution and wasted computation in asynchronous execution due to fluctuations in draft length. This paper introduces AHASD, a task-level asynchronous mobile NPU-PIM heterogeneous architecture for speculative decoding. Notably, AHASD achieves parallel drafting on the PIM and verification on a single NPU through task-level DLM-TLM decoupling and specifically, it incorporates Entropy-History-Aware Drafting Control and Time-Aware Pre-Verification Control to dynamically manage adaptive drafting algorithm execution and pre-verification timing, suppressing invalid drafting based on low-confidence drafts. Additionally, AHASD integrates Attention Algorithm Units and Gated Task Scheduling Units within LPDDR5-PIM to enable attention link localization and sub-microsecond task switching on the PIM side. Experimental results for different LLMs and adaptive drafting algorithms show that AHASD achieves up to 4.2$\times$ in throughput and 5.6$\times$ in energy efficiency improvements over a GPU-only baseline, and 1.5$\times$ in throughput and 1.24$\times$ in energy efficiency gains over the state-of-the-art GPU+PIM baseline, with hardware overhead below 3% of the DRAM area.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种异步异构移动NPU-PIM架构，通过任务级解耦和动态控制实现LLM推测解码的高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动设备上LLM推理面临效率瓶颈，传统同步执行存在空闲开销，异步执行因草稿长度波动导致计算浪费，亟需高效异构架构。
analysis.problem: 解决移动单NPU-PIM系统中推测解码的同步执行空闲开销和异步执行计算浪费问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统操作级同步执行存在空闲开销，异步执行因草稿长度波动导致计算浪费。
analysis.method: 提出AHASD架构，包含任务级DLM-TLM解耦、熵-历史感知草稿控制、时间感知预验证控制、注意力算法单元和门控任务调度单元。
contributions: 提出首个任务级异步移动NPU-PIM异构架构用于推测解码。
设计动态控制机制抑制无效草稿生成，提升推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多种LLM和自适应草稿算法上实验，相比纯GPU基线吞吐量提升4.2倍、能效提升5.6倍，相比最先进GPU+PIM基线吞吐量提升1.5倍、能效提升1.24倍，硬件开销低于DRAM面积的3%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定移动NPU-PIM硬件平台。
动态控制机制可能增加额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种异步异构移动NPU-PIM架构，通过任务级解耦和动态控制实现LLM推测解码的高效推理。

papers.title: R$^3$-SQL: Ranking Reward and Resampling for Text-to-SQL
papers.abstract: Modern Text-to-SQL systems generate multiple candidate SQL queries and rank them to judge a final prediction. However, existing methods face two limitations. First, they often score functionally equivalent SQL queries inconsistently despite identical execution results. Second, ranking cannot recover when the correct SQL is absent from the candidate pool. We propose R$^3$-SQL, a Text-to-SQL framework that addresses both issues through unified reward for ranking and resampling. R$^3$-SQL first groups candidates by execution result and ranks groups for consistency. To score each group, it combines a pairwise preference across groups with a pointwise utility from the best group rank and size, capturing relative preference, consistency, and candidate quality. To improve candidate recall, R$^3$-SQL introduces agentic resampling, which judges the generated candidate pool and selectively resamples when the correct SQL is likely absent. R$^3$-SQL achieves 75.03 execution accuracy on BIRD-dev, a new state of the art among methods using models with disclosed sizes, with consistent gains across five benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: R³-SQL通过统一奖励排序和智能重采样，在Text-to-SQL任务中实现新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL系统对功能等价的SQL评分不一致，且当正确SQL不在候选池时无法恢复，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何对候选SQL进行一致排序，并在正确SQL缺失时通过重采样提高召回率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法对执行结果相同的SQL评分不一致，且排序无法纠正候选池缺失问题。
analysis.method: 提出R³-SQL框架，包含统一奖励排序（按执行结果分组，结合成对偏好和点效用评分）和智能重采样（判断候选池质量并选择性重采样）。
contributions: 提出统一奖励排序方法，通过分组和组合评分实现一致排序。
引入智能重采样机制，在正确SQL可能缺失时主动重采样。
analysis.experiments: 在BIRD-dev上达到75.03执行准确率，创下公开模型大小方法的新SOTA，并在五个基准上取得一致提升。
limitations: 重采样可能增加推理成本。
依赖候选生成器的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: R³-SQL通过统一奖励排序和智能重采样，在Text-to-SQL任务中实现新SOTA。

papers.title: Assessment of the quantitative impact of occlusal positioning splints on temporomandibular joint conditions
papers.abstract: A computational method for quantitative analysis of temporomandibular joint (TMJ) configuration using occlusal positioning splints is proposed and demonstrated. The method models a positioning splint as a physical realization of a predefined rigid transformation of the mandible, derived from multimodal data, including CBCT, facial motion acquisition, and dental scans integrated within a common coordinate system. Splints corresponding to selected mandibular positions are designed and fabricated, and their positioning accuracy is evaluated using repeated scans of plaster models. Discrepancies are represented as error transformations and analyzed statistically in the space of rigid motions. The estimated transformations are propagated to segmented TMJ structures, enabling simulation-based evaluation of joint space changes. Transformation-based error analysis and surface distance metrics are used to quantify differences between planned and achieved configurations. The method enables indirect assessment of TMJ configuration using a single anatomical model and transformation data, reducing the need for repeated imaging across multiple mandibular positions. This study is intended as a methodological demonstration, supported by a clear step-by-step graphical presentation, and does not aim to provide clinical validation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于咬合定位牙合垫的颞下颌关节构型定量分析方法，通过多模态数据融合与误差传播模拟关节空间变化。
analysis.research_motivation: 颞下颌关节（TMJ）疾病的诊断和治疗评估通常需要多次成像，成本高且辐射暴露大；现有方法难以定量分析不同下颌位置下的关节构型变化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用咬合定位牙合垫间接、定量评估TMJ构型，减少对重复成像的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将定位牙合垫建模为下颌预定刚性变换的物理实现，融合CBCT、面部运动采集和牙科扫描数据于统一坐标系；设计并制造对应下颌位置的牙合垫，通过重复扫描石膏模型评估定位精度，将误差表示为刚性运动空间中的变换并进行统计分析；将估计的变换传播至分割的TMJ结构，实现基于仿真的关节空间变化评估。
contributions: 提出一种结合多模态数据与刚性变换误差分析的TMJ构型间接评估方法。
通过误差传播和表面距离度量量化计划与实现构型之间的差异，减少重复成像需求。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅作为方法学演示，缺乏临床验证。
依赖多模态数据配准精度，误差传播可能累积。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于咬合定位牙合垫的颞下颌关节构型定量分析方法，通过多模态数据融合与误差传播模拟关节空间变化。

papers.title: Edge-Cloud Collaborative Reconstruction via Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion for Downstream Remote Sensing Perception
papers.abstract: The exponential surge in high-resolution remote sensing data faces a severe bottleneck in satellite-to-ground transmission. Limited downlink bandwidth forces the use of extreme high-ratio compression, which irreversibly destroys high-frequency structural details essential for downstream machine perception tasks like object detection. While current super-resolution techniques attempt to recover these details, regression-based methods often yield over-smoothed textures, and generative diffusion models frequently introduce structural hallucinations that mislead detection systems. To address this trade-off, we propose the Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion (SALD) framework, an asymmetric edge-cloud collaborative SR system. At the resource-constrained edge, the system decouples imagery into a highly compressed low-frequency payload and a lightweight soft structural prior. Transmitting this decoupled representation minimizes bandwidth consumption. On the powerful cloud side, we introduce a Structure-Gated Large Kernel (SGLK) module and a Semantic-Guidance Engine (SGE) within the diffusion backbone. These modules leverage the transmitted structural priors to gate large-kernel convolutions, effectively capturing long-range dependencies inherent in aerial scenes while actively suppressing generative hallucinations. Extensive experiments on both the MSCM and UCMerced datasets demonstrate that, even under extreme bandwidth constraints, SALD achieves superior perceptual quality (LPIPS) and significantly enhances downstream performance in both scene classification and small-target detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构感知潜扩散框架SALD，通过边缘-云协同和结构先验传输，在极低带宽下恢复遥感图像高频细节，提升下游感知任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率遥感数据激增，卫星-地面传输带宽有限，极端压缩破坏高频结构细节，现有超分方法要么过度平滑要么产生结构幻觉，误导检测系统。
analysis.problem: 在极低带宽约束下，如何从高度压缩的遥感图像中恢复高频结构细节，同时避免生成幻觉，以提升下游目标检测和场景分类等感知任务的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出非对称边缘-云协同超分框架SALD：边缘端将图像解耦为高度压缩的低频载荷和轻量软结构先验；云端引入结构门控大核模块和语义引导引擎，利用传输的结构先验门控大核卷积，捕获长程依赖并抑制生成幻觉。
contributions: 提出边缘-云协同的SALD框架，通过解耦传输结构先验实现极低带宽下的高质量遥感图像重建。
设计结构门控大核模块和语义引导引擎，有效利用结构先验捕获长程依赖并抑制扩散模型的生成幻觉。
在MSCM和UCMerced数据集上，极端带宽下SALD在感知质量（LPIPS）和下游场景分类、小目标检测任务上均取得显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在MSCM和UCMerced数据集上进行实验，评估感知质量（LPIPS）和下游场景分类、小目标检测性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定结构先验设计，泛化到其他遥感任务需调整。
边缘端解耦和云端扩散推理可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构感知潜扩散框架SALD，通过边缘-云协同和结构先验传输，在极低带宽下恢复遥感图像高频细节，提升下游感知任务性能。

papers.title: Cutscene Agent: An LLM Agent Framework for Automated 3D Cutscene Generation
papers.abstract: Cutscenes are carefully choreographed cinematic sequences embedded in video games and interactive media, serving as the primary vehicle for narrative delivery, character development, and emotional engagement. Producing cutscenes is inherently complex: it demands seamless coordination across screenwriting, cinematography, character animation, voice acting, and technical direction, often requiring days to weeks of collaborative effort from multidisciplinary teams to produce minutes of polished content. In this work, we present Cutscene Agent, an LLM agent framework for automated end-to-end cutscene generation. The framework makes three contributions: (1)~a Cutscene Toolkit built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) that establishes \emph{bidirectional} integration between LLM agents and the game engine -- agents not only invoke engine operations but continuously observe real-time scene state, enabling closed-loop generation of editable engine-native cinematic assets; (2)~a multi-agent system where a director agent orchestrates specialist subagents for animation, cinematography, and sound design, augmented by a visual reasoning feedback loop for perception-driven refinement; and (3)~CutsceneBench, a hierarchical evaluation benchmark for cutscene generation. Unlike typical tool-use benchmarks that evaluate short, isolated function calls, cutscene generation requires long-horizon, multi-step orchestration of dozens of interdependent tool invocations with strict ordering constraints -- a capability dimension that existing benchmarks do not cover. We evaluate a range of LLMs on CutsceneBench and analyze their performance across this challenging task.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM Agent的自动化3D过场动画生成框架，包含双向引擎集成、多智能体协作和层次化评测基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 过场动画制作需要多学科团队数天至数周协作，流程复杂且耗时，现有方法缺乏端到端自动化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何实现从剧本到可编辑引擎原生资产的自动化、闭环式3D过场动画生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建Cutscene Agent框架：基于MCP协议实现LLM Agent与游戏引擎的双向集成（工具调用+实时状态观察）；采用多智能体系统，由导演Agent协调动画、摄影、音效等专业子Agent，并引入视觉推理反馈循环；提出层次化评测基准CutsceneBench。
contributions: 提出基于MCP的Cutscene Toolkit，实现LLM Agent与游戏引擎的双向闭环集成。
设计多智能体协作系统，支持长时序、多步骤的过场动画生成。
构建层次化评测基准CutsceneBench，填补现有工具使用基准在长程编排任务上的空白。
analysis.experiments: 在CutsceneBench上评估多种LLM，分析其在该挑战性任务上的表现。
limitations: 可能依赖特定游戏引擎的MCP实现，泛化性待验证。
多智能体协作的通信开销和一致性可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于LLM Agent的自动化3D过场动画生成框架，包含双向引擎集成、多智能体协作和层次化评测基准。

papers.title: Towards Robust Deep Learning-based Rumex Obtusifolius Detection from Drone Images
papers.abstract: Domain adaptation (DA) addresses the challenge of transferring a machine learning model trained on a source domain to a target domain with a different data distribution. In this work, we study DA for the task of Rumex obtusifolius (Rumex) image classification. We train models on a published, ground vehicle-based dataset (source) and evaluate their performance on a custom target dataset acquired by unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). We find that Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models, specifically ResNets, generalize poorly to the target domain, even after fine-tuning on the source data. Applying moment-matching and maximum classifier discrepancy, two established DA techniques, substantially improves target-domain performance. However, Vision Transformer (ViT) models pretrained with self-supervised objectives (DINOv2, DINOv3) handle domain shifts intrinsically well, surpassing even moment-matching-trained ResNets, likely due to the rich, general-purpose representations acquired during large-scale pretraining. Using ViTs fine-tuned on the source dataset, we demonstrate high classification performances in the range of F1=0.8 on our target dataset. To support further research on DA for weed detection in grassland systems, we publicly release our UAV-based target dataset AGSMultiRumex, comprising data from 15 flights over Swiss meadows.

analysis.tldr: 针对无人机图像中酸模检测的域适应研究，发现ViT模型比CNN更鲁棒，并开源了UAV数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 农业杂草检测中，模型在不同数据分布（如地面车辆 vs 无人机）下泛化能力差，域适应技术可缓解此问题，但现有研究缺乏对酸模检测的评估。
analysis.problem: 解决从地面车辆图像（源域）到无人机图像（目标域）的域迁移中，深度学习模型性能下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CNN模型（ResNet）在目标域泛化差，即使微调后仍不佳；而自监督预训练的ViT（DINOv2/v3）天然具有更好的域不变性，性能超过使用域适应技术的CNN。
analysis.method: 对比CNN（ResNet）与ViT（DINOv2/v3）在源域训练后直接迁移或使用域适应技术（矩匹配、最大分类器差异）的效果，并微调ViT。
contributions: 系统评估了CNN和ViT在酸模检测域适应任务中的表现，发现ViT具有内在鲁棒性。
公开了包含15次瑞士草地飞行的UAV数据集AGSMultiRumex，促进杂草检测域适应研究。
analysis.experiments: 在源域（地面车辆数据集）训练，在自建UAV目标域上测试，ViT微调后F1=0.8。摘要未提供具体对比实验细节。
limitations: 仅针对单一杂草种类（酸模），可能不适用于其他杂草。
未探索更复杂的域适应方法或更大规模数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对无人机图像中酸模检测的域适应研究，发现ViT模型比CNN更鲁棒，并开源了UAV数据集。

papers.title: SaliencyDecor: Enhancing Neural Network Interpretability through Feature Decorrelation
papers.abstract: Gradient-based saliency methods are widely used to interpret deep neural networks, yet they often produce noisy and unstable explanations that poorly align with semantically meaningful input features. We argue that a fundamental cause of this behavior lies in the geometry of learned representations: correlated feature dimensions diffuse attribution gradients across redundant directions, resulting in blurred and unreliable saliency maps. To address this issue, we identify feature correlation as a structural limitation of gradient-based interpretability and propose SaliencyDecor, a training framework that enforces feature decorrelation to improve attribution fidelity without modifying saliency methods or model architectures by reshaping the feature space toward orthogonality, our approach promotes more concentrated gradient flow and improves the fidelity of saliency-based explanations. SaliencyDecor jointly optimizes classification, prediction consistency under feature masking, and a decorrelation regularizer, requiring no architectural changes or inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that our method produces substantially sharper and more object-focused saliency maps while simultaneously improving predictive performance, achieving accuracy gains across the datasets. These results establish our method as a principled mechanism for enhancing both interpretability and accuracy, challenging the conventional trade-off between explanation quality and model performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过特征去相关训练框架提升梯度类显著性图的清晰度和忠实度，同时提高模型预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 梯度类显著性方法常产生噪声大、不稳定的解释，与语义特征对齐差，根本原因在于学习表征中特征维度相关导致归因梯度扩散。
analysis.problem: 特征相关性导致梯度类显著性图模糊且不可靠，需要在不修改显著性方法或模型架构的前提下提升归因忠实度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征相关维度使归因梯度沿冗余方向扩散，产生模糊的显著性图。
analysis.method: 提出SaliencyDecor训练框架，联合优化分类损失、特征掩蔽下的预测一致性损失和去相关正则化项，重塑特征空间朝向正交性，无需架构修改或推理开销。
contributions: 识别特征相关性是梯度类可解释性的结构限制，并提出去相关训练框架缓解该问题。
在多个基准和架构上验证方法能产生更清晰、聚焦目标的显著性图，同时提升预测准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和架构上进行实验，结果显示显著性图更清晰、更聚焦目标，且预测性能提升。摘要未提供具体数据集和数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于梯度类显著性方法，对其他可解释性方法效果未知。
去相关正则化可能增加训练复杂度或需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过特征去相关训练框架提升梯度类显著性图的清晰度和忠实度，同时提高模型预测性能。

papers.title: Golden RPG: Confidence-Adaptive Region-Aware Noise for Compositional Text-to-Image Generation
papers.abstract: Compositional text-to-image (T2I) generation requires a model to honour multiple sub-prompts that describe distinct image regions. Recent work shows that the \emph{starting noise} of a diffusion model carries significant semantic information: ``golden'' noise predicted from text can substantially raise prompt fidelity. We observe that this noise prediction is, however, fundamentally global: the same network is asked to summarise a long, multi-region prompt with a single text embedding, which becomes the bottleneck whenever the prompt describes scenes with spatially-separated entities. We introduce \textbf{Golden RPG}, a region-aware noise predictor that extends a frozen NPNet with two trainable additions: (i) a per-region \textbf{FiLM adapter} that reshapes the predicted noise according to each sub-prompt; and (ii) a \textbf{Region Cross-Attention} layer injected between two stages of the Swin backbone, allowing different spatial locations to attend to different sub-prompt tokens. To prevent the regional conditioning from degrading samples whose prompts are already easy, we further propose a \textbf{Confidence-Adaptive Blending} head that dynamically predicts, per sample, how strongly the regional signal should override the global signal. We evaluate on the original RPG benchmark (20 prompts, 100 samples) and on four multi-region categories of T2I-CompBench (1{,}200 images, six competing methods). Golden RPG achieves the highest Cross-Region-Coherence score on every category, while matching the strongest baselines on absolute CLIP-Score and CLIP-IQA. A paired user study further shows a $\boldsymbol{\sim}$67\% preference over the strongest baseline. The adapter contains $\sim$2M trainable parameters and adds only $0.6$\,s of inference overhead on top of SDXL.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域感知噪声预测器Golden RPG，通过FiLM适配器和区域交叉注意力提升组合式文本到图像生成的提示保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合式文本到图像生成需要模型同时满足多个描述不同图像区域的子提示，但现有方法中扩散模型的起始噪声预测是全局的，难以处理空间分离实体的复杂场景。
analysis.problem: 解决全局噪声预测在处理多区域组合提示时的瓶颈问题，提升对多个子提示的忠实度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到扩散模型的起始噪声携带显著语义信息，但全局噪声预测网络使用单一文本嵌入总结长多区域提示，成为性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 在冻结的NPNet上扩展两个可训练组件：每个区域的FiLM适配器重塑噪声，以及注入Swin骨干两阶段之间的区域交叉注意力层；另提出置信度自适应混合头动态控制区域信号覆盖全局信号的强度。
contributions: 提出区域感知噪声预测器Golden RPG，通过FiLM适配器和区域交叉注意力实现区域级噪声调制。
提出置信度自适应混合头，根据样本难度动态平衡全局与区域信号。
在RPG基准和T2I-CompBench上取得最高跨区域一致性分数，用户偏好约67%。
analysis.experiments: 在RPG基准（20个提示，100个样本）和T2I-CompBench四个多区域类别（1200张图像，六种对比方法）上评估，Golden RPG在每个类别上获得最高跨区域一致性分数，CLIP-Score和CLIP-IQA与最强基线持平。
limitations: 仅基于SDXL，可能不直接迁移到其他扩散架构。
区域数量固定，可能难以处理动态数量的子提示。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域感知噪声预测器Golden RPG，通过FiLM适配器和区域交叉注意力提升组合式文本到图像生成的提示保真度。

papers.title: Faithfulness-QA: A Counterfactual Entity Substitution Dataset for Training Context-Faithful RAG Models
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models frequently produce answers grounded in parametric memory rather than the retrieved context, undermining the core promise of retrieval augmentation. A fundamental obstacle to fixing this unfaithfulness is the lack of training data that explicitly requires models to prefer context over internal knowledge. We introduce Faithfulness-QA, a large-scale dataset of 99,094 samples constructed through counterfactual entity substitution. Starting from two established extractive QA benchmarks--SQuAD and TriviaQA--we automatically identify answer-bearing named entities in each context, replace them with type-consistent alternatives drawn from a curated bank of 76,953 entities, and thereby manufacture controlled knowledge conflicts between context and parametric memory. Rigorous quality filtering ensures 100% pass rates across four automated checks on random 200-sample audits. We release the full dataset, the construction pipeline, and a typed entity bank covering eight named entity categories. Faithfulness-QA is designed as a training resource for attention-based faithfulness objectives and as an evaluation benchmark for measuring context-grounding behavior in RAG systems. Data and code are available at https://github.com/qzhangFDU/faithfulness-qa-dataset.

analysis.tldr: 通过反事实实体替换构建大规模数据集，训练RAG模型优先依赖检索上下文而非参数记忆。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG模型常依赖参数记忆而非检索上下文生成答案，违背检索增强的核心目标，但缺乏明确要求模型优先使用上下文的训练数据。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模训练数据来强制RAG模型在上下文与内部知识冲突时优先选择上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RAG模型倾向于依赖参数记忆，导致生成结果与检索上下文不一致。
analysis.method: 通过反事实实体替换构建数据集：从SQuAD和TriviaQA中识别答案实体，替换为类型一致的替代实体，制造上下文与参数记忆的冲突。
contributions: 构建了包含99,094样本的Faithfulness-QA数据集，用于训练上下文忠实RAG模型。
提供了构建流程、类型实体库（76,953实体，8类）及严格质量过滤（随机200样本审计100%通过）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅基于英文抽取式QA，可能不覆盖生成式或对话场景。
反事实替换可能引入不自然或语义偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过反事实实体替换构建大规模数据集，训练RAG模型优先依赖检索上下文而非参数记忆。

papers.title: Rapid tracking through strongly scattering media with physics-informed neuromorphic speckle analysis
papers.abstract: This work addresses the critical problem of tracking fast-moving objects through strongly scattering media in a low-light environment. Different from existing approaches that use frame-based cameras with fixed exposure times, which trade off signal-to-noise ratio for temporal resolution, we introduce computational neuromorphic tracking (CNT), a physics-informed framework that combines asynchronous event sensing with task-driven speckle analysis for robust motion estimation. We formulate the neuromorphic speckle aggregation as a spatiotemporal speckle representation, jointly optimizing the temporal and spatial parameters to maximize tracking stability under extreme conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables robust motion tracking of 10x faster motion and under 10x dimmer illumination compared to conventional systems. These improvements significantly broaden the operational regime for tracking through scattering media, providing an efficient and scalable solution for demanding scenarios involving rapid motion and low-light conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息神经形态散斑分析框架，实现强散射介质中快速运动物体的鲁棒跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于帧相机的跟踪方法在低光环境下需在信噪比和时间分辨率之间权衡，难以同时实现快速运动和弱光条件下的鲁棒跟踪。
analysis.problem: 强散射介质中快速运动物体在低光环境下的鲁棒跟踪问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出计算神经形态跟踪（CNT）框架，结合异步事件传感与任务驱动散斑分析，将神经形态散斑聚合建模为时空散斑表示，联合优化时空参数以最大化极端条件下的跟踪稳定性。
contributions: 提出物理信息神经形态散斑分析框架，实现强散射介质中快速运动物体的鲁棒跟踪。
在10倍更快运动和10倍更暗光照条件下验证了方法的有效性，显著拓宽了散射介质跟踪的工作范围。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对特定散射介质或运动模式敏感。
实际部署中事件相机的硬件成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理信息神经形态散斑分析框架，实现强散射介质中快速运动物体的鲁棒跟踪。

papers.title: QFlash: Bridging Quantization and Memory Efficiency in Vision Transformer Attention
papers.abstract: FlashAttention improves efficiency through tiling, but its online softmax still relies on floating-point arithmetic for numerical stability, making full quantization difficult. We identify three main obstacles to integer-only FlashAttention: (1) scale explosion during tile-wise accumulation, (2) inefficient shift-based exponential operations on GPUs, and (3) quantization granularity constraints requiring uniform scales for integer comparison. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{QFlash}, an end-to-end integer FlashAttention design that performs softmax entirely in the integer domain and runs as a single Triton kernel. On seven attention workloads from ViT, DeiT, and Swin models, QFlash achieves up to 6.73$\times$ speedup over I-ViT and up to 8.69$\times$ speedup on Swin, while reducing energy consumption by 18.8\% compared to FP16 FlashAttention, without sacrificing Top-1 accuracy on ViT/DeiT and remaining competitive on Swin under per-tensor quantization. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/EfficientCompLab/qflash.

analysis.tldr: 提出全整数FlashAttention设计QFlash，在ViT等模型上实现数倍加速并降低能耗。
analysis.research_motivation: FlashAttention通过分块提升效率，但其在线softmax依赖浮点运算以保证数值稳定性，导致难以实现全量化，限制了在低精度硬件上的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个完全基于整数运算的FlashAttention，克服分块累加中的尺度爆炸、GPU上低效的移位指数运算以及量化粒度约束等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出三个主要障碍：分块累加时尺度爆炸、GPU上移位指数运算效率低、整数比较需要统一量化尺度。
analysis.method: 提出QFlash，一种端到端整数FlashAttention设计，将softmax完全在整数域中执行，并作为单个Triton内核运行。
contributions: 识别并解决了全整数FlashAttention的三个主要障碍。
提出QFlash，实现全整数softmax和单Triton内核的高效执行。
在多个ViT变体上取得显著加速和能耗降低，同时保持精度。
analysis.experiments: 在ViT、DeiT和Swin模型的七个注意力负载上测试，QFlash相比I-ViT最高加速6.73倍，相比FP16 FlashAttention能耗降低18.8%，在ViT/DeiT上Top-1精度无损，Swin上在per-tensor量化下保持竞争力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定量化设置（per-tensor），其他量化粒度未验证。
在Swin模型上精度略有下降，可能需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全整数FlashAttention设计QFlash，在ViT等模型上实现数倍加速并降低能耗。

papers.title: DenseScout: Algorithm-System Co-design for Budgeted Tiny Object Selection on Edge Platforms
papers.abstract: Deploying tiny object perception on edge platforms is challenging because practical systems must satisfy both strict compute budgets and end-to-end latency constraints. A common strategy is to first select a small number of candidate patches from a high-resolution image and then apply downstream processing only to the selected regions. However, existing detector-based frontends are not well aligned with this setting: strong offline detection accuracy does not necessarily yield effective low-budget patch prioritization, nor does it guarantee usable performance once transport and inference delays are considered. In this work, we study budgeted tiny object selection on edge platforms from a joint algorithm--system perspective. We present DenseScout, a lightweight dense-response selector with only 1.01M parameters, which directly ranks candidate patch locations from a high-resolution scene via a lightweight proxy input and is better aligned with low-budget tiny-object prioritization than detector-style frontends. To bridge offline selector quality and deployable utility, we further develop a transport-aware runtime realization on heterogeneous edge devices and adopt QoS-constrained recall, which counts a target as successfully perceived only if it is covered by the selected regions and the end-to-end processing finishes before the deadline. Experiments show that DenseScout consistently outperforms detector-based baselines in offline budgeted patch-selection evaluation, especially in low-budget regimes, while cross-platform results on RK3588 and Jetson Orin NX show that deployable performance depends jointly on selector quality and runtime realization efficiency. These results suggest that edge tiny object perception should be optimized as an algorithm--system co-design problem rather than as isolated model selection.

analysis.tldr: 提出算法-系统协同设计的轻量级密集响应选择器DenseScout，用于边缘平台上的预算受限微小目标选择。
analysis.research_motivation: 在边缘平台上部署微小目标感知面临严格的计算预算和端到端延迟约束，现有基于检测器的前端在低预算补丁优先级排序和考虑传输与推理延迟后的可用性能方面表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何从高分辨率图像中高效选择少量候选补丁，使得在边缘平台的低预算和延迟约束下，微小目标选择性能最优。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，强离线检测精度并不一定能带来有效的低预算补丁优先级排序，也不保证考虑传输和推理延迟后的可用性能。
analysis.method: 提出DenseScout，一种轻量级密集响应选择器（仅1.01M参数），通过轻量级代理输入直接对候选补丁位置进行排序，并在异构边缘设备上实现传输感知的运行时实现，采用QoS约束的召回率指标。
contributions: 从算法-系统协同角度研究边缘平台上的预算受限微小目标选择问题。
提出DenseScout轻量级密集响应选择器，在低预算下优于基于检测器的基线。
开发传输感知的运行时实现，并引入QoS约束的召回率指标，桥接离线选择器质量和可部署效用。
analysis.experiments: 在RK3588和Jetson Orin NX平台上进行跨平台实验，显示可部署性能取决于选择器质量和运行时实现效率。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的微小目标场景。
未讨论与其他前端选择方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出算法-系统协同设计的轻量级密集响应选择器DenseScout，用于边缘平台上的预算受限微小目标选择。

papers.title: The Thinking Pixel: Recursive Sparse Reasoning in Multimodal Diffusion Latents
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have achieved success in high-fidelity data synthesis, yet their capacity for more complex, structured reasoning like text following tasks remains constrained. While advances in language models have leveraged strategies such as latent reasoning and recursion to enhance text understanding capabilities, extending these to multimodal text-to-image generation tasks is challenging due to the continuous and non-discrete nature of visual tokens. To tackle this problem, we draw inspiration from modular human cognition and propose a recursive, sparse mixture-of-experts framework integrated into conventional diffusion models. Our approach introduces a recursive component within joint attention layers that iteratively refines visual tokens over multiple latent steps while efficiently sharing parameters via sparse selection of neural modules. At each step, a gating network is devised to dynamically select specialized neural modules, conditioned on the current visual tokens, the diffusion timestep, and the conditioning information. Comprehensive evaluation on class-conditioned ImageNet image generation tasks and additional studies on the GenEval and DPG benchmark demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method in enhancing model image generation performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出递归稀疏专家混合框架，在扩散模型潜空间中迭代细化视觉token以增强文本到图像生成中的结构化推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在高保真数据合成上表现优异，但在复杂结构化推理（如文本遵循任务）上能力有限；语言模型通过潜推理和递归策略提升了文本理解，但多模态文本到图像生成中视觉token的连续非离散性质使得直接扩展这些策略具有挑战性。
analysis.problem: 如何将递归推理和稀疏专家混合机制有效集成到扩散模型中，以提升其在文本到图像生成任务中的结构化推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出递归稀疏专家混合框架，在联合注意力层中引入递归组件，通过稀疏选择神经模块在多个潜步骤中迭代细化视觉token；每个步骤中，门控网络根据当前视觉token、扩散时间步和条件信息动态选择专用神经模块。
contributions: 提出一种递归稀疏专家混合框架，将递归推理机制集成到扩散模型中。
设计基于门控网络的动态稀疏模块选择策略，实现参数高效共享。
在类条件ImageNet图像生成、GenEval和DPG基准上验证了方法在提升图像生成性能上的优越性。
analysis.experiments: 在类条件ImageNet图像生成任务以及GenEval和DPG基准上进行了综合评估，结果表明所提方法在提升模型图像生成性能方面具有优越性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的扩散模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
递归稀疏推理可能增加计算开销，实际部署效率待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出递归稀疏专家混合框架，在扩散模型潜空间中迭代细化视觉token以增强文本到图像生成中的结构化推理能力。

papers.title: LegalMidm: Use-Case-Driven Legal Domain Specialization for Korean Large Language Model
papers.abstract: In recent years, the rapid proliferation of open-source large language models (LLMs) has spurred efforts to turn general-purpose models into domain specialists. However, many domain-specialized LLMs are developed using datasets and training protocols that are not aligned with the nuanced requirements of real-world applications. In the legal domain, where precision and reliability are essential, this lack of consideration limits practical utility. In this study, we propose a systematic training framework grounded in the practical needs of the legal domain, with a focus on Korean law. We introduce LegalMidm, a Korean legal-domain LLM, and present a methodology for constructing high-quality, use-case-driven legal datasets and optimized training pipelines. Our approach emphasizes collaboration with legal professionals and rigorous data curation to ensure relevance and factual accuracy, and demonstrates effectiveness in key legal tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向韩国法律领域的LLM LegalMidm，通过用例驱动数据构建和优化训练流程提升法律任务效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用LLM在法律领域缺乏精度和可靠性，现有领域专用模型未充分考虑实际应用需求，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建符合韩国法律领域实际需求的高质量数据集和训练框架，以提升LLM在法律任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出用例驱动的法律数据集构建方法和优化训练流程，强调与法律专业人士合作及严格数据筛选。
contributions: 提出LegalMidm，一个韩国法律领域专用LLM
设计用例驱动的法律数据集构建和训练框架
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对韩国法律，可能不适用于其他司法管辖区
未提供定量实验评估
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向韩国法律领域的LLM LegalMidm，通过用例驱动数据构建和优化训练流程提升法律任务效果。

papers.title: Exploring Time Conditioning in Diffusion Generative Models from Disjoint Noisy Data Manifolds
papers.abstract: Practically, training diffusion models typically requires explicit time conditioning to guide the network through the denoising sampling process. Especially in deterministic methods like DDIM, the absence of time conditioning leads to significant performance degradation. However, other deterministic sampling approaches, such as flow matching, can generate high-quality content without this conditioning, raising the question of its necessity. In this work, we revisit the role of time conditioning from a geometric perspective. We analyze the evolution of noisy data distributions under the forward diffusion process and demonstrate that, in high-dimensional spaces, these distributions concentrate on low-dimensional hyper-cylinder-like manifolds embedded within the input space. Successful generation, we argue, stems from the disentanglement of these manifolds in high-dimensional space. Based on this insight, we modify the forward process of DDIM to align the noisy data manifold with the flow-matching approach, proving that DDIM can generate high-quality content without time conditioning, provided the noisy manifold evolves according to the flow-matching method. Additionally, we extend our framework to class-conditioned generation by decoupling classes into distinct time spaces, enabling class-conditioned synthesis with a class-unconditional denoising model. Extensive experiments validate our theoretical analysis and show that high-quality generation is achievable without explicit conditional embeddings.

analysis.tldr: 从几何角度重新审视扩散模型中的时间条件，证明DDIM无需时间条件也能生成高质量内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型通常需要显式时间条件来引导去噪过程，但流匹配等方法无需时间条件也能生成高质量内容，这引发了对时间条件必要性的疑问。
analysis.problem: 探究扩散模型中时间条件的必要性，并尝试在DDIM中去除时间条件而不降低生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在高维空间中，前向扩散过程中的噪声数据分布集中在低维超圆柱流形上，成功生成源于这些流形在高维空间中的解缠。
analysis.method: 修改DDIM的前向过程，使其噪声数据流形与流匹配方法对齐，从而无需时间条件；并扩展至类别条件生成，通过将不同类别解耦到不同时间空间。
contributions: 从几何角度分析了时间条件的作用，揭示了噪声数据流形的解缠是成功生成的关键。
证明了DDIM在无需时间条件的情况下也能生成高质量内容，前提是噪声流形按流匹配方式演化。
提出了一种无需类别条件去噪模型的类别条件生成框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于确定性采样方法如DDIM，对随机采样方法的适用性未知。
类别条件生成中时间空间的解耦可能引入额外的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从几何角度重新审视扩散模型中的时间条件，证明DDIM无需时间条件也能生成高质量内容。

papers.title: OmniVTG: A Large-Scale Dataset and Training Paradigm for Open-World Video Temporal Grounding
papers.abstract: Video Temporal Grounding (VTG), the task of localizing video segments from text queries, struggles in open-world settings due to limited dataset scale and semantic diversity, causing performance gaps between common and rare concepts. To overcome these limitations, we introduce OmniVTG, a new large-scale dataset for open-world VTG, coupled with a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm designed to enhance the grounding capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our OmniVTG is constructed via a novel Semantic Coverage Iterative Expansion pipeline, which first identifies gaps in the vocabulary of existing datasets and collects videos that are highly likely to contain these target concepts. For high-quality annotation, we leverage the insight that modern MLLMs excel at dense captioning more than direct grounding and design a caption-centric data engine to prompt MLLMs to generate dense, timestamped descriptions. Beyond the dataset, we observe that simple supervised finetuning (SFT) is insufficient, as a performance gap between rare and common concepts still persists. We find that MLLMs' video understanding ability significantly surpasses their direct grounding ability. Based on this, we propose a Self-Correction Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training paradigm. We train the MLLM to first predict, then use its understanding capabilities to reflect on and refine its own predictions. This capability is instilled via a three-stage pipeline of SFT, CoT finetuning, and reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments show our approach not only excels at open-world grounding in our OmniVTG dataset but also achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot performance on four existing VTG benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/oceanflowlab/OmniVTG.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模开放世界视频时序定位数据集OmniVTG和自校正思维链训练范式，显著提升MLLM在开放场景下的定位能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时序定位数据集规模小、语义多样性不足，导致模型在开放世界中常见与罕见概念间存在性能差距，亟需大规模、高覆盖的数据集和更有效的训练方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建大规模、语义覆盖广的开放世界视频时序定位数据集，并设计训练范式以弥合MLLM在常见与罕见概念间的性能差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到MLLM的视频理解能力显著优于其直接定位能力，且简单监督微调无法消除罕见与常见概念间的性能差距。
analysis.method: 提出OmniVTG数据集（通过语义覆盖迭代扩展管道构建，并利用MLLM密集字幕生成能力进行标注）和自校正思维链训练范式（三阶段：SFT、CoT微调、强化学习，让模型先预测再反思修正）。
contributions: 构建了OmniVTG，一个大规模开放世界视频时序定位数据集，具有高语义覆盖和高质量密集时间戳描述。
提出了自校正思维链训练范式，利用MLLM的理解能力反思和修正自身预测，显著提升开放世界定位性能。
在OmniVTG和四个现有基准上取得最先进零样本性能。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniVTG数据集和四个现有VTG基准上进行零样本评估，取得最先进结果。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 数据集构建依赖MLLM生成标注，可能存在标注噪声。
自校正训练范式计算开销较大，可能影响训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模开放世界视频时序定位数据集OmniVTG和自校正思维链训练范式，显著提升MLLM在开放场景下的定位能力。

papers.title: Spectral bandits
papers.abstract: Smooth functions on graphs have wide applications in manifold and semi-supervised learning. In this work, we study a bandit problem where the payoffs of arms are smooth on a graph. This framework is suitable for solving online learning problems that involve graphs, such as content-based recommendation. In this problem, each item we can recommend is a node of an undirected graph and its expected rating is similar to the one of its neighbors. The goal is to recommend items that have high expected ratings. We aim for the algorithms where the cumulative regret with respect to the optimal policy would not scale poorly with the number of nodes. In particular, we introduce the notion of an effective dimension, which is small in real-world graphs, and propose three algorithms for solving our problem that scale linearly and sublinearly in this dimension. Our experiments on content recommendation problem show that a good estimator of user preferences for thousands of items can be learned from just tens of node evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 将图平滑性假设引入在线学习，提出有效维度概念并设计线性/次线性遗憾算法，仅需少量节点评估即可学习用户偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: 图上的光滑函数在半监督学习中有广泛应用，但现有在线学习算法在处理图结构时，累积遗憾会随节点数增加而急剧增长，难以应用于大规模图推荐场景。
analysis.problem: 解决臂的期望收益在图结构上光滑的在线学习问题，目标是设计算法使累积遗憾不随节点数增加而显著增长。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入有效维度概念，该维度在真实世界图中很小；提出三种算法，其遗憾在该维度上呈线性或次线性增长。
contributions: 提出图光滑臂的在线学习框架，并定义有效维度以刻画问题复杂度。
设计三种遗憾与有效维度线性或次线性相关的算法。
analysis.experiments: 在内容推荐问题上，仅需数十次节点评估即可学习数千个物品的用户偏好估计器。
limitations: 有效维度的计算可能依赖于图结构假设。
实验仅涉及内容推荐，未验证其他图应用场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将图平滑性假设引入在线学习，提出有效维度概念并设计线性/次线性遗憾算法，仅需少量节点评估即可学习用户偏好。

papers.title: Combating Visual Neglect and Semantic Drift in Large Multimodal Models for Enhanced Cross-Modal Retrieval
papers.abstract: Despite significant progress in Unified Multimodal Retrieval (UMR) powered by Large Multimodal Models (LMMs), existing embedding methods primarily focus on sample-level objectives via contrastive learning while overlooking the crucial subject-level semantics. This limitation hinders the model's ability to group semantically coherent subjects in complex multimodal queries, manifesting as semantic alignment deviation--where models fail to accurately localize salient text-referred regions in visual content. Moreover, without explicit guidance to model salient visual subjects, LMMs tend to over-rely on textual cues, resulting in visual modality neglect and suboptimal utilization of visual knowledge. To this end, we propose Salient Subject-Aware Multimodal Embedding (SSA-ME), a novel framework designed to enhance fine-grained representation learning through saliency-aware modeling. SSA-ME leverages LMMs and visual experts to identify and emphasize salient visual concepts in image-text pairs, and introduces a saliency-guided objective to better align cross-modal attention with semantically meaningful regions. Additionally, a feature regeneration module recalibrates visual features based on the derived saliency maps, ensuring a balanced and semantically coherent integration across modalities. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MMEB benchmark, demonstrating that incorporating subject-level modeling substantially improves multimodal retrieval. Comprehensive qualitative analyses further illustrate the interpretability and effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出SSA-ME框架，通过显著性感知建模增强多模态检索中的细粒度表征，解决视觉忽视和语义漂移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态检索方法主要关注样本级对比学习，忽略了主体级语义，导致模型在复杂查询中难以对齐文本相关的视觉区域，且过度依赖文本线索而忽视视觉模态。
analysis.problem: 多模态检索中模型存在语义对齐偏差和视觉模态忽视，无法有效利用视觉知识进行细粒度表征学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型在复杂多模态查询中无法准确定位文本所指的视觉区域（语义对齐偏差），且缺乏对显著视觉主体的显式建模导致视觉模态被忽视。
analysis.method: 提出SSA-ME框架，利用LMM和视觉专家识别图像-文本对中的显著视觉概念，引入显著性引导目标对齐跨模态注意力，并通过特征再生模块基于显著性图重新校准视觉特征。
contributions: 提出显著性感知的多模态嵌入框架SSA-ME，增强细粒度表征学习。
引入显著性引导目标和特征再生模块，缓解视觉忽视和语义漂移。
在MMEB基准上取得最先进性能，并通过定性分析展示可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在MMEB基准上进行实验，取得最先进性能，并进行了全面的定性分析。
limitations: 可能依赖外部视觉专家模型，增加计算开销。
显著性引导可能对噪声标注敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SSA-ME框架，通过显著性感知建模增强多模态检索中的细粒度表征，解决视觉忽视和语义漂移问题。

papers.title: Dynamic UGV-UAV Cooperative Path Planning in Uncertain Environments
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the Dynamic UGV-UAV Cooperative Path Planning (DUCPP) problem involving one unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) assisted by one or more unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating on an uncertain road network with potentially impassable edges. DUCPP is particularly relevant for scenarios such as disaster response, emergency supply transport, and rescue operations, where a UGV must reach a specified destination in the presence of partially unknown road conditions. To enable the UGV to travel safely and efficiently to its destination, the UAV(s) dynamically inspect edges in the environment to identify and prune damaged or impassable edges from consideration. We present multiple strategies, including a bidirectional approach, to optimize UGV-UAV cooperation for finding a safe path in an uncertain road network. Furthermore, we explore the impact of using multiple UAVs on reducing the UGV's travel time, and evaluate the associated computation time. The proposed strategies are implemented and evaluated on 100 urban road networks. The results demonstrate that the bidirectional strategy achieves the best performance in most instances, and using multiple UAVs further reduces UGV travel time at the expense of increased computation time. This paper presents a robust framework for DUCPP to achieve efficient UGV-UAV cooperation for path planning and inspection, offering practical solutions for navigation in challenging and uncertain conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出双向搜索策略解决不确定环境下UGV-UAV协同路径规划问题，多无人机可减少UGV行驶时间但增加计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 在灾害响应、紧急物资运输等场景中，地面车辆（UGV）需要在部分未知路况下安全高效到达目的地，而无人机（UAV）可辅助探测路况，但现有方法缺乏对动态不确定性和多机协同的优化。
analysis.problem: 动态不确定道路网络中，UGV借助UAV探测不可通行边，协同规划安全路径并最小化行驶时间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 双向搜索策略在多数实例中表现最佳；多无人机可减少UGV行驶时间，但计算时间随之增加。
analysis.method: 提出多种协同策略（包括双向搜索），UAV动态检测并剪除受损或不可通行边，UGV基于更新后的路网规划路径。
contributions: 形式化定义了动态UGV-UAV协同路径规划问题（DUCPP），并提出了多种协同策略。
在100个城市道路网络上验证了双向策略的有效性，并分析了多无人机对行驶时间和计算时间的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在100个城市道路网络上评估，结果显示双向策略性能最优，多无人机减少UGV行驶时间但增加计算时间。
limitations: 未考虑UAV续航限制和通信延迟。
实验仅基于合成城市路网，未在真实环境中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双向搜索策略解决不确定环境下UGV-UAV协同路径规划问题，多无人机可减少UGV行驶时间但增加计算开销。

papers.title: AutoResearchBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Complex Scientific Literature Discovery
papers.abstract: Autonomous scientific research is significantly advanced thanks to the development of AI agents. One key step in this process is finding the right scientific literature, whether to explore existing knowledge for a research problem, or to acquire evidence for verifying assumptions and supporting claims. To assess AI agents' capability in driving this process, we present AutoResearchBench, a dedicated benchmark for autonomous scientific literature discovery. AutoResearchBench consists of two complementary task types: (1) Deep Research, which requires tracking down a specific target paper through a progressive, multi-step probing process, and (2) Wide Research, which requires comprehensively collecting a set of papers satisfying given conditions. Compared to previous benchmarks on agentic web browsing, AutoResearchBench is distinguished along three dimensions: it is research-oriented, calling for in-depth comprehension of scientific concepts; literature-focused, demanding fine-grained utilization of detailed information; and open-ended, involving an unknown number of qualified papers and thus requiring deliberate reasoning and search throughout. These properties make AutoResearchBench uniquely suited for evaluating autonomous research capabilities, and extraordinarily challenging. Even the most powerful LLMs, despite having largely conquered general agentic web-browsing benchmarks such as BrowseComp, achieve only 9.39% accuracy on Deep Research and 9.31% IoU on Wide Research, while many other strong baselines fall below 5%. We publicly release the dataset and evaluation pipeline to facilitate future research in this direction. We publicly release the dataset, evaluation pipeline, and code at https://github.com/CherYou/AutoResearchBench.

analysis.tldr: 提出AutoResearchBench基准，用于评估AI代理在科学文献发现中的能力，包含深度研究和广泛研究两类任务，现有最强LLM准确率不足10%。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主科学研究中，AI代理需要高效发现相关科学文献，但现有基准缺乏对研究导向、文献聚焦和开放搜索能力的评估。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够全面评估AI代理在复杂科学文献发现中自主研究能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含深度研究（多步追踪特定论文）和广泛研究（收集满足条件论文集）两类任务的基准，并公开数据集和评估流程。
contributions: 提出AutoResearchBench，首个专注于自主科学文献发现的基准，包含深度研究和广泛研究两种互补任务。
实验表明最强LLM在该基准上表现极差（准确率<10%），凸显其挑战性。
公开数据集、评估流程和代码以促进后续研究。
analysis.experiments: 在多个LLM上评估，最强模型在深度研究任务上准确率9.39%，广泛研究任务上IoU 9.31%，多数基线低于5%。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有科学领域或文献类型。
评估指标可能无法完全反映实际研究中的复杂需求。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AutoResearchBench基准，用于评估AI代理在科学文献发现中的能力，包含深度研究和广泛研究两类任务，现有最强LLM准确率不足10%。

papers.title: Personalized Cross-Modal Emotional Correlation Learning for Speech-Preserving Facial Expression Manipulation
papers.abstract: Speech-preserving facial expression manipulation (SPFEM) aims to enhance human expressiveness without altering mouth movements tied to the original speech. A primary challenge in this domain is the scarcity of paired data, namely aligned frames of the same individual with identical speech but different expressions, which impedes direct supervision for emotional manipulation. While current Visual-Language Models (VLMs) can extract aligned visual and semantic features, making them a promising source of supervision, their direct application is limited. To this end, we propose a Personalized Cross-Modal Emotional Correlation Learning (PCMECL) algorithm that refines VLM-based supervision through two major improvements. First, standard VLMs rely on a single generic prompt for each emotion, failing to capture expressive variations among individuals. PCMECL addresses this limitation by conditioning on individual visual information to learn personalized prompts, thereby establishing more fine-grained visual-semantic correlations. Second, even with personalization, inherent discrepancies persist between the visual and semantic feature distributions. To bridge this modality gap, PCMECL employs feature differencing to correlate the modalities, providing more precisely aligned supervision by matching the change in visual features to the change in semantic features. As a plug-and-play module, PCMECL can be seamlessly integrated into existing SPFEM models. Extensive experiments across various datasets demonstrate the superior efficacy of our algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 提出个性化跨模态情感关联学习（PCMECL）以改进VLM监督，用于保留语音的面部表情操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 保留语音的面部表情操控（SPFEM）中配对数据稀缺，现有VLM监督因通用提示和模态差异而受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLM提供更精确的监督信号，实现个性化且跨模态对齐的情感操控。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准VLM使用单一通用提示无法捕捉个体间表情差异，且视觉与语义特征分布存在固有差异。
analysis.method: PCMECL：1）基于个体视觉信息学习个性化提示；2）通过特征差分对齐视觉与语义特征变化。
contributions: 提出个性化提示学习以建立细粒度视觉-语义关联
提出特征差分方法弥合模态差异，提供更精确对齐的监督
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的初始质量
个性化提示可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出个性化跨模态情感关联学习（PCMECL）以改进VLM监督，用于保留语音的面部表情操控。

papers.title: Below-Chance Blindness: Prompted Underperformance in Small LLMs Produces Positional Bias Rather than Answer Avoidance
papers.abstract: Detecting sandbagging--the deliberate underperformance on capability evaluations--is an open problem in AI safety. We tested whether symptom validity testing (SVT) logic from clinical malingering detection could identify sandbagging through below-chance performance (BCB) on forced-choice items. In a pre-registered pilot at the 7-9 billion parameter instruction-tuned scale (3 models, 4 MMLU-Pro domains, 4 conditions, 500 items per cell, 24,000 total trials), the plausibility gate failed. Zero of 12 model-domain cells showed significant below-chance performance under sandbagging instruction. Exploratory analyses revealed three qualitatively distinct failure modes. Qwen-2.5-7B and Phi-3.5-mini largely ignored the sandbagging instruction, with 62-88% response identity with the honest baseline. Llama-3-8B complied substantially but implemented underperformance as a positional heuristic, collapsing its response distribution onto middle-alphabet options (E at 31.8%, F at 26.1%) regardless of where the correct answer fell. This produced accuracy boosts of up to 33 percentage points when the correct answer coincidentally occupied the model's preferred position. An explicit anti-task instruction ("pick the least likely answer") drove two of three models below chance, with accuracy as low as 0.024. The capability for answer-aware avoidance therefore exists but is not activated by "deliberately underperform." BCB did not fail as a logical marker of answer-aware avoidance. It was not observed in this regime because the model showing the largest behavioural shift exhibited behaviour consistent with a position-dominant response policy rather than content-aware answer avoidance. We propose that positional-distribution shift may be a more effective behavioural signature than below-chance accuracy for detecting prompted underperformance at this model scale.

analysis.tldr: 小LLM在提示下表现不佳时，并非故意答错，而是产生位置偏差，导致低于随机水平的检测失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 检测LLM在能力评估中的故意低表现（sandbagging）是AI安全中的开放问题，现有方法缺乏有效的行为标记。
analysis.problem: 验证症状有效性测试（SVT）逻辑能否通过低于随机水平的表现（BCB）来识别sandbagging。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在7-9B参数模型上，sandbagging指令未导致显著低于随机水平的表现；模型表现出三种失败模式：忽略指令、位置启发式（偏向中间选项）、以及反任务指令才能触发低于随机水平。
analysis.method: 在MMLU-Pro数据集上，对3个7-9B指令微调模型进行预注册实验，比较诚实基线、sandbagging指令和反任务指令下的准确率和响应分布。
contributions: 发现小LLM在sandbagging指令下不产生低于随机水平的表现，而是产生位置偏差。
提出位置分布偏移作为检测提示下低表现的有效行为特征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了实验设置：3个模型、4个MMLU-Pro领域、4种条件、每单元500项、共24000次试验。
limitations: 仅测试了7-9B参数规模的模型，更大或更小模型可能不同。
仅使用MMLU-Pro数据集，其他任务或领域可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小LLM在提示下表现不佳时，并非故意答错，而是产生位置偏差，导致低于随机水平的检测失效。

papers.title: VLM Judges Can Rank but Cannot Score: Task-Dependent Uncertainty in Multimodal Evaluation
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used as automated judges for multimodal systems, yet their scores provide no indication of reliability. We study this problem through conformal prediction, a distribution-free framework that converts a judge's point score into a calibrated prediction interval using only score-token log-probabilities, with no retraining. We present the first systematic analysis of conformal prediction for VLM-as-a-Judge across 3 judges and 14 visual task categories. Our results show that evaluation uncertainty is strongly task-dependent: intervals cover ~40% of the score range for aesthetics and natural images but expand to ~70% for chart and mathematical reasoning, yielding a quantitative reliability map for multimodal evaluation. We further identify a failure mode not captured by standard evaluation metrics, ranking-scoring decoupling, where judges achieve high ranking correlation while producing wide, uninformative intervals, correctly ordering responses but failing to assign reliable absolute scores. Finally, we show that interval width is driven primarily by task difficulty and annotation quality, i.e., the same judge and method yield 4.5x narrower intervals on a clean, multi-annotator captioning benchmark. Code: https://github.com/divake/VLM-Judge-Uncertainty

analysis.tldr: VLM 裁判的评分不确定性高度依赖任务类型，且存在排序-评分解耦现象。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM 作为自动裁判时，其评分缺乏可靠性指示，现有评估指标无法捕捉不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何量化 VLM 裁判的评分不确定性，并揭示其与任务类型的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估不确定性强烈依赖任务：美学和自然图像区间覆盖约 40% 分数范围，图表和数学推理则扩大到约 70%；存在排序-评分解耦，即裁判排序准确但评分区间过宽。
analysis.method: 使用共形预测（conformal prediction）将评分转化为校准的预测区间，仅需分数 token 的对数概率，无需重新训练。
contributions: 首次系统分析 VLM 作为裁判的共形预测，覆盖 3 个裁判和 14 个视觉任务类别。
发现评估不确定性强烈依赖任务类型，并绘制定量可靠性图谱。
识别排序-评分解耦这一失败模式。
揭示区间宽度主要由任务难度和标注质量驱动。
analysis.experiments: 在 3 个 VLM 裁判和 14 个视觉任务类别上进行实验，包括图表、数学推理、美学、自然图像等，并在干净的多标注字幕基准上验证。
limitations: 仅使用共形预测，未探索其他不确定性量化方法。
实验限于视觉任务，未涉及其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM 裁判的评分不确定性高度依赖任务类型，且存在排序-评分解耦现象。

papers.title: DRAGON: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Visual Reasoning over Diagrams
papers.abstract: Diagram question answering (DQA) requires models to interpret structured visual representations such as charts, maps, infographics, circuit schematics, and scientific diagrams. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) often achieve high answer accuracy on these tasks, yet correct answers do not guarantee that models ground their reasoning in the diagram regions that support the prediction. Models may instead rely on textual correlations or dataset artifacts without identifying the visual evidence required to verify the answer. This limitation prevents reliable evaluation of diagram reasoning and reduces interpretability. We introduce DRAGON, a benchmark for evaluating evidence-grounded visual reasoning in diagrams. Given a diagram, a question, and the correct answer, a model must predict bounding boxes that correspond to the visual elements required to justify the answer. These evidence regions may include answer-bearing components, textual labels, legends, axes, connectors, and other supporting structures involved in the reasoning process. The DRAGON dataset contains 11,664 annotated question instances collected from six diagram QA datasets: ChartQA, Circuit-VQA, InfographicsVQA, MapIQ, MapWise, and AI2D. We release a 2,445-instance benchmark test set with human-verified reasoning evidence annotations and a standardized evaluation framework. We evaluate eight recent VLMs and analyze their ability to localize reasoning evidence across diverse diagram domains. DRAGON enables systematic evaluation of diagram reasoning and supports future research on models that ground their predictions in visual evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出DRAGON基准，评估VLM在图表问答中是否基于视觉证据进行推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在图表问答中虽能给出正确答案，但可能依赖文本相关性或数据集伪影，而非真正基于图表区域的视觉证据进行推理，导致评估不可靠且可解释性差。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个标准化的基准来评估VLM在图表问答中定位推理所需视觉证据的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，VLM在图表问答中高准确率并不保证其推理基于正确的视觉区域，模型可能利用文本相关性或数据集伪影。
analysis.method: 构建DRAGON基准，包含从6个图表QA数据集收集的11,664个带注释的问题实例，并发布2,445个实例的测试集，要求模型预测支持答案的视觉元素边界框。
contributions: 提出DRAGON基准，用于评估图表推理中的证据定位能力。
发布包含2,445个实例的测试集和标准化评估框架。
评估了8个最新VLM，分析其在不同图表领域定位推理证据的能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖6个图表QA数据集，可能无法涵盖所有图表类型。
评估仅针对8个VLM，更多模型有待测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DRAGON基准，评估VLM在图表问答中是否基于视觉证据进行推理。

papers.title: Value-Sensitive AI for Prayer: Balancing the Agencies Between Human and AI Agents in Spiritual Context
papers.abstract: We present four conceptual value-sensitive AI systems to examine how the presence of AI could influence praying experiences. Drawing on key values and practices associated with praying identified through a diary study, we designed AI systems intended to "assist" prayer practices. These designs were presented to participants through speculative design workbooks, serving as provocations to co-reflect on how the intervention of AI systems might shape their praying experiences. Our findings suggest that a sense of authenticity (or feeling a genuine connection to the divine) is a crucial value, while the presence of AI was often perceived as diminishing this authenticity, particularly when AI assumed too much agency in guiding praying practices. Based on our findings, we argue that AI system designs for deeply value-laden experiences should preserve users' agency in shaping their own experiences by maintaining interpretive openness, perhaps by leveraging AI's inexplicability as a resource for personal meaning-making or by recognizing non-use of AI as a legitimate design choice.

analysis.tldr: 通过日记研究和推测设计工作坊，探讨AI在祷告场景中的价值敏感性，发现真实性是关键价值，AI过度介入会削弱真实性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI系统越来越多地介入人类的价值敏感活动，但如何在精神/宗教场景中设计AI以尊重用户深层价值观（如祷告的真实性）尚缺乏研究。
analysis.problem: 如何设计AI系统以在祷告等精神实践中平衡AI代理与人类代理的能动性，避免削弱用户感知的真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户认为AI过度引导祷告会降低与神圣连接的真实感；AI的不可解释性反而可能被用户用于个人意义构建。
analysis.method: 通过日记研究识别祷告中的关键价值观，设计四种概念性价值敏感AI系统，并使用推测设计工作坊作为激发物，收集用户对AI介入祷告的反思。
contributions: 识别出真实性（与神圣的真实连接）是祷告场景中的核心价值，且AI的能动性过强会损害这一价值。
提出价值敏感AI设计应保持解释开放性、利用AI的不可解释性作为意义构建资源，并认可非使用作为合法设计选择。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 研究基于小规模日记研究和设计工作坊，结论的泛化性有限。
未涉及不同宗教或文化背景下的祷告实践差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过日记研究和推测设计工作坊，探讨AI在祷告场景中的价值敏感性，发现真实性是关键价值，AI过度介入会削弱真实性。

papers.title: ValueBlindBench: Agreement-Gated Stress Testing of LLM-Judged Investment Rationales Before Returns Are Observable
papers.abstract: LLM-based financial agents increasingly produce investment rationales before the outcomes needed to evaluate them are observable. This creates a delayed-ground-truth evaluation problem: realized returns remain the eventual arbiter of investment quality, but they arrive too late and are too noisy to guide many model-development and governance decisions. LLM judges offer a tempting shortcut for pre-deployment evaluation of AI-finance systems, but unvalidated judges may reward verbosity, confidence, or rubric mimicry rather than financial judgment. This paper introduces ValueBlindBench, a preregistered agreement-gated stress-test protocol for deciding when LLM-judged investment-rationale claims are publishable, qualified, or invalid. In a controlled market-state capital-allocation prototype with 1,000 honest decision cycles and 100 preregistered adversarial controls (1,100 trajectories, 5,500 judge calls), ValueBlindBench clears the aggregate agreement gate at \(\barκ_w = 0.7168\) but prevents several overclaims. Lower-rank systems collapse into a tie-class, one rubric dimension fails the per-dimension gate (\texttt{constraint\_awareness}, \(\barκ_w = 0.2022\)), single-judge rankings are family-dependent, and terse-correct rationales receive a \(Δ= -2.81\) rubric-point penalty relative to honest rationales. A targeted anchor-specificity probe further shows that financial constructs such as constraint awareness are operationally load-bearing. The scientific object is therefore not a leaderboard and not a claim to measure true investment skill. ValueBlindBench is a pre-calibration metrology layer for AI-finance evaluation: it governs whether a proposed LLM-judge-based investment-rationale claim is stable enough, agreed enough, and uncontaminated enough to be reported at all.

analysis.tldr: 提出ValueBlindBench协议，在收益可观测前通过一致性门控测试来验证LLM对投资理由的评判是否可信。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM金融智能体在投资结果可观测前就生成投资理由，导致延迟真值评估问题；未经验证的LLM评判者可能奖励冗长、自信或模仿评分标准而非真正的金融判断。
analysis.problem: 如何在收益可观测之前，可靠地评估LLM对投资理由的评判质量，避免虚假或不可靠的评判结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：一致性门控后，低排名系统陷入平局，一个维度（约束意识）未通过门控，单一评判者排名依赖家族，简洁正确理由比诚实理由得分低2.81分。
analysis.method: ValueBlindBench：预注册的一致性门控压力测试协议，包含1000个诚实决策周期和100个对抗控制，通过加权Kappa系数聚合评判者一致性，并设置聚合门控和逐维度门控。
contributions: 提出ValueBlindBench协议，作为AI金融评估的预校准计量层，决定LLM评判的投资理由是否可发布。
通过大规模实验验证协议有效性，揭示LLM评判中的一致性问题和维度缺陷。
analysis.experiments: 在受控市场状态资本分配原型中，使用1100条轨迹、5500次评判者调用，包含1000个诚实决策和100个预注册对抗控制。
limitations: 实验基于模拟市场状态，可能不完全反映真实金融环境。
协议依赖评判者间一致性，但一致性高不一定保证评判准确。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ValueBlindBench协议，在收益可观测前通过一致性门控测试来验证LLM对投资理由的评判是否可信。

papers.title: DATAREEL: Automated Data-Driven Video Story Generation with Animations
papers.abstract: Data videos are a powerful medium for visual data based storytelling, combining animated, chart-centric visualizations with synchronized narration. Widely used in journalism, education, and public communication, they help audiences understand complex data through clear and engaging visual explanations. Despite their growing impact, generating data-driven video stories remains challenging, as it requires careful coordination of visual encoding, temporal progression, and narration and substantial expertise in visualization design, animation, and video-editing tools. Recent advances in large language models offer new opportunities to automate this process; however, there is currently no benchmark for rigorously evaluating models on animated visualization-based video storytelling. To address this gap, we introduce DataReel, a benchmark for automated data-driven video story generation comprising 328 real-world stories. Each story pairs structured data, a chart visualization, and a narration transcript, enabling systematic evaluation of models' abilities to generate animated data video stories. We further propose a multi-agent framework that decomposes the task into planning, generation, and verification stages, mirroring key aspects of the human storytelling process. Experiments show that this multi-agent approach outperforms direct prompting baselines under both automatic and human evaluations, while revealing persistent challenges in coordinating animation, narration, and visual emphasis. We release DataReel at https://github.com/vis-nlp/DataReel.

analysis.tldr: 提出DataReel基准和自动化数据视频故事生成的多智能体框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据视频在新闻、教育和公共传播中广泛应用，但生成过程需要协调视觉编码、时间推进和叙述，且依赖可视化、动画和视频编辑的专业知识，自动化生成缺乏基准和有效方法。
analysis.problem: 缺乏用于评估模型在动画可视化视频故事生成能力的基准，以及自动化生成该类型视频的有效方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多智能体方法优于直接提示基线，但在协调动画、叙述和视觉重点方面仍存在挑战。
analysis.method: 提出DataReel基准（328个真实故事，包含结构化数据、图表可视化和叙述文本），以及一个多智能体框架，将任务分解为规划、生成和验证阶段。
contributions: 构建了首个用于自动化数据驱动视频故事生成的基准DataReel，包含328个真实故事。
提出了一个多智能体框架，在自动和人工评估中均优于直接提示基线。
analysis.experiments: 在DataReel基准上进行了自动和人工评估，多智能体框架优于直接提示基线。
limitations: 基准规模有限（328个故事），可能无法覆盖所有数据视频类型。
多智能体框架在动画、叙述和视觉重点的协调上仍有改进空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DataReel基准和自动化数据视频故事生成的多智能体框架。

papers.title: When the Forger Is the Judge: GPT-Image-2 Cannot Recognize Its Own Faked Documents
papers.abstract: OpenAI's GPT-Image-2 has effectively erased the visual boundary between authentic and AI-edited document images: a single number on a receipt can be replaced in under a second for a few cents. We release AIForge-Doc v2, a paired dataset of 3,066 GPT-Image-2 document forgeries with pixel-precise masks in DocTamper-compatible format, and benchmark four lines of defence: human inspectors (N=120, n=365 pair-votes via the public 2AFC site CanUSpotAI.com), TruFor (generic forensic), DocTamper (qcf-568, document-specific), and the same GPT-Image-2 model as a zero-shot self-judge -- asked, to avoid the trivial "image is mostly real" reading, whether any region was generated or edited by an AI image model. Human 2AFC accuracy is 0.501, indistinguishable from chance: even side-by-side, inspectors cannot tell GPT-Image-2 receipt forgeries from authentic counterparts. The three computational judges sit only modestly above (TruFor 0.599, DocTamper 0.585, self-judge 0.532). The self-judge fails consistently, not by chance: across five prompt strategies and four policies for handling ambiguous responses, AUC never rises above 0.59. To rule out the possibility that the two forensic detectors are broken on our source domain rather than blind to AI inpainting, we calibrate each on a same-domain traditional-tampering set built for its training distribution: TruFor reaches AUC 0.962 on cross-camera splicing of our dataset, DocTamper reaches 0.852 on cross-document OCR-token splicing with two-pass JPEG re-encoding. Both retain near-published performance on traditional tampering; switching to GPT-Image-2 inpainting drops AUC by 0.27-0.36 (0.962->0.599 TruFor; 0.852->0.585 DocTamper), isolating a detection gap specific to GPT-Image-2 inpainting. We release the dataset, pipeline, four-judge protocol, and calibration sets.

analysis.tldr: GPT-Image-2生成的文档伪造图像难以被人类和现有检测器识别，包括其自身。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成的文档伪造图像日益逼真，对金融、法律等领域构成严重威胁，但现有检测方法在GPT-Image-2这类先进模型面前可能失效。
analysis.problem: 评估人类、通用取证检测器、文档专用检测器以及GPT-Image-2自身在识别GPT-Image-2生成的文档伪造图像方面的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类检测准确率接近随机（0.501），三种计算检测器性能仅略高于随机（AUC 0.532-0.599），且GPT-Image-2作为自判断器持续失败（AUC<0.59）。传统篡改检测器在GPT-Image-2修复任务上AUC下降0.27-0.36，表明存在针对AI修复的检测盲区。
analysis.method: 构建包含3066对GPT-Image-2伪造文档图像的数据集AIForge-Doc v2，并设计四种检测方案：人类评估（2AFC）、通用取证检测器TruFor、文档专用检测器DocTamper、以及GPT-Image-2零样本自判断。
contributions: 发布AIForge-Doc v2数据集，包含3066对GPT-Image-2伪造文档图像及像素级掩码。
系统评估人类和三种计算检测器在识别GPT-Image-2文档伪造上的性能，揭示检测盲区。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及人类2AFC准确率0.501，TruFor AUC 0.599，DocTamper AUC 0.585，自判断AUC<0.59，以及传统篡改检测的校准结果。
limitations: 仅针对GPT-Image-2模型，未评估其他AI图像生成模型。
数据集仅包含收据类文档，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GPT-Image-2生成的文档伪造图像难以被人类和现有检测器识别，包括其自身。

papers.title: DiRe-RAPIDS: Topology-faithful dimensionality reduction at scale
papers.abstract: Dimensionality reduction methods such as UMAP and t-SNE are central tools for visualising high-dimensional data, but their local-neighborhood objectives can preserve sampling noise while distorting global topology. We show that standard local metrics reward this noise memorisation: top-performing embeddings invent cycles and disconnected islands absent from the data. We introduce a topology-faithfulness benchmark based on noisy manifolds with known homology, tune DiRe against it, and find Pareto-optimal configurations that match or beat GPU-accelerated UMAP on classification while recovering exact first Betti numbers on stress tests. On 723K arXiv paper embeddings, DiRe preserves 3-4 times more topological structure than UMAP at comparable wall-clock.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种拓扑忠实降维方法DiRe，在保持分类性能的同时显著优于UMAP的拓扑结构保留能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有降维方法（如UMAP、t-SNE）的局部邻域目标会保留采样噪声并扭曲全局拓扑，导致嵌入中产生数据中不存在的虚假结构（如环、孤立岛），影响下游分析的可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模高维数据降维中同时保持分类性能和全局拓扑忠实性（如贝蒂数）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准局部度量（如kNN准确率）会奖励噪声记忆，使得高评分嵌入反而包含虚假拓扑结构（如环、孤立岛）。
analysis.method: 基于已知同调的噪声流形构建拓扑忠实性基准，并针对该基准调优DiRe（一种拓扑忠实降维方法），找到帕累托最优配置。
contributions: 揭示了标准局部度量奖励噪声记忆导致拓扑扭曲的现象
提出了基于噪声流形同调的拓扑忠实性基准
开发了DiRe方法，在分类性能匹配或超越GPU加速UMAP的同时，在压力测试中恢复精确的第一贝蒂数
在723K arXiv论文嵌入上，DiRe在相近运行时间内保留的拓扑结构是UMAP的3-4倍
analysis.experiments: 在噪声流形压力测试上验证了贝蒂数恢复能力，并在723K arXiv论文嵌入上比较了拓扑保留量和运行时间。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有已知同调结构的数据
大规模应用时计算开销仍需评估
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种拓扑忠实降维方法DiRe，在保持分类性能的同时显著优于UMAP的拓扑结构保留能力。

papers.title: Towards Seamless Lunar Mosaics: Deep Radiometric Normalization for Cross-Sensor Orbital Imagery Using Chandrayaan-2 TMC Data
papers.abstract: Radiometric inconsistencies remain a major challenge in generating seamless lunar mosaics from multi-mission orbital imagery due to variability in illumination geometry, sensor characteristics, and acquisition conditions. This paper presents a deep learning-based radiometric normalization framework for multi-mission lunar mosaics constructed primarily from ISRO's Chandrayaan-2 Terrain Mapping Camera (TMC) data, supplemented with auxiliary imagery from the SELENE (Kaguya) mission. The proposed approach employs a conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) comprising a U-Net-based generator and a PatchGAN discriminator to learn a nonlinear radiometric mapping from conventionally mosaicked lunar imagery to a photometrically consistent reference derived from LROC Wide Angle Camera (WAC) data. A patch-based training strategy with overlap-aware inference is adopted to enable scalable processing of large-area mosaics while preserving structural continuity across tile boundaries. Quantitative evaluation using Structural Similarity Index (SSIM), Peak Signal-to-Noise Ratio (PSNR), and Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) demonstrates consistent improvements over traditional histogram-based normalization techniques. The proposed framework achieves enhanced tonal uniformity, reduced seam artifacts, and improved structural coherence across multi-source lunar datasets. These results highlight the effectiveness of learning-based radiometric normalization for large-scale planetary mosaicking and demonstrate its potential for generating high-fidelity lunar surface maps from heterogeneous orbital imagery.

analysis.tldr: 用cGAN对月球轨道图像进行辐射归一化，生成无缝拼接图。
analysis.research_motivation: 多任务轨道图像因光照、传感器差异导致辐射不一致，传统方法难以生成无缝月球拼接图。
analysis.problem: 跨传感器月球轨道图像的辐射归一化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统直方图归一化方法在辐射一致性上表现不足，存在拼接伪影和结构不连续。
analysis.method: 基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），U-Net生成器+PatchGAN判别器，学习从传统拼接图像到光度一致参考（LROC WAC）的非线性映射，采用分块训练和重叠感知推理。
contributions: 提出首个基于深度学习的月球多任务图像辐射归一化框架
在Chandrayaan-2 TMC和SELENE数据上验证，定量指标优于传统方法
analysis.experiments: 使用SSIM、PSNR、RMSE评估，在月球拼接图上取得更优的色调均匀性和结构一致性。
limitations: 依赖LROC WAC参考数据，可能不适用于无参考场景
分块处理可能引入边界伪影，需进一步优化
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用cGAN对月球轨道图像进行辐射归一化，生成无缝拼接图。

papers.title: BARRED: Synthetic Training of Custom Policy Guardrails via Asymmetric Debate
papers.abstract: Deploying guardrails for custom policies remains challenging, as generic safety models fail to capture task-specific requirements, while prompting LLMs suffers from inconsistent boundary-case performance and high inference costs. Training custom classifiers achieves both accuracy and efficiency, yet demands substantial labeled data that is costly to obtain. We present BARRED (Boundary Alignment Refinement through REflection and Debate), a framework for generating faithful and diverse synthetic training data using only a task description and a small set of unlabeled examples.
